title: Middle AI Engineer (Machine Learning, LLM, Python)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Grow and advance into higher-level roles A creative and innovative work culture Competitive pay and great benefits The Job We are seeking a skilled and driven Mid-Level AI Engineer to join our AI Assistant Platform team. In this role, you will contribute to the design, development, and deployment of advanced AI systems that power next-generation intelligent features, autonomous agent services, and AI co-working capabilities. You will work alongside platform engineers, data scientists, and cloud architects to transform cutting-edge AI systems into scalable, reliable production services and deeply integrated into our core applications. Key Responsibilities Develop & Deploy Core AI Capabilities: Build scalable, production-ready services utilizing LLMs, Agentic workflows, RAG, and Model Context Protocol (MCP). Implement Observability: Design and maintain monitoring and evaluation services to supervise production models, ensuring system reliability, performance, and uptime. Backend Integration: Partner closely with platform and backend engineers to seamlessly integrate AI features and agentic workflows into the core AI Assistant platform. Optimize Infrastructure: Scale and optimize Agent infrastructure across distributed cloud environments (AWS, GCP, or Azure) to support high-throughput, low-latency inference. Lifecycle Management: Manage the end-to-end deployment lifecycle of AI services, bridging the gap between initial experimentation and robust production environments (LLMOps/MLOps). Security & Compliance: Enforce security protocols, data privacy measures, and performance best practices across all AI applications and data pipelines. Your Skills and Experience Required Skills & Qualifications Education: Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Computer/Electrical Engineering, Data Science, or a related quantitative field. Experience: 2+ years of professional experience in software engineering, AI/ML engineering, or data science with a strong, demonstrable focus on production AI. Core AI Expertise: Deep understanding of Large Language Models (LLMs), RAG techniques, Prompt Engineering, and OCR pipelines. Backend development: 2+ years of Python experience, experience with FastAPI , Redis caching. Well understanding of database design and optimization. DevOps Fundamentals: Hands-on experience with containerization using Docker . Preferred Qualifications Agentic Systems: Direct experience building and orchestrating complex autonomous agents or Multi-Agent systems (e.g., LangChain, LangGraph). Advanced RAG: Practical experience working with Vector Databases and hybrid search optimization. High-Throughput Design: Experience designing systems to handle high Concurrent Users (CCU) and heavy traffic loads. Orchestration & Cloud: Knowledge of container orchestration tools like Kubernetes and cloud AI deployment tools (e.g., AWS SageMaker, GCP Vertex AI, or Azure AI). Mindset & Engineering Culture (Good to Have) End-to-End System Design: Experience working with full-lifecycle backend systems, including handling API gateways, custom routing, and real-time streaming responses . High Ownership & Rigor: A strong sense of accountability and a commitment to thorough unit testing/self-testing before delivering code to production. Continuous Growth: A passionate self-learner who proactively keeps pace with the rapidly evolving AI landscape. Agile Mindset: Ability to thrive cross-functionally in fast-paced, Agile R&D environments and adapt quickly to emerging AI technologies. Why You'll Love Working Here Why Join Us Shape the Future of AI: Play a pivotal role in building the core AI models, agentic services, and infrastructure for a next-generation AI Assistant Platform. Work with Cutting-Edge Tech: Collaborate with a world-class team of AI researchers, data scientists, and platform engineers on the absolute frontier of AI engineering (LLMs, Multi-Agent systems, MCP). Impact at Scale: Contribute to a highly scalable, enterprise-grade architecture that powers real-time, intelligent AI experiences across industries. Culture of Innovation: Thrive in an environment that values continuous learning, high ownership, and the freedom to experiment with emerging AI technologies. What We Offer 💰 Competitive salary & performance-based bonus + 13th-month salary + holiday/Tết bonuses. 🏥 Healthcare Insurance . 💻 Modern equipment (MacBook, iPhone). 🎯 Team building, Happy Hours, dynamic and young work environment. 📚 Clear career path with opportunities for professional development.

title: DevOps Engineer (AWS, CI/CD, Python, Terraform)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us 100% salary on probation Premium PTI health care insurance 100% full 13 months salary The Job Duties and Responsibilities DevOps Engineer is responsible for improving software product delivery in the areas of provisioning, monitoring, securing, deploying, scaling, maintaining, and system hardening. A typical day in this role involves monitoring systems, supporting the project teams, and collaborating with the software development, architecture, and infrastructure teams to derive best practices for continuous improvement. This role requires an individual to be hands-on to build, setup, monitor, and maintain running systems primarily on AWS, with ability to work on on-premise or other cloud platforms. The DevOps Engineer is responsible for tasks in the following areas: Design, provision, and maintain cloud infrastructure with primary focus on AWS services including container orchestration (ECS/App Runner), serverless computing, databases, API management, and CDN solutions. Support infrastructure deployment and management across AWS, on-premise,and other cloud providers as required. Establish idempotent CI/CD pipelines using infrastructure-as-code tools (Terraform preferred) and CI/CD platforms to automate configuring, provisioning, packaging, testing, and deployment. Configure and deploy monitoring, alerting, and observability platforms to provide visibility into system health, performance, and incident management. Standardize the processes for managing, maintaining, and securing Linux-based environments to ensure consistent and timely setup, configuration, and availability. Implement security best practices including system hardening, vulnerability management, identity and access management, secrets management, and incident response for production environments. Draft and maintain detailed, up-to-date technical documentation and user guides. Participate in the troubleshooting of performance and stability issues and recommend solutions to prevent recurrence. Apply proper architecture guidelines to ensure highly available services. Your Skills and Experience Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent practical experience 2+ years of hands-on DevOps/SRE experience with production cloud infrastructure Strong experience with AWS cloud services (compute, storage, database, networking, serverless) Broad understanding of the tools and technologies within virtualization, infrastructure automation, configuration management, container concepts, observability, and Kubernetes orchestration Strong grasp of automated configuration management and Infrastructure as Code using Terraform and Ansible Prior experience establishing observability platforms including Prometheus, Grafana, and similar tools Experience building and maintaining CI/CD pipelines with modern automation platforms Strong Linux administration skills including system configuration, networking, and security hardening Proficient with troubleshooting system issues related to hardware, custom software, and packaged middleware Capable with at least one major scripting language (Bash, Python, Groovy) Strong communication in both verbal and written forms Excellent English communication Desired qualifications: AWS certification (Solutions Architect or DevOps Engineer) Hands-on experience with message streaming platforms (Kafka, RabbitMQ, AMQ) Knowledge of microservices architecture patterns Why You'll Love Working Here Salary and bonus Attractive salary; 100% salary on probation; Performance review twice a year, based on job outcomes; 13 months salary and bonus assessment yearly; Working time: Flexible working hours and location from Mondays to Fridays. Unlimited paid leave annually; Insurance, health care, and extra benefits Premium PTI health care insurance Special health benefits (50% discount on medical examination fee, 10% discount on ultrasound and procedure fees, 5% on medicine) at 2 Clinics, including: Vivision - 514 Bạch Mai Phụ Sản 1 - 329 Bạch Mai An annual medical check-u Annual company trip and holiday party and other benefits according to company policy; Free lunch at the office; drinks and snacks at the pantry; MacBook and external monitor provided for work; Working environment and development Working environment: fast-moving, young, dynamic, no-walls environment. Sports activities: football, exercise break. Training: soft skills and technical skills training. Others: free coffee/tea/cookies, parking fee, year-end party, etc… /tea/cookies, parking fee, year-end party, etc…

title: Senior AI Engineer (AIML/CV/OCR, Yolo, Python, Pytorch)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us 13th Salary; Performance bonus Premium health care for you and your family Opportunity to be on site in the USA The Job YOU You want to be an important member of a strong team of other makers who take pride in their work and support each other. As a Senior AI Engineer , you will join the AI-Powered Takeoff Team in Vietnam, collaborating closely with U.S. stakeholders and coordinating with external vendors to build an AI-driven product that transforms technical drawings (PDFs, CAD files, and blueprints) into actionable data, directly improving product performance and business efficiency. That’s year one. If career growth is important to you, we not only know how to help you with that, it’s what we love to do: PROJECT DESCRIPTION AI-Powered Takeoff is an intelligent construction TakeOff platform designed to automate material quantity takeoffs from architectural and engineering drawings. By leveraging computer vision, machine learning, and the system extracts, measures, and categorizes building components directly from digital blueprints PDF, significantly reducing manual effort, errors, and turnaround time. The objective of AI-Powered Takeoff is to: Automate quantity detection from drawings Assist with measurements (length, area, count, volume) Organize extracted quantities in structured formats Support revision comparison Reduce manual tracing effort WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING At Simpson Strong-Tie we value the individual, and the creativity that individuals can bring to the workplace. You join this company for a career, not a job! You will join the AI Engineering team within an innovative manufacturing and construction technology environment, collaborating closely with the US team to design and develop AI services that enhance product performance and deliver measurable business impact. You thrive in a cross-functional environment, working closely with product managers, AI engineers, subject matter experts (SMEs), data analysts, product engineers, and business stakeholders to deliver high-impact solutions. Design, develop, and maintain scalable end-to-end machine learning pipelines for automated vision processing Build systems for symbol detection, drawing interpretation, floor plan parsing, and quantity extraction from construction documents (PDFs, CAD exports, blueprints). Develop and fine-tune object detection and segmentation models to identify construction elements (walls, doors, windows, fixtures, framing, hardware components, etc.). Implement OCR/YOLO and document layout analysis pipelines to extract annotations, dimensions, and labels from technical drawings. Apply advanced ML techniques including transformer-based vision models and multi-label classification. Conduct model evaluation, benchmarking, hyperparameter optimization, and performance tuning. You will also be responsible for creating and optimizing core modules of the MLOps platform, from the computation layer to the orchestrator layer. Collaborate with software engineers to integrate ML models into production applications. Manage and oversee the AI vendor’s deliverables, including reviewing training approaches and datasets, and leading testing/UAT to evaluate and validate model accuracy and performance against business requirements. Your Skills and Experience If you can do everything listed above, you’ve got what it takes. Perhaps some of the following would be helpful too: 2+ years in Software Development (preferably construction tech, engineering, or document automation) 3+ years in AI/ML or Computer Vision roles Strong hands-on Python experience for image processing and CV pipelines ML & Computer Vision Expertise Design and maintain scalable end-to-end ML pipelines for automated vision processing (symbol detection, drawing interpretation, floor plan parsing, quantity extraction from PDFs/CAD/blueprints). Solid experience with OpenCV, Torchvision, YOLO, Detectron2, SAM, or similar. Proven background in Object Detection, Image Segmentation, OCR, and Document Layout Analysis (e.g., PaddleOCR, Tesseract, LayoutLM, Donut). Experience analyzing large sets of technical drawings and applying data augmentation for engineering documents. Image classification, multi-label detection, semantic & instance segmentation Transformer-based vision models (ViT, DETR, LayoutLM) Model evaluation (mAP, IoU, F1), hyperparameter tuning, model optimization Strong experience with PyTorch, TensorFlow, Scikit-learn, Pandas, Albumentations, etc. Experience with Azure/Azure ML, AWS, or GCP Other requirements (nice to have) Deploy and optimize ML systems (low-latency inference, retraining pipelines, drift monitoring) Model serving tools (TorchServe, ONNX, Triton, TF Serving) Comfortable working in Linux environments Ability to communicate technical outputs to non-technical stakeholders Strong written and spoken English Bonus: Experience with BIM (IFC/Revit), PDF parsing, GIS/spatial data, or construction/proptech domains. title: Senior Data Engineer (Python, SQL)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job About the Role You will own the pipelines that move every event, transaction, and Change Data Capture (CDC) record from our products into a ClickHouse lakehouse and back out to the tools that act on it. Concretely, you own the medallion architecture (Bronze → Silver → Gold) that turns raw events and revenue postbacks into the curated, aggregated tables that power Business Intelligence (BI), marketing attribution, and our emerging Machine Learning / Artificial Intelligence (ML/AI) workloads. This is a hands-on, end-to-end data engineering role on a modern open-source stack — not a narrow ticket-taking position. You will touch ingestion, storage, transformation, orchestration, and activation, and you will be the person who decides how a given dataset should be modeled and served. What You'll Work On Ingestion & event collection Maintain and extend event collection through RudderStack (our Customer Data Platform), PostHog, GA4, and server-side event sources across the web app and mobile apps Land raw revenue events from Stripe and Apple In-App Purchase (IAP) postbacks reliably and idempotently — billing data has zero tolerance for loss or duplication. Integration & storage Run Airbyte connectors, including Change Data Capture from internal production databases, into the AWS S3 data lake. Manage the S3 → ClickHouse load path and keep the lake organized, partitioned, and costefficient. Transformation — the medallion core Build and operate the Bronze → Silver → Gold pipelines in ClickHouse. Make correct use of ClickHouse engine families: ReplacingMergeTree for deduplicated, CDC-driven Silver tables and AggregatingMergeTree for the Gold aggregates that BI and ML consume. Model subscription-domain data — trials, conversions, Monthly Recurring Revenue (MRR), churn, Lifetime Value (LTV) — so that one number means one thing everywhere. Orchestration & reliability Author, schedule, and monitor pipelines in Apache Airflow. Build data-quality checks, freshness Service Level Agreements (SLAs), alerting, and lineage so failures are caught before stakeholders see them. Activation & reverse pipelines Sync curated data out to BigQuery and to the activation layer: ad platforms for conversion tracking (Google Ads, Meta Ads, Apple Ads, and the TikTok/Reddit Ads channels as they come online), plus Braze, Singular, and Firebase. Feed the Gold layer to AWS QuickSight dashboards and prepare clean, well-documented feature tables for ML/AI use cases. Your Skills and Experience Required 7+ years building production data pipelines, with strong, idiomatic SQL and Python. Hands-on experience with a columnar analytical warehouse — ClickHouse strongly preferred. Solid grasp of dimensional / medallion data modeling and when to denormalize, dedup, or preaggregate. Experience orchestrating pipelines with Apache Airflow. Experience with an Extract-Load-Transform (ELT) / ingestion tool — Airbyte preferred — and a working understanding of Change Data Capture. Comfort on AWS, especially S3 as a data lake. Track record of treating data quality, observability, and idempotency as first-class — not afterthoughts. Why You'll Love Working Here Full gross salary from Day 1 of Probation (2 months) Annual performance-based bonus (discretionary) Compulsory Social, Health & Unemployment Insurance from Day 1 of Probation Supplemental health insurance — Allianz / Bảo Việt MacBook provided for work 12 days paid annual leave/year, +1 day per 5 consecutive years Public holidays per Vietnamese law Training & professional development provided as needed Free parking

Có trên 2 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển Full-stack. Đã từng làm việc thực tế với ADK (Agent Development Kit). Thành thạo cả hai hệ sinh thái TypeScript và .NET. Có kinh nghiệm làm việc trong đội ngũ đa chức năng (Cross-functional team). Có kinh nghiệm với Docker, Cloud services (Azure/AWS) và Git. Why You'll Love Working Here 1. title: Junior AI Engineer - LLM (Python, Machine Learning)
company: TRUONG MINH THINH TECHNOLOGY JOINT STOCK COMPANY
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Mức lương cạnh tranh theo năng lực Cập nhật áp dụng công nghệ mới theo xu hướng Môi trường trẻ, năng động, nhiều cơ hội phát triển The Job TMT is a pioneer in providing Software-as-a-Service (SaaS) technology solutions in Vietnam. Trusted by over 30,000 customers, TMT leads the way in applying technology to SME and E-commerce sectors through software products such as TPOS, TDental, and more, helping clients manage and optimize their business operations. Currently, TMT is looking for an AI Engineer - LLM to collaborate directly with the AI Team as well as TMT's product development team on upcoming software development projects. Job Summary: The Junior LLM Engineer is responsible for data quality operations, monitoring SOTA research, maintaining the Knowledge Store, optimizing LLM performance, and building demos/MVPs to ensure data quality, continuous technical updates, and model excellence in accordance with product requirements. Key Responsibilities: - Execute data cleaning, deduplication, and quality filtering within the automated data pipeline. - Implement and maintain data quality validation rules and quality gates (Senior design, Junior implement). - Support data annotation workflow operations (Senior owns system design). - Track and document open-source models and the latest research papers (LLM, VLM, Multimodal LM). - Run standard benchmark comparisons for new models (Senior defines benchmarks, Junior executes). - Execute LoRA/QLoRA fine-tuning for task agents (Senior defines strategy, Junior owns execution). - Build training and test datasets for tasks (Senior defines requirements, Junior owns dataset creation). - Tune and optimize model parameters and hyperparameters for optimal product performance (deployment configurations are owned by Senior). - Build web apps/demos/MVPs to showcase LLM capabilities. - Utilize AI Coding Agents (Claude Code, Cursor) for rapid frontend component development. - Integrate demo applications with LLM APIs (inference endpoints, model serving). Your Skills and Experience 1. Required Qualifications - Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Data Science, AI, or a related field. - 1+ year of experience in an AI Engineer - LLM role. - Solid foundation in Python programming. - Basic understanding of Machine Learning concepts, data structures, algorithms, REST APIs, and databases (SQL/NoSQL) . - Basic knowledge of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript . 2. Key Skills Required - Interest in reading research papers and technical documentation. - Familiarity with or willingness to learn AI Coding Agents (Claude Code, Cursor). - Good communication skills (Vietnamese + basic English). 3. Preferred Qualifications - Basic knowledge of UI frameworks (React, Vue, Svelte, etc.). - Experience with data quality tools and validation frameworks. - Experience building web demos or MVPs (any framework). - Understanding of the Hugging Face ecosystem (Transformers, Datasets, Evaluate). - Experience with ML experiment tracking tools (MLflow, Weights & Biases). Why You'll Love Working Here 1. Salary and Bonuses - Competitive salary based on capability, with annual performance and salary reviews. - 13th-month salary and bonuses for national holidays, Lunar New Year, etc. 2. Insurance and Healthcare - Statutory insurances (Social Insurance, Health Insurance, Unemployment Insurance), trade union participation, and full benefits in accordance with Labor Law. - Annual health check-ups. - Paid leave policies for maternity, medical treatment, etc. 3. Work Environment and Career Progression - Young, dynamic work environment at one of the leading technology companies specializing in management solutions that deliver utility to the community. Our software products were honored with the Sao Khue Award 2021 and are highly regarded by the tech community and media. - Experience a warm, friendly TMT culture with diverse internal engagement activities. - Open, transparent, and well-defined career advancement opportunities. 4. Training and Team Activities - Free access to company-sponsored training programs and professional workshops. - Unleash your creativity and participate in weekly sports/recreational clubs (Football, Badminton, etc.). - Annual company trips and team-building activities.

title: Data Engineer (Data Warehouse, Python/Java, SQL)

description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job 1. Thiết kế mô hình dữ liệu và Data Mart phục vụ khai thác dữ liệu cho các hệ thống downstream. Xây dựng kiến trúc dữ liệu đảm bảo khả năng mở rộng, ổn định và hiệu năng cao. Phát triển pipeline dữ liệu Xây dựng và vận hành các pipeline ETL/ELT lấy dữ liệu từ nhiều nguồn: RDBMS (Oracle, PostgreSQL, MSSQL, MySQL…) MongoDB API File batch Streaming source Thiết kế cơ chế đồng bộ dữ liệu batch, incremental hoặc near realtime. Xây dựng cơ chế CDC và đồng bộ dữ liệu giữa hệ thống nguồn và DWH. Tự động hóa quy trình xử lý và đồng bộ dữ liệu. Làm sạch và chuẩn hóa dữ liệu Thực hiện cleansing, transform và chuẩn hóa dữ liệu từ nhiều nguồn khác nhau. Mapping dữ liệu giữa hệ thống transactional và DWH. Xử lý dữ liệu lỗi, trùng lặp, thiếu dữ liệu hoặc không đồng nhất. Xây dựng các rule kiểm tra chất lượng dữ liệu (Data Quality). Tổng hợp dữ liệu Xây dựng các bảng aggregate/fact phục vụ khai thác dữ liệu. Thiết kế và tối ưu logic xử lý dữ liệu khối lượng lớn. Tối ưu hiệu năng query, partitioning và indexing. Vận hành & tối ưu hệ thống Monitoring và xử lý lỗi pipeline/ETL job. Phân tích và xử lý sự cố liên quan đến dữ liệu. Thực hiện reconciliation giữa dữ liệu nguồn và DWH. Đảm bảo SLA và tính ổn định của hệ thống dữ liệu. 2. Your Skills and Experience 3. Yêu cầu Kiến thức & kinh nghiệm Tốt nghiệp Đại học chuyên ngành CNTT hoặc tương đương. Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với hệ thống DWH, ETL/ELT hoặc Data Pipeline. Hiểu về kiến trúc: Data Warehouse Data Mart ETL/ELT CDC Có kinh nghiệm xử lý dữ liệu lớn là lợi thế. Kỹ năng kỹ thuật Thành thạo SQL và tối ưu truy vấn. Có kinh nghiệm với: Oracle PostgreSQL MSSQL MySQL MongoDB Hiểu đặc điểm dữ liệu relational và document-based database. Có kinh nghiệm với các công cụ ETL/workflow: Airflow Talend Pentaho NiFi dbt Có khả năng lập trình: Python Java Hiểu về Kafka hoặc streaming data là lợi thế. Ưu tiên Có kinh nghiệm vận hành hệ thống dữ liệu lớn hoặc realtime. Có kiến thức về Linux, Docker, Kubernetes là lợi thế. Có kinh nghiệm tối ưu hiệu năng hệ thống dữ liệu. 4. Kỹ năng mềm Tư duy logic và phân tích dữ liệu tốt. Chủ động và có trách nhiệm trong công việc. Có khả năng làm việc nhóm và phối hợp liên phòng ban. Kỹ năng xử lý vấn đề và troubleshooting tốt. 5. Công nghệ sử dụng Oracle / PostgreSQL / MSSQL / MongoDB Airflow / Kafka Python / Java Linux Docker / Kubernetes GitLab CI/CD 6. KPI chính Độ ổn định của pipeline dữ liệu SLA đồng bộ dữ liệu Chất lượng và độ chính xác dữ liệu Hiệu năng xử lý ETL Số lượng incident liên quan dữ liệu Tỷ lệ tự động hóa pipeline dữ liệu Why You'll Love Working Here Phúc Lợi Bảo hiểm Du Lịch Phụ cấp Du lịch nước ngoài Đồng phục Thưởng Chăm sóc sức khỏe Đào tạo Tăng lương Công tác phí Phụ cấp thâm niên Chế độ nghỉ phép

title: Senior AI Developer (ML/Python/SQL)
company: Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Committed 13th-mth bonus + attractive yearly bonus Premium Healthcare for you and 2 family members 16++ days of paid leave per year The Job The Senior AI Engineer for this global workflow product plays a specialized role at the intersection of reverse engineering and forward-looking product development . Unlike standard AI roles, this position focuses heavily on "unlocking" decades of tribal knowledge and operational data hidden in legacy silos to power the next generation of AI-driven automation. You will lead the technical strategy for extracting, mining, and transforming massive volumes of legacy data into high-quality training sets for AI models. Your mission is to evolve our global workflow product from a reactive IT tool into a proactive, AI-driven platform capable of predictive maintenance, anomaly detection, and automated decision-making. Key Responsibilities Legacy Data Mining: Architect and implement advanced data mining techniques to extract valuable operational insights from structured and unstructured legacy systems (e.g., old SQL procedures, mainframe logs, siloed documentation). AI Product Evolution: Design and deploy production-ready ML/Deep Learning models that drive core product features such as intelligent workflow routing, natural language interfaces (LLMs), and predictive analytics. Feature Engineering for Workflows: Lead the discovery and creation of "features" from legacy data that specifically improve IT workflow efficiency, such as identifying bottleneck patterns or predicting system failures. Global Model Management: Oversee the deployment and lifecycle (MLOps) of models across global regions, ensuring low-latency performance and compliance with regional data residency laws (e.g., GDPR, SOC2). Reverse Engineering via GenAI: Utilize Generative AI and LLMs to automate the modernization of legacy codebases, turning outdated scripts into documented, cloud-native services. Cross-Functional Leadership: Mentor junior engineers and collaborate with Product Managers to translate legacy business logic into modern, AI-powered user experiences Your Skills and Experience Technical Skills & Experience Education: Bachelor's or Master’s degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, or a related quantitative field. Experience: 8+ years in software or data engineering, with at least 4+ years specialized in AI/ML deployment in a global production environment. AI/ML Mastery: Expert proficiency in Python and frameworks like PyTorch, TensorFlow, or Scikit-learn . Strong experience with LLM Orchestration (e.g., LangChain, LangGraph). Data Mining & Engineering: Deep experience with ETL/ELT pipelines, NoSQL/Graph databases, and tools like Apache Spark or Flink for large-scale data processing. Infrastructure: Hands-on experience with MLOps (MLflow, Airflow), containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), and global cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP). Specialized Hybrid Skills Legacy System Knowledge: Ability to navigate and extract data from older relational databases or siloed enterprise architectures. Analytical Mindset: Proven track record of identifying high-value AI use cases from messy, real-world "dark data". Strategic Communication: Ability to justify the ROI of legacy data mining projects to senior leadership. Why You'll Love Working Here Private Health Insurance (Generali) : Covered by company Personal Accident Insurance: Covered by company 13-month Salary Bonus : Guaranteed upon contract completion. (Payment timing: Included in the final payroll of labor contract) 12 days annual leave

title: Platform Engineering / Internal Infrastructure (DevOps)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Môi trường đẩy nhanh phát triển năng lực Nơi quy tụ nhân tài người Việt trên toàn cầu Văn hóa thành công, đề cao sáng kiến The Job Chuyên viên cao cấp Kỹ thuật nền tảng (Platform Engineer) chịu trách nhiệm triển khai, vận hành và tối ưu hóa toàn bộ hệ sinh thái hạ tầng và nền tảng dùng chung của công ty. Ứng viên sẽ làm việc trên cả môi trường điện toán đám mây công cộng (GCP) và các trung tâm dữ liệu tại Việt Nam (Private Cloud) để đảm bảo tính ổn định và hiệu suất cao nhất cho hệ thống. Theo dõi hiệu năng hệ thống, xử lý các sự cố liên quan đến nền tảng và đưa ra các biện pháp tối ưu hóa tài nguyên. Kiến thức & năng lực chuyên môn Có kinh nghiệm triển khai và vận hành các công cụ dùng chung: Kong API Gateway, Hashicorp Vault, Keycloak, Temporal,... Có kinh nghiệm triển khai và vận hành các công cụ observability: Splunk, New Relic, Zabbix, Grafana Stack. Có kinh nghiệm thực tế trong việc xây dựng và quản lý CI/CD pipeline. Có khả năng lập trình tốt với Python, Bash, hoặc Go để phục vụ công việc tự động hóa. Hiểu biết sâu về kiến trúc hệ thống, containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) và quản lý cấu hình. Năng lực cá nhân Tư duy logic tốt, khả năng phân tích và giải quyết vấn đề phức tạp. Chủ động, ham học hỏi các công nghệ mới trong lĩnh vực Cloud và Platform Engineering. title: AI-Powered Automation Engineer
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job Itviec’s client is seeking an AI-Powered Automation Engineer to rebuild how our 1,000-person manufacturing company runs using AI agents. In this role, you will skip the corporate fluff and focus on shifting code weekly to eliminate manual inefficiencies across departments. Working in a greenfield environment with near-zero politics, you will report directly to the General Director, define your own tech stack, and build AI-driven tools that deliver immediate, real-world impact. 1. NAS Cleanup: Use AI to read disorganized file trees, design a proper folder structure, and mass-rename via scripts. 2. Data Integration: Stitch together disconnected Sales, Material, and Production data islands into a trusted master file. 3. ERP Prep: Clean legacy datasets and write batch-loading migration scripts ahead of next year's ERP launch. 4. Internal Tooling: Turn raw feature ideas from non-tech field staff into functional tools within 48 hours. 5. Market Intelligence: Maintain AI pipelines that scrape competitor filings and websites to identify potential buyers. 6. Task Automation: Eliminate daily manual bottlenecks across operations (e.g., automated cash consolidation scripts for Finance). Your Skills and Experience AI-Powered Builder: Must have shipped at least one real end-to-end project using AI coding tools (Cursor, Claude Code, Windsurf, v0, etc.). Live links matter more than a polished resume. Hands-on Mindset: Comfortable diving into messy, undocumented Excel sheets. Uses AI to proactively learn garment operations instead of waiting for senior guidance. Communication & Languages: Able to translate factory-floor needs into technical tools. Must hold a working conversation in English or Korean. Nice-to-have: SQL, Python, manufacturing exposure, and ERP experience. Why You'll Love Working Here Our client is a premier, large-scale OEM headwear manufacturer headquartered in Hanoi, operating with a robust workforce of 1,000 personnel. Far from a traditional garment company, they are driving a pioneering corporate transformation by aggressively investing in AI agents and rapid automation to fully restructure their enterprise operations. With a high-tech strategy and substantial budgeting that rivals modern tech startups, they offer an agile, greenfield environment where engineers communicate directly with top management, bypass corporate politics, and deploy real-world automation tools on a fast-paced weekly rhythm. Salary: Meaningfully above the garment-industry baseline (strongly open to negotiation for top talent) 100% salary during probation + 13th-month bonus. Insurance: 100% Gross Salary Social Insurance (BHXH) coverage. AI Tooling Budget: $200 provided for AI subscriptions and tools.

title: AI Engineer (Agentic Systems & Backend)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Budget for individual learning & development 14+ leave days/year; premium health insurance Dynamic and open working environment The Job AI Engineering & Orchestration: Agentic Systems: Design and deploy autonomous AI Agents, building complex workflows including planning, multi-step reasoning, and tool-use/function calling. Data & Retrieval: Build and optimize RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) systems using vector databases and embeddings to provide accurate context for LLMs. AIOps: Establish evaluation pipelines to measure AI quality, minimize hallucinations, and control bias. Resource Optimization: Monitor and optimize latency, token throughput, and operational costs for AI systems. AI Integration: Package AI features into stable APIs for seamless integration into the existing Microservices ecosystem. Backend Engineering: Core Systems: Design, develop, and manage high-performance backend services, ensuring stability and scalability in production. Feature Development: Maintain existing systems and proactively develop new functionalities based on business requirements. International Collaboration: Work closely with the Korean tech team and stakeholders to align on architectural solutions and application deployment. Code Quality: Apply standard coding practices, ensuring high unit test coverage and optimized debugging processes. Technology Research: Proactively research new technologies, specifically AI infrastructure solutions, to apply to company projects. Your Skills and Experience Mandatory Skills: Experience: 4–6 years of professional experience, including 1–2 years in backend software development and 3–4 years in AI Engineering . Strong proficiency in Python or Java is required. Candidates with hands-on experience in both languages are preferred, using Python for AI/Data applications and Java for core backend services. Architecture: Deep understanding of Microservices, RESTful APIs, and gRPC. Data: Experience with SQL (PostgreSQL, MySQL) or NoSQL (MongoDB, Cassandra). Fundamentals: Mastery of data structures, algorithms, OOP, and common design patterns. AI Specialization: LLM Production: Proven experience implementing features using OpenAI, Claude, or open-source models (Llama, Mistral) in production. Frameworks: Proficiency in AI orchestration libraries: LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI, or AutoGen. Vector Infrastructure: Experience with Vector Databases such as Milvus, Pinecone, Qdrant, or pgvector. Agentic Skills: Solid understanding of Function Calling, Memory management (Long-term/Short-term), and advanced Prompt Engineering (Chain-of-Thought, ReAct). AI Quality: Knowledge of evaluation frameworks (e.g., Ragas, Arize Phoenix, or LangSmith). Nice-to-have: Experience with high-traffic systems and asynchronous processing. Proficiency in Docker, Kubernetes, and Cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure). Experience with Redis (Caching) and Message Brokers (Kafka or RabbitMQ). Understanding of CI/CD for AI (MLOps). Why You'll Love Working Here Health and Wellness Premium health insurance Safe, ethical, secure, and healthy workplace Financial Well-Being Competitive compensation package Annual bonus program Personal Development Budget for individual learning & development Work-life balance 14 days of paid annual leave, increasing by 1 day each year Flexible working timeframe Workplace experiences Modern working equipment Well-stocked pantry to relax and recharge. Engagement activities (monthly team bonding, yearly company trip…) Sponsored sports clubs Business trip opportunities to the Korean Headquarters

title: Home Racer - Data Analyst
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Very attractive starting income Insightful mentorship from Experts & C-level Ownership on international projects The Job In accordance with the applicable laws and regulations on personal data protection, including the Law on Personal Data Protection and its implementing regulations, Home Credit Vietnam Finance Company Limited (“Home Credit”) collects and processes candidates’ personal data for recruitment purposes and other related purposes in accordance with the Agreement, Notice and Acceptance for Personal Data Processing. By submitting your application to Home Credit through ITViec, you acknowledge that you have read, understood and agreed to the contents of the Agreement, Notice and Acceptance for Personal Data Processing available at the following link: , and consent to Home Credit collecting and processing your personal data in accordance with applicable laws and regulations Data doesn't speak - until you ask the right questions. As a Data Analyst, you'll be the bridge between numbers and decisions, turning raw data into stories that guide business moves and spark real change. JOB RESPONSIBILITIES - Analyze data and visualize key metrics to uncover insights, track performance, and support smart business decisions. - Build dashboards, reports, and models using SQL, Python, Power BI, or other tools to support daily operations. - Collaborate with cross-functional teams to solve business challenges with data. Why You'll Love Working Here Understanding candidates' expectations of the ideal workplace, we always put the people element at the top of our priorities. ​ Compensation programs and employees' development opportunities for employees are always significantly invested in, bringing you:​ Primary benefits: 13th-month Salary and performance- based KPI Bonus ​ 15+ Annual Leaves​ Full Social Insurance, 24/7 Accidental Insurance, Annual Medical Check- up​ Team Building and CSR activities: Year- end Party, New-year Party, Company trip, Charity activities, Blood donation​ Learning workshops: Udemy E-learning, English courses, Senior management development training programs​ Our culture fosters your career development through: ​ 1. Strategy ​ Thinking Big: We focus on creating meaningful and sustainable opportunities for the company. ​ Customer Obsession: We try to understand future customer needs , trends, and the impact of digital transformation. ​ 2. Implementation ​ Digital Savviness : We seek to understand the technological aspects of the business to enhance efficiency and customer experience. ​ Entrepreneurship: We communicate the company's strategy and purpose to others, inspire and lead them effectively. ​ Risk in mind: We consider risks and their possible effects before making decisions. ​ Operational Excellence : We stay focused on the goal, disciplined in tightening tasks to the end. ​ 3. Building the organization ​ People Centricity : We sustain focus on the development of team members through meaningful development plans and learning opportunities. ​ Integrity : We always stay focused on the goal you need to achieve, refrain from getting into personal conflicts.

title: Database Administrator(DBA, Oracle, PostgreSQL)
company: Công ty Cổ phần Thanh toán số MobiFone
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job Vị trí CVCC Quản trị cơ sở dữ liệu (DBA) chịu trách nhiệm triển khai, vận hành và tối ưu hóa toàn bộ hệ thống cơ sở dữ liệu của công ty trên nền tảng GCP và các data center đặt tại Việt Nam (private cloud). Job Purpose: Đảm bảo tính sẵn sàng, hiệu năng và an toàn của hệ thống dữ liệu thông qua việc: Triển khai và vận hành các hệ thống cơ sở dữ liệu đa dạng. Tối ưu hóa hiệu năng và thiết kế chiến lược bảo vệ dữ liệu. Xây dựng giải pháp sẵn sàng cao và tự động hóa vận hành. Hỗ trợ kỹ thuật chuyên sâu và đào tạo đội ngũ. Responsibilities Triển khai, vận hành và nâng cấp các hệ thống cơ sở dữ liệu, bao gồm: Oracle, Postgresql, Redis, Cassandra, TiDB. Thực hiện tối ưu hóa hiệu năng, tinh chỉnh câu lệnh, và thiết kế chiến lược sao lưu/phục hồi đảm bảo an toàn dữ liệu. Xây dựng các giải pháp High Availability (HA), Disaster Recovery (DR) và tự động hóa quy trình vận hành cơ sở dữ liệu. Hỗ trợ vận hành ứng dụng, vận hành nghiệp vụ về các thao tác nâng cao trên cơ sở dữ liệu. Xây dựng tài liệu vận hành, viết runbook vận hành/giám sát/xử lý sự cố, đào tạo L1. Your Skills and Experience Trình độ học vấn & kinh nghiệm Tốt nghiệp Đại học chuyên ngành Công nghệ thông tin hoặc các lĩnh vực liên quan. Tối thiểu 3 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc ở vị trí DBA. Kiến thức & năng lực chuyên môn Có kiến thức sâu về kiến trúc và kinh nghiệm vận hành các hệ thống RDBMS lớn (Oracle, PostgreSQL) và kinh nghiệm chuyển đổi/migrate dữ liệu. Có kinh nghiệm vận hành các hệ thống phân tán và NoSQL (Cassandra, TiDB) ở quy mô lớn, nhiều data center. Có khả năng lập trình (Python, Bash) để tự động hóa các tác vụ quản trị. Năng lực cá nhân Tư duy giải quyết vấn đề tốt và khả năng chịu áp lực cao. Có khả năng làm việc nhóm, phối hợp đa phòng ban. Có năng lực nghiên cứu, truyền đạt và đào tạo. Why You'll Love Working Here Lương & Phụ cấp Lương tháng 13, thưởng hiệu quả công việc năm (theo kết quả kinh doanh của công ty). Phụ cấp ăn trưa: 730.000đ/tháng. Phép năm: Tối đa 15 ngày/năm (theo cấp nhân sự). Sức khỏe: Bảo hiểm xã hội, BH sức khỏe và khám sức khỏe định kỳ hàng năm. Máy tính xách tay, màn hình và các phương tiện/tài khoản/công cụ cần thiết khác cho công việc. Cơ hội nghề nghiệp Xét tăng lương hàng năm và cơ hội thăng tiến. Công nhận và khen thưởng ở cấp độ nhóm và Công ty. Môi trường làm việc Môi trường làm việc trẻ trung, năng động và hợp tác. Teambuilding hàng quý/ hàng năm & các sự kiện nội bộ gắn kết

title: Senior Data Analyst
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Very competitive remuneration package Build products for millions of users in Australia Hybrid and flexible working environment The Job You will build and deliver a series of key Reporting suites that reflect the experience the Retail Business has as the consumer of Technology Services and Change. Support the Retail Technology team with the preparation of ad-hoc reporting and presentation artifacts, utilising a broad set of tooling including Cursor AI. You will have worked in a large enterprise level organisation with high volumes of transactional and customer data. A solid understanding of Technology Service Delivery metrics and Customer Service analysis would be beneficial. YOUR JOB RESPONSIBILITIES Produce key weekly and monthly reporting suites that accurately present the performance of Technology services to the Retail Business and NAB’s Branch Network. Develop and maintain dashboards, scorecards and reporting packs that provide clear visibility of service performance, delivery outcomes, operational trends and emerging issues. Extract, transform, validate and analyse data from enterprise systems to ensure reporting outputs are accurate, complete, consistent and fit for business use. Translate business questions and stakeholder requirements into well-defined metrics, reporting logic and actionable insights that support decision making. Perform ad-hoc analysis to investigate performance trends, data anomalies, service issues and opportunities for improvement across Retail Technology services. Automate and continuously improve recurring reporting processes to reduce manual effort, improve timeliness and strengthen reporting reliability. Prepare presentation materials and executive-ready reporting artefacts that communicate insights clearly to technical and non-technical stakeholders. Partner with Retail Technology, service owners, delivery teams and data providers to understand reporting needs, resolve data issues and improve the usefulness of reporting outputs. Ensure all reporting and data handling activities are performed in line with relevant NAB data governance, privacy, security and risk requirements. Fulfil other tasks as assigned by your People Leader and/or authorized representative of NAB Vietnam from time to time. Your Skills and Experience Must have At least 5 years experience in an Information Technology role & at least 2 years experience in a data analysis role Strong analytical capability — able to translate business requirements into well-defined, accurate metrics, with a disciplined approach to validating and sanity-checking results. Business Reporting – Competent in producing Executive and Business reporting in PowerPoint or equivalent tools Advanced SQL proficiency — demonstrated ability to write and optimise complex queries, including multi-table joins, window functions, common table expressions (CTEs), and aggregations. Business intelligence tooling — hands-on experience developing dashboards and reports in Power BI (or equivalent platforms such as Tableau or Looker). Excellent communication and documentation skills — able to present findings clearly to both technical and non-technical stakeholders and maintain well-documented work. Data quality awareness — sound understanding of common data integrity risks, including fan-out joins, deduplication, grain definition, and date-partition handling. Working knowledge of Python — competent in using Python (e.g. pandas) for ad-hoc analysis and data manipulation. Nice-to-have Familiarity with the use of AI tools, ideally Cursor AI Familiarity with dbt or a comparable transformation framework Exposure to cloud data services (AWS). Experience with distributed data processing (PySpark). Familiarity with version control (Git). Why You'll Love Working Here THE BENEFITS AND PERKS 1. Generous compensation and benefit package Attractive salary and benefits 20-day annual leave and 7-day sick leave, etc. 13th month salary and Annual Performance Bonus Premium healthcare for yourself and family members Monthly allowance for team activities Premium welcome kit and frequent appreciation gifts Extra benefits for long-term employees 2. Exciting career and development opportunities Large scale products with modern technologies in banking domain Clear roadmap for career advancement in both technical and leadership pathways Well-structured learning and development programs (technical and soft skills) Sponsored certificates in both IT and banking/finance Premium account on Udemy English learning with native teachers Opportunity for traveling & training in Australia 3. Professional and engaging working environment Hybrid working model and good work-life balance Well-equipped & modern Agile office with fully stocked pantry Special programs to improve your physical and mental health Annual company trip and events A solid talented team behind you – great people who love what they do If this excites you, let's have a chat over a cup of coffee!

title: Senior Data Scientist – ID2649
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us People Development High promotion opportunities Very attractive salary package The Job 1. Tham gia và phối hợp triển khai các giải pháp khoa học dữ liệu và trí tuệ nhân tạo cho các đơn vị trong ngân hàng Đề xuất và tham gia triển khai các giải pháp khoa học dữ liệu cùng chuyên gia và phối hợp chặt chẽ với các đơn vị kinh doanh/vận hành để giải quyết các bài toán thực tế có tính ứng dụng cao Ứng dụng các kỹ thuật phân tích nâng cao, xác suất thống kê, học máy, học sâu và GenAI để khám phá hành vi và thấu hiểu khách hàng, từ đó đưa ra insight có giá trị nhằm thúc đẩy kinh doanh Tham gia phát triển các mô hình học máy, học sâu và ứng dụng GenAI nhằm phục vụ các mục tiêu như: dự báo khách hàng rời đi (churn prediction), bán chéo/sản phẩm (cross/up-sell), phân khúc khách hàng (segmentation), dự đoán giá trị vòng đời khách hàng (CLTV), và cá nhân hóa trải nghiệm khách hàng Tham gia xây dựng sản phẩm AI/ML/GenAI hỗ trợ tự động hóa và tối ưu hóa các quy trình vận hành ngân hàng từ xử lý hồ sơ, thẩm định, hỗ trợ chăm sóc khách hàng đến vận hành nội bộ, … 2. Chủ động tìm hiểu và thử nghiệm các công nghệ, framework và mô hình mới để nâng cao hiệu quả triển khai giải pháp dữ liệu và AI tại ngân hàng. Tích cực tham gia các diễn đàn chuyên môn, hội thảo nội bộ/ngoại bộ, seminar nhằm mở rộng kiến thức và chia sẻ kinh nghiệm thực tiễn với đội nhóm. Your Skills and Experience Trình độ đào tạo/ Educational Qualifications Tốt nghiệp Đại học trở lên trong các lĩnh vực liên quan như: Khoa học Máy tính (Computer Science), Toán học/Toán ứng dụng (Mathematics/Applied Mathematics), Thống kê (Statistics), Kỹ thuật (Engineering), Khoa học Dữ liệu (Data Science), Kinh tế lượng, Tài chính định lượng (Econometrics, Quantitative Finance), hoặc các ngành liên quan. 1. Kiến thức/ Chuyên môn có liên quan Relevant Knowledge/ Expertise Nắm chắc kiến thức về các mô hình thống kê, kỹ thuật dự báo, thuật toán học máy, học sâu và/hoặc GenAI; có khả năng lựa chọn và áp dụng phù hợp với bài toán thực tế. Có khả năng vận dụng các kỹ thuật phân tích thống kê, kiểm định giả thuyết và phân tích dữ liệu phức tạp; có khả năng đưa ra các phân tích và khuyến nghị mang tính thực tiễn cao. Thành thạo Python và các thư viện phổ biến phục vụ cho phân tích nâng cao, học máy, học sâu (như Pandas, Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, PyTorch) và GenAI (Transformers, LangChain...). title: AI Engineer (ML, LLM)
company: CÔNG TY CỔ PHẦN CHỨNG KHOÁN KAFI
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Go build a great FinTech product Go build it on top of the state-of-the-art tech Go together with top-of-mind people and team. The Job We are an emerging securities firm in Vietnam, growing rapidly with a strong focus on technology, professional trading, and innovation. Our mission is to deliver data-driven and intelligent investment solutions that empower retail, professional, and institutional clients. We are looking for an AI Engineer (Applied AI) to join our technology team and drive the adoption of AI across software development, data & analytics, and operational workflows . In this role, you will focus on building and experimenting with AI-driven solutions , rapidly developing proof-of-concepts (POCs) , and turning them into practical, production-ready tools and automations . You will work closely with engineering, product, data, and business teams to identify opportunities where AI can create real impact. This role reports to the Project Manager / Head of Business Technology and is well-suited for candidates with a strong logical mindset , an interest in data, models, and technology , and a desire to grow in AI-driven investment products . Key Responsibilities Explore and identify opportunities to apply AI across software development, data & analytics, and operational processes . Build and iterate on AI-driven POCs , including use cases such as: AI assistants and copilots, Intelligent document processing and summarization, Investment Q&A and recommendation tools, Workflow automation and decision-support systems Develop and deploy AI-powered automation workflows that improve productivity across internal teams and customer-facing products. Work with LLM APIs and AI frameworks (e.g., OpenAI, Claude, LangChain, vector databases) to build features such as: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG); Semantic search and embeddings; Chatbots and AI assistants. Collaborate with backend engineers, data engineers, and product teams to integrate AI solutions into existing systems and platforms. Design and maintain lightweight ML/AI pipelines for data processing, model integration, evaluation, and deployment. Take ownership of end-to-end delivery , from idea to POC, production, monitoring and improvement. Work with external vendors or partners to evaluate, integrate, and operate third-party AI solutions , including taking over systems for internal use and enhancement. Monitor performance of AI solutions, continuously improving quality, reliability, and user experience . Stay up to date with the latest developments in AI, LLMs, and applied AI use cases , and bring relevant ideas into the organization. Experience working with data processing and feature engineering , including preparing datasets, transforming raw data into meaningful features, and supporting model development and evaluation. Your Skills and Experience Must-Have: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, AI, Data Science , or a related field. 2–5+ years of experience in applied AI, ML engineering, or building AI-powered applications . Strong understanding of prompt engineering techniques , including prompt design, chaining, context management, and evaluation for building reliable LLM-based applications. Strong hands-on experience with Python (or similar), and familiarity with modern AI/ML ecosystems. Experience working with LLMs and AI tools , such as: OpenAI / Claude / similar APIs; LangChain or equivalent frameworks; Vector databases / embeddings. Strong problem-solving and logical thinking , with the ability to quickly turn ideas into working prototypes. Experience building end-to-end solutions (not just models), including integration into real systems. Comfortable working in a fast-paced, experimental environment with evolving requirements. Strong ownership mindset and ability to drive initiatives independently . Nice-to-Have: Experience applying AI in financial services, trading, or investment-related use cases . Experience working with or delivering solutions for fintech partners or external clients . Experience in taking over, operating, and improving AI systems from external vendors . Familiarity with data pipelines, analytics systems, or BI tools . Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure). Why You'll Love Working Here Attractive salary Government Social Insurance is based on full of gross salary Full salary during probation Working Monday – Friday, 8am:5pm For every 5 work-years, +2 day to annual leave​​ Diverse company culture activities: Annual Year End Party, Quarterly party, Company outings, Team building, Coffee and Snack, etc

title: Senior/Lead Platform Engineer (Databricks, MLops, AWS)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Excellent environment and team to help you grow. Competitive salary and learning culture. Premium health care for you and your family. The Job Role Overview We are seeking a Senior/Lead Platform Engineer (Databricks, MLops, AWS) who will take ownership of the design, implementation and operation of our core data, analytics and ML infrastructure. This role spans across platform architecture, DevSecOps, DataOps, and ML infrastructure , and requires a combination of strategic thought leadership and hands-on execution. You will build, integrate and operate platforms on AWS and Databricks , enabling scalable, secure, production-grade ML/AI solutions. Key Responsibilities Architect and implement end-to-end data and ML platforms: data lakes, warehouses, streaming and batch pipelines, model training/deployment infrastructure, on AWS + Databricks. Lead DevSecOps and DataOps practices: infrastructure as code (IaC), CI/CD pipelines for data & ML workflows, secure multi-account/multi-region cloud operations. Integrate AWS services (e.g., S3, Redshift, Kinesis, Lambda, EKS/ECS) with Databricks runtime, Delta Lake, Unity Catalog etc to build scalable, performant pipelines. Build and operate ML infrastructure: training clusters, model versioning, MLOps toolchain (e.g., MLflow), model monitoring and observability, automatic retraining workflows. Establish data governance, lineage, quality, observability standards across data pipelines and ML workflows. Mentor engineering teams, define architectural best practices and guide implementation of high-scale data/ML systems. Optimize system performance, cost and scalability; diagnose and resolve large-scale production issues. Continuously evaluate new tools and technologies in the areas of cloud, data platform, DevSecOps, ML infrastructure and apply them to drive innovation. Your Skills and Experience 7+ years of experience in data platform architecture, cloud/ML infrastructure engineering or related roles. Deep technical expertise in Databricks and AWS : demonstrated ability to design, integrate and operate solutions spanning both platforms. Strong hands-on implementation skills: you will not just design but build, deploy and operate the platform. Proven track record of building and operating scalable ML/AI platforms in production (model training & deployment). Expertise in Apache Spark, Delta Lake, modern data pipeline frameworks (batch + streaming). Strong background in infrastructure as code (Terraform, CloudFormation), CI/CD for data/ML, and DevSecOps practices. Proficiency in Python and SQL; familiarity with Scala or equivalent is a plus. Experience with data governance, data lineage, observability and MLOps frameworks (e.g., MLflow, Airflow, dbt). Bonus: Experience in fintech, regulated industries or high-security environments. Why You'll Love Working Here You’ll love working with us if you are: Passionate about technology. Independent but also a good team player. Comfortable with a high degree of ambiguity. Focused on usability and speed. Keen on presenting your ideas to your peers and management. At TYME, opportunities are here for the taking. If you want to be part of our purpose and live and lead through our values, we can offer exciting development opportunities through expanded lateral roles, stretch assignments, or people leadership. Some of our benefits: Meal and parking allowances are covered by the company. Full benefits and salary rank during probation . Insurances such as Vietnamese labor law and premium health care for you and your family. SMART goals and clear career opportunities (technical seminar, conference, and career talk) - we focus on your development. Values-driven, international working environment, and agile culture. Overseas travel opportunities for training and work-related. Internal Hackathons and company events (team building, coffee run, etc.). Pro-Rate and performance bonus . 15-day annual + 3-day sick leave per year from the company. Work-life balance 40-hr per week from Mon to Fri . Performance-based bonus and equity participation in GoTyme Group

Grow your career with opportunities across the dynamic ecosystem of Techcombank & Masterise Group. Access special loan offers with competitive interest rates and flexible grace period options tailored to your financial needs. Personal lockers with QR code access. Quarterly/yearly teambuilding & engaged internal events.

title: Middle AI Engineer (RAG/LLM/Computer Vision )
company: Công ty Cổ phần Công nghệ DP Unity
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job Chúng tôi đang xây dựng các tính năng AI cho sản phẩm phần mềm thương mại trong lĩnh vực xây dựng / BIM, và đang tuyển 2 Kỹ sư AI cho hai mảng chuyên môn khác nhau: Track A — AI Tài liệu: xây dựng agent đọc, tổng hợp tài liệu PDF kỹ thuật, tra cứu quy chuẩn – tiêu chuẩn (TCVN, ISO…) và phát hiện điểm bất thường để gợi ý người dùng kiểm tra (trợ lý soát lỗi, không phải phán quyết tự động). Track B — AI Thị giác: xây dựng hệ thống phát hiện thay đổi (change detection) từ ảnh flycam/vệ tinh — ví dụ so sánh hai lần bay để phát hiện công trình mới xây và xác định vị trí. Tóm tắt nhanh - Bạn sẽ làm gì ? Track A: xây dựng AI đọc hiểu tài liệu kỹ thuật, RAG, tra cứu tiêu chuẩn, phát hiện bất thường. Track B: xây dựng AI phát hiện công trình thay đổi từ ảnh flycam / vệ tinh. Không yêu cầu biết cả hai track — thạo một mảng là đủ nộp. Ưu tiên người từng đưa sản phẩm AI chạy thật, hơn là bằng cấp. Cả hai vị trí đều thiên về kỹ sư ứng dụng (applied / product engineering): trọng tâm là biến mô hình có sẵn ưu tiên mã nguồn mở hoặc chi phí hợp lý, thành sản phẩm chạy ổn định, đáng tin cậy và tối ưu chi phí để bán cho khách hàng — không phải nghiên cứu thuật toán mới. Với Track B, công việc có thể bao gồm tinh chỉnh (fine-tune) model pretrain trên dữ liệu thực tế để phù hợp ảnh tại Việt Nam. Bạn làm việc cùng người phụ trách kỹ thuật (tech lead) để hiện thực hóa kiến trúc đã duyệt, và chủ động đi từ yêu cầu đến sản phẩm chạy được. Track A - AI Tài liệu (RAG/LLM) Trách nhiệm: Xây dựng pipeline RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) để tra cứu tài liệu, quy chuẩn, tiêu chuẩn và trả lời có dẫn nguồn rõ ràng. Phát triển agent xử lý tài liệu: nhận PDF đầu vào, trích xuất – tổng hợp thông tin, đối chiếu bộ tiêu chuẩn, xuất kết quả có cấu trúc (JSON). Xây dựng cơ chế phát hiện lỗi / bất thường / thiếu sót trong tài liệu và sinh cảnh báo dễ hiểu cho người dùng. Cùng team xây dựng “kho kinh nghiệm lỗi” (error memory): lưu lại các lỗi thường gặp để hệ thống cải thiện dần theo dữ liệu thực tế — đây là lợi thế cạnh tranh của sản phẩm. Ép mô hình trả kết quả ổn định, hạn chế “bịa” (hallucination) — yếu tố sống còn với sản phẩm tra cứu tiêu chuẩn. Yêu cầu chính: Đã xây dựng ít nhất một hệ thống RAG hoặc ứng dụng LLM chạy thật. Thành thạo ít nhất một framework ứng dụng LLM: LangChain, LlamaIndex hoặc tương đương. Kinh nghiệm với cơ sở dữ liệu vector: Qdrant, ChromaDB, Weaviate hoặc pgvector (PostgreSQL). Thành thạo prompt engineering và kỹ thuật ép mô hình trả kết quả có cấu trúc. Kinh nghiệm trích xuất dữ liệu từ PDF và tài liệu không / bán cấu trúc (PyMuPDF, pdfplumber hoặc tương đương). Điểm cộng: Kinh nghiệm OCR tài liệu scan tiếng Việt (khử nhiễu, nhận đúng dấu, OCR bảng biểu) với Tesseract, PaddleOCR hoặc tương đương. Kinh nghiệm với Agentic RAG, AI agent, quy trình AI nhiều bước. Đã xây dựng vòng lặp cải thiện chất lượng dựa trên feedback / dữ liệu lỗi. Track B - AI Thị giác (Change Detection) Lưu ý quan trọng: Ứng viên KHÔNG cần phụ trách bay flycam, ghép ảnh, georeference hay xử lý GIS chuyên sâu — phần này đã có đội ngũ nội bộ đảm nhận. Bạn nhận dữ liệu ảnh đã xử lý sẵn và tập trung hoàn toàn vào lớp AI thị giác. Trách nhiệm: Xây dựng hệ thống phát hiện thay đổi từ ảnh trên cao: nhận hai ảnh trực giao (đã ghép, khớp tọa độ) ở hai thời điểm, phát hiện công trình/nhà mới xây và khoanh vùng vị trí. Lựa chọn, tích hợp và tinh chỉnh các model change detection mã nguồn mở (Open-CD, ChangeFormer, RSBuilding, BIT… hoặc tương đương). Xử lý lọc nhiễu: phân biệt thay đổi thật (công trình) với thay đổi vặt (bóng, xe, cây, mùa vụ) để giảm báo động giả. Kết hợp model thị giác-ngôn ngữ (VLM) để xác nhận và mô tả vùng thay đổi cho người dùng. Tích lũy dữ liệu ảnh thực tế + nhãn đúng/sai làm “kho kinh nghiệm” để cải thiện độ chính xác của model theo thời gian. Yêu cầu chính: Thành thạo PyTorch (hoặc TensorFlow) và quen với quy trình huấn luyện / tinh chỉnh model thị giác. Kinh nghiệm với computer vision: phân vùng ngữ nghĩa (semantic segmentation), phát hiện đối tượng, hoặc change detection. Biết sử dụng và tinh chỉnh model pretrain (Hugging Face, model zoo, hoặc các repo như Open-CD). Thành thạo xử lý ảnh với OpenCV, NumPy; làm việc được với ảnh độ phân giải cao. Hiểu cách đánh giá model thị giác (IoU, F1, precision/recall) và cải thiện độ chính xác. Điểm cộng: Kinh nghiệm với ảnh viễn thám / vệ tinh / flycam và các bộ dữ liệu change detection (LEVIR-CD, WHU, S2Looking). Quen làm việc với ảnh có tọa độ địa lý (rasterio, GDAL) — dù phần GIS đã có đội khác lo. Kinh nghiệm với mô hình thị giác-ngôn ngữ (VLM) như Grounding DINO, SAM, Qwen-VL. Sản phẩm có lộ trình mở rộng sang phân tích video giám sát công trường (an toàn lao động, phát hiện hành vi bất thường). Ứng viên có hứng thú hoặc kinh nghiệm video understanding / object tracking là một lợi thế cho định hướng tương lai. Kỹ năng mềm: Tư duy phân tích và giải quyết vấn đề tốt; biết đặt câu hỏi đúng trước khi code. Tinh thần làm chủ công việc (ownership), chủ động đi từ yêu cầu đến kết quả. Truyền đạt ý tưởng kỹ thuật rõ ràng cho cả người trong và ngoài ngành kỹ thuật. Cẩn trọng với chất lượng đầu ra — đây là sản phẩm bán cho khách hàng kỹ thuật. Sẵn sàng học công nghệ AI mới và áp dụng vào bài toán kinh doanh thực tế. Kết quả kỳ vọng sau 3 - 6 tháng: Để bạn hình dung rõ vai trò, đây là những gì chúng tôi kỳ vọng đạt được sau 3--6 tháng đầu: Track A: triển khai được pipeline RAG đọc tài liệu kỹ thuật, trả lời có dẫn nguồn, xuất kết quả JSON có cấu trúc dùng được trong sản phẩm. Track B: triển khai được pipeline change detection nhận hai ảnh trước/sau, trả ra vùng công trình mới kèm vị trí, có thể đánh giá bằng precision / recall / IoU và đạt mức dùng được cho sản phẩm. Cả hai: đóng gói được service bằng Docker / API để tích hợp vào sản phẩm chính. Your Skills and Experience Tốt nghiệp Đại học ngành Khoa học máy tính, CNTT, Kỹ thuật phần mềm, Trí tuệ nhân tạo hoặc tương đương (hoặc có sản phẩm / kinh nghiệm tương xứng). Khoảng 2–4 năm kinh nghiệm (hoặc ít hơn nếu năng lực tương đương); thành thạo Python, nền tảng kỹ thuật phần mềm vững (Git, REST API, code sạch dễ bảo trì). Biết gọi mô hình qua API và có kinh nghiệm chạy mô hình mã nguồn mở (local hoặc trên server) để tối ưu chi phí. Đóng gói và triển khai dịch vụ bằng Docker. Đã từng đưa ít nhất một sản phẩm/dự án AI chạy thật (không chỉ làm theo tutorial). Bạn không cần đáp ứng 100% các công nghệ được liệt kê. Chúng tôi đánh giá cao khả năng học nhanh và sản phẩm bạn đã làm hơn là việc tick đủ mọi từ khóa. Why You'll Love Working Here Lương: thỏa thuận theo năng lực và kinh nghiệm thực tế, cạnh tranh so với mặt bằng thị trường. Tham gia BHXH, BHYT, BHTN theo quy định của Nhà nước và Công ty. Lương tháng 13, thưởng các ngày lễ, Tết và thưởng theo hiệu suất làm việc. Làm sản phẩm thật, không outsourcing: bạn sở hữu mảng kỹ thuật của mình, thấy sản phẩm đến tay khách hàng thật trong ngành xây dựng / BIM. Chuyên môn có chiều sâu: được làm với AI ứng dụng, BIM/GIS và bài toán kỹ thuật thực tế, có người định hướng kiến trúc rõ ràng. Dữ liệu thực tế: được làm trực tiếp với tài liệu kỹ thuật, hồ sơ công trình và ảnh bay thật — không phải dữ liệu giả lập. Lộ trình phát triển: cơ hội phát triển thành Senior AI Engineer / AI Product Engineer khi sản phẩm mở rộng. Môi trường làm việc trẻ trung, đề cao tính chủ động, định hướng phát triển lâu dài.

title: Senior Technical Support Specialist (L3 Support)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Competitive salary Full statutory insurance Professional, international working environment The Job About Safetrust Safetrust is building the future of identity. Imagine walking into a building where your phone, watch, or face becomes your secure credential. No badges. No friction. Just seamless, secure access across physical and digital environments. That’s what we do. Our platform combines mobile credentials, IoT devices, cloud-native architecture, and secure authentication to power access across offices, data centers, and enterprise systems—used by Fortune 200 companies and global partners. We operate across the United States, Vietnam, and Australia, solving one of the most complex challenges in modern security: how identity works across devices, systems, and the real world. Why This Role Matters This is not a traditional support role. This is where the hardest problems go. As a Senior Technical Support Engineer (L3), you will diagnose and resolve complex, system-level issues across hardware, mobile, cloud, and identity infrastructure—issues that directly impact customers and product reliability. Your work will not only resolve incidents—you will help identify patterns, prevent failures, and improve how our products are built and deployed. Role Overview Safetrust is seeking a Senior Technical Support Engineer (L3) to serve as the highest level of technical escalation across our platform. You will work across embedded devices, mobile applications, APIs, and cloud services to troubleshoot deeply complex issues, perform root cause analysis, and drive resolution in partnership with Engineering and Product teams. This role is highly cross-functional and requires strong technical depth, ownership, and the ability to operate under pressure during critical incidents. What You’ll Do Deep Technical Troubleshooting Own and resolve Tier 3 escalations across hardware, firmware, mobile (iOS/Android), APIs, and cloud platforms Perform system-level debugging across device, network, and backend layers Analyze logs, packet captures, and system behavior to isolate root causes Troubleshoot interactions between IoT devices, mobile credentials, and cloud services Root Cause Analysis & Reliability Conduct detailed root cause analysis for complex and recurring issues Identify systemic problems and recommend long-term solutions Drive reduction of recurring defects and support escalations Contribute to improving system reliability and product stability Incident Management & Resolution Lead technical coordination during high-priority incidents Work cross-functionally with Engineering, QA, and Product to resolve issues Provide clear, structured communication during critical situations Release & Hotfix Support Partner with Engineering and QA to validate fixes and hotfixes Support release readiness and deployment validation Monitor post-release behavior and identify emerging risks Documentation & Knowledge Sharing Create and maintain technical documentation, troubleshooting guides, and known issue records Improve knowledge base structure to support scalable support operations Ensure complex solutions are documented for reuse Cross-Functional Collaboration Act as a technical bridge between Support, Engineering, Product, and Customer Success Provide detailed technical feedback to influence product improvements Support new feature rollouts and ensure support readiness Mentorship & Enablement Train and mentor L1 and L2 support engineers Lead knowledge transfer sessions for new systems and features Help elevate technical capability across the support organization Your Skills and Experience What You Bring Technical Expertise Strong experience troubleshooting IoT systems, embedded devices, or connected platforms Experience with Bluetooth, NFC, and RF technologies (BLE, NFC, etc.) Knowledge of secure credential technologies (e.g., DESFire or similar) Understanding of access control systems and integrations Strong knowledge of networking protocols (TCP/IP, HTTP, TLS) Experience with packet analysis tools (e.g., Wireshark) Experience troubleshooting APIs, distributed systems, and integrations Development & Tools Proficiency in at least one scripting or programming language (Python, JavaScript, Java, Kotlin, Bash, etc.) Experience working with REST APIs and API debugging tools Experience with Jira, Confluence, and log analysis tools Core Skills Strong analytical and problem-solving mindset Ability to debug complex, multi-layer systems Clear communication of technical concepts to both technical and non-technical audiences Ability to perform under pressure during critical incidents Strong ownership and follow-through Nice to Have Experience with iOS and Android debugging or development Experience with cloud platforms and microservices architectures Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and release processes Experience in SaaS, IoT, or platform-based environments Experience in identity, security, or access control systems What Sets You Apart Ability to troubleshoot across hardware, mobile, and cloud systems end-to-end Strong ownership of issues from detection through resolution Ability to identify patterns and prevent future failures Strong documentation and knowledge-sharing mindset Ability to operate effectively in complex, high-pressure environments Success in This Role Resolution speed and quality of complex escalations Reduction in recurring issues and systemic defects Improved product reliability and stability Increased effectiveness of L1/L2 support teams Strong customer outcomes during critical incidents Why You'll Love Working Here Competitive salary based on experience and performance Daily lunch provided at the office Free coffee, tea, and refreshments Full statutory insurance (social, health, unemployment) Annual health check-up and paid annual leave Professional, international working environment

title: Senior Solution Architect - ERP / Odoo (Up to 80M VND+)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Làm với khách quốc tế, dự án ERP/ Odoo Lương T13 +thưởng năm + thưởng theo dự án. Your Skills and Experience Bắt buộc: 5+ năm phát triển phần mềm, tối thiểu 2 năm ở vai trò Architect hoặc Tech Lead. Thành thạo Python và PostgreSQL ; đã thiết kế hệ thống, API và data model ở quy mô production. Hiểu sâu quy trình nghiệp vụ ERP của ít nhất 2–3 mảng (Supply Chain, Manufacturing/MRP, Inventory, Procurement, HR & Payroll, CRM, Accounting, eCommerce/POS…). Có kinh nghiệm làm việc trực tiếp với đội nghiệp vụ của khách — kể được câu chuyện cụ thể về việc thay đổi quyết định của khách dựa trên tư vấn của mình. Tư duy phản biện và giải quyết vấn đề tốt — thoải mái với bài toán mơ hồ. Tiếng Anh giao tiếp tốt, tự tin trao đổi trực tiếp với khách quốc tế. Hiểu OOP, design pattern và software architecture; viết được code sạch, dễ bảo trì. Điểm cộng lớn: Kinh nghiệm customize/tích hợp Odoo (Python, ORM, XML). Nền tảng Odoo thực chiến trong các dự án ERP enterprise. Why You'll Love Working Here Quyền lợi: Range lương up to 80M VND (thoả thuận trong buổi phỏng vấn). Lương tháng 13, thưởng sinh nhật và các ngày lễ. Thưởng theo dự án và theo năng lực. Bảo hiểm xã hội đóng full lương. Cơ hội onsite, giao tiếp trực tiếp với khách hàng nước ngoài.

title: Middle AI Engineer (Inference Engineering)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Competitive salary package & 13th month & bonus Talented team and leaders from Silicon Valley Cool products for global market The Job AI Engineer Location: Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam Type: Full-time Team: AI / Engineering About Autonomous Autonomous is an AI-native company founded in 2015, transforming from smart office products into a global AI hardware and product company. We are building intelligent products that combine hardware, software, and AI to enhance how people work, create, and interact with technology in real life. Our mission is to build AI-powered systems and products that enhance human productivity and creativity at scale. About the Role We are looking for an AI Engineer to help build, optimize, and deploy AI systems for real-world products. This role is ideal for someone strong in model development, inference optimization, and production deployment, with the ability to work across research, engineering, and product teams. What You’ll Work On You will work across Autonomous’ key AI product ecosystem, with a focus on: 1. Workspace AI: AI features for Autonomous’ workspace products, including desks, chairs, and WorkPods, making them more intelligent, adaptive, and personalized. 2. Lamp: A physical AI companion for your desk that sees, hears, remembers, and proactively checks in before you ask, powered by expressive motion and local AI for private, personal interactions. 3. Intern: The world’s first personal AI device, powered by OpenClaw, designed to handle tasks through simple. You will help build AI capabilities that turn user requests into real actions across work, research, and productivity workflows. Responsibilities Develop, train, evaluate, and optimize AI/ML models for production use cases. Build and improve inference pipelines for computer vision, LLM, and multimodal AI systems. Optimize model performance, latency, and cost using techniques such as quantization, pruning, ONNX, TensorRT, or Triton Inference Server. Deploy AI models into production environments and monitor performance over time. Work with engineering teams to integrate AI models into applications, services, or device-side systems. Conduct experiments, benchmark models, and document technical findings clearly. Review code, improve model-serving workflows, and contribute to engineering best practices. Stay updated with new AI models, frameworks, and optimization techniques. Your Skills and Experience Requirements 1+ years of hands-on experience in AI/ML engineering, deep learning, or applied AI. Strong programming skills in Python. Experience with PyTorch or TensorFlow. Solid understanding of machine learning, deep learning, model evaluation, and data preprocessing. Experience building or deploying AI models in real-world projects. Familiarity with model optimization or inference deployment. Ability to read technical papers, experiment with new models, and turn research into working systems. Good problem-solving skills and willingness to work in a fast-paced product environment. Nice to Have Experience with ONNX, TensorRT, Triton Inference Server, vLLM, llama.cpp, or similar inference tools. Experience with edge deployment, Jetson, embedded systems, or device-side AI. Experience with computer vision, LLMs, RAG, multimodal systems, or AI agents. Experience with Docker, cloud deployment, CI/CD, or production ML pipelines. C/C++ experience. Strong math foundation or research background. What We Look For Strong technical foundation and curiosity. Hands-on builder mindset. Ability to learn fast and ship practical AI systems. Clear communication and ownership. Interest in building AI products from Vietnam for the global market. Why You'll Love Working Here Why you’ll love working here You be you. We deeply care about helping everyone at Autonomous work on what they love, freely express their ideas within the organization, and grow to to their true potential. You be a better you. Most of the time, you’ll be working on cutting edge technologies. You’ll be constantly learning and improving your knowledge as an engineer, researcher or scientist. You are your own boss. There is very little hierarchy at Autonomous. Decision making processes are transparent and open to vote. We welcome all different ways of thinking and trust the people we work with to do what they do best. There is no micromanagement here. You the inventor. Most of the time, you’ll find yourself working on a problem that doesn’t have a solution - yet. That’s where you come in. Solve problems for the world, not just Vietnam. Most of the problems we’re solving are for the global audience of today, and of tomorrow.
