title: AI Engineer Internship with Top Korean AI Companies
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job RESPONSIBILITIES Participate in real-world AI projects with leading AI companies from Korea Develop, optimize, and deploy AI models, with a primary focus on Computer Vision Take ownership of the end-to-end AI development lifecycle, including: model research and experimentation dataset research, preparation, and augmentation pre-training and fine-tuning deployment to edge devices model evaluation and performance analysis Build scalable AI pipelines across cloud, mobile, and embedded environments other AI-related tasks : LLM / VLM engineering, data pipeline development, data mining and analysis, manufacturing AI Your Skills and Experience REQUIREMENTS Programming: Proficient in Python, familiar with libraries such as NumPy, Pandas, scikit-learn, and PyTorch or TensorFlow Foundational Knowledge: Solid understanding of Machine Learning and Deep Learning concepts, including transformers, Computer Vision and embeddings Preferred: Hands-on experience with Computer Vision model training (Yolo,ShuffleNet,MobileNet,DETR,etc) and data augmentation techniques Communication skills: Good communication skills in Vietnamese and English Education: Final-year student or fresh graduate in Computer Science, AI, Data Science, or a related field Why You'll Love Working Here About Us: ABC Studio (AI Bigdata Content Studio) is a Korea–Vietnam AI company specializing in AI optimization, generative AI, and big data engineering, with a strong focus on market intelligence, visual content, Computer Vision and Edge AI for smart devices. We work closely with leading Korean partners to optimize and deploy AI models — from computer vision to LLMs — on edge and low-power platforms, enabling scalable, high-performance AI solutions across digital marketing, retail, and embedded systems. Our Vision : To become a global leading company in market intelligence, leveraging large-scale data from global e-commerce platforms, KOLs, and social media To build a robust AI infrastructure layer for efficient deployment across cloud, mobile, and embedded devices To lead innovation in AI-driven content engineering , spanning film (VFX), webtoons, and social marketing In the second half of 2026, we are planning to launch multiple new Computer Vision AI projects in collaboration with our Korean partners. We are looking for enthusiastic and talented individuals who are eager to grow with us and take part in a long-term, meaningful journey at the forefront of AI innovation.

title: ASIC Layout Design Engineer
company: Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Committed 13th-mth bonus + attractive yearly bonus Premium Healthcare for you and 2 family members 16++ days of paid leave per year The Job Company Description The Bosch Group is a leading global supplier of technology and services. Since the beginning of 2013, its operations have been divided into four business sectors: Automotive Technology, Industrial Technology, Consumer Goods, and Energy and Building Technology. The Bosch Group comprises Robert Bosch GmbH and its roughly 360 subsidiaries and regional companies in some 50 countries. If its sales and service partners are included, then Bosch is represented in roughly 150 countries. This worldwide development, manufacturing, and sales network is the foundation for further growth. Bosch Global Software Technologies Company Limited (BGSV) i s 100% owned subsidiary of Robert Bosch GmbH - one of the world’s leading global suppliers of technology and services, offering end-to-end Engineering, IT, and Business Solutions. Starting its operation from 2010 at Etown 2 in HCMC, BGSV is the first software development center of Bosch in Southeast Asia. BGSV nowadays have over 4,000 associates, with a global footprint and presence in the US, Europe, and the Asia Pacific region. With our unique ability to offer end-to-end solutions that connect sensors, software, and services, we enable businesses to move from the traditional to digital or improve businesses by introducing a digital element in their products and processes. Job Description We are actively seeking skilled ASIC Layout Designer with expertise in analog layout to join our exclusive talent pool for future opportunities in cutting-edge MEMS sensor projects. If you're passionate about ASIC design and have the niche skills we're looking for, we want to hear from you! While we may not have immediate openings, we recognize that professionals with your expertise are in high demand, and we are eager to stay in touch for future opportunities. As an ASIC Layout Designer , you will be responsible for: Analog Layout Design from the block level to top-level IC integration. Performing physical verification for advanced ASICs in MEMS sensor applications. Collaborating with international design teams to ensure timely and high-quality layout delivery. Managing the entire tape-out flow in coordination with the wafer foundry. Collaborating with digital backend engineers to generate DEF files for P&R and integrating the digital layout into the overall chip. Working with CAD engineers to continuously enhance our PDKs and design environments. Your Skills and Experience Bachelor's/Master's in Microelectronics or Electrical Engineering (focus on analog circuits, digital circuits, semiconductor devices, and physics). Proven experience in analog/mixed-signal IC layout (ADCs, DACs, PLLs, LDOs, charge pumps, bandgap). Expertise in TSMC 28nm ~ 152nm, SMIC 110nm, and TZ 180nm BCD SOI technologies and design rules. Proficient in Cadence Virtuoso, verification tools (Calibre, PVS, Assura), and CMOS process effect mitigation. Familiar with experience in EM/IR drop analysis, Linux OS, and programming (Shell, Skill, Python, Tcl). Good English communication Why You'll Love Working Here Why Join Our team ? Future Opportunities : Get early access to upcoming roles and projects. Cutting-Edge Work : Contribute to the development of next-gen MEMS sensor ASICs and hardware technology. International Collaboration : Work with global teams in a dynamic, innovative environment. Exclusive Access : Be the first to hear about high-impact opportunities in the ASIC design space. If you’re ready to be part of groundbreaking projects and make an impact in the world of MEMS sensors and ASIC design , join our talent pool today! We’ll reach out when the right opportunity arises. Why BOSCH? Because we do not just follow trends, we create them. Together we turn ideas into reality, working every day to make the world of tomorrow a better place. Do you have high standards when it comes to your job? So do we. At Bosch, you will discover more than just work. Benefits and Career Opportunities Working in one of the Best Places to Work in Vietnam and Top 30 of the Most Innovative Companies all over the world Join in a dynamic and fast-growing global company ( English-speaking environment), with opportunity to work in global projects and being a part of innovation team contributing initiative ideas to the hi-tech world Onsite opportunities : short-term and long-term assignments in worldwide offices Engage in our diverse training programs which surely help strengthen both your personal and professionalism 13th-month salary bonus + attractive performance bonus (you'll love it!) + annual performance appraisal 100% offered salary and mandatory social insurances in 2-month probation 15++ days of annual leave + 1-day of birthday leave Premium health insurance for employee and 02 family members Flexible working time and working model Lunch and parking allowance Good benefits of company activities such as: football, badminton, yoga, Aerobic, team building…

title: Senior Data Engineer - Financial Crime
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Excellent environment and team to help you grow. Competitive salary and learning culture. Premium health care for you and your family. The Job About GoTymeX: GoTymeX is Tyme Group 's Technology & Product Development Hub with a global mission to become serial bank builders. Our Financial Crime platform plays a critical role in protecting customers and the bank from fraud, money laundering, and other financial crimes using advanced data, analytics, AI, and automation. About the Role We’re looking for a Senior Data Engineer to join our Financial Crime team. You’ll be part of the group responsible for building and maintaining high-performance data pipelines that drive fraud detection, entity resolution, and compliance analytics across Tyme’s ecosystem. The ideal candidate should relocate to Vietnam. You’ll work with large, complex datasets in Databricks , integrate data from multiple systems in real time and batch, and help design the data foundation for real-time risk detection and case management. Key Responsibilities: Build and optimize data ingestion pipelines using Python and PySpark to collect and transform data from multiple sources (transactions, KYC, AML, authentication, devices, logs, etc.). Proficiency in SQL (PostGres preferred) Design and maintain data model that support Financial Crime/Fraud detection, profiling, and entity resolution. Implement data quality checks and ensur e data reliability across environments. Collaborate closely with Data Scientists, Analysts, Compliance, Operations and our Product/Feature teams to operationalize models and rules. Utilize jobs, workflows, APIs and streaming to manage large-scale data processing workloads. Integrate with external systems (e.g. sanctions, ID&V, biometrics and authentication systems) to enrich risk and identity data. Support automation and monitoring of ETL processes to improve operational efficiency. Your Skills and Experience Requirements Must have: Bachelor’s degree. 5+ years of experience Strong skills in Python, PySpark, Scala and Advanced SQL (preferably PostGres) Hands-on experience with Databricks, Snowflake, Fabric or similar Experience working with structured and unstructured data in a production environment. Experience with Agentic AI, MLFlow, ML models, Eval Secure Coding practices – testing/QA Comfortable with cloud-based data platforms (preferably AWS). Good communication skills in English — able to collaborate with cross-functional teams in an international environment. Proficiency in working with Text, Delta, Parquet, JSON, CSV, and XML data formats. Working knowledge of Spark structured streaming. AWS infrastructure experience, specifically working with S3. Solid understanding of git-based version control, DevOps, and CI/CD. Experience of working on Atlassian stack a plus. Knowledge of common web API frameworks and web services. Strong teamwork, relationship, and client management skills, and the ability to influence peers and senior management to accomplish team goals. Willingness to embrace modern technology, best practice, and ways of work. Nice to have: Experience in Financial Crime/AML, KYC, or fraud detection systems. Familiarity with Entity Resolution frameworks (e.g., Quantexa, Sensing, open source Entity Resolution tools). Experience with data streaming frameworks (Kafka, Spark Streaming, MQ). Why You'll Love Working Here You’ll love working with us if you are: Passionate about technology. Independent but also a good team player. Comfortable with a high degree of ambiguity. Focused on usability and speed. Keen on presenting your ideas to your peers and management. At GoTymeX, opportunities are here for the taking. If you want to be part of our purpose and live and lead through our values, we can offer exciting development opportunities through expanded lateral roles, stretch assignments, or people leadership. Some of our benefits: Meal and parking allowances are covered by the company. Full benefits and salary rank during probation . Insurances such as Vietnamese labor law and premium health care for you and your family. SMART goals and clear career opportunities (technical seminar, conference, and career talk) - we focus on your development. Values-driven, international working environment, and agile culture. Overseas travel opportunities for training and work-related. Internal Hackathons and company events (team building, coffee run, etc.). Pro-Rate and performance bonus . 15-day annual + 3-day sick leave per year from the company. Work-life balance 40-hr per week from Mon to Fri . Performance-based bonus and equity participation in GoTyme Group

title: [Young Talent] Data Science & Risk Modeling Spealist
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Mức lương cạnh tranh, hấp dẫn Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp, thân thiện Được làm việc với các hệ thống hiện đại, tiên tiến The Job 2026TD453779 - [Young Talent] Chuyên viên Mô hình rủi ro Thực hiện các công việc liên quan đến việc xây dựng mô hình rủi ro tín dụng trong phạm vi chức năng được giao, đảm bảo tuân thủ quy trình và quy định của MB nhằm đạt được các mục tiêu chung của đơn vị. Thu thập và xử lý dữ liệu để xây dựng các mô hình và công cụ đo lường rủi ro tín dụng, hệ thống xếp hạng khách hàng (scoring), và hệ thống cảnh báo sớm. Xây dựng và triển khai các thẻ điểm/mô hình định lượng rủi ro tín dụng, rủi ro tín dụng tập trung và rủi ro tín dụng đối tác theo phạm vi phân công. Hỗ trợ thiết lập các công cụ kiểm tra sức chịu đựng rủi ro tín dụng, bao gồm thu thập thông tin, đề xuất kịch bản sức chịu đựng, đánh giá và phân tích tác động của kịch bản đối với các yếu tố như tỷ lệ nợ xấu (NPL), dự phòng rủi ro tín dụng, vốn cho rủi ro tín dụng, và thu nhập từ hoạt động tín dụng. Tham gia xây dựng các công cụ hỗ trợ việc định giá dựa trên rủi ro (risk-based pricing). Tư vấn và đóng góp ý kiến trong quá trình xây dựng và triển khai các mô hình tín dụng tại các đơn vị liên quan trong MB và các công ty thành viên. Đưa ra các khuyến nghị và báo cáo dựa trên kết quả phân tích đầu ra từ các mô hình đo lường rủi ro tín dụng, nhằm hỗ trợ cải thiện Khung quản trị rủi ro tín dụng. Thực hiện các công việc khác theo phân công của quản lý trực tiếp, phù hợp với năng lực và phạm vi công việc. Your Skills and Experience Tốt nghiệp Đại học các chuyên ngành như Toán Kinh tế, Khoa học Dữ Liệu, Tài chính - Ngân hàng, Thống kê, Công nghệ Thông tin (CNTT). Ưu tiên tốt nghiệp loại Xuất sắc Ưu tiên ứng viên kinh nghiệm làm việc/ thực tập/ tham gia các dự án liên quan đến phân tích dữ liệu và xây dựng mô hình rủi ro. Ưu tiên ứng viên có các chứng chỉ liên quan (CFA, FRM) Tiếng Anh tốt Thành thạo trong xử lý và phân tích dữ liệu, sử dụng SQL, Python, PowerBI/Tableau. Kỹ năng giao tiếp và làm việc nhóm tốt. Ứng viên ứng tuyển vui lòng nêu rõ GPA, xếp loại tốt nghiệp và năm tốt nghiệp. MB Bank yêu cầu ứng viên ứng tuyển cần cung cấp chi tiết các thông tin sau: - Thông tin cá nhân: Họ và tên, Ngày tháng năm sinh, Giới tính - Số điện thoại và Email liên hệ - Trình độ học vấn, Trường đã tốt nghiệp - Kinh nghiệm làm việc - Từ 3 - 5 kỹ năng nổi bật - Nguồn Tuyển dụng Vì sao Bạn nên đảm bảo đầy đủ thông tin khi ứng tuyển? - Hồ sơ của Bạn sẽ được đánh giá nhanh chóng. - Đối với các hồ sơ đáp ứng đầy đủ thông tin và tiêu chí tuyển dụng phù hợp, MB Bank sẽ chủ động liên hệ phỏng vấn trong thời gian sớm nhất. - Ứng viên vui lòng kiểm tra email và điện thoại thường xuyên để không bỏ lỡ lịch hẹn phỏng vấn. Cập nhật ngay thông tin mới nhất về các Chương trình do MB tổ chức tại FanPage: - Ai yêu Miền Bắc hơn MBers - Ai yêu Miền Trung hơn MBers - Ai yêu Miền Nam hơn MBers Why You'll Love Working Here Trải nghiệm Thu nhập hấp dẫn với gói đãi ngộ toàn diện: Thưởng thành tích tháng 13; Thưởng thành tích theo kết quả công việc 06 tháng, 1 năm ; Thưởng các dịp lễ tết trong năm ; Thưởng theo danh hiệu cá nhân và tập thể… Du lịch nghỉ dưỡng hàng năm Khám sức khỏe định kì Gói bảo hiểm sức khỏe cá nhân và người thân (MIC) Quà tặng và ngày nghỉ sinh nhật hưởng nguyên lương Cơ hội nghề nghiệp và phát triển bản thân: Được thử sức với các nền tảng công nghệ mới, tham gia vào những dự án chuyển đổi lớn của ngân hàng Có cơ hội học hỏi từ các Chuyên gia, Lãnh đạo nội bộ hàng đầu tại MB trong lĩnh vực IT, Tài chính ngân hàng Được trải nghiệm các phương pháp học tập mới và phát triển năng lực theo lộ trình công danh. Hưởng các chính sách hỗ trợ, khuyến khích học tập, nâng cao trình độ và phát triển bản thân (chứng chỉ nghề quốc tế...) Môi trường làm việc lý tưởng với: Những người cộng sự thân thiện và tài năng Cơ sở vật chất, không gian làm việc xanh và hiện đại.

title: AI Engineer
company: CÔNG TY TNHH NANYANG BIOLOGICS VIỆT NAM
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job NYB is seeking an innovative and passionate AI Engineer to join our growing team. The ideal candidate is a proactive, problem-solving engineer with experience in building scalable, high-performance applications. Your expertise will enable NYB to create cutting-edge digital solutions that drive innovation in AI-powered drug discovery. Responsibilities Design, develop and implement AI/ML models and algorithms for a variety of use cases. Leverage deep learning, natural language processing (NLP), and large language model (LLM) techniques to analyze complex data, uncover patterns, and support data-driven decision-making across research and development activities. Fine-tune and deploy transformer-based models for domain-specific tasks such as information extraction, classification, summarization, and similarity detection. Develop robust and maintainable ML pipelines for data preprocessing, model training, validation, deployment, and monitoring. Ensure reproducibility and scalability of AI systems through tools such as MLflow, Docker, and cloud services. Contribute to the continuous improvement of our AI stack by researching, evaluating, and implementing state-of-the-art models and techniques. Maintain code quality, reproducibility, and documentation standards in all ML projects. Conduct thorough data-centric approaches - cleaning, augmentation, drift detection, and versioning. Your Skills and Experience Qualifications Must have: Bachelor’s degree or higher in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Information Technology, or a related field. 2-5 years of hands-on experience in AI/ML engineering roles. Proficiency in Python and common ML frameworks such as PyTorch, TensorFlow, and Keras. Experience in developing and serving AI models with FastAPI, Flask, Docker. Prior experience with LLMs integration (e.g., OpenAI, Claude) and prompt engineering to deploy AI applications. Solid knowledge in Computer Vision and NLP techniques (e.g., YOLOv5/6, LayoutLM). Hands-on experience with model optimization tools such as ONNX, TensorRT, and TFLite. Experience in MLOps tools: MLflow, BentoML, Evidently, Prometheus, Grafana. Strong data handling and visualization using Pandas, Seaborn, Matplotlib. Familiarity with DevOps practices and version control (Git/GitHub Actions). Knowledge/experience in scalable cloud infrastructure (AWS / GCP / Azure). Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to learn new technologies quickly. Fluent in English. Why You'll Love Working Here Benefits We provide a dynamic, fast-paced, and collaborative environment where problem-solving and agility are at the heart of what we do. Along with a competitive salary, we foster a culture that values ambition, confidence, and humility, consistently pushing the boundaries of innovation. If you're excited about working in a young, talented tech company and want to explore the world of AI and pharmaceuticals, we encourage you to apply. Competitive salary Workplace : 45-47 Tran Xuan Soan, Hai Ba Trung, Ha Noi (From Monday to Friday: 9h -17h). Build a professional network through collaborations with pharmaceutical companies, industry leaders, and academic experts. Work on impactful projects that address critical challenges in drug discovery and healthcare.

title: AI Developer
company: Ngân hàng TMCP Phương Đông | OCB
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Large-scale technology projects Bonus and benefits - Bank’s policies Loan programs for employees The Job I. The Role This is not a research role and not a "PoC factory." You will join OCB's AI Squad — a small, elite, forward-deployed unit modeled on the Palantir Forward-Deployed Engineer and Navy SEAL operating philosophy: a few exceptional engineers who embed directly inside business divisions, find the highest-value problems, and ship production AI that moves the bank's numbers. You will own outcomes, not tickets. Your work is measured against two hard targets: Cost-to-Income Ratio (CIR) improvement — automating high-cost manual workflows (document processing, credit operations, AML/ops review, RM support) so the bank does more with the same headcount. Or: Revenue growth through personalization — building AI systems that lift products-per-customer, card and lending penetration, CASA, and campaign conversion by delivering the right offer to the right customer at the right time. You embed with a division, learn its workflow better than it knows itself, build the agent or pipeline that removes the cost or unlocks the revenue, and put it into production. Then you do it again. II. What You'll Own 1. Forward-Deployed Delivery Embed directly with a business division (Retail, SME, Risk, Operations, AML) — sit with the operators, map the workflow end-to-end, and identify where AI removes cost or creates revenue. Own the full lifecycle of each solution: problem framing, architecture, data pipeline, build, deployment, integration with core banking, and the business result. You are accountable for the metric, not just the model. Ship fast and iterate in production. We measure success in deployed systems and basis points of CIR, not slide decks. 2. Personalization & Revenue Engines Build AI systems that drive revenue through personalization: next-best-offer and next-best-action engines, pre-approved credit and lending journeys, CASA/cash-leakage retention prompts, and RM/PRM coaching assistants that tell front-line staff exactly what to pitch to whom. Connect customer behavioral signals, product-holding data, and transaction patterns into agentic workflows that act — not dashboards that observe. 3. Cost & Operations Automation (CIR) Build agentic and RAG workflows that collapse manual cost: credit-policy lookup, risk-analysis support, AML alert triage and case automation, and operations/RM assistant tools. Build document-intelligence pipelines — OCR and data extraction for contracts and collateral, valuation support, signature verification, and automated document classification — using vision-language models where they earn their place. 4. Production AI Engineering Stand up evaluation frameworks, guardrails, and observability for every system you ship. Banking-grade means measurable, monitored, and safe by default. Own deployment, model serving, monitoring, and retraining. Meet SLAs. Partner with IT and infra to integrate cleanly with core banking systems (T24, Way4, LOS, OMNI) and internal platforms. 5. Squad Leadership Set the engineering bar. Mentor junior squad members and pull business stakeholders along with you — translating workflow pain into shipped systems and shipped systems into business value. Yêu cầu Experience - 4+ years in AI/ML engineering with a real track record of production systems, not prototypes. You can point to things running in production with users and business impact behind them. - Banking, financial services, or another regulated, security-sensitive industry is a strong plus. - Bonus: experience as a forward-deployed / solutions / embedded engineer where you owned a customer or business outcome directly. Core Skills - Production-grade LangChain/LangGraph — multi-agent architectures, function calling, tool integration, stateful graphs. This is the bar. - Strong command of advanced RAG pipeline design and agent orchestration. - Computer Vision / VLM for OCR, document intelligence, and image analysis. - LLMOps/MLOps: model serving (FastAPI, vLLM, Triton), containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), CI/CD, evaluation and guardrails. - Databricks (Delta Lake, MLflow) for data processing and scaled deployment. How You Operate - Outcome-obsessed. You measure your work in CIR basis points and revenue lift, not commits. - Embedded and fearless. Comfortable sitting with operators, learning a domain cold, and owning the result in front of business leaders. - Bias to ship. Production over PowerPoint. Fast iteration, tight feedback loops. - Excellent communicator who can translate technical work for non-technical stakeholders. Bilingual Vietnamese/English is a strong plus. Quyền lợi và chế độ - 100% salary during probation - 13th month salary and year-end bonus based on business performance (1–3.5 months’ salary) - Competitive total compensation, commensurate with experience and capability - Annual salary review based on performance - Bonus and benefits in accordance with the Bank’s policies - Eligibility for preferential loan programs for employees - Health insurance card covering inpatient and outpatient medical care (as per policy) - Professional working environment with deep technical specialization and long-term career development - Opportunity to participate in large-scale technology projects in the banking and finance domain - Exposure to core banking systems, large-scale data, and high-security environments - Regular internal training programs in technical expertise, banking knowledge, and soft skills Your Skills and Experience Experience - 4+ years in AI/ML engineering with a real track record of production systems, not prototypes. You can point to things running in production with users and business impact behind them. - Banking, financial services, or another regulated, security-sensitive industry is a strong plus. - Bonus: experience as a forward-deployed / solutions / embedded engineer where you owned a customer or business outcome directly. Core Skills - Production-grade LangChain/LangGraph — multi-agent architectures, function calling, tool integration, stateful graphs. This is the bar. - Strong command of advanced RAG pipeline design and agent orchestration. - Computer Vision / VLM for OCR, document intelligence, and image analysis. - LLMOps/MLOps: model serving (FastAPI, vLLM, Triton), containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), CI/CD, evaluation and guardrails. - Databricks (Delta Lake, MLflow) for data processing and scaled deployment. How You Operate - Outcome-obsessed. You measure your work in CIR basis points and revenue lift, not commits. - Embedded and fearless. Comfortable sitting with operators, learning a domain cold, and owning the result in front of business leaders. - Bias to ship. Production over PowerPoint. Fast iteration, tight feedback loops. - Excellent communicator who can translate technical work for non-technical stakeholders. Bilingual Vietnamese/English is a strong plus. Quyền lợi và chế độ - 100% salary during probation - 13th month salary and year-end bonus based on business performance (1–3.5 months’ salary) - Competitive total compensation, commensurate with experience and capability - Annual salary review based on performance - Bonus and benefits in accordance with the Bank’s policies - Eligibility for preferential loan programs for employees - Health insurance card covering inpatient and outpatient medical care (as per policy) - Professional working environment with deep technical specialization and long-term career development - Opportunity to participate in large-scale technology projects in the banking and finance domain - Exposure to core banking systems, large-scale data, and high-security environments - Regular internal training programs in technical expertise, banking knowledge, and soft skills Why You'll Love Working Here - 100% salary during probation - 13th month salary and year-end bonus based on business performance (1–3.5 months’ salary) - Competitive total compensation, commensurate with experience and capability - Annual salary review based on performance - Bonus and benefits in accordance with the Bank’s policies - Eligibility for preferential loan programs for employees - Health insurance card covering inpatient and outpatient medical care (as per policy) - Professional working environment with deep technical specialization and long-term career development - Opportunity to participate in large-scale technology projects in the banking and finance domain - Exposure to core banking systems, large-scale data, and high-security environments - Regular internal training programs in technical expertise, banking knowledge, and soft skills

title: Senior Devops Engineer
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Hybrid working Wonderful and Human focus Environment Global Training Program (Cloud, OS,...) The Job We are looking for a hands-on Senior DevOps Engineer to strengthen our platform engineering team. In this role you will design, build, and operate cloud infrastructure on Azure or GCP, drive CI/CD automation, and embed GitOps practices that let product teams ship with confidence. You will work closely with infrastructure, security, and application teams — translating complex technical solutions into measurable business outcomes while raising the DevOps bar across the organization. Key Responsibilities Infrastructure & Cloud Design, develop, and manage cloud infrastructure using an IaC tool such as Terraform, Bicep, or CloudFormation. Administer and harden Linux servers for DevOps and application workloads, ensuring security and operational stability. Manage containerized workloads with Kubernetes and Docker, including cluster configuration, scaling, and lifecycle management. CI/CD & Automation Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines using one or more tools such as GitHub Actions, Jenkins, or Azure DevOps. Implement GitOps workflows using a tool such as FluxCD with Helm charts to enable automated, declarative delivery. Develop automation scripts in Bash and/or Python to drive operational efficiency and environment management. Observability & Reliability Operate and optimize a monitoring and observability stack — such as Grafana/Prometheus, ELK/OpenSearch, Dynatrace, or Datadog. Implement and support robust logging, alerting, and incident response strategies. Collaboration & Leadership Collaborate cross-functionally with infrastructure, security, and other internal teams to deliver reliable, scalable services. Communicate clearly with internal stakeholders and customers, translating technical solutions into business value. Lead or contribute to technical decision-making, best practice definition, and DevOps knowledge sharing within the team. What Seniority Means in This Role We are not just looking for someone who can execute tasks — we expect a Senior DevOps Engineer to operate with a high degree of autonomy, ownership, and technical leadership. Here is what that looks like day-to-day: Ownership & Autonomy You take end-to-end ownership of infrastructure domains — from design through delivery and ongoing operations — without needing close supervision. You proactively identify gaps in reliability, security, or scalability and drive improvements rather than waiting to be assigned work. Technical Depth & Judgement You make sound architectural decisions independently, weighing trade-offs between tooling choices, cost, maintainability, and risk. You are the go-to person for complex infrastructure problems, debugging production incidents, and designing resilient systems. You stay current with the DevOps ecosystem and can evaluate new tools or practices critically before adopting them. Influence & Mentorship You actively raise the team’s technical bar — through code reviews, pairing sessions, internal workshops, or written documentation. You mentor junior and mid-level engineers, providing constructive feedback and helping them grow into independent contributors. You contribute to defining team standards, best practices, and DevOps culture within the engineering organization. Stakeholder Communication You communicate infrastructure decisions, risks, and trade-offs clearly to both technical peers and non-technical stakeholders. You translate platform work into business value — uptime, velocity, cost savings — and advocate for platform investment when needed. Your Skills and Experience Must Have Experience 5–7 years of professional experience in a DevOps or Infrastructure Engineering role. Professional-level hands-on experience with Azure or GCP (deep expertise in one is required). Infrastructure as Code Proficiency in at least one IaC tool: Terraform (preferred), Bicep, or CloudFormation. Strong grasp of IaC best practices: state management, module design, drift detection, and GitOps workflows. CI/CD & GitOps Hands-on experience with at least one CI/CD platform: GitHub Actions , Jenkins, or Azure DevOps. Experience with GitOps tooling — FluxCD preferred — using Helm charts for declarative delivery. Familiarity with version control systems: Git or Azure DevOps Git. Platform & Systems Strong Linux system administration and troubleshooting experience. Skilled in scripting and automation using Bash and/or Python. Experience managing containerized workloads on Kubernetes and/or Docker. Observability Solid knowledge of at least one monitoring/logging stack: Prometheus/Grafana, ELK, OpenSearch, Dynatrace , or Datadog. Strong understanding of DevOps best practices including security, reliability, and scalability. Communication Excellent English communication skills — written and spoken — for both technical and non-technical audiences. Proven ability to document, present, and advocate technical decisions clearly. Nice to Have French language proficiency (any level) — a valued plus for client-facing and multi-region team engagement. Relevant DevOps certifications: CKA, Terraform Associate, or Azure DevOps Expert. BSc / MSc in Computer Science, Engineering, or an equivalent technical discipline. Working experience at an IT services or managed services provider. Experience with multi-cloud or hybrid cloud deployments. Awareness of security and compliance frameworks such as SOC 2, ISO 27001, or CIS Benchmarks — hands-on experience is a plus. Exposure to SRE practices and site reliability concepts. Why You'll Love Working Here Hybrid working Global Training Performance bonus Full social insurance, unemployment insurance, health insurance Personal incident and health insurance Wonderful and Human focus Environment Dynamic and young work force Great working environment (relax corners, PS4, ping-pong table etc.) Allowances (lunch, parking, mobi, transportation) Travel opportunities (Inter sites mobility) Team activities (CSR, Coffee hours, Friday Talking, YEP, …)

title: Industrial Data Systems Engineer
company: Công ty TNHH Peregrine Management Việt Nam
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job Position Overview We are seeking an experienced Industrial Data Systems Engineer to help design and build software and data infrastructure supporting advanced manufacturing and industrial process development initiatives. In this role, you will develop systems that collect, organize, store, and process operational and machine-related data from industrial environments. Working alongside AI/ML engineers and manufacturing specialists, you will help create reliable data infrastructure and backend systems that support analytics, process optimization, and AI-driven applications. This is a hands-on engineering role focused on practical implementation, system reliability, and scalable industrial software architecture. Key Responsibilities Design, build, and maintain backend systems supporting industrial and manufacturing data collection Develop data ingestion pipelines for machine, sensor, and operational data Build and manage databases for structured and unstructured manufacturing-related data Develop APIs and services supporting downstream analytics and AI/ML applications Support integration with industrial equipment, controllers, sensors, and external systems where required Assist with deployment and maintenance of on-premise, edge, and cloud-connected infrastructure environments Collaborate with AI/ML engineers to support model training, inference, and operational deployment requirements Monitor and improve system reliability, data consistency, and overall platform performance Document system architectures, workflows, and technical configurations Participate in experimentation, troubleshooting, and continuous improvement activities Your Skills and Experience Required Qualifications Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Informations Systems, or a related technical field 5+ years of relevant professional experience in software engineering, backend systems, industrial software, or data engineering Strong experience with backend software development and API design Experience working with relational databases (PostgreSQL preferred) Experience building data Each engineer owns a feature end-to-end - from data model to UI pixel - and thinks like a Product Owner when scoping, like a Solutions Architect when designing, and like a craftsman when coding. If you want to work with people like that and become like them, this is the next step. What you'll do Feature ownership Take a feature from kick-off to production: data model, API design, service layer, UI. Own reliability, performance, and observability of what you ship - not just the happy path. Turn product goals into concrete technical specs. System design & architecture Design full-stack architectures: databases, APIs, queues, caches, frontend rendering strategies. Apply patterns (Clean Architecture, Event - Driven, etc) where they fit the problem. Write design docs and lead technical discussions. Backend Build well-tested APIs and microservices in Node.js, Go, or Python - whichever fits. Design and optimize relational and non-relational databases. Work with event streaming. Frontend Build fast, accessible, SEO-friendly storefronts with React / Next.js (SSR/CSR as appropriate). Optimize Core Web Vitals, bundle size, lazy loading, and CDN strategy (Cloudflare, AWS S3). Write maintainable state management (Redux, Zustand, Recoil). Code quality & collaboration Write clean, tested, well-structured code; review teammates' code. Treat unit/integration/e2e testing and CI/CD as standard practice. Work with Product and Design to shape requirements, not just receive them. Support junior engineers Your Skills and Experience Education & Experience Education: Strong academic background in Computer Science, Engineering,... 5+ years of professional engineering with real fullstack work. We value T-shaped engineers who have a clear spike (deep expertise) in either Frontend or Backend, but possess the full-stack capability to own and ship a feature end-to-end when needed 2+ years building products at a product company, fast-growing tech startup, or environments demanding strong product-led delivery. Built or joined at least one system from scratch: schema, API, service, and UI. Technical Depth & Domain Knowledge We don't gate-keep on language, but you should understand the why behind your choices. Must have at least one stack in depth: TypeScript / JavaScript: Node.js, React, Next.js (SSR, API routes, state management), Node / Go / Java: backend services, goroutines, clean service architecture Python: API backends, scripting, data-adjacent services LLM / AI integration in production features Databases (required): Relational design: normalization, indexing, query optimization, transactions (PostgreSQL preferred) At least one NoSQL store in production (Redis, MongoDB, Elasticsearch) Able to diagnose and fix a slow query System-level: Async systems: queues, events, background workers Judgment on when caching helps vs. when it creates problems Monolith and Microservice trade offs Nice to have: eCommerce: checkout flows, inventory, pricing engines, ad integrations Docker, Kubernetes basics, CI/CD pipeline ownership Why You'll Love Working Here Ownership: Direct ownership of real work streams from day 1 with a clear trajectory toward product leadership roles. AI Implementation: Hands-on experience deploying cutting-edge AI solutions to solve high-scale business problems. High-performance Team: Work with a data-driven team that values autonomy, speed, and outcomes. Compensation: Competitive total compensation package (13 months guarantee + attractive bonus). Health & Leave: 15 paid leave days + global health insurance. Learning Budget: Dedicated L&D budget to support your professional development.

title: Junior C++ Software Developer (Linux)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Valuing our people with competitive compensation Supporting our people’s health and wellbeing Empowering our people to grow and thrive The Job Company Description Technology is our how. And people are our why. For over two decades, we have been harnessing technology to drive meaningful change. By combining world-class engineering, industry expertise and a people-centric mindset, we consult and partner with leading brands from various industries to create dynamic platforms and intelligent digital experiences that drive innovation and transform businesses. From prototype to real-world impact - be part of a global shift by doing work that matters. Job Description Exciting new opportunities to develop, maintain and modernize CSCF (Call Session Control Function), a software-only core network application in the IP Multimedia Subsystem (IMS) responsible for SIP/SDP signaling, registration and session control. CSCF runs as an application on top of the Application Development Platform (ADP) and is delivered as a cloud-native for carrier-grade telecom networks. By joining the team, you will work on CSCF application components such as SIP Stack, Diameter Stack, Event Dispatcher, Service Invocation, node-specific behavior and OAM integration. You will collaborate with global engineering teams to improve reliability, scalability, observability and service continuity across clustered deployments. Your responsibilities include but not limited to the following: Under the guidance of senior engineers, be involved in the full Software Development Life Cycle for CSCF application components and microservices, from analysis and implementation to testing, delivery and maintenance. Contribute to the development and maintenance of features related to SIP/SDP and Diameter signalling, including routing, registration, service invocation. Write clean, maintainable and well-documented code; create unit or integration tests and participate in code reviews to promote engineering best practices. Continuously learn IMS, 3GPP/IETF telecom standards and cloud-native practices to improve CSCF quality, security and performance. Your Skills and Experience Qualifications A University Qualification in Software Engineering or a related degree is required. Basic understanding of cloud-native technologies, microservices architecture and containerization, including Docker, Kubernetes and Helm. Good programming foundation in C++, with ability to use Python or Bash for automation, debugging and troubleshooting. Familiar with Linux environment, networking fundamentals and debugging of distributed systems. Willingness to learn IMS core network concepts and telecom signalling protocols such as SIP/SDP and Diameter. Understanding of software development practices such as Git, CI/CD, unit testing, code review and Agile methodologies such as Scrum or Kanban. Good analytical thinking, ownership mindset and ability to work collaboratively in a global team. Preferred Exposure to SIP, Diameter, TCP, UDP, SCTP, DNS/ENUM or 3GPP/IETF standards is a plus. Good at problem-solving skills, strong communication abilities, and a collaborative mindset. Good at English communication and presentation abilities, both written and spoken. Why You'll Love Working Here At Endava , we are offering opportunities and exciting development for our people to build an engaging technical community. Career coaching, learning and development : Certifications, soft skills, training licenses. Endava Digital Library and tech conferences. Culture and work environment : Company-sponsored team-based sports, hobby clubs, tech & social communities. Some of our benefits: Finance: Competitive salary package, annual leave encashment, 13th month salary, referral bonus; Career Development: Career coaching, global career opportunities, non-linear career paths, internal development programmes for management and technical leadership; Learning Opportunities: Complex projects, rotations, internal tech communities, training, coaching, online learning platforms subscriptions, English programme, certifications, pass-it-on sessions, workshops, conferences; Work-Life Balance: Hybrid work and flexible working hours, employee assistance programme; Health: Global internal wellbeing programme, access to wellbeing apps, premium health check, extra insurance; Community: Global internal tech communities, hobby clubs and interest groups, inclusion and diversity programmes, events and celebrations; Other: Trade Union benefits, Welcome package and gift-giving frequency.

title: AI Engineer
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Be the leading financial leasing company Young, dynamic environment Work-life balance The Job Tích hợp AI & Phát triển Tính năng: Lập trình và tích hợp các tính năng AI vào hệ thống sản phẩm chính thông qua việc kết nối, tối ưu hóa các API (OpenAI, Anthropic...) và Local Model Server của công ty. Xử lý Dữ liệu (Data Pipeline): Tham gia xây dựng các luồng xử lý, chuẩn hóa dữ liệu đầu vào (văn bản, hình ảnh, tài liệu...) để phục vụ cho các mô hình AI/LLMs. Ứng dụng RAG & Kiến trúc AI: Phối hợp triển khai hệ thống RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation), quản lý Vector Database và tối ưu hóa câu lệnh (Prompt Engineering) cho nhiều bài toán khác nhau. Phát triển Backend/API: Viết các API core chắc chắn, bảo mật và hiệu năng cao để kết nối mượt mà giữa AI service và ứng dụng người dùng. Nghiên cứu & Thử nghiệm: Chủ động tìm hiểu, benchmark hiệu năng giữa các mô hình (Cloud vs Local) và thử nghiệm các framework AI mới để ứng dụng vào các function sản phẩm đa dạng. Your Skills and Experience 1. Kỹ năng kỹ thuật (Hard Skills) Kinh nghiệm: Dưới 1 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc vững chắc với Python và NodeJS / TypeScript . Tư duy tích hợp AI: Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với Web API/RESTful API. Hiểu cách hoạt động, cách gọi và xử lý dữ liệu trả về từ các mô hình ngôn ngữ lớn (LLMs). Framework kiến thức: Biết sử dụng hoặc có tư duy tốt về các framework phát triển ứng dụng AI như LangChain, LlamaIndex, Hugging Face Transformers là một lợi thế lớn. Cơ sở dữ liệu: Thành thạo SQL/NoSQL. Có hiểu biết về Vector Database (ChromaDB, Pinecone, Milvus, pgvector...) là điểm cộng. Môi trường: Biết sử dụng Docker, Git và quen thuộc với môi trường Linux để làm việc với server. 2. Kỹ năng mềm & Tư duy (Soft Skills) Tư duy linh hoạt (Agile Mindset): Sẵn sàng tiếp nhận và giải quyết nhiều bài toán AI khác nhau tùy theo nhu cầu sản phẩm (không bị bó buộc vào một dạng task cố định). Khả năng tự nghiên cứu: Đọc hiểu tài liệu kỹ thuật tiếng Anh tốt, chủ động tìm giải pháp khi gặp các công nghệ mới hoặc lỗi hệ thống. Tinh thần Teamwork: Phối hợp tốt với các Engineer khác và bộ phận Product để hiện thực hóa ý tưởng. Why You'll Love Working Here Thời gian làm việc: 5 ngày/tuần (Thứ 2 – Thứ 6). Lương tháng 13, chế độ tăng lương, thưởng hàng năm. Xe công ty đưa đón tận nơi khi gặp khách hàng. Phụ cấp ăn trưa, cấp máy tính, điện thoại làm việc. Teambuilding đẳng cấp 5* ở trong và ngoài nước; được công ty tài trợ kinh phí khi đi du lịch và các hoạt động thể thao, dã ngoại,… theo nhóm. Ngoài chế độ bảo hiểm theo luật định còn có bảo hiểm sức khỏe và tai nạn 24/24 cho toàn nhân viên. Ứng viên được đào tạo kiến thức nghiệp vụ đối với hoạt động cho thuê tài chính. title: Fullstack Software Engineer
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Very attractive salary & benefit,Open space-hybrid Non-stop learning and growth opportunities Approved training and certifications The Job We are looking for a highly skilled and motivated Senior Full Stack Software Engineer with experience in developing web applications to join our up and coming Talosix team in Ho Chi Minh City. This is an incredibly unique opportunity to join an emerging world-class team of data scientists and data engineers to solve some of the toughest problems facing U.S. healthcare systems. Being part of a new startup, you will have the rare opportunity to make critical contributions and have input to the growth, direction and investments of the company to build products and solutions that will provide tremendous operational benefits to our healthcare customers. As a Senior Full Stack Software Engineer you will be responsible in building and scaling healthcare applications, working tightly with a highly multi-disciplinary and cross-geography team composed of data scientists, data engineers, project managers and healthcare domain experts and customers. The application and use of AI is central to how we work at Talosix. We expect every engineer on our team to actively seek, adopt, and champion AI-powered tools and practices — not as a nice-to-have, but as a core discipline. Finding ways to optimize and streamline development workflows, improve code quality, reduce cycle time, and move faster through intelligent automation is a critical expectation of this role. What you will do Design, develop, and maintain scalable web applications using modern front-end and back-end technologies. Provide technical guidance and mentorship to junior engineers, conduct code reviews, and ensure best practices. Participate in architectural discussions, making key decisions on technology stack, frameworks, and best practices. Work closely with product managers, UX/UI designers, and other engineers to deliver robust and user-friendly applications. Improve application performance, scalability, and security. Participate in CI/CD pipeline improvements, cloud infrastructure management, and automated deployment processes. Research and evaluate new methodologies and technologies that improve the quality, reliability, and performance of the front-end department’s software development systems and processes. Proactively identify and implement AI-driven optimizations across the development lifecycle — from code generation and test automation to code review, documentation, and deployment — to continuously raise team velocity and output quality. Serve as an internal advocate and practitioner for AI tooling adoption, sharing techniques, resources, and workflows that help the broader engineering team move faster and build better. Your Skills and Experience Bachelor’s degree (or higher) in Computer Science or Engineering. 5+ years of experience in software engineering with experience in modern web application stacks. Proficient in CSS3, HTML5, JavaScript. Greatly proficient in web technologies such as React JS, TypeScript, Bootstrap, and Redux. Solid experience in cross-browser compatibility, client-side security, browser tuning and optimization techniques/tools. Backend service experience in Python, NodeJS, Scala, and/or Java. Solid proficiency in SQL for querying, extracting, cleaning and preparing data. Knowledge of MongoDB, Redis, Elastic Search, and JWT. Experience working with one of the core cloud platforms and its associated products (AWS, GCP, or Azure) as related to architecting and building cloud solutions and/or data pipelines is a plus. Experience in AI-driven development tools and practices, including proficiency with AI coding assistants like Cursor or Claude within VS Code, to generate code, unit tests, and test cases, ensuring high efficiency and quality in development workflows. A proven mindset of continuous improvement — you actively look for ways to use AI and automation to eliminate friction, reduce toil, and accelerate delivery. You don’t wait to be asked; you surface ideas and experiments that make the team measurably faster and better. Passionate early adopter of bleeding-edge AI technologies, with the ability to act as a spokesperson and advocate for AI integration, sharing best practices, third-party resources (e.g., videos, tutorials), and techniques to modernize and accelerate the team’s traditional development processes. Strong communication skills to effectively educate and inspire team members, driving adoption of AI coding techniques and fostering a culture of innovation and efficiency in software development. Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English. Experience working with global and remote teams will be an added bonus. Why You'll Love Working Here We offer highly competitive salaries and a comprehensive benefits package , including private health insurance in addition to full social insurance coverage based on 100% salary . You’ll work in a dynamic startup environment with continuous learning opportunities, including the chance to explore and apply AI technologies in real-world products . We value professional development and provide reimbursements for approved training programs and certifications , supporting your growth in both core engineering skills and emerging technologies such as AI . In addition, we offer generous paid time off, holidays, and regular company outings . Join us and be part of a team that’s building innovative technology and making a meaningful impact on people’s lives!

title: Backend End Developer (Typespcript / Graphql / Mongo )
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job We are looking for a Backend Engineer to help us accelerate innovation globally. At AcceleratorApp, we are the world’s leading software for incubator and accelerator management. We are a remote-first organization (based in Lisbon) serving over 100,000 monthly users. We are looking for a developer who codes with purpose, values stability, and is eager to tackle distributed systems. The Role: You will join our backend team working primarily with Node.js and GraphQL . As we scale, you will play a pivotal role in spinning up and adding new components to our architecture. Your day-to-day will involve designing architecture, writing clean and testable code, reviewing Pull Requests, and discussing trade-offs for new features. We are heavy proponents of Test-Driven Development (TDD) . You won't just be writing code; you will be ensuring its quality, scalability, and performance from day one. You will work with a modern stack including Nats, Elasticsearch, MongoDB, Redis, and Postgres. Your Skills and Experience Core Requirements: Experience: 5+ years of full-time experience with modern JavaScript, with at least 3 years deeply focused on Node.js (and frameworks like Express). Database Mastery: 2+ years of experience with MongoDB. You must understand how to maintain indexes, optimize functions for efficiency, and structure data in NoSQL. Experience with Postgres is also expected. TDD Mindset: You don't just write tests; you believe in Test Driven Development as a methodology for writing robust code. Architecture: Experience building distributed systems and microservices. Familiarity with event-driven architecture (Kafka) and caching strategies (Redis) is highly valued. API Design: Strong experience building and designing GraphQL and/or REST APIs. Communication: Excellent written and verbal communication skills. Since we work asynchronously, the ability to document your work and context is crucial. Bonus Points (Nice to have): A strong desire to learn and work with Python (or prior experience with it). Experience with AWS (EC2, S3), Docker, and Kubernetes. Familiarity with Elasticsearch. Experience with TypeScript. Why You'll Love Working Here Stability Meets Agility We operate with the agility of a startup but the stability of an established company. In our five-year history, we have never had a layoff—even during economic downturns—and we prioritize job security for our team. Remote-First & Asynchronous We trust you to manage your time. We work on an asynchronous management model, meaning fewer unnecessary meetings and more deep-work time. You can join us from anywhere in the world. Culture of Growth Learning is part of the job: We want you to be hungry to learn. Whether it’s reading, watching courses, or mastering a new language like Go, we encourage and support your professional development. Your voice matters: You are expected to provide your constructive point of view on technical decisions, product design, and business strategy. Diverse Team: Join a passionate team of colleagues hailing from all over the world. The Mission You will be building a product that matters. We are dedicated to making the startup industry more connected, efficient, and fair globally.

title: Thực tập sinh Khoa học Dữ liệu
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job a) Tạo lập và Xử lý dữ liệu: Thiết kế và tối ưu hóa giải pháp tích hợp và xử lý dữ liệu để thu thập, làm sạch, chuẩn hóa dữ liệu từ nhiều nguồn khác nhau (bao gồm dữ liệu cấu trúc và phi cấu trúc). b) Kiểm soát Chất lượng dữ liệu: Áp dụng các thước đo khoa học để kiểm toán, phát hiện và xử lý lỗi dữ liệu. c) Phát triển Mô hình AI/ML: Nghiên cứu, thử nghiệm và triển khai các thuật toán Học máy, Học sâu, xử lý ngôn ngữ tự nhiên (NLP) hoặc thị giác máy tính phục vụ cho công tác tự động hóa dán nhãn và phân tích dữ liệu dự báo. d) Bảo mật và Tuân thủ: Triển khai các giải pháp bảo vệ dữ liệu cá nhân, tuân thủ nghiêm ngặt theo quy định pháp luật. đ) Báo cáo và Trực quan hóa: Xây dựng các bảng điều khiển (Dashboard) theo dõi trực quan chỉ số chất lượng dữ liệu và báo cáo phân tích kỹ thuật phục vụ công tác nghiệm thu dự án. Your Skills and Experience 1. Về trình độ học vấn & Kinh nghiệm: a) Trình độ: Sinh viên năm cuối hoặc mới tốt nghiệp Đại học chính quy trở lên chuyên ngành Khoa học dữ liệu, Hệ thống thông tin quản lý, Công nghệ thông tin, Toán - Tin ứng dụng hoặc các ngành kỹ thuật liên quan. b) Kinh nghiệm: Không yêu cầu kinh nghiệm. Chấp nhận ứng viên mới tốt nghiệp có kết quả học tập đạt Giỏi trở lên hoặc có kinh nghiệm thực tập chuyên sâu tại các dự án công nghệ tương đương. 2. Về năng lực chuyên môn & Kỹ thuật: a) Thành thạo ngôn ngữ lập trình Python hoặc R phục vụ phân tích dữ liệu. b) Ưu tiên có kinh nghiệm làm việc với cơ sở dữ liệu quan hệ (SQL Server, MySQL...) và phi quan hệ (MongoDB, NoSQL...). c) Sử dụng tốt các thư viện dữ liệu và học máy thông dụng. d) Có kiến thức cơ bản hoặc hiểu biết về cấu trúc đường ống xử lý dữ liệu, quy trình dán nhãn dữ liệu và các công cụ trực quan hóa dữ liệu (PowerBI, Tableau) hoặc các thư viện Python chuyên dụng (Matplotlib, Seaborn). e) Có tư duy tốt về cấu trúc dữ liệu, thuật toán và toán học thống kê. Hiểu biết về các khung quản trị chất lượng dữ liệu hoặc an toàn thông tin là một lợi thế lớn. 3. Về kỹ năng mềm: Kỹ năng phân tích, tư duy logic và giải quyết vấn đề tốt. Khả năng làm việc nhóm kỹ thuật và giao tiếp hiệu quả với các bên liên quan. Tự chủ, có tinh thần trách nhiệm cao với sản phẩm dữ liệu do mình quản lý. Khả năng đọc hiểu tài liệu kỹ thuật bằng tiếng Anh tốt. Kỹ năng thuyết trình và báo cáo giải pháp kỹ thuật. Why You'll Love Working Here a) Thu nhập: Mức lương hấp dẫn (thỏa thuận theo năng lực khi phỏng vấn) + Thưởng hiệu suất theo kết quả dự án. b) Môi trường làm việc: Hiện đại, chuyên nghiệp, được tiếp cận với các công nghệ AI/ML tiên tiến và hệ thống quản trị dữ liệu chuyên nghiệp theo chuẩn quốc tế. c) Cơ hội thăng tiến: Được đào tạo chuyên sâu bởi các chuyên gia công nghệ hàng đầu, có lộ trình phát triển nghề nghiệp rõ ràng. d) Chế độ phúc lợi: Đầy đủ chế độ bảo hiểm theo luật định (BHXH, BHYT, BHTN), lương tháng 13, thưởng lễ tết và các hoạt động văn hóa, phúc lợi nội bộ của công

title: Principal System Engineer (Golang, AI)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Hybrid working; Flexible time; Macbook Pro L&D programs; 17 days off 13.7 million B2C users; 140,000+ business customer The Job We are looking for a Principal/Senior AI Systems Engineer with a deep mastery of Golang to architect and build the next generation of our back-office automation platform. You will be the bridge between sophisticated AI models and production-grade software. This role is not just about prompt tuning; it is about building the high-performance engines, concurrency patterns, and system integrations that allow AI Agents to operate reliably at scale. Core Engine Development : Design and develop high-performance AI Agent engines in Golang, focusing on concurrency, low-latency execution, and scalable system architecture AI Orchestration : Build robust prompt-chaining strategies and agentic workflows that integrate LLMs into our SaaS application. System Reliability : Monitor agent behavior and system-level metrics in Go to identify and mitigate hallucinations or performance degradation. Cross-Functional Leadership : Take technical ownership of AI initiatives, leading collaboration across BE/FE/SRE teams to drive system-level decisions. Optimization: Bridge the gap between Python-based AI research and Go-based production environments, ensuring seamless model serving and data flow. Your Skills and Experience Must have 3 to 5 years of professional experience with Golang; a deep, idiomatic understanding of Goroutines, channels, and designing scalable, high-performance backend services. 2+ years of experience with Python 5+ years of Web application development. Practical experience designing and optimizing prompts for LLMs in production environments. Good understanding of: Backend development (e.g., web frameworks, databases) Cloud infrastructure (e.g., Azure, AWS, Terraform, serverless architecture) MLOps pipeline Experience in: Architectural design for multi-agent orchestration. LLM orchestration frameworks like AutoGen, LangChain, and LlamaIndex. RAG architecture and vector stores. Integrating AI services from platforms like Azure AI Foundry, AWS Bedrock, or GCP Vertex AI. Nice to Have Basic understanding of frontend development (e.g., TypeScript/React). Understanding of AI system deployment from a security/compliance standpoint. Exposure to IaC and CI/CD in production systems. Experience in B2B application development. Experience in introducing traditional machine learning techniques and related ML pipelines to improve businesses. Communication Strong English communication, both verbal and written. Experience in leading a project as a team leader. Experience in educating team members. Strong sense of ownership. Why You'll Love Working Here Caring Mental & Physical Recreation: Hybrid working Full salary in probation & 13th month salary Social insurance on full salary from probation Premium Health insurance from probation Flexible start 8AM-9AM from Mon-Fri 17 days off annually + 1 Birthday Leave Paternity leave extra 5 days Annual company trip; Quarterly team building activities Club activities Annual health check Caring Career & Development: Clear Career path Foreign language & International technology-related certifications sponsoring Well-equipped facility: Macbook pro, additional monitor,.. Soft skill workshops Tech seminars Monthly and biannually Recognition Awards Performance review twice/year

title: Senior Data Scientist
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Cutting-edge technology in semiconductor design Competitive compensation and benefit package Young, dynamic, team-oriented working environment The Job About this role: As a Senior Data Scientist, you will be expected to prepare structured and unstructured data for serving AI/ML applications, apply advanced analytical techniques to generate insights and solutions for business problems, independently grasp new technical concepts and critically judging their practicality and adaptability to our organizational environment. About our team Our AI Development team focuses on building enterprise-grade AI solutions to drive business impact across multiple domains. The team is covering the full AI lifecycle from data preparation to production deployment. We work closely with business stakeholders to translate requirements into scalable and practical AI solutions. Our environment emphasizes strong engineering practices, collaboration, and continuous improvement. As part of a growing team, you will have opportunities to shape technical decisions and contribute to strategic AI initiatives. Responsibilities Aggregate, clean, and analyze data from various sources using Databricks tools and frameworks, preparing both structured and unstructured data for AI/ML applications. Write and ensure clean, style-guide-compliant code that is reproducible for similar projects with awareness of optimizing queries and debugging skills. Provide dashboards using Databricks Dashboard to trace AI effectiveness, and log data traces and metrics properly using MLFlow. Collaborate with other data scientists, AI engineers, full-stack developers, and domain experts on cross-functional projects. Keep up to date with the latest developments and trends in data science, applying them to the team’s operation. Your Skills and Experience Skills and Qualifications Must Have Bachelor's degree or higher in computer science, statistics, mathematics, or a related field. At least 5 years of relevant experience in Data Science or a related field. Proficiency in data engineering, data platforms, and analytics with a strong history of successful projects and in-depth knowledge of industry best practices. Strong analytics skills. Strong understanding of chunking and embedding strategies in RAG applications. Proficient in Python, SQL, PySpark and MLFlow. Effective communication, documentation, and white-boarding skills. Creative, curious, and problem-solving mindset. Proven ability to achieve an efficiency increase by utilizing LLMs in coding, analytical, and communication practices. Strongly Preferred Familiarity with Databricks products and services. Experience working with Apache Spark to process large-scale distributed datasets Working knowledge of at least one major cloud ecosystem (Azure, AWS, or GCP); Azure is preferred Have working knowledge of CI/CD. Experience working with a geographically distributed and cross-functional team including systems integrators and third-party companies Why You'll Love Working Here Renesas Design Vietnam Company Limited aims to provide our employees with comprehensive compensation and benefit plans, and a professional working environment. Some featured benefits are: - Competitive salary/bonus based on working performance. - Excellent training program. - Opportunity for promotion. - Fair assessment. - 24/24 hour insurance package including social and medical and unemployed insurance - Dynamic people. - Team-oriented environment. - Sport activities and Annual company trip

title: [Middle/ Senior] Applied AI Engineer (Good English)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Highly Competitive Salary & Benefits Clear Career Growth & Learning Opportunities Partner with Top-tier Financial Institutions The Job We are building AI-powered products for real-world business use cases, focusing on Large Language Models (LLMs), Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), AI Agents, and domain specific model fine-tuning. As a Middle/Senior AI Engineer, you will take ownership of complex AI systems, mentor junior engineers, lead technical decisions, and drive the quality and scalability of our AI products from design to production. Key Responsibilities Lead the design, development, and maintenance of AI-powered products using Large Language Models (LLMs). Architect and own end-to-end Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems for complex business applications. Design and build sophisticated AI Agents and multi-step AI workflows for real-world production use cases. Lead fine-tuning of domain-specific models using LoRA, QLoRA, PEFT, or similar approaches; define fine-tuning strategies. Architect, curate, and govern datasets for model training and evaluation; establish data quality standards. Design and own evaluation and benchmarking pipelines to measure AI quality, accuracy, and performance at scale. Research, evaluate, and productionize new AI techniques, open-source models, and agent-based systems. Provide technical leadership and mentorship to junior and middle-level engineers. Collaborate closely with product, engineering, and business teams to define AI solutions and drive delivery. Define and enforce testing, documentation, and AI engineering best practices across the team. Contribute to architectural decisions, technical roadmaps, and AI strategy. Your Skills and Experience Mandatory Requirements Degree in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Software Engineering, or a related field. 3 – 6+ years of experience in AI, Machine Learning, or Software Engineering, with at least 2 years at a senior level. Expert-level Python programming skills; solid understanding of software design principles. Deep hands-on experience with LLMs, embeddings, vector databases, and production RAG systems. Proven track record of building and shipping AI applications or AI-powered products in real-world, production environments. Strong familiarity with open-source LLMs such as Llama, Qwen, DeepSeek, Gemma, Mistral, or similar models. Solid experience with LoRA/QLoRA fine-tuning, PEFT, AI evaluation and benchmarking, and dataset preparation for AI training. Deep understanding of prompt engineering, AI application design, and AI system architecture. Experience mentoring engineers and leading technical projects end-to-end. Strong English communication skills — both reading and writing; able to communicate technical concepts clearly. Strong problem-solving, ownership mindset, and ability to drive decisions under ambiguity. Nice To Have Experience with AI Agents, LangGraph, LangChain, CrewAI, MCP, or similar agentic frameworks. Experience leading fine-tuning projects for domain-specific open-source models at scale. Experience designing and maintaining evaluation and benchmark pipelines in production. Experience with synthetic data generation, data flywheel design, and dataset curation strategies. Experience working with OCR, document processing, or knowledge extraction systems. Experience contributing to open-source AI projects or communities. Experience building and growing AI products with a significant active user base. Experience with MLOps, model serving infrastructure, or AI system observability What You Will Work On Owning and scaling production-grade AI products and architectures. Defining and leading AI workflows and AI Agent system design. Driving fine-tuning and evaluation strategies for domain-specific AI models. Building enterprise-grade RAG systems that power real business outcomes. Dataset engineering, AI quality evaluation, and continuous model improvement loops. End-to-end AI product development lifecycle — from research to production. Why You'll Love Working Here 13th month salary based on exact time available monthly working at INNOTECH. Budget for team building each quarter / kick-off project. Premium Health Care Package - PVI for all employees. Laptop and monitor provided. Performance bonus plan. Employee referral bonus: 2,000,000 – 10,000,000 VND (depending on level / roles). Holiday celebrations. Teambuilding events. Annual Company Trips / Year-End Party. Sport activities. Support for learning and professional certificates

title: AI Computer Vision Engineer – eKYC
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Competitive salary and bonus Young and innovative working environment Work with the brightest minds The Job Design, train, evaluate, and deploy computer vision models for face matching (selfie ↔ document / reference image) and face liveness detection / anti-spoofing (detecting attacks from photos, replay, masks, deepfake, etc.). Optimize models for on-device inference (mobile, edge) — focus on resource constraints (latency, memory, compute). Build data pipelines: image/video collection, preprocessing, augmentation, alignment, quality checks, normalization. Monitor model performance in production: metrics like FAR / FRR, ROC / AUC, error cases under challenging conditions (low light, extreme pose, blur). Collaborate with mobile / SDK / backend teams to integrate models securely into client applications. Research state-of-the-art techniques in face recognition, spoof detection, domain generalization, and apply to real-world constraints. Continuously iterate and improve based on real-world feedback, edge cases, and adversarial examples. Your Skills and Experience Bachelor’s / Master’s / PhD in Computer Science, AI, Electrical Engineering, or related fields. 3+ years of experience in computer vision / face recognition / liveness detection / anti-spoofing. Proven track record of deploying vision models to production, ideally on mobile / edge platforms. Strong programming skills in Python; familiarity with frameworks like PyTorch, TensorFlow, ONNX, and mobile inference frameworks. Experience with face detection, face alignment, landmark detection, preprocessing, and image normalization workflows. Experience in liveness detection methods: texture / reflection / depth cues / motion cues / multimodal approaches. Experience optimizing models (quantization, pruning, knowledge distillation) for deployment under resource constraints. Strong problem solving, debugging, and analytical skills. Good communication skills; ability to explain trade offs to product, mobile, and operations teams. Why You'll Love Working Here Competitive salary + performance bonus & benefits Full equipment support (e.g. dev machine, mobile devices for testing) Insurance & social benefits as per law Opportunities for learning, research, attending conferences, professional growth Collaborative, fast-paced, product-driven environment

title: Tập sự tiềm năng – AI Engineer (AIE)
company: Ngân hàng TMCP Tiên Phong | TPBank
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Thưởng dự án và thưởng cuối năm cao Hoạt động: bóng đá, karaoke, đi phượt, du lịch,... Được đào đạo kĩ năng mềm và nghiệp vụ chuyên sâu The Job Tham gia xây dựng, phát triển các ứng dụng AI/GenAI như Chatbot, AI Agent, RAG, hệ thống xử lý ngôn ngữ tự nhiên Thực hiện xử lý, làm sạch và khai thác dữ liệu phục vụ huấn luyện và triển khai mô hình Làm việc với embedding, vector database, retrieval system Hỗ trợ tuning, đánh giá và cải thiện chất lượng mô hình (accuracy, consistency, guardrails…) Phối hợp với các đơn vị phát triển sản phẩm để đưa AI vào ứng dụng thực tế Theo dõi và tối ưu hiệu năng mô hình (latency, cost, scalability) Your Skills and Experience Đã tốt nghiệp ĐH (đã có bằng) và có trên 2 năm kinh nghiệm làm việc có hợp đồng, ưu tiên tốt nghiệp các trường: Đại học Bách Khoa, Đại học FPT, Đại học Khoa học tự nhiên, Đại học Ngoại thương, Đại học Kinh tế Quốc dân, Học viện Ngân hàng, Học viện Tài chính… Tư duy logic tốt Có mong muốn chuyển mảng việc chuyên môn sang ứng dụng AI trong phát triển và vận hành phần mềm, xây dựng các nền tảng số Ưu tiên ứng viên có kinh nghiệm lập trình Java, Python và/hoặc Linux. Chủ động học hỏi, sẵn sàng thử nghiệm cái mới Có khả năng làm việc nhóm và trao đổi kỹ thuật Why You'll Love Working Here Thực hiện hoài bão xây dựng một ngân hàng tiên phong cho người Việt, TPBank mong muốn kết hợp sự thân thiện vốn có của người Việt Nam, tính chuyên nghiệp mang tầm quốc tế và Công nghệ cao để tạo nên nền tảng một ngân hàng hàng đầu tại Việt Nam. Tương lai nghề nghiệp vững chắc; các lãnh đạo nhiệt huyết và giàu kinh nghiệm; đồng nghiệp chia sẻ, cởi mở và thân thiện; môi trường làm việc hiện đại, chuyên nghiệp… và đặc biệt là chính sách nhân sự chuyên nghiệp với các chế độ đãi ngộ tài chính và phi tài chính mang tính toàn diện và hấp dẫn là những điều TPBank mong muốn mang đến cho toàn cán bộ nhân viên. CHÍNH SÁCH NHÂN SỰ: Được đào tạo và phát triển sự nghiệp trong môi trường công nghệ tiên tiến, chuyên nghiệp, Ngân hàng Số hàng đầu tại Việt Nam. Thu nhập hấp dẫn, lộ trình phát triển sự nghiệp bền vững. TPBank duy trì một chính sách lương, thưởng cạnh tranh, cùng với các cơ hội thăng tiến trong nghề nghiệp, luôn minh bạch và công bằng nhất. Bên cạnh chính sách đãi ngộ về tài chính, TPBank còn có các gói phúc lợi và đãi ngộ phi tài chính hiệu quả đảm bảo cho cán bộ nhân viên sức khỏe, hạnh phúc và một tương lai tài chính ổn định lâu dài. CHẾ ĐỘ ĐÃI NGỘ TÀI CHÍNH: Chính sách đãi ngộ dành cho Cán bộ nhân viên (CBNV) chính thức của TPBank gồm có: Lương Phụ cấp: Phụ cấp trang điểm (dành cho CBNV nữ), Phụ cấp ăn trưa, Phụ cấp xăng xe/đi lại, Phụ cấp điện thoại, Phụ cấp độc hại. Chế độ phúc lơi: TPBank tặng quà hoặc tiền mặt cho CBNV nhân ngày lễ, tết: Ngày Quốc tế lao động, ngày Quốc Khánh, Tết Nguyên đán, Tết Dương lịch, Ngày Quốc tế Phụ nữ, Ngày phụ nữ Việt Nam, Ngày thành lập ngân hàng, ngày sinh nhật CBNV; Tết trung thu/Ngày Quốc tế Thiếu nhi (dành cho con CBNV)... Lương kinh doanh: là phần thưởng trên phần hiệu quả cho nhóm nhân viên trực tiếp kinh doanh theo chỉ tiêu được giao hàng tháng hoặc quý. Thưởng hiệu quả hàng năm: TPBank trả thưởng hàng năm cho CBNV theo kết quả kinh doanh của ngân hàng và đánh giá hiệu quả làm việc của CBNV. CHẾ ĐỘ ĐÃI NGỘ PHI TÀI CHÍNH: Chính sách đãi ngộ phi tài chính dành cho cán bộ nhân viên (CBNV) chính thức của TPBank như sau: Chương trình chăm sóc sức khỏe định kỳ và đặc biệt (AON Care); Chương trình nghỉ mát hàng năm. Chế độ nghỉ phép: 12 ngày, 14 ngày, 16 ngày hoặc 18 ngày tùy từng cấp CBNV. Ngoài ra, tại TPBank, các tổ chức Công đoàn, Đoàn thanh niên, Nhóm hoạt động tình nguyện Hearts in Hand, và các nhóm thành viên khác được tổ chức và hoạt động thường xuyên. Các chương trình sinh hoạt đoàn thể được tổ chức ngoài giờ làm việc góp phần tạo nên không khí vui tươi, thân thiện, sẻ chia cho cán bộ nhân viên TPBank. Đặc biệt, các chương trình hoạt động cộng đồng mang tính nhân đạo xã hội cũng thường xuyên được tổ chức và nhận được sự hưởng ứng nhiệt tình của cán bộ nhân viên TPBank. Tại TPBank, "Mỗi nhân viên là một tài sản quý giá". TPBank luôn chào đón các bạn ứng viên, những người muốn đến với chúng tôi bằng tài năng, trí tuệ, phẩm chất đạo đức và lòng say mê công việc. Đến với TPBank, chúng tôi sẽ tạo cho bạn những cơ hội và thử thách để bạn tự khẳng định mình bằng chính tài năng của bạn. Bởi lẽ, Vì chúng tôi hiểu bạn.
