title: Senior Backend Golang Developer (AWS, GCP, SQL)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Competitive salary: Negotiable based on experience 13th-month salary. 12 days of annual leave plus public holidays. The Job 🧾 POSITION SUMMARY The Senior Golang Developer will be responsible for designing and developing complex backend services, ensuring high performance and scalability, and mentoring junior team members. You will work closely with cross-functional teams and lead initiatives that shape our technical strategy and product infrastructure. 🛠 KEY Responsibilities Technical Leadership Design and architect scalable microservices and distributed systems. Lead technical decision-making and provide guidance on system design. Optimize application performance, reliability, and scalability. Implement advanced concurrency patterns and performance tuning in Go. Establish and promote coding standards and best practices. Shape the technology roadmap and evaluate technical trade-offs to optimize operational performance and development costs. Development & Engineering Build high-performance backend services using Go and relevant frameworks. Design and implement robust RESTful and gRPC APIs. Integrate with SQL and NoSQL databases, ensuring data consistency and performance. Implement logging, monitoring, tracing, and observability across backend systems. Ensure backend security and compliance with internal and external policies. Lead incident response and production troubleshooting. Establish and maintain automated source code quality standards through linters and static analysis. Develop and execute a comprehensive testing strategy, including Unit, Integration, and End-toEnd (E2E) tests, to ensure system reliability. Design highly observable systems by standardizing logging, tracing, and metrics structures to proactively detect and resolve issues before they impact users. Effectively leverage and manage AI tools to enhance productivity and work outcomes. Team Collaboration & Mentoring Mentor junior and mid-level developers through code reviews and knowledge sharing Participate in the hiring process and conduct technical interviews Collaborate with DevOps, product managers, and frontend teams Contribute to sprint planning, estimation, and delivery roadmaps Your Skills and Experience 📌 Requirements Technical Skills 5+ years of experience working with Go (Golang) in production environments. Proficiency with Go frameworks such as gRPC, Gin, and Echo. Experience with cloud platforms such as GCP, AWS, or Azure. Deep understanding of Go internals, including goroutines, channels, memory management, and garbage collection. Strong experience with microservices architecture and distributed systems. Solid database expertise in PostgreSQL/MySQL and NoSQL databases (MongoDB, Redis). Hands-on experience with Docker and Kubernetes. Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and observability tools (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack). Architecture & System Design Experience designing scalable and highly available systems. Strong understanding of messaging and event-driven systems (RabbitMQ, Kafka). Knowledge of caching strategies, CDN usage, and security protocols (OAuth2, JWT). Strong grasp of SOLID and DRY principles, and advanced architectural patterns such as Clean Architecture or Domain-Driven Design (DDD). Experience using profiling and benchmarking tools (e.g., pprof, trace) to address high-throughput system challenges. Deep understanding of distributed system patterns such as the Saga Pattern and data consistency models (e.g., Eventual Consistency). Soft Skill & Leadership Strong problem-solving and debugging skills. Ability to work independently and lead small projects or technical initiatives. Excellent communication and collaboration skills. Experience mentoring and guiding team members. ➕ Preferred Qualifications Background in fintech, banking, or payment systems. Relevant certifications (e.g., AWS). Knowledge of blockchain, cryptocurrency, or machine learning integrations. Why You'll Love Working Here 📍 Position Information Location: B20 Bach Dang Street, Tan Son Hoa Ward, Ho Chi Minh City Working hours: Monday to Friday, 8:30 AM – 6:00 PM (including 1.5-hour lunch break from 12:00 PM - 1:30 PM) 💼 WHAT WE OFFER Competitive salary: Negotiable based on experience. 13th-month salary. 12 days of annual leave plus public holidays. Daily lunch provided by the company’s kitchen, offering both Vietnamese and Western dishes. 🌐 LANGUAGE Vietnamese (primary language) English (client communication) 🚀 Application Process To apply, please submit: An updated English CV. GitHub or portfolio links (if available). Relevant certifications or personal projects. Good English proficiency is required. There will be an English interview following the work experience discussion round.

title: Senior Back-End Developer (.NET)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us 100% salary is paid in probation. Annual Leave: 12 days/ year. Cash out leaves at lunar Tet The Job Gia nhập SSTech , bạn sẽ tham gia vào nhiều dự án phát triển phần mềm đa dạng, làm việc trực tiếp với các khách hàng Australia và đội ngũ nội bộ của chúng tôi. Chúng tôi chú trọng vào sự phát triển toàn diện, tạo điều kiện về không gian và thời gian để bạn nghiên cứu, ứng dụng công nghệ mới, cũng như nâng cao cả kỹ năng chuyên môn lẫn kỹ năng mềm. Với vai trò Senior Back-end Developer (.NET) , trọng tâm của bạn là xây dựng các hệ thống backend chất lượng cao và có khả năng mở rộng. Vai trò này cũng bao gồm một phần công việc về DevOps, với tỉ lệ phân bổ khoảng 70-80% Phát triển chương trình và 20-30% Quản trị DevOps . Trách nhiệm chính: Phát triển chuyên sâu (Hands-on Development): Đóng vai trò là lập trình viên .NET (C#) chính cho các dự án được giao. Chịu trách nhiệm hoàn toàn đối với mã nguồn backend, viết các logic phía máy chủ (server-side) sạch, có khả năng mở rộng và dễ bảo trì. Thiết kế API & Tích hợp cơ sở dữ liệu: Phân tích yêu cầu dự án để xây dựng các RESTful API và/hoặc microservices mạnh mẽ, bảo mật và hiệu suất cao. Phối hợp chặt chẽ với các lập trình viên Frontend để đảm bảo tích hợp dữ liệu liền mạch và quản lý kiến trúc cơ sở dữ liệu. Triển khai Unit Test & Độ bao phủ mã nguồn (Code Coverage): Viết và duy trì các bài kiểm thử Unit Test và Integration Test toàn diện cho các logic nghiệp vụ cốt lõi và tầng truy cập dữ liệu. Đảm bảo độ bao phủ mã nguồn cao để ngăn ngừa lỗi phát sinh (regression) và duy trì sự ổn định lâu dài của hệ thống. Ước lượng công việc & Bàn giao: Xem xét các yêu cầu kỹ thuật để chia nhỏ nhiệm vụ phát triển cá nhân, đưa ra các ước lượng kỹ thuật chính xác và quản lý tiến độ lập trình của bản thân để đảm bảo bàn giao đúng hạn và tin cậy. Hỗ trợ DevOps & Triển khai (Trọng tâm 20%): Thực hiện các đợt triển khai ứng dụng định kỳ, theo dõi nhật ký máy chủ (server logs) và hỗ trợ khắc phục các sự cố môi trường cơ bản để đảm bảo vận hành backend luôn ổn định. Các nhiệm vụ khác: Thực hiện các công việc khác theo sự phân công của Leader và Quản trị dự án (PM) để đảm bảo dự án hoàn thành đúng tiến độ. Your Skills and Experience Ngôn ngữ & Framework cốt lõi: Có trên 4 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển backend, trong đó có ít nhất 3 năm kinh nghiệm thực chiến chuyên sâu với C# và các framework .NET hiện đại. Phát triển API: Kinh nghiệm dày dạn trong việc thiết kế, xây dựng và bảo mật các ASP.NET Core RESTful Web API hiệu suất cao. Cơ sở dữ liệu & ORM: Kiến thức chuyên sâu về cơ sở dữ liệu và kinh nghiệm vững chắc với Entity Framework Core. Kiểm thử & Chất lượng: Kinh nghiệm thực tế trong việc viết các bài kiểm thử Unit Test và Integration Test chặt chẽ bằng các framework (như xUnit, NUnit, v.v.). Kỹ năng mềm & Ngôn ngữ: Khả năng đọc viết tiếng Anh để trao đổi tài liệu trực tiếp và hiệu quả với các khách hàng cũng như đối tác Australia. Không cần giao tiếp Tiếng Anh tốt. Why You'll Love Working Here Mức lương và chế độ đãi ngộ hấp dẫn. Lương tháng 13 và xét tăng lương hàng năm. Chế độ nghỉ phép đặc biệt: 12 ngày phép năm & Quy đổi ngày phép dư thành tiền mặt vào dịp Tết Nguyên Đán. Thâm niên mỗi năm thêm 1 ngày phép. Đảm bảo đầy đủ các chế độ bảo hiểm và phúc lợi theo Luật Lao động Việt Nam. Du lịch công ty (Company Trip) hàng năm. Môi trường làm việc hiện đại, được trang bị đầy đủ thiết bị cần thiết. Phục vụ cơm trưa tại văn phòng. Tiện ích miễn phí không giới hạn: Trà, cà phê, đồ ăn nhẹ và trái cây luôn sẵn sàng để bạn nạp năng lượng. Môi trường làm việc năng động, thân thiện cùng đội ngũ lập trình viên tài năng và giàu kinh nghiệm. Thời gian làm việc: Thứ Hai đến Thứ Sáu, 8h30 - 17h30 (Nghỉ trưa 1 tiếng)

title: Senior / Staff Backend Engineer
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Flexibility to perform Careers without boundaries Learning and development opportunities The Job About the job BE is Vietnam's home-grown ride-hailing and super-app, serving millions of riders and drivers every day. We're looking for a Staff Software Engineer to own the architecture of the systems at the core of our marketplace — and to set the technical bar for how we build them. This is a deeply hands-on role with broad technical leadership scope. You'll define long-term technical direction across squads, make the hard architectural calls, and stay hands-on in the code — that's a must here, not a nice-to-have. Our tech stack Hundreds of Golang microservices in a domain-oriented, event-driven architecture, running on GCP, GKE, and Istio with autoscaling, resiliency, a chaos-engineering mindset, and full end-to-end observability. Mobile on Flutter (component-based, composable). Web on TypeScript, React, Next.js, Tailwind , with an in-house composable design system. A real DevOps culture: you design, build, and operate your own services, with SRE and Platform support when you need it. Open-source lovers and contributors — our tooling is built in-house on top of the best of open source. The platform you'll architect You'll own the architecture of the systems at the core of the BE marketplace — dispatch , dynamic pricing and surge , the promotion and incentive engine , and the experimentation / A/B platform . These are among the highest-leverage, hardest real-time problems in the company. If these are the problems you want to spend the next few years on, this is the seat. Your impact You work with engineering leadership and other staff engineers to define the long-term technical vision for this domain together, and align the squads around durable, business-driven solutions. You own the architecture and technical strategy, and you bring deep domain expertise and real business sense to shape roadmap priorities and investment decisions across teams. You advise technical leaders on technical strategy for the org, balancing engineering and business priorities to land on the right long-term bets. What you'll do Set a high technical bar across the group through deep technical insight, architecture and design reviews, and the standards you hold for code quality and system design. Review and evolve the dispatch, pricing, promotion, and experimentation systems — making pragmatic, high-impact improvements to availability, performance, and security, rather than rebuilding for its own sake. Work across Product, Design, and Engineering to solve BE's hardest technical challenges for our riders and drivers. Drive quality, operational readiness, and engineering excellence across squads, and define the governance and review protocols for major technical decisions. Plan and run load, stress, and chaos testing to validate reliability and scalability before our users find the limits for us. Partner with Product to ship features with a data-driven approach, and measure impact through our A/B and experimentation platform Your Skills and Experience 8+ years in software engineering, with a track record of driving technical direction that spans multiple teams and/or services. Proven experience building and scaling complex, high-impact, high-availability systems in production. Deep system design skill, especially for distributed, real-time, and high-throughput systems. Strong command of system performance and scaling, with solid knowledge of MySQL or PostgreSQL. Experience with NoSQL stores such as Cassandra or Elasticsearch is a strong plus. Experience with chaos engineering is a strong plus. You write Go, or you're a strong backend engineer eager to — most of our stack is Golang, and we're happy to talk to strong candidates with Java, Node.js, or any similar languages. You engage directly in the code when it accelerates a critical outcome, and you hold a high standard for quality, design, and architectural decisions across the group. You communicate clearly, collaborate well while owning your decisions independently, and you're genuinely driven to make systems better. Why You'll Love Working Here Benefits 13th salary Social Insurance Medical healthcare Annual health check 15 days annual leave Transportation fee (BE's services) Performance bonus Holiday bonus Team Building and many engagement activities

title: Senior Backend Developer (PHP/ Laravel/ SQL/ API)

Cải thiện độ tin cậy và khả năng chịu lỗi của hệ thống. Tham gia vào các cuộc thảo luận về kiến trúc hệ thống. Duy trì chất lượng mã nguồn cao và các tiêu chuẩn kỹ thuật. Your Skills and Experience Phát triển Backend (Backend Development) Hơn 5 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển backend. Kiến thức vững chắc về PHP 8+. Kinh nghiệm chuyên sâu với Laravel. Kinh nghiệm xây dựng và bảo trì các API trong môi trường thực tế (production). Hiểu biết về: Giao dịch cơ sở dữ liệu (database transactions). Xử lý đồng thời (concurrency). Tình trạng tranh chấp (race conditions). Các hoạt động lũy đẳng (idempotent operations). Cơ sở dữ liệu (Database) Kinh nghiệm dày dặn với MySQL. Kiến thức về: Chiến lược lập chỉ mục (indexing strategies). Tối ưu hóa truy vấn. Tính nhất quán của giao dịch (transactional consistency). Tính toàn vẹn dữ liệu (data integrity). Kiến thức cơ bản về Hệ thống phân tán (Distributed Systems Basics) Hiểu biết về: Xử lý bất đồng bộ (asynchronous processing). Các tác vụ chạy ngầm (background jobs). Cơ chế thử lại (retry mechanisms). Xử lý lỗi (error handling). Kiến trúc dựa trên hàng đợi (queue-based architectures). Ưu tiên ứng viên có kinh nghiệm với Redis queues hoặc các hệ thống tương tự. Tích hợp API (API Integration) Kinh nghiệm tích hợp với các API bên ngoài. Xử lý an toàn các webhook. Chiến lược xử lý lỗi và thử lại. Kinh nghiệm với API thanh toán hoặc tài chính là một điểm cộng lớn. Nhận thức về Bảo mật (Security Awareness) Hiểu biết về các phương pháp bảo mật backend tốt nhất: Xác thực API (API authentication). Giới hạn tốc độ (rate limiting). Kiểm chứng dữ liệu đầu vào (input validation). Xử lý webhook an toàn. Ưu tiên ứng viên có kinh nghiệm làm việc với dữ liệu tài chính hoặc nhạy cảm. Điểm cộng (Nice to Have) Kinh nghiệm làm việc với các hệ thống thanh toán. Kinh nghiệm tích hợp tiền điện tử (crypto) / blockchain. Kinh nghiệm với các dịch vụ backend chịu tải cao (high-load). Kiến thức về kiến trúc hướng sự kiện (event-driven architectures). Kinh nghiệm triển khai nhật ký kiểm tra (audit logging). Quen thuộc với Docker và CI/CD. Phẩm chất cá nhân Tinh thần trách nhiệm cao (ownership mindset). Chú ý đến từng chi tiết. Khả năng thiết kế các hệ thống đáng tin cậy. Tư duy kỹ thuật thực tế (pragmatic engineering approach). Kỹ năng gỡ lỗi (debugging) và giải quyết vấn đề tốt. Khả năng làm việc trong một nhóm nhỏ và tốc độ nhanh. Why You'll Love Working Here Lương tháng 13 và thưởng theo hiệu quả kinh doanh của công ty. Thưởng theo dự án, thưởng hiệu suất làm việc. Được tham gia đầy đủ BHXH, BHYT, BHTN theo quy định của pháp luật. Nghỉ phép năm và các ngày nghỉ lễ theo quy định. Môi trường làm việc năng động, thân thiện, nhiều cơ hội học hỏi và phát triển. Tham gia các hoạt động nội bộ của công ty: team building, sinh nhật, sự kiện nội bộ Cơ hội phát triển nghề nghiệp và lộ trình thăng tiến rõ ràng.

title: Backend PHP Developer

title: Backend Dev (Golang, AI) - Lương cạnh tranh

We serve over 35,000 pharmacies, clinics, and hospitals with a mission to make healthcare more accessible and efficient. As we scale rapidly, recruitment must evolve from manual and reactive to systemized and data-driven, and that’s where this role comes in. We are seeking a Senior Software Engineer skilled in React, Next.js, HTML, and CSS to build user-friendly web applications for CIRCA’s POS and operation systems. You’ll develop and optimize key modules like inventory, orders, payments, and reporting, working closely with backend engineers and UI/UX designers. Key Responsibilities: Design, develop, and maintain high-performance backend services using Golang . Work with PostgreSQL , MongoDB , ElasticSearch , Redis , and RabbitMQ to build scalable, distributed systems. Implement APIs using REST or JSON-RPC protocols. Deploy and maintain services using Docker , Kubernetes , and GCP (or equivalent cloud platforms). Optimize system performance, scalability, and reliability. Collaborate with frontend and product teams to deliver complete features. Participate in code reviews and contribute to overall system architecture. Your Skills and Experience Qualification Must-Have: Solid understanding of AI Agents, including: agents, skills, MCP, and context management Experience using Claude Code or same tool (Codex, Cursor, ...) Strong product mindset with the ability to independently build products Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or related field. 3-5 years of experience in back-end web development, hands on experience in Front-end (Reactjs) & Golang Proficiency in concurrency patterns , microservices, and distributed architectures. Strong experience with: PostgreSQL , MongoDB , ElasticSearch, Redis , RabbitMQ Familiarity with cloud infrastructure, especially GCP , and container orchestration with Kubernetes . ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot, Augment, Cursor Able to leverage AI to improve coding speed, testing, debugging, and technical decision-making Nice-to-Have: Experience with POS , ERP , or retail inventory systems. Exposure to frontend frameworks like Next.js or SolidJS . Product mindset and care for user impact. Good English communication skills. Why You'll Love Working Here Performance & salary review yearly Paid social insurance based on full salary Bao Viet Insurance Medical Checkup 15 days of annual leave Parking allowance

title: Mid / Senior Backend Developer (NodeJS)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Sự nghiệp thăng tiến rõ ràng & thu nhập cạnh tranh Môi trường đổi mới sáng tạo & chuyên nghiệp Gia nhập tập đoàn với tầm nhìn toàn cầu. The Job Phát triển & Vận hành: Quản lý việc vận hành và phát triển phần mềm, triển khai các nền tảng giải pháp. Dẫn đầu nỗ lực trong việc cải thiện khả năng mở rộng, độ tin cậy, bảo mật và hiệu suất của phần mềm và hệ thống. Xây dựng API: Thiết kế, phát triển và duy trì các ứng dụng và API phía máy chủ để hỗ trợ tương tác mượt mà với các thành phần giao diện người dùng của ứng dụng web. Ứng dụng AI & Tối ưu hiệu suất: Tận dụng các công cụ AI (như Claude, ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot...) và tư duy sử dụng AI agents vào quy trình viết code, debug, review code để liên tục tối ưu hóa năng suất làm việc của cá nhân và đội nhóm. Bảo mật hệ thống: Chủ động đưa ra các khuyến nghị, giải pháp và yêu cầu khắt khe liên quan đến bảo mật trong toàn bộ vòng đời phát triển phần mềm. Phân tích yêu cầu: Chuyển đổi các yêu cầu từ phía người dùng/nghiệp vụ thành các yêu cầu kỹ thuật chi tiết và trực tiếp lên kế hoạch phát triển cụ thể trên các nền tảng quản lý dự án (như ClickUp). Kiểm soát chất lượng: Đánh giá, chuẩn hóa các quy chuẩn phát triển phần mềm và quy trình triển khai giải pháp kỹ thuật. Cấp bậc Senior: Hỗ trợ Trưởng nhóm Lập trình Backend (Backend Team Leader) trong việc đào tạo, quản lý và phát triển năng lực cho đội ngũ Junior/Fresher. Your Skills and Experience Kinh nghiệm cốt lõi: Tốt nghiệp Kỹ sư, Cử nhân chuyên ngành Công nghệ thông tin, Khoa học Máy tính hoặc các lĩnh vực liên quan. Có ít nhất 3 năm kinh nghiệm thực tế với lập trình Backend sử dụng ngôn ngữ NodeJS (Đối với vị trí Senior yêu cầu hơn 5 năm kinh nghiệm ). Kiến thức & Kỹ năng kỹ thuật: Kỹ năng sử dụng AI: Có kinh nghiệm thực tế và thành thạo việc ứng dụng các công cụ AI hỗ trợ lập trình vào công việc hàng ngày. Có khả năng viết prompt tốt để giải quyết các luồng logic phức tạp. Nắm vững các kiến thức nền tảng về Cấu trúc dữ liệu và Giải thuật. Có nền tảng vững chắc về Lập trình hướng đối tượng (OOP) và Design Patterns. Có kinh nghiệm làm việc sâu rộng với các hệ quản trị cơ sở dữ liệu RDBMS và NoSQL (như MySQL, PostgreSQL,...). Am hiểu và từng làm việc trong môi trường áp dụng quy trình phát triển sản phẩm Agile/SCRUM, Kanban. Yêu cầu dành riêng cho vị trí Senior: Có kinh nghiệm thực tế về thiết kế và triển khai kiến trúc hệ thống Microservices. Từng trực tiếp triển khai và vận hành hệ thống trên các nền tảng Cloud Computing lớn như AWS, Azure, hoặc GCP. Thái độ & Phẩm chất: Trung thực, chủ động trong công việc và có tinh thần ham học hỏi, liên tục cập nhật các công nghệ mới. Why You'll Love Working Here 1. Thu nhập cạnh tranh & đãi ngộ xứng đáng Lương thưởng minh bạch, xét thăng tiến công bằng với cơ hội tăng lương 1-2 lần/năm. Thưởng tháng 13 hấp dẫn, chia sẻ thành quả từ sự phát triển của công ty. Thường hiệu quả công việc cộng thêm tháng 14, 15, 16… 2. Chăm sóc sức khỏe toàn diện Khám sức khỏe tổng quát định kỳ hàng năm để luôn an tâm và khỏe mạnh. Cung cấp Gói bảo hiểm sức khỏe toàn diện cho bạn và người thân. 3. Môi trường làm việc chuyên nghiệp & năng động Cộng sự tài năng: Làm việc cùng đội ngũ kỹ sư, chuyên gia trẻ, sáng tạo và đầy đam mê. Dự án đột phá: Trực tiếp tham gia vào những dự án công nghệ tiên phong, định hình xu hướng thị trường. 4. Lộ trình phát triển cá nhân Tham gia các khoá Đào tạo định kỳ từ Công ty và Tập đoàn tổ chức. Cơ hội thăng tiến rõ ràng, được thiết kế riêng cho từng cá nhân. 5. Cân bằng cuộc sống & gắn kết Teambuilding, du lịch hàng năm và các sự kiện văn hóa, thể thao sôi động. Tham gia hoạt động trong các Nhóm văn nghệ và thể thao để thỏa sức đam mê và kết nối. Hỗ trợ tối đa với đầy đủ các loại phụ cấp (ăn trưa, xăng xe, đi lại...).

title: Principal Backend Engineer
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Big chance to build Fintech system, large data International & English environment Apply new Tech-Stack, Technology and more The Job About Timo Launched in 2015, Timo pioneered digital banking in Vietnam with a mission to make banking faster, simpler, and more accessible. Today, as part of one of Southeast Asia’s leading digital financial services platforms, Timo is building secure, scalable, and customer-first digital banking experiences for millions of users across Vietnam. We are looking for curious minds and driven talents from fintech, digital banking, and technology companies who are excited to move fast, build meaningful products, and help shape the future of banking in Vietnam. About the Role We are looking for a Principal Backend Engineer to help shape the engineering foundations behind Timo's digital banking platform. In this role, you will own the core engineering platform , building internal frameworks, improving developer experience, and driving engineering best practices across teams. You will help Timo's engineers ship faster, build more reliably, and scale efficiently. You will report to the Head of Engineering . What You Will Do Architect and build internal frameworks, SDKs, and reusable components that streamline development across Timo's engineering teams Drive engineering standards in API design, microservices, observability, and performance optimization Improve developer experience (DevEx) through self-service tooling, automation, and CI/CD improvements Lead technology evaluation : research, run PoCs, and contribute to Timo's and Kredivo's Tech Radar Strengthen observability : ensure logging, tracing, and monitoring scale seamlessly with the platform Partner with DevOps to optimize CI/CD pipelines and cloud cost efficiency Influence cross-functionally across Backend, Mobile, Data, and Security teams to drive organization-wide initiatives Mentor senior engineers and drive adoption of platform tools and best practices Architect and evolve scalable backend and platform solutions using Java, Spring Boot, microservices, Kubernetes, Kafka/RabbitMQ, and event-driven architectures Provide technical leadership on system design, architecture, performance optimization, and complex production troubleshooting Your Skills and Experience What We Are Looking For Experience 6+ years of backend engineering experience, with prior experience in a Principal, Staff, or technical leadership role Proven track record of building production systems at scale Background in Platform Engineering, fintech, banking, payments, or Developer Experience is preferred Strong hands-on experience with Java, Spring Boot (4+ years), microservices, Kubernetes, Kafka/RabbitMQ, distributed systems, and cloud-native application architectures Skills & Expertise Strong expertise in building internal frameworks, SDKs, or developer tooling Deep knowledge of distributed systems, microservices, and software architecture Experience evaluating and adopting new technologies, running PoCs, and maintaining a Tech Radar Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines, cloud infrastructure , observability, caching, event-driven systems, and deployment automation Skilled at defining and driving engineering standards : API design, performance, reliability Familiarity with event-driven and distributed system patterns. Excellent debugging and problem-solving skills across complex, multi-service environments Professional working English : daily collaboration with Timo leadership and Kredivo's regional engineering teams Why You'll Love Working Here Our deliverable is a leading software that is changing the way people do banking. You will be proud of your work and you will share with everybody that you helped to build Timo. You’ll be joining a team of experts who are technically savvy, creative, and who share the intention of reinventing banking in Vietnam. You work closely with international architects and front-end consultants, product managers, and designers to develop the system. You will learn a lot from them. Company Benefits: Full benefits and salary during probation Premium health care insurance Competitive salary and learning culture Other benefits as per stated in Vietnamese Labor Law

title: Technical Leader .NET Backend (Microservices gRPC, AI)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Môi trường công nghệ hiện đại, vui vẻ, hòa đồng Được xét tăng lương 1 năm 1 lần The Job Mô tả công việc Tham gia phát triển các sản phẩm của công ty theo yêu cầu của khách hàng và của Ban giám đốc Review code, tối ưu hiệu năng hệ thống và đảm bảo chất lượng kỹ thuật xuyên suốt vòng đời sản phẩm Phối hợp với các bộ phận liên quan để triển khai và vận hành hệ thống hiệu quả Your Skills and Experience Yêu cầu kỹ thuật 1. NET & Backend Có kinh nghiệm tối ưu memory, profiling, xử lý concurrency, tuning middleware pipeline Trên 05 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển ứng dụng ASP.NET Core / MVC Core, Entity Framework Core, SMPP Chủ động thiết kế service decomposition, inter-service communication (gRPC, REST, Event-driven), API Gateway pattern Clean Architecture, Domain-Driven Design (DDD), CQRS + Event Sourcing Versioning, rate limiting, idempotency, backward compatibility 2. Database & Caching Có nhiều kinh nghiệm thiết kế DB, làm việc với SQL: SQLServer, PostgreSQL Có nhiều kinh nghiệm thiết kế DB, làm việc với NoSQL: MongoDB, Elasticsearch Có nhiều kinh nghiệm làm việc với Message Queue & Cache: RabbitMQ, Kafka, Redis 3. System Design & Performance Optimization Có kinh nghiệm tối ưu hóa hệ thống, thiết kế kiến trúc hệ thống theo modular và scalable, high traffic & high availability Tối ưu API response time, giảm database round-trips, xử lý bulk operations hiệu quả Hiểu rõ CAP theorem, eventual consistency và các trade-off trong distributed system Structured logging (Serilog/NLog), distributed tracing (OpenTelemetry, Jaeger), metrics (Prometheus + Grafana), alerting 4. AI-Assisted Development (Vibe-Coding) Thành thạo sử dụng các công cụ AI coding: GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code, hoặc tương đương Biết setup up workflow/skill/rule/command toàn trình bằng AI Biết prompt engineering để generate code, viết test, review code, tạo documentation hiệu quả Có khả năng review và validate output của AI Có kinh nghiệm tích hợp AI/LLM vào sản phẩm là một lợi thế lớn 5. DevOps & Infrastructure Viết Dockerfile tối ưu, kế pipeline GitLab CI / GitHub Deployment, service, ingress, configmap, horizontal pod autoscaling (lợi thế) Yêu cầu ứng viên Tối thiểu 05 năm làm việc với .NET ecosystem. Tối thiểu 03 năm dẫn dắt team hoặc làm technical owner của module/project Có ít nhất 01 dự án vận hành với lưu lượng cao hoặc dữ liệu lớn Đã sử dụng ít nhất 01 công cụ AI coding trong công việc thực tế Có khả năng thiết kế kiến trúc hệ thống quy mô lớn, tối ưu hóa hiệu năng Định hướng kỹ thuật cho team và ứng dụng linh hoạt các công cụ phát triển hiện đại - bao gồm AI-assisted coding (vibe-coding). Khả năng đưa ra quyết định kỹ thuật nhanh dưới áp lực deadline Why You'll Love Working Here Quyền lợi ứng viê n Mức lương: Thoả thuận theo kinh nghiệm và năng lực Thưởng dự án hàng tháng khi trở thành nhân viên chính thức Được training đa dạng về các hot-trend công nghệ, kỹ năng chuyên môn lẫn kỹ năng mềm. Được làm việc và học hỏi cùng với team nhiều kinh nghiệm. Cơ hội trải nghiệm và ứng dụng nhiều công nghệ mới trong sản phẩm. Tham gia bảo hiểm, công ty đóng 100% bảo hiểm (BHYT, BHXH, BHTN) Khám sức khỏe định kì hằng năm. Được làm việc trong môi trường công nghệ, năng động, có cơ hội hoàn thiện bản thân và thăng tiến cao. Chế độ bảo hiểm đầy đủ, phép năm, lương tháng 13 theo quy định của nhà nước. Tham gia hoạt động thể thao, workshop, tổ chức sinh nhật, teambuilding, du lịch theo quý, năm. Môi trường 9X vui vẻ, hòa đồng, thân thiện. Địa điểm làm việc: 140-142 đường số 02, KDC Vạn Phúc, Phường Hiệp Bình TP HCM

title: Middle/ Senior Backend Developer (PHP, Kafka, MySQL)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Grow and advance into higher-level roles A creative and innovative work culture Competitive pay and great benefits The Job Job Summary We are looking for a Middle/ Senior Backend Developer to join our engineering team. You will design, develop, and optimize scalable backend systems using Laravel, Kafka, MySQL, AWS, and Graylog. title: Principal Backend Engineer (AWS, TypeScript, DynamoDB)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Competitive salary depend on your performance Working with young and passion employee Green and spacious office The Job About the role Strong written and verbal English is a hard requirement for this role — please read on with that in mind. You will own the backend that sits at the center of our business — the system of record for nearly everything the company does. This is the kind of role most engineers never get a shot at: a mature, high-throughput platform built on architectural choices that reward careful engineering, with real autonomy and consequential decisions to make. You are inheriting it, not building it from scratch, and you will be responsible for keeping it correct and fast while extending it. You will initially work under the platform architect, with the explicit goal of growing into the architect role yourself. The work is hands-on and deeply technical, and you operate with a high degree of autonomy from day one. What you'll work with AWS AppSync (GraphQL) — a single annotated schema compiled into multiple role-scoped APIs, backed by a large library of VTL resolvers and pipeline functions assembled through a custom build system. Amazon DynamoDB — single-table design with composite (PK/SK) keys, multiple GSIs, Streams, TTL, and PITR. The primary source of truth for the platform. AWS Lambda (TypeScript/Node.js) — many functions in an Nx monorepo, bundled with esbuild: API resolvers, queue consumers, stream processors, and Step Function tasks. AWS Step Functions — orchestration of multi-step workflows (order fulfillment, settlement/payout, lifecycle state machines). Event-driven processing — DynamoDB Streams, SQS, and Kinesis. Secondary data systems — Aurora MySQL, ClickHouse, OpenSearch, and Turbopuffer (vector/semantic search). Third-party integrations — Stripe, Pusher, Etsy, Amazon Cognito, and Sentry. Infrastructure as Code — Terraform/OpenTofu managing dev, test, and production. Testing — Jest (unit/integration) and Vitest end-to-end suites running against live AppSync APIs. Responsibilities Work under the platform architect initially, with a clear path to taking on the architect role yourself as you build context and trust. Own the architecture, evolution, and reliability of the core backend repository and several related backend services — including a separate asset-generation service for image, PDF, and font pipelines. Design and extend DynamoDB access patterns — keys, indexes, and item layouts — treating schema and key-design changes as high-stakes, well-reasoned decisions. Build and maintain GraphQL APIs and their resolver pipelines, including VTL mapping logic and the supporting Lambda functions. Design event-driven and orchestrated workflows (Streams, SQS, Step Functions) that are idempotent, observable, and resilient to partial failure. Manage infrastructure through Terraform/OpenTofu; own safe, repeatable deployments across environments. Diagnose production issues to root cause — not symptoms — across the data, API, and integration layers. As the backend team grows, take on day-to-day technical leadership of less experienced engineers — mentorship, code review, and helping them ramp up on the platform's complexity. Uphold and extend a strong engineering documentation culture (architecture decisions, patterns, and gotchas are written down, not held in one person's head). Your Skills and Experience Required qualifications 10+ years of professional backend engineering experience (15+ preferred), with a substantial portion spent owning production systems at scale. Deep, hands-on AWS experience, including CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure managed with Terraform/OpenTofu. Strong NoSQL data-modeling expertise — direct experience designing single-table or composite-key models and the access patterns that ride on them, with a real understanding of the trade-offs involved. Production TypeScript/Node.js proficiency. Strong written and verbal English, including the ability to produce clear documentation and communicate effectively with stakeholders in other time zones. A demonstrated track record of full ownership: making sound architectural calls independently and being accountable for the result. Strongly preferred AWS AppSync and GraphQL resolver experience (VTL a strong plus). Event-driven architecture and workflow orchestration (Step Functions, Streams, queues). Experience operating high-throughput, low-latency systems where data correctness is non-negotiable. Working experience with relational databases, search databases, and vector databases / embeddings. Image processing and color management for print (Sharp/ImageMagick, ICC profiles, RGB→CMYK). PDF internals, vector/SVG manipulation, and font engineering (pdf-lib, SVGO, fontTools/FontForge). Headless browser rendering (Puppeteer/Chromium) for high-fidelity output. Hands-on experience with AI agent orchestration, multi-agent workflows, and validation strategies — using harnesses like Claude Code or Pi to drive real engineering work, not just chat-style assistance. Why You'll Love Working Here The opportunity If you take pride in measuring twice and cutting once, reasoning to root cause, and writing down what you learn, this is the kind of system worth building a career around. Why Join Corjl A high-impact role with real ownership over the core platform behind a growing product used by creators worldwide. A team that invests in great engineering — this is a leadership role, not a support role. Collaborative, engineering-driven environment based in Ho Chi Minh City. Competitive salary and benefits commensurate with experience. How to Apply: Please submit your CV and links to recent work demonstrating your backend engineering capabilities. We are most interested in seeing your engineering thinking — include examples that show how you reasoned about a hard architectural problem, modeled data, and ensured correctness and reliability at scale. Applications without relevant work samples or a clear account of systems you have owned will not be considered.

Amazon DynamoDB — single-table design with composite (PK/SK) keys, multiple GSIs, Streams, TTL, and PITR. The primary source of truth for the platform. Work with the existing DynamoDB access patterns and indexes — extending them carefully and flagging when a change has broader implications. Build event-driven and orchestrated workflows (Streams, SQS, Step Functions) that are idempotent, observable, and resilient to partial failure. Diagnose production issues across the data, API, and integration layers — reasoning to root cause, not symptoms. Make infrastructure changes through Terraform/OpenTofu when your work requires them. Participate in code review and design discussions; raise alternatives and trade-offs rather than just executing. Contribute to and uphold the team’s documentation culture (architecture decisions, patterns, and gotchas get written down). Your Skills and Experience Required qualifications 5+ years of professional backend engineering experience (7+ preferred), with significant time in production systems on AWS. Hands-on AWS experience across core serverless and data services — Lambda, DynamoDB, IAM, SQS, S3, CloudWatch — and comfort working with infrastructure managed by Terraform/OpenTofu. Working knowledge of DynamoDB and NoSQL data modeling — composite keys, GSIs, access patterns — with an understanding of why those choices matter at scale. Production TypeScript/Node.js proficiency. Strong written and verbal English, including the ability to produce clear documentation and communicate effectively with stakeholders in other time zones. A track record of shipping reliable production code and taking responsibility for the work you put your name on. Strongly preferred AWS AppSync and GraphQL resolver experience (VTL a plus). Event-driven architecture and workflow orchestration (Step Functions, Streams, queues). Experience operating systems where data correctness and reliability matter — payments, ordering, anything money-touching. Working experience with relational databases, search databases, or vector databases / embeddings. Image processing and color management for print (Sharp/ImageMagick, ICC profiles, RGB→CMYK). PDF internals, vector/SVG manipulation, or font engineering (pdf-lib, SVGO, fontTools/FontForge). Headless browser rendering (Puppeteer/Chromium) for high-fidelity output. Hands-on experience with AI agent orchestration, multi-agent workflows, and validation strategies — using harnesses like Claude Code or Pi to drive real engineering work, not just chat-style assistance. Why You'll Love Working Here A chance to do serious engineering on a serious system, alongside people who care about getting it right and care about helping you grow. If you sweat the details, debug to root cause, and want to keep getting better at this, it’s a good place to do that. Why Join Corjl A high-impact role with real ownership over the core platform behind a growing product used by creators worldwide. Collaborative, engineering-driven environment based in Ho Chi Minh City. Competitive salary and benefits commensurate with experience. How to Apply: Please submit your CV and links to recent work demonstrating your backend engineering capabilities. We are most interested in seeing your engineering thinking — include examples that show how you reasoned about a hard architectural problem, modeled data, and ensured correctness and reliability at scale. Applications without relevant work samples or a clear account of systems you have owned will not be considered.

title: Software Engineer (Golang/.NET)

Phân tích yêu cầu nghiệp vụ, đề xuất giải pháp kỹ thuật và xây dựng kiến trúc phù hợp cho từng sản phẩm/dự án. Phát triển các dịch vụ microservices sử dụng Golang; tham gia bảo trì và nâng cấp các hệ thống hiện có trên nền tảng .NET. Thiết kế và tối ưu API, cơ sở dữ liệu, cơ chế caching, messaging và các thành phần hạ tầng liên quan. Theo dõi, phân tích và xử lý các vấn đề về hiệu năng, độ ổn định và bảo mật của hệ thống. Phối hợp với Product, QA, DevOps và các nhóm kỹ thuật khác để triển khai tính năng mới và đảm bảo chất lượng sản phẩm. Tham gia review thiết kế, review code, chia sẻ kiến thức và hỗ trợ phát triển năng lực cho các thành viên trong nhóm. Chủ động nghiên cứu, đánh giá và áp dụng các công nghệ, công cụ mới nhằm nâng cao hiệu quả phát triển và vận hành hệ thống. Tham gia xử lý sự cố, điều tra nguyên nhân gốc rễ (Root Cause Analysis) và đề xuất giải pháp phòng ngừa tái diễn. Your Skills and Experience Tối thiểu 5 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển phần mềm backend. Thành thạo Golang và có kinh nghiệm xây dựng hệ thống production quy mô lớn. Có hiểu biết hoặc kinh nghiệm làm việc với .NET (C#/.NET Core). Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với PostgreSQL, MySQL hoặc các hệ quản trị cơ sở dữ liệu tương đương. Hiểu biết về kiến trúc Microservices, RESTful API, Event-driven Architecture. Có kinh nghiệm với Kafka, Redis, Docker, Kubernetes hoặc các công nghệ tương tự là một lợi thế. Có khả năng phân tích vấn đề, tư duy hệ thống và kỹ năng làm việc nhóm tốt. Chủ động, trách nhiệm và có tinh thần cải tiến liên tục. Why You'll Love Working Here Why SENDO? At SENDO we believe that our employees are the keys to our success. Happier employees will perform very well! We not only provide an awesome working environment where young and talented employees work, share ideas and help each other improve, but we also have lots of fun activities. Besides, you will work on the biggest e-commerce product using the latest technology and with top engineers in Vietnam SENDO benefits and Perks Competitive salary and benefits including extra medical insurance. 13th-month salary. Extra bonus based on performance and company profit yearly. Performance Review 2 times/year to adjust Salary and title/position Company and team building trip every year Gift on special days like birthday, Tet and Holidays Many fun and meaning activities such as sport and social clubs Opportunity to training both technical and soft skills to develop your career path

title: Middle/Senior Software Engineer (C#, .NET, SQL)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Competitive salary + Healthcare insurance package. Flexible Working Hours 13th month and productivity bonus. The Job Job description MiTek’s Component Manufacturing division is seeking a dynamic and passionate Software Engineer to help pioneer industry changing solutions for the residential construction industry. This position will be part of a team working on a 3D BIM solution for single or multi-family modeling, design, and estimating. Be part of a high-performing and collaborative team that is focused on innovation and engaging MiTek customers, while creating powerful software. Responsibilities Code, enhance, test, and debug 3D CAD/Engineering desktop software using C#, SQL Server, and the .NET Framework. Contribute to large, breakthrough enhancements in our CAD/BIM platform. Efforts require refactoring existing logic, feasibility analysis, and creating new enhancements. Collaborate with business analysts, testing, and other development teams to ensure solutions are efficient, consistent, and fulfill business needs. Perform design and analysis on efforts before starting development. Author technical documents for software architecture or design as required. Participate in design reviews, code reviews, and collaborative requirements reviews. Apply generally accepted programming standards and techniques to ensure efficient performance and data manipulation. Attendance during regular work hours and overtime as required. Collaborate with multiple global teams to contribute to a large-scale project. Your Skills and Experience Required qualifications: Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or a related field. 3+ years of experience working as a software engineer and related roles; Experience with C#, .NET, SQL Server Knowledge of data structures and strong understanding of object-oriented principles Comfortable digging into large, unfamiliar codebases to diagnose, debug, and resolve critical issues English proficiency at B2 CEFR level or above (or equivalent) is required. Preferred qualifications: Experience working in an agile development environment Experience working developing desktop applications Understanding of mathematical concepts involving algebra and geometry Why You'll Love Working Here Competitive Income: Attractive salary, 13th-month bonus, year-end performance bonus Comprehensive Healthcare: PVI insurance, full social insurance, 24/7 accident insurance, annual health check-ups Training & Development: English courses, LinkedIn Learning, MiTek University, overseas training opportunities Leave Policy: 12 annual leave days, Christmas holiday Recognition of Achievements & Contributions: Employee of the Month/Year, Platinum Star Award, VIP trip for employees with 3 years of service Modern Facilities: Designed to support learning, working, and development Benefits: Free diverse lunch options, team-building activities, sports clubs (Badminton, Football, Swimming, Modern Dance, Yoga, Esports, Gym)

description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job Quản trị & Tối ưu Hệ thống: Thực hiện các công việc liên quan đến chỉnh sửa giao diện (UI/UX), tối ưu hóa hiệu suất website, cài đặt Plugin và thao tác quản trị trong hệ thống Admin. Your Skills and Experience Trình độ học vấn: Tốt nghiệp Cao đẳng trở lên chuyên ngành Công nghệ thông tin hoặc các chuyên ngành có liên quan. Sử dụng thành thạo các ngôn ngữ và công cụ: PHP, MySQL, HTML/CSS, Bootstrap, JQuery; có tư duy tốt về Web Responsive. Hiểu biết sâu về mã nguồn mở WordPress; có khả năng viết module, tùy biến giao diện (custom theme) và lập trình bổ sung các tính năng nâng cao. Khả năng tự học, tự nghiên cứu nhằm nâng cao kỹ năng và cập nhật các kiến thức chuyên môn mới. Có khả năng làm việc độc lập dưới áp lực tốt, đồng thời phối hợp hiệu quả khi làm việc nhóm. Why You'll Love Working Here Thu nhập: Mức lương cạnh tranh từ 8.000.000đ đến 12.000.000đ , trao đổi và thỏa thuận trực tiếp với Trưởng bộ phận dựa trên năng lực thực tế. Chính sách Thưởng: Thưởng sáng kiến: Ghi nhận và thưởng xứng đáng cho các ý tưởng, giải pháp xuất sắc đóng góp vào sự phát triển chung của Công ty. Thưởng chương trình giới thiệu nhân sự nội bộ. Công cụ làm việc: Cung cấp đầy đủ trang thiết bị, máy móc và vật tư phục vụ cho công việc. Chế độ Phụ cấp: Hỗ trợ các khoản phụ cấp đa dạng bao gồm: ăn trưa, điện thoại, xăng xe, công tác phí,... Phúc lợi xã hội: Đóng Bảo hiểm xã hội đầy đủ (BHXH, BHYT, BHTN) theo đúng quy định của Luật Lao động hiện hành. Chăm sóc đời sống: Tặng quà vào các dịp Lễ, Tết, sinh nhật và các chế độ phúc lợi nội bộ khác. title: Mid-Level/Senior .NET Developer
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us 100% salary is paid in probation. Annual Leave: 12 days/ year. Cash out leaves at lunar Tet The Job Job Description Contract Duration : 8 months with view to extend, asap start date We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated Senior .NET Developer to join our team in Vietnam. You will collaborate within a cross-functional pod alongside our Australian client team on a critical backend migration of a live government application. The project involves migrating an existing backend from Azure Functions to Azure Web App Service, driven by security requirements. The application is already live in production, so careful and methodical migration practices are essential. Key Responsibilities: • Backend Migration : Lead the migration of the existing backend from Azure Functions to Azure Web App Service, ensuring zero disruption to the live production environment. • Security & Compliance : Apply best practices for secure backend development in alignment with government application security requirements. • Code Quality & Testing : Maintain high code quality through robust testing (unit, integration, and end-to-end tests) and adherence to best practices. • Azure Integration : Configure and maintain Azure services including App Service, authentication middleware, and related cloud infrastructure. • Collaboration : Work within an Agile pod alongside the Australian client team, participating in regular meetings, sizing exercises, and providing clear task updates in English. Your Skills and Experience Required Skills and Experience Development: Strong experience with .NET (ideally .NET 8 or .NET 10). Code Quality: Ensure adherence to high code quality standards, ensuring code coverage is maintained. Architecture: Proven experience with Microsoft Azure, including Azure Web App Service and/or Azure Functions. Data Access: Proficiency with Entity Framework (or comparable modern ORM). Containerization: Expertise using Docker and Docker Compose for local development and runtime setup. Database: Experienced with MS SQL Server. General Dev: Experience with version control systems (Git) and Agile development methodologies. Desirable Skills and Experience Communications: Fluency in spoken English is desirable. Fluency in written English is essential. Authentication: Experience with Azure Active Directory B2C (Azure B2C) for identity and access management. CICD: Experience with Azure DevOps or similar CI/CD pipelines. Containerization: Experience with Docker for local development and deployment. Why You'll Love Working Here At SSTech, we focus on web development with emerging technologies providing lots of opportunities to learn new technology, new technical skill and knowledge. We aim for a friendly and flexible working environment, a work-life balance to provide the best assist for our team members to work effectively. Other than that, all the members are offered with many benefits: Attractive salary and benefits 13th-month salary & annual salary review. Added 1 day leaves/month & Cash out leaves at Lunar New Year (Tet). Furthermore, an additional day of leave will be granted for each year of seniority All benefits under the labor code Annual company trip Well-equiped working condition In-house lunch Unlimited free coffee, tea, snacks, and fruit to keep you energized Dymanic and friendly working environment in a team of talented and experienced developers. 🕑Working time: Monday to Friday. 08:30 – 17:30 (including a 60-minute lunch break)

title: Junior .NET Developer (HTML, C#, Javascript)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job - Tham gia trực tiếp vào dự án đang phát triển tại công ty. - Phối hợp với BA phân tích và thực hiện các yêu cầu hệ thống phần mềm. - Tham gia thiết kế, lập trình, quản lý, bảo trì hệ thống phần mềm của công ty. - Báo cáo trực tiếp với trưởng bộ phận. Your Skills and Experience - Từ 02 năm kinh nghiệm - Thành thạo ngôn ngữ lập trình: .NET, (ASP.NET, C# hoặc VB.NET) - Nắm vững kiến thức về lập trình hướng đối tượng - Kiến thức về HTML, CSS, Javascript, JQuery, AJAX. - Khả năng lập trình tốt WebService, WCF, ADO.NET, LINQ, Entity Framework. - Khả năng lập trình PL/SQL Oracle . - Ưu tiên những ứng viên có kinh nghiệm làm về các hệ thống ứng dụng web application. - Chịu được áp lực về thời gian, cường độ, khối lượng công việc - Có ý thức trách nhiệm cao trong công việc. - Cẩn thận, trung thực, sáng tạo, tư duy logic tốt - Khả năng làm việc độc lập và theo nhóm Why You'll Love Working Here Lương cạnh tranh (Từ 12 triệu), phỏng vấn theo năng lực và cạnh tranh với các đơn vị cùng ngành. Làm việc trong môi trường văn hóa mang đậm bản sắc Tinh Vân: Chia sẻ, hợp tác, trẻ trung, năng động, và có cơ hội thăng tiến cao. Nhiều chế độ ưu đãi cho những nhân viên xuất sắc. Được đóng đầy đủ BHXH, BHYT, BHTN khi ký hợp đồng chính thức và hưởng các quy định khác theo Luật Lao động. Được hưởng chế độ bảo hiểm sức khỏe toàn diện của bảo hiểm Bảo Việt. Nghỉ thứ 7 và Chủ nhật.

title: React Native Architect - 2-Month Signon Bonus
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Inspired Leadership Team and Talented Colleagues Attractive Salary and Benefits Hybrid mode available and flexible working time The Job *** 2-month sign-on bonus *** Offer & Onboard from 16 Jun, 2026 - 15 July, 2026 Lead the design, development, and maintenance of mobile of cross-platform mobile applications using React Native. Collaborate closely with US-based clients to understand project requirements, provide technical guidance, and ensure successful project delivery. Architect and implement robust and scalable React Native mobile solutions. Define and execute the mobile development strategy , including technology stack, architecture, and best practices. Mentor and guide a team of React Native developers, fostering a culture of innovation and excellence. Collaborate closely with design, product, and backend teams to deliver exceptional user experiences. Optimize application performance, scalability, and user experience. Ensure code quality, maintainability, and adherence to best practices. Stay up-to-date with the latest trends and advancements in React Native and mobile development. Implement comprehensive testing strategies (unit, integration, and UI) to ensure application stability. Your Skills and Experience General Requirements: Upper-Intermediate skill level of English (the ability to present to clients and stakeholders as well as participate online conferences in English) Likely having 7+ years of experience depending on how fast of your learning and developing technical capability Familiar with Agile development methodologies (Scrum) Strong leadership, communication, and collaboration abilities. Technical Requirements: Proven experience as a React Native Architect with a strong track record of delivering successful mobile applications. In-depth knowledge of React Native, JavaScript, and associated libraries (e.g., React Navigation, Redux, Expo). Strong understanding of mobile UI/UX design principles and best practices. Proficiency with RESTful APIs, GraphQL, and JSON. Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and mobile deployment processes. Excellent problem-solving, debugging, and troubleshooting skills. Proficiency in native platform development (iOS and Android) is a plus. Why You'll Love Working Here Perks You'll Enjoy Working in one of the Best Places to Work in Vietnam Building large-scale & global software products Working & growing with Passionate & Talented Team Diverse careers opportunities with Software Outsourcing, Software Product Development, IT Solutions & Consulting Attractive Salary and Benefits Performance appraisals every year and performance bonus Remote work available and flexible working time Onsite opportunities: short-term and long-term assignments in North American (U.S, Canada), Europe, Asia. Various training on hot-trend technologies, best practices and soft skills Premium healthcare insurance for you and your loved ones Company trip, big annual year-end party every year, team building, etc. Fitness & sport activities: football, tennis, table-tennis, badminton, yoga, swimming… Joining community development activities: 1% Pledge, charity every quarter, blood donation, public seminars, career orientation talks,… Free in-house entertainment facilities (foosball, ping pong, gym…), coffee, and snack (instant noodles, cookies, candies…) And much more, join us and let yourself explore other fantastic things!

title: Senior Expo / React Native Developer
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Multiple platforms - Techologies - More Challenges Work with large CMR Software and 500+ Customers Opportunities to travel/work to the U.S, EU The Job Omnicasa is a B2B CRM platform built specifically for the real estate industry. We're a small, tight team spread across Belgium, Vietnam, and Morocco — and we move fast. Our mobile app runs on Expo and is a core part of what we sell. It needs to feel like a native iOS/Android app, not a web app wrapped in a shell. We've already done the hard work of migrating away from a legacy .NET MAUI app to a fully Expo-based stack. We use native UI components throughout, and the app reflects that. We take design seriously — liquid glass effects, native navigation patterns, platform-appropriate animations. If you look at our app and think "that's clearly React Native," something has gone wrong. What you'll do Own and extend our Expo mobile app — new features, performance improvements, and platform-specific polish Work with native modules (Swift/Kotlin exposure is a plus, not a hard requirement) Collaborate with our design team to implement UI that genuinely looks and feels native on both iOS and Android Contribute to architecture decisions — we want someone who has opinions, not someone who just executes tickets Help maintain quality: you'll be the person who pushes back when something doesn't feel right on device Your Skills and Experience Must-haves: 4+ years working with Expo and React Native — not as a side project, as your primary stack You've shipped real apps to the App Store and Google Play, and you know what "production-ready" actually means Strong TypeScript fundamentals You understand the difference between Expo Go, development builds, and managed vs bare workflow — and when to use which Experience with Expo Router, EAS Build, and OTA updates You care about the details: gesture responsiveness, scroll physics, transition timing, platform conventions Experience with native UI paradigms (blur effects, vibrancy, Dynamic Island, haptics, etc.) Strong plus: Expo DOM Components or brownfield integration experience Eye for design — you can look at a screen and know when something is off, even if you can't always explain why immediately Animation experience with Reanimated 3 and Gesture Handler Not a fit if: Your React Native experience is mostly web-to-mobile ports that "kind of work on mobile too" You've only worked in Expo Go and never shipped a production build You think platform differences are an edge case Why You'll Love Working Here What we give back Very competitive salary 13th-month salary Premium insurance Powerful Macbook Flexible time Flat company culture Clear career road-map

title: Senior Platform Architect – React, Next.js | Remote
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Work on real AI — not just talk about it. Build products used in global supply chains. Remote work, real impact, room to grow. The Job The Role This role will start part-time (10–20 hours per week) with the potential to transition into a full-time technical leadership role as the platform scales. You will lead the platform architecture and technical direction while working alongside developers, DevOps engineers and the UAT team to ensure the system is built efficiently, securely and with long-term scalability in mind. This role is primarily focused on architecture and technical leadership , but we are also looking for someone comfortable being hands-on when required , particularly around backend architecture, data modelling and system design. You will help define the technology stack, validate developer implementation, review architecture decisions and ensure development follows best practices across performance, scalability and security. Key Responsibilities Platform Architecture Design and maintain the overall platform architecture Define service boundaries, APIs and core system modules Architect the platform for multi-tenant SaaS scalability Guide technical decisions for the MVP and long-term platform evolution Ensure the system remains modular, scalable and extensible Backend & Data Architecture This role is primarily backend and data architecture focused . Responsibilities include: designing scalable APIs and service architecture defining database architecture and data models designing ingestion pipelines and background processing systems ensuring performance, reliability and scalability of the platform Security Architecture Design and validate key security layers including: tenant data isolation row-level security and access control API authentication and authorization encryption and secure data storage audit logging and traceability protection against data leakage or privilege escalation Development Oversight Review developer architecture decisions and code Validate performance, concurrency handling and scalability Ensure high standards of maintainable code and system design Identify improvements in database models and APIs Guide efficient engineering practices DevOps & Engineering Delivery Leadership You will help oversee engineering delivery and ensure the platform is deployed and maintained using modern DevOps practices. Responsibilities include: guiding development and DevOps workflows overseeing CI/CD pipelines and deployment processes ensuring reliable staging, testing and production environments coordinating development, infrastructure and UAT activities improving engineering efficiency and release cycles ensuring platform reliability, monitoring and observability You may work with or guide DevOps engineers responsible for infrastructure and deployments. AI-Assisted Engineering We actively encourage AI-assisted development workflows . You will guide the team in using tools such as: Claude Codex AI-assisted coding environments to improve: developer productivity automated code generation testing workflows documentation engineering efficiency Data Platform Design Assist in designing the core data models for: supply chain data analytics supplier and product data modelling pricing and market intelligence systems data ingestion and analytics pipelines QA and UAT Oversight Work with the UAT team to ensure: architecture integrity security layers are properly implemented performance requirements are met new features align with platform architecture standards Platform Architecture Overview The MegaMine platform will consist of core platform services and modular product modules . Core Platform Services These services form the foundation of the system: Authentication and tenant management Data ingestion and normalization pipelines Price indexing and analytics engines Search capabilities (keyword and semantic) Alert and notification systems Audit logging Infrastructure & Technology Experience While the final architecture will be defined by the Platform Architect, experience with modern SaaS infrastructure and data platforms is expected. Relevant experience may include: Frontend Platforms modern web frameworks such as React or Next.js TypeScript-based frontend architectures Backend Platforms Node.js, TypeScript or similar backend frameworks modular API architectures REST or GraphQL APIs Data Platforms PostgreSQL or other relational databases time-series or analytics databases caching and queue systems (e.g. Redis) Storage object storage systems such as S3-compatible storage Infrastructure & DevOps AWS, GCP or similar cloud platforms CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI or similar) containerisation (Docker) infrastructure as code (Terraform or similar) monitoring and observability tooling Background Processing Experience designing systems with background processing such as: ingestion pipelines alert processing notification systems scheduled data integrations Your Skills and Experience About You You are an experienced architect who has built scalable SaaS platforms or data-intensive systems . You are comfortable leading architecture decisions while also contributing hands-on when required, particularly in backend systems and data modelling. You enjoy shaping the foundations of early-stage platforms and working with small, high-performing engineering teams. Required Experience SaaS platform architecture backend system design and development relational database architecture (e.g. PostgreSQL) API design and distributed systems multi-tenant SaaS system design cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP or similar) experience leading engineering teams including developers, DevOps and QA Preferred Experience AI / LLM integrations vector databases or RAG pipelines data analytics or intelligence platforms high-volume API systems B2B SaaS startups DevOps pipelines and cloud infrastructure management Engagement Details Part-time role: 10–20 hours per week Remote / international candidates welcome Potential to transition to full-time platform leadership role Why Join Architect a new AI-driven SaaS platform from the ground up Work with modern data and AI technologies Influence the technical direction of a global platform Flexible remote engagement with long-term opportunity Why You'll Love Working Here Work on Switch AI — a live, AI-powered platform for procurement, sales, and quality management used by a real Australian business. Remote-friendly setup with a collaborative, no-drama team culture. Direct access to leadership — your work and ideas are seen and acted on quickly. Work across a modern tech stack: Next.js, Supabase, OpenAI, NetSuite API. Opportunities to grow into senior and lead roles as the product scales. Exposure to global clients and cross-border operations (Australia, Philippines, and beyond).

title: Mobile Developer (React Native, English)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job About Digital Unicorn Digital Unicorn is a mobile and web development agency focused on creating great digital products that truly matter to our customers. We work closely with startups, scale-ups, and established companies to design and build high-quality applications with strong product thinking, clean execution, and long-term value in mind. Our team is international, highly motivated, and hands-on. We value ownership, clarity, and craftsmanship. We keep things practical, move fast, and expect everyone to contribute directly to the success of our projects and our clients. We believe great products come from people who care deeply about users, quality, and collaboration. About the Role We are looking for a Mobile Developer (React Native) to join our growing delivery team and work on high-impact client projects. You will be involved in building, improving, and maintaining real-world products used by real users. At any given time, you will focus on the most important product or technical challenge for your project. This role is ideal for someone who enjoys taking responsibility, working closely with PMs, designers, and other engineers, and turning ideas into reliable, well-crafted software. Level: Middle/Senior Type: Onsite, Fulltime, Inhouse What You Will Do What You Will Do Build and maintain mobile apps with React Native and Expo (iOS and Android) , from feature design to App Store / Google Play release Develop web interfaces when needed: React admin panels, dashboards, internal tools Work with Supabase for database, authentication, real-time subscriptions, and edge functions Contribute to back-end services built with NestJS or similar frameworks Write clean, tested code following team conventions (conventional commits, monorepo structure) Participate in code reviews and help improve code quality across the team Collaborate daily with PMs, BAs, QC engineers, and designers to deliver features Communicate clearly in English with international stakeholders and team members Use AI tools daily to accelerate development and maintain high standards Your Skills and Experience We're looking for developers who are comfortable working in a modern, AI-assisted development environment and meet most of the following requirements: Required Skills AI-assisted development: Confident using AI tools (e.g. Claude Code, Claude Skills) to write, review, and improve code. React Native & Expo: Experience building and shipping production mobile applications. TypeScript: Strong practical experience. Supabase: Hands-on experience with database, authentication, real-time features, and Edge Functions. NestJS / Node.js: Experience with NestJS or similar backend frameworks. REST APIs: Solid understanding of API design and backend fundamentals. Git: Familiar with standard Git workflows and conventional commits. Testing: Experience writing unit and integration tests (e.g. Vitest, Testing Library, Maestro). English: Professional working proficiency for collaborating with international clients. Teamwork: Experience working effectively with PMs, BAs, QCs, and designers. Experience working in an agency or consulting environment Nice to Have NativeWind, Expo Router, or Turbo monorepos Bun or other modern JavaScript runtimes Biome, oxlint, or modern linting tools OAuth2, SSO, or payment integrations (Stripe, PayPal, BitPay) CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, EAS) Docker/Podman and basic Kubernetes knowledge Experience integrating AI services or self-hosted AI models Why You'll Love Working Here Open to discuss about Salary & bonus, aligned with your skills and experience 100% salary during the probation period Insurance coverage according to local regulations Work on real products with real impact Learn from experienced engineers, PMs, and managers Grow your technical and product skills quickly International working environment, English-speaking environment with direct client exposure A culture that values quality, responsibility, and continuous improvement Project ownership – make meaningful contributions from day one Dynamic, comfortable, and creative working environment Team building events & company trips every year, Happy Hour every Friday Snacks and fresh fruits always available for your break times Sports & wellness activities to recharge and boost energy

title: Senior React Native Engineer (Full-stack, Node.js)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Competitive salary and benefits Comprehensive insurance coverage and allowances Generous leave: public + annual + 3 special days The Job This is a full-stack feature-delivery role with React Native at its center. You will spend most of your time in the mobile app, but you own features end-to-end. A product requirement drives both the mobile flow and the API contract behind it. A Figma design is one input to that, not the source of the schema. You design the API contract, build it on our existing backend architecture, and integrate it through to the React Native UI. The app is not a simple UI shell. It includes AI meal scanning, recipe scanning, voice logging, barcode scanning, food diary flows, meal plans, premium subscriptions, and push notifications. It also includes authentication, health-device sync, secure storage, analytics, crash and performance monitoring, and release pipelines for iOS and Android. We expect this person to work like a senior owner. You should clarify requirements early, design both the mobile flow and the API behind it, write maintainable TypeScript across mobile and backend, test risky paths, and follow production issues through to resolution. Mobile Product Delivery Build and maintain WAO mobile features in React Native, TypeScript, and React Navigation. Own key user flows such as meal logging, food diary, meal scanning, voice logging, barcode scanning, meal plans, premium paywalls, profile, onboarding, and reports. Translate Figma designs into React Native using the existing design system, theme tokens, shared components, and icon set. Keep screens responsive across devices, safe areas, keyboard states, loading states, error states, and permission states. Improve app startup, navigation stability, rendering performance, memory use, and image handling. Native Mobile Capabilities Work with camera, microphone, image picker, file upload, WebP conversion, and native barcode detection flows. Handle iOS and Android permissions for camera, microphone, notifications, Apple Health, and Health Connect. Maintain push and local notification behavior. Work with in-app purchases using Apple App Store, Google Play, and backend receipt validation. Debug native build, signing, Gradle, CocoaPods, simulator, device, and release issues. App Data and State Manage app state, caching, offline data, and data sync with discipline. Keep sensitive data safe and handle auth and network failures gracefully. Backend API Development Design and build the backend GraphQL APIs your features need: schema, resolvers, services, DTO validation, and database access. Work from the product requirement, not the screen layout: shape the API contract the mobile feature needs, then build and integrate it end-to-end through to the React Native UI. Work on top of the existing architecture and patterns rather than inventing new ones, and keep GraphQL changes backward compatible. Build across the backend areas used by mobile: nutrition, tracker, meal scan, recipe scan, voice log, food search, feature flags, authentication, push notifications, and in-app purchases. Quality and Release Write and run unit and end-to-end tests when the change calls for them. Add focused tests for risky mobile behavior, payment flows, auth, request retry, and API integration. Use crash reporting, performance monitoring, analytics events, and logs to diagnose production issues. Support iOS and Android release preparation, store configuration, build checks, and regression testing. Review teammates' code and mentor through clear, day-to-day feedback. Your Skills and Experience We are looking for a senior engineer who can own production work end-to-end without waiting for every detail to be assigned. Experience 7+ years of professional software engineering experience. 4+ years building and maintaining production React Native apps for iOS and Android. Strong TypeScript, React, React Native, mobile architecture, debugging, and release experience. Experience shipping consumer mobile products with authentication, payments, push notifications, camera, or health-device integrations. Solid backend fundamentals in Node.js and TypeScript: API design, validation, authentication, database access, error handling, and tests. Prior NestJS and GraphQL experience is preferred, not mandatory. Experience working with product managers, designers, backend engineers, QA, and support teams. Working English for technical docs, specs, code review, and cross-team communication. Must Have Strong hands-on React Native ability across UI, navigation, state, data fetching, native permissions, app lifecycle, and performance. Strong TypeScript habits. You should be comfortable with generated types, strict APIs, reusable hooks, and clear component boundaries. Solid understanding of iOS and Android app behavior, including build systems, signing, device testing, release builds, and store review constraints. Experience with GraphQL clients, API contracts, error handling, caching, and cache invalidation. Ability to debug crashes, slow screens, memory pressure, broken native modules, flaky network behavior, and production-only bugs. Testing discipline with unit tests, React Native test patterns, end-to-end testing, and manual regression checks. Backend API ability. You have solid Node.js and TypeScript backend experience: API contract design, validation, authentication, data access, and tests. Strong with AI-agent, spec-driven development. This is core to how we work, not a bonus. You use AI agents to accelerate implementation, then review, test, and own the result. You keep full responsibility for correctness and production behavior. Security awareness around personal data, auth tokens, payment data, logs, and local storage. Product judgment. You can explain trade-offs between user experience, delivery speed, code quality, and release risk. Nice to Have Experience with React Native native modules in Swift, Objective-C, Kotlin, or Java. Experience with camera, image processing, OCR, barcode scanning, speech recognition, or health-device data. Experience with App Store Connect, Google Play Console, and IAP receipt validation. Experience with NestJS GraphQL schema design, database modeling and migrations, query tuning, or backend caching. Experience setting up or improving AI-agent, spec-driven workflows for a team: spec quality, review standards, verification, and guardrails. Why You'll Love Working Here Build the core mobile product for an AI nutrition platform used by real users in Vietnam. Work close to product decisions, mobile and backend architecture, and production operations. High ownership in a small team where senior engineers can improve how the product is built and released. Competitive salary and benefits. Generous leave policy: Public holidays 12 days annual leave 3 additional Company Holidays: Christmas, Vietnamese Family Day, Birthday leave Comprehensive insurance coverage and allowances for parking and transportation. Performance-based annual 13th-month salary may apply. Recreational facilities including billiards and table tennis.

title: Remote Senior Fullstack Engineer (Go/React)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Gain very attractive salary and benefits; Be a developer, not a coder; Excellent environment and team to help you grow. The Job As a Fullstack Engineer, you will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining web applications that leverage Golang for server-side development, ReactJS for the front end, and AWS services for cloud infrastructure. Responsibilities Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define, design, and ship new features; Write efficient, reusable, and testable code in Golang for server-side development; Develop responsive and user-friendly front-end applications using ReactJS; Design and implement robust and scalable RESTful APIs; Integrate web applications with AWS services, ensuring optimal performance and reliability; Collaborate with UI/UX designers to implement visually appealing user interfaces; Troubleshoot, debug and resolve issues throughout the development lifecycle; Stay up-to-date with emerging technologies and industry best practices; Participate in code reviews and provide constructive feedback to team members. Your Skills and Experience 5-7 years of experience in software development; Proficient in Backend development (Golang) , particularly in data modeling, database design, and optimization; Skilled in Frontend development (ReactJS) , with a focus on providing UI/UX consulting in partnership with designers; English is required at the B1 level as a minimum requirement. The candidate needs to speak by himself during the daily standup, sprint planning, and sprint retro. title: Senior React Native Engineer
