title: Senior React Native Developer
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Attractive salary Fun, flexible and challenging work A purpose: improve the life of thousands of women The Job Our Mission ⭐️ Perifit is a profitable and fast-growing Femtech startup based in Paris, France, with a software team based in Ho Chi Minh City. Turnover was multiplied by 100 in 5 years! Our goal is to assist women worldwide with the most challenging moments in their lives – moments that are heavily under-addressed – and provide fun and effective self-care solutions. Our first product, the Perifit (a connected probe and its mobile games), launched in 2018, has become the #1 connected solution for pelvic floor rehabilitation. As of now, it has helped more than 500,000 women and is the best-ranked app in its category. We now develop innovative pelvic floor trainers and breast pumps that use the most recent technologies to help women improve their lives. Our mission is to empower women to take control of their health and improve their overall well-being. At Perifit, we stand for equality, inclusivity, benevolence, and wellbeing for both our clients and our employees. Joining Perifit means being part of a dynamic, mission-driven team that is making a real difference in women's lives, and having the opportunity to contribute to a growing and innovative startup in the Femtech industry! We're very proud of our values! FREEDOM – FEMINISM – STARTUP MINDSET – REAL IMPACT – NO EGO Why we need you 🚀 Our apps (Perifit Care and Perifit Pump) are technically ambitious: hybrid mobile applications that combine Bluetooth connectivity, game logic coded in Unity, and a React Native user interface, with a backend based on MySQL PHP. We need a deeply technical engineer who can ensure the robustness, scalability, and reliability of this stack. You will initially focus on Perifit Care. You will be the go-to technical reference for the apps, capable of understanding the big picture and going deep into specific parts when needed. What you will be doing 🎯 React Native Development : Own the front-end architecture, ensuring high performance, maintainability, and a smooth UX Technical Decision-Making : Drive architecture decisions and technical trade-offs, manage tech debt, and shape the technical roadmap for the apps. Quality & Standards : Define and enforce testing strategy, and coding standards; own performance profiling and scalability. Algorithms & Signal Processing : understand the algorithm in the app and manage unity dev to implement algorithms for signal processing, noise reduction, and decision-making within the app. App Deployment : Own app releases on iOS and Android stores, manage CI/CD pipelines, and ensure smooth updates. Cross-team Communication : Act as the bridge between engineering and product teams, translating technical challenges into clear explanations for stakeholders. Regulatory-readiness mindset : Work in coordination with QA/RA teams to ensure features are developed with robustness and traceability in mind, in line with CE/FDA requirements. What kind of person we are looking for 👤 Mindset : Resilient, adaptable, proactive, and pragmatic problem-solver. Communication : Capable of explaining technical challenges to non-technical stakeholders. Cultural Fit : Comfortable discussing topics related to women's health, pelvic floor, childbirth, and female intimacy. Location : Based in Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam. You will shine if ✨ You've already deployed complex React Native + Unity applications at scale. You have experience with Bluetooth-connected consumer devices. You've worked in a regulated healthcare or medtech environment. You are familiar with CI/CD and DevOps pipelines for mobile applications. You embrace AI-driven development and have integrated AI tooling into your day-to-day engineering workflow. Your Skills and Experience React Native Mastery : 5+ years building and shipping production React Native apps at scale, including 2+ years owning the architecture of a complex production app. Backend & Database : Proven, hands-on experience with Firestore and SQL/MySQL databases. Algorithms & Signal Processing : Solid understanding of applied mathematics, real-time data processing, and algorithm design. Mobile Deployment : Ownership of the full app release process on the App Store and Google Play, including CI/CD. English Proficiency : Excellent written and spoken English for technical reporting and cross-team collaboration. AI-driven Development (nice to have) : Experience leveraging AI-assisted development tools and workflows (e.g. coding agents, review AI works and test what AI done, etc.) to ship faster with high quality. Why You'll Love Working Here You'll be building applications that directly impact the lives of hundreds of thousands of women – and their families. Your role is deeply hands-on, giving you both technical depth and real ownership of the apps. 🏥 Insurance benefits provided through PTI 🏢 Flexible and Friendly Work Environment : Dynamic startup culture, international team, and a focus on wellbeing. Annual bonus up to 20% of total annual salary (includes 13th-month salary and performance bonus) Company bonus based on the company's performance

title: Mobile Developer (React Native, Securities, Blockchain)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Vững vàng phát triển sự nghiệp Môi trường đa dạng và hòa nhập Tiên phong ứng dụng công nghệ The Job MỤC ĐÍCH CỦA CHỨC DANH Chịu trách nhiệm thiết kế, phát triển và tối ưu các ứng dụng và hệ thống phần mềm chứng khoán và tài sản số. Đảm bảo các sản phẩm đáp ứng các yêu cầu nghiệp vụ, hiệu năng, bảo mật cao, ổn định và có khả năng mở rộng khi có yêu cầu. CÁC TRÁCH NHIỆM THỰC THI CHÍNH 1. Phát triển sản phẩm • Phát triển và duy trì các ứng dụng di động bằng React Native với hiệu năng tối ưu. • Thiết kế kiến trúc ứng dụng linh hoạt, dễ bảo trì và mở rộng. • Thực hiện tối ưu hiệu năng: memory, rendering, network requests, list virtualization… • Tích hợp các giao tiếp real-time bằng socket: WebSocket, Socket.IO, etc. • Làm việc chặt chẽ với team backend để triển khai API, real-time data và blockchain (nếu có). 2. Thiết kế giải pháp kỹ thuật và cải tiến hệ thống • Tham gia, đề xuất giải pháp kiến trúc, mô hình hệ thống nhằm đáp ứng được về tầm nhìn phát triển, hiệu năng, an toàn thông tin của hệ thống. • Nghiên cứu, đánh giá tìm hiểu công nghệ mới để đưa vào áp dụng nhằm tăng được hiệu quả, năng suất của công việc. 3. Kiểm thử và đảm bảo chất lượng sản phẩm • Phối hợp với bộ phận Test trong quá trình kiểm thử tích hợp và kiểm thử hệ thống. • Xử lý lỗi, tối ưu mã nguồn trong quá trình vận hành sản phẩm. • Tham gia/ phối hợp giải quyết các sự cố hệ thống và phối hợp với các nhóm liên quan trong quá trình vận hành sản phẩm. 4. Hợp tác & phối hợp liên phòng ban • Làm việc cùng các nhóm phát triển sản phẩm số để đảm bảo sản phẩm đáp ứng theo yêu cầu của nghiệp vụ • Tham gia các cuộc họp kỹ thuật, báo cáo tiến độ định kỳ. 5. Đào tạo, chia sẻ kiến thức & hỗ trợ đội nhóm • Đóng góp trong việc xây dựng tiêu chuẩn kỹ thuật, quy trình phát triển phần mềm • Chia sẻ kinh nghiệm, xây dựng môi trường học tập. CÁC KẾT QUẢ MONG MUỐN • Hệ thống hoạt động ổn định, có hiệu năng cao, có khả năng mở rộng và thời gian downtime thấp. • Đảm bảo tuân thủ các quy định về phát triển phần mềm, an toàn thông tin trong quá trình phát triển sản phẩm. Your Skills and Experience 1. Trình độ Học vấn • Tốt nghiệp Cao đẳng, Đại học chuyên ngành Công nghệ thông tin, Hệ thống thông tin, Điện tử viễn thông hoặc các chuyên ngành khác có liên quan. 2. Kiến thức/ Chuyên môn có liên quan • Hiểu biết về kiến trúc ứng dụng mobile như Redux, MobX, Context API…. • Có kinh nghiệm phát triển smart contract hoặc từng làm việc trong những dự án Web3, tài sản số là một lợi thế. 3. Kinh nghiệm liên quan • Có ít nhất 3-5 năm kinh nghiệm phát triển ứng dụng di động với React Native. • Kinh nghiệm tối ưu performance cho ứng dụng di động như profiling, memory optimization, lazy loading, list virtualization… • Kinh nghiệm làm việc với real-time data/socket: WebSocket, Socket.IO… • Kinh nghiệm triển khai và tích hợp API REST/GraphQL. • Có khả năng đọc hiểu và viết unit test, end-to-end test. • Ưu tiên: kiến thức hoặc kinh nghiệm làm việc với blockchain, smart contract, crypto wallets. 4. Kỹ năng • Khả năng phân tích và giải quyết vấn đề tốt. • Tinh thần chủ động, trách nhiệm cao trong công việc. • Kỹ năng làm việc nhóm và giao tiếp tốt. Why You'll Love Working Here Mức lương cạnh tranh, tháng tháng 13 và thưởng hiệu quả công việc Cơ hội tham gia đào tạo tại Công ty mẹ Bảo hiểm sức khỏe cho người lao động Bảo hiểm tai nạn Khám sức khỏe định kì Nghỉ thứ 7, chủ nhật

CLB Tennis/Pickle Ball Chế độ khám sức khỏe định kỳ. Cơ hội tham gia trực tiếp vào việc phát triển các sản phẩm công nghệ tầm cỡ toàn cầu, hợp tác cùng các đối tác đến từ Úc, Châu Âu và các thị trường phát triển khác . Làm việc trong môi trường Agile/Scrum , phối hợp chặt chẽ với đội QA và trực tiếp trao đổi với khách hàng quốc tế qua chat, họp trực tuyến. Chúng tôi làm việc vì đam mê và chúng tôi quý trọng người tài đức. Chiến lược của DEKON là tập trung phát triển con người & gắn bó lâu dài. Và vì chúng tôi có công ty thành viên đặt tại Melbourne (Australia), và làm việc với những project Phức tạp về Blockchain do vậy bạn sẽ được giao lưu học hỏi trực tiếp từ những Technical Lead/PM/BA/Manager nhiều năm kinh nghiệm (10, 20 & 30 năm) trong và ngoài nước. Bạn sẽ được đào tạo trong môi trường làm việc chuẩn-quốc-tế!

title: Fullstack Developer (NodeJS, ReactJS, AI Native)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us We CARE about you and always put FAIRNESS first Flexible & open international working environment Chance to work onsite with the team The Job Job Details Overview We are moving away from traditional "hand-coded" development. Our team operates at the intersection of AI-Agent efficiency and High-Level Architecture . Your first mission is to drive our Intranet using a Metadata-Driven approach. However, we are hiring for the long term. You will be a foundational member of the team, helping us build a modular software ecosystem that will power the company's future projects. Responsibilities Agentic Development: You will use Claude Code as your primary partner. You won't spend your day writing boilerplate; you will spend it directing AI to build high-quality, tested, and secure features. Metadata Mastery: You will design systems where logic is driven by. Your goal is to build tools that are so flexible they can be "reconfigured" for new use cases without rewriting the core engine. System Guardian: You will oversee the "big picture." While AI generates the code, you ensure the architecture remains clean, scalable, and easy to maintain for years to come. Future Planning: As the company grows, you will help design and implement new internal and external platforms using our "modular-first" philosophy. Your Skills and Experience Candidate Requirements Node.js & React: 3+ years of professional experience. You should be comfortable with the "Middle" level, meaning you can solve problems independently without constant hand-holding. AI Agent Mastery: This is non-negotiable. You must have a proven workflow for working with Claude Code (or similar agents). You should know how to write effective CLAUDE.md files and how to "course-correct" an AI when it goes off-track. System Logic: Experience with Metadata Driven systems (where the UI and logic are defined by data/JSON rather than static code) is a huge plus. English: Good reading and writing skills (IELTS ~6.0+ equivalent) to interact with AI tools and technical documentation effectively. Why You'll Love Working Here Attractive Benefits: 13th-month salary bonus provided to all staff members. Comprehensive healthcare insurance package for you and your dependents. Annual health check-up included. 12 days of annual leave per year, with the opportunity for 1 additional day per year, up to a maximum of 18 days. Additionally, 3 special Restaff holidays are granted on December 24th, 25th, and 26th. Hybrid working model allowing for 1 day per week of remote work. English-speaking working environment. Overseas business trip opportunities available. Sponsorship and encouragement for staff members to pursue further education through coverage of tuition fees and examination costs. Product-oriented approach with an agile project management style, offering a dynamic work environment and the chance to gain expertise in the latest technologies. Regular gathering parties and team-building activities. Complimentary coffee (including cappuccino, cafe latte, latte macchiato, etc.), milk, and juice. Working hours from 9 am to 6 pm, Monday to Friday, with a one-hour lunch break and a thirty-minute break in the afternoon. Annual Performance Appraisal opportunities English communication skills training provided. And much more!

title: Fullstack Developer (ReactJS + NodeJS)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Attractive salary + KPI bonus based on performance Opportunity to be led by top architects & leaders High teamwork spirit and flexible working time The Job About the Role Are you ready to grow from a developer into a system builder? At VeXeRe, you’ll learn how to design, build, and scale applications that serve millions of users nationwide — all while working with experienced mentors who’ll guide you every step of the way. We’re building a modern microservices-based ecosystem with CI/CD, containerization, and cloud infrastructure, where you’ll get real hands-on experience with production-level systems. OUR TECH STACK: Backend: Node.js, Express.js, RabbitMQ / Kafka, PostgreSQL / Redis / Elasticsearch, Docker / Kubernetes / Jenkins Frontend: React.js, ES6 / TypeScript, Redux / Redux-Saga / Hooks RESPONSIBILITIES: Develop high-quality solutions to meet business requirements by designing, coding, and shipping well-structured, maintainable software. Identify and address technical debt & challenges: Proactively analyze areas for improvement and implement changes to enhance system performance and scalability. Collaborate and share knowledge within the Frontend Squad to maximize team expertise and personal growth. Take ownership: Lead a team or a product if capable, contributing to technical direction and best practices. Your Skills and Experience REQUIREMENTS: Must-Have: Proactive mindset, curiosity, and a drive to learn. Fast learner, able to adapt quickly to new technologies. 2+ years of hands-on experience in software development. University degree required; graduation from UIT, US, or BK is an advantage. Familiarity with macOS or Linux for development and deployment tasks. Understanding of our technology stack (no need to master everything, but familiarity is required): Backend: Node.js, PostgreSQL, Redis, Elasticsearch. Frontend: React.js, Redux, Redux-Saga, Reselect, React Hooks. Commitment to code quality: Strong experience in code reviews. Familiarity with unit testing best practices. Growth mindset: Ready to grow rapidly as the company scales several times a year. Nice-to-Have (Plus): Solid foundation in computer science (data structures, algorithms). Experience with Docker, CI/CD pipelines, or microservices architecture. Previous experience building and shipping real-world applications. Why You'll Love Working Here BENEFITS: Competitive Compensation & Bonuses Attractive salary package with performance-based monthly bonuses (up to 2 months’ salary per year). 100% salary during the probation period. Performance reviews twice a year with opportunities for salary adjustments. Flexible Work & Growth Opportunities Hybrid working model (work from home or at the office). Learn directly from our CTO, Tech Leads, and Senior Engineers. Build your public tech profile by: Writing on Medium & VeXeRe Tech Blog under your own name. Contributing to VeXeRe’s open-source projects. Speaking at internal or public tech talks. Attractive stock options for long-term contributors. Exclusive Employee Perks Up to 30% discount on bus tickets for Vexere employees and their families. 12 annual leave days + 1 additional day every 3 years (convertible to salary). Vibrant and friendly working environment. Training sessions on soft skills, communication, and modern technologies. Exciting company activities: team building trips, year-end parties, and more. What factors can help you trust Vexere? VeXeRe is the largest intercity bus booking platform in Vietnam, partnering with over 1,000 bus operators across 3,000 domestic and cross-border routes. Our Bus Management System (BMS) is trusted by 700+ transport companies nationwide, helping them modernize operations and boost efficiency. We’re backed by prestigious investors including Woowa Brothers (Baemin), CyberAgent Ventures (Japan), BonAngels (Korea), Pix Vine Capital (Singapore), Spiral Ventures (Japan), Access Ventures (Korea), and NCore Ventures (Korea) — two of which are Decacorns valued over USD 10 billion.

title: Mid to Sr Fullstack Developer (Go/NodeJS/Javascript)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Profitable startup from Year 1! High pay, MacBook Pro, $1000 annual development Work with top talent on product changing industry The Job About the Opportunity We are looking for an elite Internal Tools Builder to act as the engine behind our company's operations. As we evolve into a full-funnel marketing platform serving over 600k+ verified users, our internal operations, ERP, and tooling need to scale just as fast. In this role, you will work directly with company leadership to identify operational bottlenecks and build custom internal systems from the ground up. You will not be handed a perfect ticket; you will be handed a business problem. We need a highly autonomous Fullstack Engineer with a relentless "builder mindset" who can lead the topic, architect the system, and collaborate with other engineers to get it across the finish line. What You Will Do You will not just "write code." You will own internal products end-to-end. Your core challenges will include: Build the Engine: Architect and build robust internal tools, ERP modules, and operational systems across the entire stack (Database -> API -> UI) to make our internal teams wildly efficient. Direct Collaboration with Leadership: You will work directly with leadership/the boss. You must be comfortable hopping on a call, translating a vague business problem into a technical roadmap, and executing it. Lead the Topic: You are the technical owner. You will drive the architecture, make the hard technical trade-offs, and push back when necessary to ensure we are building the right thing. Mentorship & Collaboration: You won't be doing it entirely alone. You will pair with and mentor a junior engineer—delegating tasks effectively, doing code reviews, and helping them level up their full-stack skills. Performance & Architecture: Balance speed with stability. Know when an internal tool just needs a quick MVP to save the team 10 hours a week, and when a system needs to be highly scalable to handle massive data throughput. Your Skills and Experience What You Need to Be Successful We hire for mindset first, technology second. 1. The Builder Mindset Idea to Reality: You thrive on ambiguity. You can take a vague request ("We are losing track of customer billing edge-cases") and independently architect the database, build the API, and craft the UI to solve it. Internal Systems Expertise: You have experience building internal tools, ERPs, CRMs, or admin dashboards. You know how to stitch together third-party APIs, webhooks, and internal databases. 2. Engineering Skills Deep Experience (5+ Years): You have a strong foundation in building complex, production-ready web applications. Fullstack Fluency: You are completely comfortable jumping between backend logic (API design, complex SQL/Database modeling) and the frontend (React, state management) without skipping a beat. 3. Communication & Leadership Exceptional Communicator: Because you work directly with leadership, your written and spoken English must be excellent. You can explain complex technical trade-offs to non-technical stakeholders clearly and confidently. Force Multiplier: You have the patience and communication skills to mentor a junior engineer, breaking down complex architectures into actionable tasks for them. Why You'll Love Working Here Impact: The tools you build will instantly become the backbone of how our company operates daily. Culture: We are a lean, fast-growing team that values Good Design, Trust, and Empowerment. We invest in our people and give them the autonomy to do their best work. Perks: Highly competitive salary + 13th-month bonus. Stock options for high contributors. Professional development package of up to $1,000/year. Modern office with top-notch equipment (MacBook Pro). Comprehensive healthcare package (Annual health check, Premium Health Insurance). Flexible working hours with a standard 5-day workweek

title: OQ901 - Fullstack Developer (ReactJS, NestJS, NodeJS)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job Về vị trí này ONSQUARE INC is a Korea-based Fintech and AI-based SaaS startup. It develops payment infrastructure and AI Agent-based user tools for the global market, operating with a distributed team structure across Korea, Canada, and Vietnam. Trách nhiệm Key Responsibilities - Develop Fintech and AI Agent services (Korea-Canada based startup). - Collaborate with the head office and HCMC branch to perform the following tasks: - Develop in-house SaaS products. - B2B workflow management tools (Immigration automation). - Fintech payment platform (Remittance, Payment, KYC). - AI Agent-based user tools. - New feature development and maintenance of the above products. - Front-end Development: Develop React and TypeScript-based web applications; Implement responsive UI and optimize UX; Real-time data streaming interfaces (AI Chat, Alerts, etc.). - Back-end Development: Develop API servers based on Node.js and NestJS; Data modeling and caching using PostgreSQL and Redis; External API integration (Payment gateways, Auth, AI APIs, etc.). - Quality & Collaboration: GitHub-based code reviews and PR collaboration; Issue management and Sprints via Linear; Deployment and operation in AWS environments; Asynchronous collaboration across Canada, Korea, and Vietnam time zones. Your Skills and Experience Qualifications - 5+ years of experience in Full-stack web development. - Professional experience in React and TypeScript front-end development. - Professional experience in Node.js, NestJS, or similar back-end frameworks. - Experience in data modeling and query optimization based on RDBMS like PostgreSQL. - Experience in collaboration via Git and GitHub. - Experience in deployment within AWS or similar cloud environments. - Ability to read and write technical documentation in English. - Currently residing in or willing to relocate to Ho Chi Minh City. Yêu cầu - Experience in developing Fintech, B2B SaaS, or AI products. - Experience in integrating payment systems (Stripe, Airwallex, etc.). - Experience in utilizing LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.). - Experience in real-time data processing (WebSocket, SSE). - Understanding of Fintech security and regulations (KYC, AML). - Proficient in English conversation. Why You'll Love Working Here Quyền lợi - Competitive compensation based on experience and skill set - As required by Vietnamese labor law, full social insurance coverage applies for contracts of 1 month or longer - Shared co-working space in District 7, HCMC

title: Senior Fullstack Engineer (Elixir, Golang, NodeJS)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Opportunity for regional scale (South East Asia) Enrich your skills and develop your potential Enjoy motivating working conditions The Job We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Senior Fullstack Engineer to join our dynamic team. In this pivotal role, you will driving the design and implementation of robust and scalable web applications, also a trusted technical partner to our Product Owners. You will play a critical role in shaping the future of our platform, balancing the evolution of our existing systems with the creation of innovative new features that directly impact our business goals. This includes opportunities to work with and integrate Artificial Intelligence into our production environment to enhance our platform's capabilities. If you are passionate about building high-quality software, solving complex problems, fostering technical growth in others, and exploring the practical application of AI, we want to hear from you. What You Will Do: Technical Leadership & Architecture: Technical design, development, and implementation of new web applications and core system modules, ensuring they are built for scalability, performance, and maintainability. System Ownership: Take ownership of key parts of our web infrastructure, including existing systems and legacy code, ensuring their stability, performance, and security. Collaboration & Strategy: Work closely with Product Owners and stakeholders to translate business requirements into technical specifications and deliver impactful solutions. Provide accurate technical estimations, plan project timelines, and contribute to technical roadmap discussions. Integration Expertise: Design and implement seamless integrations with critical third-party services (e.g., payment gateways, logistics providers, marketplaces, and AI services/models ) to enhance our platform's capabilities. Mentorship & Growth: Actively mentor and guide junior developers, sharing your knowledge, best practices, and helping them grow their technical skills and careers. Operational Excellence: Provide technical support and troubleshooting for operational issues, ensuring a smooth experience for our users and internal teams. Quality & Best Practices: Champion code quality, participate in and lead code reviews, contribute to knowledge sharing sessions, and advocate for continuous improvement in our development processes and tooling. System Evolution: Proactively identify areas for technical improvement, refactoring, and optimization within our existing systems, including exploring opportunities to leverage AI technologies Your Skills and Experience Education background requirements: : Bachelor's degree in a relevant field (e.g., Computer Science, Engineering) or equivalent practical experience. Experience/Industry requirements: Strong Background in E-commerce Domain (Preferred): Strong understanding of the challenges and common patterns in the e-commerce space. Technical Proficient in at least one of: Elixir, Golang, Node.js Databases: PostgreSQL, Redis, MongoDB, Elasticsearch Message Queue: RabbitMQ or Kafka Docker, CI/CD (GitHub Actions), Cloud (AWS/GCP/Azure) Solid front-end knowledge; Unit/Integration/E2E testing experience Scalable system design & legacy system ownership Experience Third-party integrations (payment, logistics, AI services) Mentoring junior developers Collaborating with Product Owners on specs, estimations & roadmap Nice to Have E-commerce domain background AI integration in production Microservices, Grafana/Prometheus Strong English communication Why You'll Love Working Here Salary: Negotiable Phone, meal allowances Full salary insurance Full salary in probation Tet, performance bonus Premium Health Insurance Full insurance package 15 Annual Leave + 3 Sick Leave + 1 Outing Leave Work from home: 1 day/week Laptop provided

title: [Remote] DevOps / Platform Engineer
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us 100% remote, work from anywhere in Vietnam Build an AI-augmented team from the ground up Modern greenfield stack, no legacy mess The Job Kitchen Warehouse is one of Australia's largest specialty kitchenware retailers, and we are building our internal engineering function to own our e-commerce platform end to end. This is a foundational DevOps role. You will design and build the CI/CD pipeline and automation platform the entire engineering team runs on. We are an AI-augmented team. A core part of this role is building the infrastructure that runs our AI agents: Claude-powered code review, test generation, and documentation agents that run as GitHub Actions workflows on every pull request. If you like building platforms rather than just running them, and want to work at the intersection of DevOps and AI, this is for you. What you will do: Design and build our GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline from scratch: lint, test, scan, AI review, deploy Configure branch protection and a staging to production promotion strategy Integrate SonarCloud as a blocking quality gate Build the infrastructure for our AI agents (GitHub Actions workflows, Anthropic API integration, PR automation) Manage Netlify deployment configuration: preview deploys, production deploys, rollback automation Set up monitoring, alerting, and incident tooling (Datadog, Grafana) Manage secrets, environment variables, and access controls across all environments Document infrastructure and runbooks for the team Your Skills and Experience Must have: 3+ years in DevOps or platform engineering Strong GitHub Actions experience (workflow authoring, custom actions, matrix builds) JAMstack hosting experience: Netlify, Vercel, or Cloudflare Pages Comfortable scripting in Node.js and/or Python, plus Bash Experience integrating third-party APIs into CI/CD pipelines Experience with LLM APIs (Anthropic, OpenAI) Familiarity with static analysis tools (SonarCloud or similar) Secrets management and environment configuration experience Good written English for a remote-first, distributed team Nice to have: Containerisation (Docker) and infrastructure as code (Terraform) Observability tooling (Datadog, Grafana) Cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) Why You'll Love Working Here Build the platform, don't just maintain it: this is a from-scratch build with real ownership Work at the edge of DevOps and AI: you will ship the infrastructure that runs our AI agents Fully remote with flexible hours Direct line to engineering leadership; your architecture decisions stick Modern stack: GitHub Actions, Netlify, Vercel, SonarCloud, Datadog, Anthropic Claude

title: Technical Lead (Payment/Marketplace/AI)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us AI-first company shaping the future of fitness Join a passionate global team across VN, US, & UK Collaborative team valuing joy & creativity The Job About Everfit Everfit is one of the fastest growing fitness coaching platforms in the world. We power more than 300,000 coaches across the globe with an all-in-one AI-powered platform to run and grow their businesses. In 5 years, we have become one of the leaders of the health and wellness B2B SaaS category in the US and around the world! We are at an inflection point. Having achieved an eight figure ARR business, we are focusing our efforts to capture more of the $4-5 trillion health and fitness market by going direct to consumers. Our vision is to become the operating system for personal health, where anyone can plug in a coach, or multiple coaches, to reach their wellness goals faster, optimize their human potential, and extend their longevity. Our team spans from San Francisco to Vietnam, with senior leaders who have built and scaled products at Netflix, Apple, Meta, Nike, Hulu, Uber, Amazon, Hypebeast, and Quibi. We are building the next unicorn to come out of Vietnam, and we are looking for a confident leader who can help us get there. Position Overview: Location: Hanoi or Da Nang office. If you are based in Ho Chi Minh City, 2-3 weeks per month in Da Nang or Hanoi office (Open for discussion) Our Vietnam team is the engine of Everfit. Currently around 170 people, roughly 150 in Da Nang and 20 in Hanoi, who built the product that’s made us a category leader in 5 years since launch . The next chapter is about unlocking what this team is capable of — moving faster but with extreme precision, building with AI in every workflow, and operating at the level of the best companies in the world. We’re looking for a Tech Lead who can elevate our engineering team from strong to exceptional. You will drive technical excellence, lead the adoption of AI across engineering workflows and products, mentor and grow our developers, and help build a high-performance engineering culture. Working closely with product, design, and leadership teams across Vietnam and the US, you will align technical execution with business goals and ensure the team delivers impactful solutions with speed, quality, and scalability. WHAT YOU'LL LEAD You will set technical direction across 2 of Everfit's highest-priority initiatives. Payments: Own the technical direction for billing infrastructure: subscription lifecycle, payment gateways (Stripe and beyond), webhook reliability, and financial reconciliation at scale. Guide the squad through multi-currency, cross-border flows, and marketplace payout systems while maintaining financial data integrity. Marketplace: Drive backend architecture for discovery, listing management, search/ranking, and transactional flows. Design two-sided systems that scale from thousands to millions of users, covering matching, availability, dynamic pricing, and booking state, with seamless Payments integration. Your impact Technical Direction & Architecture Own the architectural patterns and technical standards for Marketplace and Payment's backend systems — workout programming engines, scheduling logic, nutrition tracking, multi-tenant platform infrastructure, notification pipelines, and third-party integrations. Drive solution design for complex features: new product areas, cross-squad integrations, platform-level changes, and performance-critical systems. Make architectural decisions that balance delivery velocity with long-term maintainability. Define and uphold engineering standards across squads: API design, data modeling, testing practices, code review culture, and documentation. Proactively identify and lead reduction of technical debt in coordination with Engineering Management and Product. Hands-on Engineering Stay in the code on the most critical work — Marketplace and Payment platform infrastructure, high-risk migrations, cross-squad technical foundations, and architectural proof-of-concepts. Review pull requests across sub-squads with depth and speed, giving feedback that helps engineers grow — not just ships. Set the standard for what good code looks like across squads: observable, testable, maintainable, and scalable. AI-First Engineering Champion AI-assisted development across squads — from code generation and test writing to automated documentation and PR reviews. Collaborate with the AI squad on integrating AI features directly into workflows: smart programming suggestions, automated progress summaries, AI-powered onboarding. Help engineers build practical AI fluency through pairing, demos, and shared tooling workflows. Mentorship & Team Growth Mentor and coach engineers across squads — raising the technical bar through code reviews, architectural guidance, and technical pairing. Run regular technical discussions and design reviews that help engineers grow as system thinkers, not just feature builders. Contribute to hiring across Payment and Marketplace: design technical assessments and conduct engineering interviews calibrated to the Marketplace and Payment domain. Cross-functional Collaboration Be the primary technical voice in product discovery across Marketplace and Payment — shaping what's feasible, what's scalable, and what will cause pain six months from now. Partner closely with PMs, BAs, QA Lead, and Design to ensure technical decisions translate cleanly into user-facing product quality. Align with Tech Leads in other squads (Marketplace, Payment, AI) on shared infrastructure, platform standards, and cross-squad integrations. Represent Payment and Marketplace Engineering in cross-functional leadership discussions, communicating system decisions with clarity to non-technical stakeholders. Your Skills and Experience Ideal Candidate Background US/UK education or international experience is highly preferred. We value leaders who bring a global perspective, have been exposed to high-performing organizations, and can combine international best practices with a deep understanding of Vietnam's talent and culture. This unique blend of experience will help us continue building a world-class company and team. You have a real engineering and product background. You understand how software gets built and you can earn the respect of builders Must-Have 5+ years of backend engineering experience, with 2+ years in a Tech Lead or equivalent role. Former startup founders, or engineers from highly entrepreneurial environments. Deep backend fundamentals: distributed systems, data modeling, event-driven architectures, API design, scalability, and reliability. Hands-on experience in at least two of the four initiative domains: payments/fintech, marketplace/platform, B2B SaaS, or AI/LLM engineering. A track record of designing maintainable systems and raising the technical bar across teams. Strong English communication skills and an AI-first engineering mindset. Nice to have: Familiarity with: Node.js, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, AWS, Docker, or equivalent. Experience in high-growth startups or distributed teams across time zones (Vietnam and US). Why You'll Love Working Here Compensation & Benefits: Full social insurance coverage and premium healthcare benefits. Competitive salary with 13th-month pay and performance bonus. Paid leave: vacation, sick leave, and maternity leave Build Your Career with Impact: Be part of a mission-driven company that’s transforming human potential. Empower over 300,000+ coaches in more than 200 countries - including Olympic athletes, military trainers, rehab specialists, and celebrity coaches. Make a global impact while building a meaningful, purpose-driven career. Continuous training, mentoring. 1-2 performance reviews annually. Work Environment: English-speaking, international environment promoting open communication and collaboration. Work alongside world-class talent from companies like Apple, Meta, Uber, Patreon, and Nike, united by a shared passion for impact and excellence. International team for global career growth. State-of-the-art equipment provided. Beautiful working environment near Danang's city center (Dragon Bridge) and Hanoi office. Health & Wellness: PVI health insurance program and annual health check-ups. Active sports clubs (football, badminton, pickleball) and company retreats. A modern pantry designed for relaxation and social connection. Monthly wellness and learning workshops to recharge and grow.

title: Senior Fullstack Developer (Next.js & NestJS)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job We are building a high-performance B2B platform where business logic and data integrity are paramount. We are looking for a Senior Engineer who can bridge the gap between complex system requirements and production-ready code. RESPONSIBILITIES: System Architecture: Lead the implementation of scalable backend patterns using NestJS. You will be responsible for enforcing Clean Architecture boundaries and transitioning monolithic modules into decoupled services where necessary. Database Stewardship: Lead the database restructuring initiative. You will design normalized schemas, plan migration strategies to minimize downtime, and optimize complex queries for performance at scale. Advanced Frontend Engineering: Architect the Next.js 14+ frontend application. You will define patterns for Server Actions, caching strategies, and reusable component composition to ensure high performance (Core Web Vitals). Technical Leadership: Establish coding standards, conduct rigorous code reviews, and mentor mid-level developers. You are the "Quality Gatekeeper." Your Skills and Experience Backend & Data Framework: Expert mastery of Node.js and NestJS. You understand the event loop, streams, and memory management deeply. Database: Advanced proficiency in PostgreSQL. Frontend Framework: Expert knowledge of React.js and Next.js (App Router). You can explain the architectural trade-offs between SSR, CSR, and ISR in depth. UI Architecture: Ability to build complex, compound components using headless libraries (shadcn/ui, Radix UI) and Tailwind CSS. Performance: Experience debugging render cycles, memory leaks, and optimizing bundle sizes. Tools & Workflow AI-Assisted Coding: You treat AI coding tools (Cursor, Claude) as a force multiplier. You know how to prompt for architectural patterns and rigorously audit the output for security and logic flaws. Mindset & Work Ethic Product-Oriented: You don‘t just write code; you build products. You proactively identify gaps in the requirements and suggest improvements that align with business goals. Extreme Attention to Detail: You care about "invisible" quality—error handling, logging, data consistency, and edge cases. You assume things will break and code defensively. Outcome-Focused: You value shipping robust software over debating tools. You make pragmatic technical trade-offs and can articulate why you made them. Independent & High Agency: You can take a vague requirement like "Improve search accuracy" and turn it into a concrete technical roadmap without needing to be managed. Scientific Rigor: You don‘t guess; you measure. You use metrics and logs to prove your optimizations work. English Reading Comprehension: Ability to read and understand English documents (equivalent to CEFR B1 level or above) Nice to Have Experience designing Microservices or Event-Driven Architectures (Kafka, Debezium). Experience with Monorepo tooling (Turborepo/Nx) in a production environment. Deep knowledge of Authentication protocols (OAuth2, OIDC) and security best practices (OWASP). Why You'll Love Working Here Social insurance coverage upon signing your employment contract. Generous leave policy: 12 annual leave days plus all Vietnamese public holidays. 13th-month salary (applicable from the probationary period). Company-provided equipment. Well-stocked pantry: tea, coffee, snacks, microwave, etc. Engaging company activities: Company trips, team-building events, regular internal events (including live music performances!), and access to company-sponsored badminton courts.

title: Application Support Level 2 (.Net, Angular)

They will work closely with Level 1 support to ensure timely resolution of tickets and will escalate complex issues to the Level 3 support team. The candidate should be adept at troubleshooting and have a strong understanding of various software development technologies. Ensure prompt and efficient resolution of technical issues related to the application throughout 24 hours a day, 7 days a week B- Role and Responsibilities Provide support for projects released on production, ensuring their uninterrupted and smooth operation during 24/7. Work 40 hours/week (have 2 flexible days off a week). Proactively identify opportunities for process improvement and contribute to the enhancement of support services and system performance during 24/7. Strong understanding of software development lifecycle and methodologies. Proficiency in troubleshooting and resolving technical issues related to software applications and systems. Knowledge of the technology stack (e.g. .NET Core, Ionic, NodeJS, Angular) to support issue analysis. Excellent communication skills and the ability to collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams. Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities with attention to detail. title: [Remote] Technical Lead (Full-Stack)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job About the Role We are seeking an experienced Technical Lead (Full-Stack) to join our team on a freelance contract basis. This position is being advertised through our recruitment partner in Vietnam. The successful candidate will provide services to a Singapore-based technology company and will work closely with our regional team on project delivery and client engagements. In this role, you will own the architecture, mentor a team of talented engineers, and partner closely with Product and Business stakeholders to deliver high-impact products that serve millions of users. If you are passionate about building scalable systems, growing engineering talent, and shaping the technology roadmap of a fast-moving product, we would love to hear from you. Key Responsibilities Lead, mentor, and grow a team of full-stack engineers — provide technical guidance, conduct code reviews, and foster a culture of engineering excellence and continuous learning. Own the end-to-end technical architecture of products and services: design scalable, secure, and maintainable systems aligned with business goals and long-term product strategy. Partner with PM and cross-functional stakeholders to translate high-level business requirements into clear technical roadmaps, milestones, and deliverables. Drive technical decision-making — evaluate trade-offs, select appropriate technologies, frameworks, and tools, and define coding standards and best practices across the team. Oversee the full software development lifecycle: planning, estimation, design, implementation, code review, testing, deployment, monitoring, and post-release support. Conduct hands-on development on the most critical and complex components of the system, while balancing leadership responsibilities. Define and enforce documentation standards for technical designs, system architecture, APIs, workflows, and operational runbooks. Establish and maintain robust CI/CD pipelines, automated testing strategies (unit, integration, end-to-end), and DevOps best practices. Benchmark, troubleshoot, and continuously optimize application performance, scalability, reliability, and cost-efficiency. Identify, evaluate, and mitigate technical risks; lead incident response and root-cause analysis for production issues. Champion the adoption of modern technologies — including AI-assisted development, AI Agents, and emerging tooling — to accelerate delivery and improve product quality. Collaborate with hiring managers to interview, recruit, and onboard engineering talent; contribute to team planning and resource allocation. Communicate technical concepts clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences, including senior leadership and external partners. Drive a culture of accountability, ownership, and quality across the engineering team. Comfortable to engage with end user clients to understand requirements and perform business analysis. Your Skills and Experience At least 7+ years of professional software engineering experience, with 2+ years in a Tech Lead, Engineering Lead, or equivalent leadership role. Proven track record of architecting and delivering production-grade, large-scale, distributed systems. Strong hands-on expertise in Node.js, JavaScript, TypeScript, and Golang. Solid front-end experience with Angular and/or ReactJS. Deep knowledge of PostgreSQL — schema design, query optimization, indexing, and scaling strategies. Strong proficiency with Docker, container orchestration, and modern deployment workflows. Hands-on experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure), microservices architecture, and event-driven systems. Strong understanding of CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure-as-code, observability, and DevOps best practices. Solid grasp of modern AI concepts and ecosystems — MCP, AI Agents, Agentic workflows, and LLM-based application design. Proven experience using AI-assisted coding tools such as Claude, Codex, Cursor or similar. Excellent system design skills with the ability to make sound architectural trade-offs. Strong leadership, mentoring, and people-development skills — able to grow engineers and build high-performing teams. Excellent communication skills in English (both written and verbal) and the ability to influence stakeholders at all levels. Experience performing Business Analyst-style responsibilities: requirement gathering, solution analysis, and functional clarification. Comfortable working remotely with distributed teams across time zones. Immediately available or with a notice period of no more than one month is preferred. Nice to Have Experience leading product teams in infrastructure, building management, IoT or other high-traffic consumer products. Experience building and deploying services using AWS Cloud Services. Contributions to open-source projects or technical thought leadership (talks, blogs, papers). Experience designing AI-augmented products or integrating LLMs into production systems. Familiarity with security best practices, data privacy, and compliance frameworks. Why You'll Love Working Here Very attractive salary commensurate with experience, plus performance-based bonuses. Clear career development path with opportunities to grow into Engineering Manager or Principal Engineer roles. Access to the latest technologies, tools, and AI-assisted development platforms. Opportunity for business trips to Singapore and engagement with strategic partners. Work alongside a friendly, experienced, and highly talented team. Professional, collaborative, and supportive working environment. Work-from-home arrangement.

title: Fullstack Developer
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job Role Overview: As a Full Stack Engineer, you will be responsible for developing both front-end and back-end components of our web applications. You will collaborate with cross-functional teams, including product managers, designers, and other engineers, to build robust software solutions. The ideal candidate will have a deep understanding of web development, from databases to front-end frameworks, and possess strong problem-solving skills. Responsibilities: • Develop Full Stack Applications: Design and implement both client-side and server-side features using modern technologies such as React, Angular, Node.js, Python, Ruby, or Java. • API Development: Build and maintain RESTful APIs and microservices that communicate seamlessly between the front-end and back-end. • Database Management: Design and optimize databases, working with both SQL and NoSQL technologies (e.g., MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB). • Code Quality & Best Practices: Write clean, maintainable, and efficient code while adhering to best practices such as version control, unit testing, and code reviews. • Collaboration & Agile Development: Work in an agile environment with product managers, designers, and other engineers to define and deliver features and improvements. • User Experience Focus: Build responsive, intuitive, and engaging user interfaces that deliver a seamless experience across devices. • Performance Optimization: Continuously monitor and optimize application performance, ensuring high availability, scalability, and reliability. • Troubleshooting & Bug Fixing: Debug and resolve issues that arise in both the front-end and back-end of the application. Your Skills and Experience Requirements • Bachelor’s Degree (or equivalent experience) in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field • 2+ years of experience as a Full Stack Developer or similar role, working with modern web technologies. • Proficiency in front-end technologies such as HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and experience with modern JS frameworks (e.g., React, Angular, Vue.js). • Proficiency in back-end technologies such as Node.js, Python, Ruby, Java, or similar. • Experience working with relational and non-relational databases (e.g., MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis). • Familiarity with version control systems such as Git. • Strong understanding of RESTful APIs and microservices architecture. • Knowledge of web security best practices and handling authentication/authorization. • Experience with cloud platforms (e.g., AWS, Azure, Google Cloud) is a plus. • Familiarity with DevOps practices, continuous integration, and deployment (CI/CD) is a plus. • Excellent problem-solving skills and attention to detail. • Strong communication and teamwork skills, with the ability to collaborate in a fast-paced environment. Preferred Skills: • Experience with containerization tools (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes) • Familiarity with GraphQL • Knowledge of mobile development (e.g., React Native, Flutter) is a plus • Experience with performance monitoring and optimization tools. Why You'll Love Working Here 14 days Annual leaves + 3 Sick leaves Private Health Insurance Annual Salary Review Performance Bonus 100% salary in probation period Free LinkedIn Learning Account Company Events & Team Building

title: System Engineer (DevOps, CI/CD, Automation)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job As a System Development Engineer, you sit at the high-velocity intersection of Software Engineering and Systems Architecture, building the sophisticated tooling that allows our systems to provide the highest quality service. You will design and implement world-class Continuous Integration and Deployment frameworks. You will treat our internal infrastructure as a product, developing high-performance internal tools, APIs, and CLI utilities to automate complex operational logic. You will lead the charge in Infrastructure as Code (IaC) and build self-healing systems and automated remediation workflows that detect and fix issues before a human ever sees an alert. You’ll bake security into the DNA of our systems. Key Responsibilities Architecting the CI/CD Engine: Design, build, and optimize high-speed deployment pipelines. You ensure it’s tested, secured, and deployed with zero downtime using Canary and Blue/Green strategies. Engineering Internal Platforms: You will treat internal services as products, developing APIs, custom CLI tools, and dashboards that empower software teams to self-serve infrastructure. Radical Automation & IaC: Eliminate manual toil by codifying everything. You will manage global-scale infrastructure using Infrastructure as Code (IaC), ensuring environments are reproducible, version-controlled, and immutable. Advanced Escalation & Reliability: Act as the "Engineer’s Engineer." You provide support for complex distributed systems failures, performing deep-dive root cause analysis (RCA) and writing code to ensure the same failure mode never happens twice. Performance Tuning & Observability: Build the "eyes and ears" of our systems. You will implement advanced telemetry, distributed tracing, and automated alerting to maintain high availability and peak performance. Replicate complex customer deployment environments to execute comprehensive system integration and stability testing. Cybersecurity Compliance & Global Standards: Ensure that our systems meet/exceed strict global security standards. Your Skills and Experience Education & Experience 5+ years of experience in system development, integration engineering, or QA automation. Bachelor Degree/ Master Degree in Software Engineering/Computer Science/Information Technology or any relevant field. ​ Technical Competencies Proficiency in object oriented and scripting programming languages Strong Linux/Unix internals knowledge and a firm grasp of networking protocols (TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP/3). ​ Language & Soft Skills Advanced verbal and written English communication skills are required. Strong analytical mind with a proactive approach to breaking down and solving complex technical puzzles. Constant learner who proactively works through ambiguity ​ What We Offer The unique opportunity to build and pioneer global security products directly out of Vietnam's thriving innovation center. An international, diverse, and multicultural R&D culture guided by world-class data scientists and chief engineers. Competitive salary and bonuses. Why You'll Love Working Here Compensation & bonus: 13th & 14th salary, AIP bonus, Holidays, Tet, and Long year service … Social insurance, Health insurance, Unemployment insurance: by Social Insurance and Labor Law The regime of annual leave, company trip, and checkup examination Award for marriage, newborn We have AON insurance package for employee, spouse, and children every year You will be trained, learned & work with the best technical managers who help you improve various dev skills & career path You’ll love working in our dynamic environment employees, young & active We love sport activities, as marathon, football, swimming,... Working time: From Monday to Friday | 08:30-12:00 & 13:00-17.30

Solid AWS networking knowledge, including VPC, Security Groups, VPN, Transit Gateway. Experience with multi-account / multi-environment AWS setups. Nice to have: AWS certifications such as AWS Security Specialty, Solutions Architect, or DevOps Engineer Professional Experience with PHP applications on AWS , especially during infrastructure migration or remediation is a big plus Familiarity with enterprise compliance, security governance, or regulated environments Experience using AI chat tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, etc.) for research, debugging, and learning Familiarity with at least one AI coding assistant (GitHub Copilot, Cursor, Claude Code, or similar) Ability to write clear, contextual prompts to generate code snippets, unit tests, or documentation Awareness of AI output limitations and responsible AI use (data privacy, handling of sensitive client data) Why You'll Love Working Here Perks You'll Enjoy Working in one of the Best Places to Work in Vietnam Building large-scale & global software products Working & growing with Passionate & Talented Team Diverse careers opportunities with Software Outsourcing, Software Product Development, IT Solutions & Consulting Attractive Salary and Benefits Performance appraisals every year and performance bonus Remote work available and flexible working time Onsite opportunities: short-term and long-term assignments in North American (U.S, Canada), Europe, Asia. title: System Manager (DevOps, leader, CI/CD,SRE)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job As a System Development Manager, you are the strategic catalyst at the intersection of Software Engineering leadership and Systems Architecture. You will lead a high-performing team of engineers dedicated to building the sophisticated tooling and frameworks that underpin our global security ecosystem. Your mission is to transform operational complexity into streamlined, automated excellence. You will define the vision for our Continuous Integration and Deployment frameworks, treating internal infrastructure as a premier product. You aren't just managing tasks; you are fostering a culture of Radical Automation and Infrastructure as Code (IaC). By mentoring your team to build self-healing systems and robust internal platforms, you ensure that security, scalability, and reliability are baked into the DNA of everything we ship. Key Responsibilities Strategic Leadership & Vision: Define the roadmap for CI/CD and internal platform engineering. You align technical initiatives with business goals to ensure our infrastructure scales ahead of our customer base. Team Empowerment & Mentorship: Lead, coach, and grow a world-class team of System Development Engineers. You remove blockers, foster a culture of "everything as code," and champion the professional growth of your direct reports. Platform Management: Drive the strategy for internal tools, APIs, and dashboards. You ensure these tools provide a frictionless "self-service" experience for our global software teams. Operational Excellence & Reliability: Oversee the stability of distributed systems. You lead the response to complex escalations and ensure that Root Cause Analysis (RCA) leads to permanent systemic improvements, not just quick fixes. Ecosystem Governance: Direct the implementation of advanced telemetry and observability. You ensure the "eyes and ears" of our systems provide the data-driven insights necessary for high-stakes decision-making. Security & Compliance Stewardship: Accountable for ensuring all systems meet or exceed strict global cybersecurity standards, maintaining the trust of our international customers. Resource & Stakeholder Management: Collaborate with Hardware, Firmware, and Cloud leadership to synchronize development efforts and ensure seamless integration across the Avigilon/Unity, Pelco, and Alta portfolios. Your Skills and Experience Education & Experience 8+ years of experience in system development, SRE, or DevOps, with at least 3+ years in a formal leadership or management role. Proven track record of delivering large-scale automation projects or internal developer platforms. Bachelor Degree or Master Degree in technical or any relevant field. Technical & Leadership Competencies Architectural Fluency: Strong understanding of Linux, networking protocols (TCP/IP, HTTP/3), and cloud-native architectures. Development Mindset: Ability to review and guide development in object-oriented and scripting languages (e.g., Python, Go, C++). Operational Maturity: Strong experience with IaC (e.g., Terraform, Ansible) and modern CI/CD orchestration. ​ Language & Soft Skills English Mastery: Advanced verbal and written communication skills for collaborating with global stakeholders. Strategic Problem Solver: Ability to navigate high-pressure situations with a calm, analytical approach. People-First Mentality: A passion for building diverse, inclusive teams and fostering a high-trust R&D culture. ​ What We Offer The unique opportunity to lead and pioneer global security products directly out of Vietnam's thriving innovation center. An international, diverse, and multicultural R&D culture guided by world-class data scientists and chief engineers. Competitive salary and bonuses. Why You'll Love Working Here Compensation & bonus: 13th & 14th salary, AIP bonus, Holidays, Tet, and Long year service … Social insurance, Health insurance, Unemployment insurance: by Social Insurance and Labor Law The regime of annual leave, company trip, and checkup examination Award for marriage, newborn We have AON insurance package for employee, spouse, and children every year You will be trained, learned & work with the best technical managers who help you improve various dev skills & career path You’ll love working in our dynamic environment employees, young & active We love sport activities, as marathon, football, swimming,... Working time: From Monday to Friday | 08:30-12:00 & 13:00-17.30

title: Senior DevOps Engineer (AWS, Kubernetes)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us High salary Flexible environment Using latest technologies The Job About Us We're not just building products, we're building a place where people grow. Personal development isn't a perk here, it's a priority. Every team member levels up alongside the company through hands-on projects, cutting-edge tools, and industry best practices. Our clients expect excellence, and that standard shapes everything we do from the infrastructure we design to the culture we cultivate. The Role We're looking for a Senior DevOps Engineer who's ready to take ownership of our infrastructure, solve tough problems at scale, and build the foundation that lets our teams ship products people actually love using. This isn't a "keep the lights on" role. You'll shape how we build, deploy, and operate influencing architecture decisions, championing reliability, and raising the bar for the entire engineering organization. What You'll Be Doing Architect & Automate: Design, build, and maintain scalable, secure, and cost-effective cloud infrastructure (AWS, DigitalOcean, or similar) using Infrastructure as Code. You'll own the full lifecycle from initial provisioning to ongoing drift detection and iterative improvement. CI/CD Ownership: Own and continuously evolve our CI/CD pipelines to maximize developer productivity. This includes ensuring fast, reliable, and automated releases while integrating quality gates, security scanning, and progressive delivery strategies (canary, blue/green, feature flags). Container Orchestration: Manage and scale containerized workloads on Kubernetes, including cluster lifecycle management, resource optimization (HPA, VPA, pod disruption budgets), networking, and storage not just deploying, but deeply understanding how things run in production. Observability & Reliability: Build and maintain a comprehensive observability stack (metrics, logs, traces) using tools like Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, or OpenTelemetry. Define and operate against SLOs/SLIs to make reliability measurable, not just aspirational. Security Integration (DevSecOps): Embed security into every layer — from image scanning and secrets management to RBAC hardening and network policies. You'll champion a shift-left security culture rather than treating it as an afterthought. Collaboration & Mentorship: Partner closely with development teams to optimize application performance, deployment strategies, and developer experience. Mentor junior and mid-level engineers, and advocate for DevOps principles across the organization. Incident Response & Continuous Improvement: Participate in an on-call rotation and lead incident response efforts. Drive blameless post-mortems that result in actionable improvements not just documentation. Cost Optimization & FinOps: Proactively monitor cloud resource usage, implement right-sizing strategies, and establish tagging and budget controls. You'll ensure we scale efficiently without burning through budget. Your Skills and Experience Must-Haves Experience: 5+ years of progressive experience in DevOps, SRE, or Platform Engineering roles, with at least 2 years operating at a senior or lead level (mentoring, architectural decision-making, cross-team collaboration). Preferred candidates with a strong backend engineering background and hands-on software development experience before transitioning into DevOps. Cloud Proficiency: Proven, hands-on experience with at least one major cloud provider (AWS preferred, Azure, GCP, or DigitalOcean), including compute, storage, networking, IAM design, cost optimization/FinOps awareness, and multi-account or multi-project governance (e.g., AWS Organizations, Landing Zones). Infrastructure as Code (IaC): Expertise in IaC tools such as Terraform (preferred), Pulumi, or CloudFormation, with experience writing modular, reusable, and version-controlled infrastructure with proper state management and drift detection. Familiarity with GitOps delivery models using tools like FluxCD or ArgoCD. CI/CD: Strong experience designing, scaling, and maintaining CI/CD pipelines (GitLab CI, GitHub Actions, or Jenkins), including pipeline security (secret management, SAST/DAST integration, artifact signing, supply-chain security) and progressive delivery strategies (canary, blue/green, feature flags). Containerization & Orchestration: Deep proficiency with Docker and Kubernetes in production, including cluster lifecycle management, Helm charts/Kustomize/operator patterns, resource management (requests/limits, HPA, VPA, pod disruption budgets), and debugging production workloads at the scheduling, networking (CNI), and storage (CSI) level. Observability & Reliability: Hands-on experience building observability stacks (metrics, logs, traces) with tools like Prometheus, Grafana, Loki, OpenTelemetry, Datadog, or the ELK stack. Experience defining and operating against SLOs/SLIs/error budgets, with proven incident response and blameless post-mortem experience. Scripting & Automation: Strong scripting skills in two or more of Python, Go, or Bash, with the ability to build internal tooling, custom controllers/operators, or CLI utilities that improve developer experience. Security Mindset: Working knowledge of DevSecOps practices — image scanning, runtime security (Falco, etc.), secrets management (Vault, SOPS, Sealed Secrets), RBAC hardening, network policies, and understanding of compliance-as-code principles and policy engines (OPA/Gatekeeper, Kyverno). Collaboration & Communication: Excellent analytical and troubleshooting skills with a systematic, documented approach to resolving complex issues. Ability to translate infrastructure decisions into business impact for non-technical stakeholders, with a track record of improving Developer Experience (DX) through internal platforms, self-service tooling, and golden paths. Nice-to-Haves Professional cloud certifications (e.g., AWS Certified DevOps Engineer Professional, CKA/CKAD/CKS). Experience with service mesh technologies (Istio, Linkerd, Cilium Service Mesh). Experience managing and automating relational databases in production (PostgreSQL, MySQL, RDS/Aurora), including backup strategies, replication, and migrations. Strong understanding of networking principles — VPC design, DNS, TCP/IP, load balancers, firewalls, CDN, and zero-trust networking concepts. Exposure to chaos engineering practices (Litmus, Chaos Monkey, Gremlin). Experience with multi-cluster or multi-region Kubernetes architectures. Familiarity with platform engineering concepts — internal developer portals (Backstage), self-service infrastructure, and API-driven provisioning. Contributions to open-source DevOps/infrastructure projects. Why You'll Love Working Here Above industry standard salaries. Friendly working environment and flexible working hours. 13th salary, insurance and team building activities. We work hand-in-hand with our clients to fully invest in their product development and build solutions together for their target market. We fully invest in our team, we will help you build yourself up in any area you feel you need development, be it in English, learning a new design tool, developing your design thinking and more. We want to make sure that you’re always learning and developing yourself whilst a part of our team. We respect both Product and Technology equally, ensuring all of the Products we work on have features with true market potential and ensuring all of the team contribute to, understand and believe in what they are developing. We respect you and your personal hours, we keep sustainable pace by working standard 8 hour days from Monday to Friday, ensuring we only plan for what we can achieve. We are fully agile, working with set sprint goals and working at our rate of velocity. You will have ownership over your role, giving you the opportunity to experiment and try new processes to better improve your day-to-day responsibilities. We are always open to improving our processes.

title: Middle DevOps Engineer ( Production Operations/ SRE )
company: Công ty Cổ phần Công nghệ DP Unity
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job Chúng tôi đang tìm kiếm DevOps Engineer có kinh nghiệm thực chiến (với tư duy DevSecOps trong vận hành) để xây dựng, vận hành và chuẩn hóa môi trường triển khai cho các hệ thống phần mềm phục vụ khối doanh nghiệp và cơ quan nhà nước. Vị trí này tập trung vào tự động hóa triển khai, giám sát hệ thống, bảo mật vận hành, sao lưu khôi phục và kiểm soát thay đổi. Phần hỗ trợ IT nội bộ chiếm khoảng 10–20% thời gian, chủ yếu nhằm đảm bảo môi trường làm việc và hạ tầng nội bộ ổn định. Trọng tâm chính của vị trí vẫn là DevOps / production operations cho sản phẩm phần mềm. Trách nhiệm chính: Triển khai và vận hành ứng dụng trên các môi trường dev, staging, production. Quản lý và theo dõi server, container, dịch vụ nền, reverse proxy và các thành phần liên quan trong hệ thống. Thiết lập và duy trì hệ thống monitoring, logging, alerting để theo dõi tình trạng hạ tầng và ứng dụng. Hỗ trợ quá trình release phần mềm, bảo đảm deploy an toàn, có kiểm soát, có khả năng rollback khi cần. Xây dựng và duy trì pipeline CI/CD tự động hóa build, test và triển khai. Phân tích, xử lý và phối hợp khắc phục các sự cố phát sinh trên môi trường vận hành. Quản lý cấu hình môi trường, domain, SSL/TLS, certificate, secret và quyền truy cập hệ thống. Xây dựng, thực hiện và kiểm tra quy trình backup/restore cho ứng dụng và cơ sở dữ liệu. Viết và duy trì tài liệu vận hành, runbook, SOP, checklist release, checklist sự cố. Phối hợp với team phát triển để chuẩn hóa cách đóng gói, triển khai và theo dõi ứng dụng sau release. Hỗ trợ chuẩn bị các nội dung kỹ thuật liên quan đến vận hành, log, sao lưu, truy vết thay đổi và an toàn hệ thống khi cần. Hỗ trợ IT nội bộ (kiêm nhiệm) Hỗ trợ xử lý sự cố máy tính, thiết bị và phần mềm cho nhân viên nội bộ. Quản lý và bảo trì hệ thống mạng nội bộ (LAN/WiFi, switch, router, VPN) và đường truyền. Quản lý server nội bộ, tài khoản người dùng, phân quyền và thiết bị dùng chung (máy in, NAS…). Your Skills and Experience Kinh nghiệm: Có từ 2–3 năm kinh nghiệm ở vị trí DevOps, System Engineer, Infrastructure Engineer hoặc tương đương (hoặc ít hơn nếu kinh nghiệm vận hành production thực tế tương đương). Có kinh nghiệm thực tế trong deploy và vận hành production cho hệ thống web, API hoặc dịch vụ backend. Kỹ năng bắt buộc: Thành thạo Linux server administration. Có kinh nghiệm tốt với Docker, Docker Compose hoặc công cụ tương đương. Có kinh nghiệm cấu hình và vận hành Nginx hoặc reverse proxy tương đương. Theo dõi và xử lý được các sự cố vận hành: tài nguyên (CPU / RAM / disk / network), crash process/service, lỗi ứng dụng sau deploy, lỗi kết nối giữa các service. Có khả năng viết shell script hoặc script tự động hóa cơ bản phục vụ triển khai và vận hành. Cần biết để làm tốt Có kinh nghiệm xây dựng pipeline CI/CD để tự động hóa build, test và deploy (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins hoặc tương đương). Biết tích hợp chạy test tự động vào pipeline làm cổng kiểm soát chất lượng (quality gate) trước khi release; thiết lập health check / smoke test sau deploy và kiểm tra khôi phục (restore test) cho backup. Có kinh nghiệm với các công cụ monitoring / logging / alerting: Prometheus, Grafana, ELK / OpenSearch / Loki, Zabbix hoặc tương đương. Có kinh nghiệm quản lý SSL/TLS, domain, certificate. Có kinh nghiệm backup/restore cho ít nhất một loại database phổ biến (PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server hoặc MongoDB). Có hiểu biết cơ bản về vận hành an toàn: quản lý secret, phân quyền truy cập, kiểm soát thay đổi, audit log, hardening cơ bản cho server. Tài liệu và phối hợp: Viết được tài liệu kỹ thuật rõ ràng, dễ dùng. Có khả năng phối hợp tốt với team dev, QA, PM trong quá trình release và xử lý sự cố. Có tinh thần trách nhiệm, cẩn thận, bình tĩnh khi xử lý hệ thống production. Ưu tiên: Các mục dưới đây là lợi thế cộng thêm, không bắt buộc — có một vài trong số này đã là điểm mạnh. Kinh nghiệm vận hành hạ tầng AI: triển khai và phục vụ (serving) mô hình AI/LLM; quản lý server GPU; tối ưu tài nguyên và chi phí cho workload AI. Quen với các công cụ phục vụ mô hình như Ollama, vLLM, Triton, TorchServe hoặc tương đương; biết đóng gói và vận hành dịch vụ inference qua API. Có kinh nghiệm với hạ tầng / cloud trong nước (VNPT, Viettel, FPT, VNG Cloud…) — phù hợp đặc thù khách hàng doanh nghiệp và cơ quan nhà nước. Có kinh nghiệm triển khai và vận hành kiến trúc microservice (service discovery, API gateway, giao tiếp giữa các service). Có kinh nghiệm với Kubernetes (k8s): triển khai, scaling, vận hành và xử lý sự cố cluster — hoặc các nền tảng điều phối container tương đương. Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với môi trường on-premise, private cloud hoặc datacenter. Đã từng làm trong môi trường yêu cầu cao về tính ổn định hệ thống, kiểm soát thay đổi, backup/restore, audit, logging, truy vết. Có hiểu biết cơ bản về các yêu cầu an toàn thông tin, dữ liệu cá nhân hoặc vận hành hệ thống cho khách hàng doanh nghiệp / cơ quan nhà nước. Có kinh nghiệm IT helpdesk / quản trị mạng nội bộ (xử lý sự cố máy tính, LAN/WiFi, quản lý tài khoản và thiết bị văn phòng). Why You'll Love Working Here Lương: thỏa thuận theo năng lực và kinh nghiệm thực tế, cạnh tranh so với mặt bằng thị trường. Tham gia BHXH, BHYT, BHTN theo quy định của Nhà nước và Công ty. Lương tháng 13, thưởng các ngày lễ, Tết và thưởng theo hiệu suất làm việc. Làm sản phẩm thật: vận hành hệ thống thực tế phục vụ khách hàng doanh nghiệp và cơ quan nhà nước, không phải môi trường thử nghiệm. Hạ tầng AI cho AEC/BIM: cơ hội tham gia xây dựng hạ tầng vận hành cho sản phẩm AI trong lĩnh vực AEC/BIM — backend service, hệ thống triển khai, monitoring/logging, và trong tương lai có thể mở rộng sang hạ tầng phục vụ AI/LLM inference (GPU serving). Lộ trình phát triển: cơ hội phát triển lên Senior / Lead, hoặc theo hướng Site Reliability / Platform Engineer khi hệ thống mở rộng. Hỗ trợ thiết bị làm việc và ngân sách học tập / chứng chỉ chuyên môn (theo chính sách công ty). Môi trường làm việc trẻ trung, đề cao tính chủ động, định hướng phát triển lâu dài.

title: DevOps Engineer (Kubernetes, AWS, CI/CD)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Attractive Salary and Benefits Amazing Clients Product driven company The Job We are seeking a DevOps Engineer with a minimum of 2 years of expertise in Continuous Integration and Continuous Deployment (CI/CD) practices. In this role, you will play a crucial part in our software development lifecycle, focusing on automating and streamlining our build, deployment, and release processes. Essential Functions: CI/CD Implementation : Design, develop, and maintain robust CI/CD pipelines to ensure smooth and efficient software delivery. Infrastructure as Code (IaC): Utilize tools such as CloudFormation/Terraform to automate and manage infrastructure provisioning and configuration. Containerization: Work with containerization technologies like Docker and orchestration tools such as Kubernetes for application deployment and scaling. Coding / Scripting: Create and maintain in-house tools aiding software development . Security: Implement security best practices throughout the CI/CD pipeline and infrastructure to propose a good balance and prevent breaches. Observability stack: Manage and improve metrics, logs, traces, alerting, visualization Troubleshooting : Diagnose and resolve issues related to deployments and system performance. DevOps Advocate: Collaborate closely with development and operations teams to bridge the gap and promote a DevOps culture. You’ll also need to: Collaborate tightly with architecture, product, front-end, and back-end teams to gain feedback and ensure your solutions effectively bring value. Take ownership of projects and have the opportunity to further your knowledge Take control of your productivity and improve your time management and communication skills Your Skills and Experience The most successful candidates for this role will have: Proven experience of at least 3 years of experience in DevOps with a strong focus on CI/CD. Experienced with IaC tools such as CloudFormation/Terraform Experienced in containers approach with Docker (Linux and Windows ). Candidates must demonstrate the ability to use AI tools as a pair operator for infrastructure debugging, scripting, CI/CD, configuration, and automation work; while maintaining human control over validation, security, and production risk.
