Perform functional, regression, integration, and system testing of software applications. Identify, record, and track defects using a defect tracking system; work closely with developers to resolve issues. Liaise with teams across business lines to understand their IT requirements. Support various teams with their day-to-day IT needs. Carry out manual testing for Mobile and Web Applications. Your Skills and Experience Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, or a related field. Minimum of 3 years of experience in software testing, preferably in a web or mobile application environment. Strong understanding of software testing methodologies, tools, and best practices Familiarity with Agile development practices and tools (e.g., JIRA, Clickup,). Preferred to have the knowledge of Real estate and property management domain. English Proficiency (written and spoken). Why You'll Love Working Here Your Career There is one overriding reason for our success – and that is you. If you are not growing, then neither are we. Your Leave Enjoy your time off, you’ve earned it! Work life balance is essential, we offer generous holiday allowances, as well as loyalty leave and charity leave. Your Lifestyle Work. Life. Balance. We want to support good health and wellbeing and know that your lifestyle is key to this. The way we work and how we relax are recognised through our lifestyle benefits. Your Community Giving something back. Community is at the heart of how we operate and our ethos. To recognise this we offer charity matching, charity leave and the opportunity to get involved in corporate fundraising events and activities.

title: QA Lead (SQL, ERP, Tester)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Competitive Salary and Benefits Macbook Pro and Additional Screens Great multinational team, dynamic vibe The Job The mission Eliminate recurring production incidents Rebuild regression foundations Design system-level quality controls Strengthen transactional and data integrity Turn QA from reactive to preventive If you’ve stabilized a messy ERP, finance system, or workflow-heavy SaaS before — this will feel familiar. The Reality Check: We are looking for a battle-tested Senior QA Lead to lead a system stabilization mission. Our platform powers 2000+ schools across multiple countries. It handles student lifecycle, operations, billing, payments, reporting, and complex data flows. We are past the early-stage chaos. Now we need to rebuild quality foundations properly. This is not a maintenance role. This is a stabilization leadership role. What You Will Be Doing Stop Production Incidents at the Root Identify systemic defect patterns Design invariant checks (data consistency, transaction integrity) Build reconciliation validation Prevent recurrence, not just detect bugs Own End-to-End Platform Quality Student enrollment & lifecycle Class & attendance management Billing & payments Reporting & analytics Integrations & webhooks Data migration & legacy imports This role sees the whole system — not just UI. Hands-On Technical Validation Write SQL to validate data integrity Test transactional atomicity Verify idempotency of background jobs Test edge cases that break real operations Participate in root cause analysis during incidents Elevate the QA Team Mentor and upgrade team capability Introduce structured test matrices Move QA from manual execution to system thinking Build quality metrics leadership can rely on Your Skills and Experience Having 5+ years QA experience Experience stabilizing a finance-heavy or workflow-heavy system Having strong understanding about below areas: Data consistency Transactional systems Complex state transitions Confidence reading logs, querying DBs, and challenging assumptions Experience designing regression automation, not just executing tests Interview Process Round 1: HR Screening Round 2: Role Challenge Round 3: Technical Interview with Engineering Lead and CPO Why You'll Love Working Here Competitive Salary 15 days of annual leave and 1 birthday leave per year Social insurance and private VBI insurance Yearly performance bonus Flexible working mode (hybrid/remote) Welfare benefit up to 400,000 VND/pax/month Annual mid-year company retreat Work equipment with MacBook provided

title: Software Quality Control (QC/ Tester)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Work environment that focus solely on development Training opportunities with experts 13th-14th month salary & Incentive Programs The Job Job Summary Responsible for Quality Management of financial banking systems. The candidate will apply professional project management standards to plan, execute, and monitor data flow quality across the entire system—from user interface to core banking systems. Key Responsibilities Plan Quality Management Develop detailed Test Strategy and Test Plan, clearly defining quality metrics and compliance requirements specific to the banking industry. Design Test Suite structure, ensuring full requirement coverage through a Requirements Traceability Matrix (RTM). Control Quality & Testing Execution Perform cross-platform testing: Mobile Apps, Internet Banking, and Core Banking systems. Manage and control changes (Change Control) to ensure system updates do not break existing business logic. Risk Management Proactively identify system quality risks, especially those related to security and data integrity in financial transactions. Propose contingency plans for critical failure scenarios. Continuous Improvement Utilize quality management tools to conduct Root Cause Analysis of system defects. Optimize testing processes to shorten release cycles while maintaining output quality. Your Skills and Experience Technical & Management Requirements QC Knowledge & Management Capability Strong understanding of Software Testing Life Cycle (STLC). Proficient in creating and managing: Test Strategy, Test Plan, Test Scenarios, Test Cases, and Test Suites. Strong scope management mindset to ensure full test coverage without scope creep (Gold Plating). Languages & Technologies Ability to read and understand programming languages. Proficient in writing complex SQL queries to validate data integrity. Tools Hands-on experience with Jira, Postman, and Playwright (Automation). General Requirements Experience Minimum 3–4 years of QC experience in Banking/Fintech. Experience in establishing QC processes from scratch for at least one medium-to-large scale project. Education Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology or a related field. Soft Skills Strong problem-solving and data-driven decision-making skills. High attention to detail and precision-oriented mindset. Proficient in technical English. Why You'll Love Working Here Our company provides an opportunity to grow as an expert-Banking IT in Vietnam You can learn about Banking concepts and know-how from korea specialized developers In addition, We have plans to expand our company to Indonesia, Myanmar, Philippines We plan to offer training for outstanding employees in korea. - Salary: you will be happy. - Performance review: twice a year. - Incentive Programs to congratulate members' development. - Company Trip, monthly/weekly activities and events. - Health check once a year and advanced healthcare program. - Free snack, coffee, sponsored pizza or chicken & beer parties. - Work onsite with foreign teams for short or long term. - Your solutions and opinions are heard.

title: Senior Quality Control Officer
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job 1. Mục đích công việc: Dẫn dắt các hoạt động kiểm thử trong nhiều dự án phát triển phần mềm, chủ yếu trong lĩnh vực bảo hiểm nhân thọ. Tư vấn và rà soát chiến lược kiểm thử, kế hoạch kiểm thử để đảm bảo phù hợp với mục tiêu kinh doanh và các yêu cầu tuân thủ. Đảm bảo sản phẩm phần mềm đạt tiêu chuẩn chất lượng đã định thông qua việc lập kế hoạch, giám sát và cải tiến quy trình kiểm thử. Hướng dẫn, phát triển kiểm thử viên cấp dưới; xây dựng năng lực kiểm thử và hỗ trợ phối hợp đa chức năng với BA, Dev, PM, người dùng nghiệp vụ 2. Nhiêm vụ chính: Xây dựng và rà soát chiến lược kiểm thử, kế hoạch kiểm thử, kịch bản kiểm thử cho các dự án. Phân tích yêu cầu nghiệp vụ và hệ thống để đảm bảo độ bao phủ kiểm thử đầy đủ và xác định rủi ro tiềm ẩn . Thiết kế và thực hiện các ca kiểm thử thủ công hoặc tự động; ghi nhận, theo dõi và xác minh lỗi. Đảm bảo khả năng truy vết kết quả kiểm thử và cung cấp báo cáo tiến độ, tổng hợp kiểm thử định kỳ . Phối hợp chặt chẽ với Developer, Business Analyst, Project Manager và các bên liên quan khác để xác nhận chất lượng và xử lý lỗi. Điều phối lịch trình kiểm thử, đảm bảo phù hợp với các mốc của dự án. Quản lý, phân công công việc và theo dõi tiến độ của nhóm kiểm thử Tổ chức đào tạo nội bộ, chia sẻ kinh nghiệm và thực hành tốt nhằm nâng cao năng lực nhóm. Liên tục đề xuất cải tiến quy trình kiểm thử. Tìm hiểu và áp dụng công cụ hoặc phương pháp kiểm thử ứng dụng AI để tối ưu hiệu quả và giảm công sức thủ công. Your Skills and Experience Tốt nghiệp đại học chuyên ngành Công nghệ thông tin, Khoa học máy tính hoặc lĩnh vực liên quan . Tối thiểu 5 năm kinh nghiệm kiểm thử phần mềm, trong đó ít nhất 2 năm trong lĩnh vực bảo hiểm hoặc ngân hàng . Có kinh nghiệm lập kế hoạch, quản lý và thực hiện kiểm thử trên nhiều dự án. Thành thạo mô hình phát triển Agile/Scrum và Waterfall. Có kinh nghiệm quản lý và hướng dẫn nhóm QA quy mô nhỏ. Có kinh nghiệm với kiểm thử tự động là một lợi thế. Kỹ năng quản lý, giao tiếp và giải quyết vấn đề tốt. Kỹ lưỡng trong công việc với tinh thần đề cao chất lượng. Khả năng làm việc hiệu quả trong môi trường áp lực cao, đồng thời quản lý và sắp xếp hợp lý các ưu tiên công việc Nhanh chóng nắm bắt kiến thức chuyên ngành liên quan đến hệ thống bảo hiểm nhân thọ. Có kinh nghiệm hoặc sự quan tâm đến các công cụ kiểm thử ứng dụng trí tuệ nhân tạo (AI) là một điểm cộng. Why You'll Love Working Here Mức lương cạnh tranh , xét tăng lương hàng năm và thưởng theo hiệu quả công việc Hưởng 100% lương chính thức trong thời gian thử việc Bảo hiểm sức khỏe cao cấp MIC dành cho CBNV và 03 người phụ thuộc Cung cấp bảo hiểm nhân thọ và bảo hiểm ung thư cho CBNV Nghỉ phép 15 ngày/năm Chính sách Wellness hấp dẫn Phụ cấp ăn trưa / điện thoại / công tác Tài trợ đào tạo và phát triển bản thân (Tiếng Anh, PMP, CSM, ITIL,...) Thời gian làm việc: 8h00 - 17h30, 5 ngày/tuần (từ Thứ Hai đến Thứ Sáu) Môi trường làm việc với cơ sở vật chất hiện đại, tiện nghi Chế độ phúc lợi vào các dịp lễ đặc biệt: sinh nhật Công ty, Tết Dương lịch, Trung thu, Ngày Gia đình Việt Nam (28/6), Quốc tế Thiếu nhi (1/6), Ngày Quốc tế Phụ nữ (8/3) & Phụ nữ Việt Nam (20/10),…

title: Automation Test Engineer

title: QA Engineer (Manual Tester, QA QC)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Attractive salary Fun, flexible and challenging work A purpose: improve the life of thousands of women The Job 🎯 Job Scope As a QA Manual Engineer, your initial focus will be on the Perifit project. You will be responsible for comprehensive quality testing of the product ecosystem: from the hybrid mobile application (React Native combined with Unity game logic) to stable interaction with the hardware (Firmware) via Bluetooth connection. You will collaborate closely with the engineering team in Vietnam and partners/stakeholders in France to ensure the product operates smoothly, accurately, and meets high medical standards. 💻 Key Responsibilities Design & Execution of Tests: Research product documentation to build detailed test cases and checklists for both iOS and Android platforms. Perform manual testing of new features and user interface (UX/UI). Hardware-Software Integration Testing: Directly test the stability of the Bluetooth (BLE) connection between the hardware device (Care) and the mobile application; determine the accuracy of data transmission and reception. QA Algorithm Processing: Collaborate with the development team to understand the signal processing algorithms in the app, and design test scenarios to verify that the data displayed on the app/game is always accurate and free from interference. Bug Tracking: Detect, analyze, classify severity levels, and log detailed bugs to the management system. Closely monitor the bug lifecycle and conduct retesting after developers fix them. Regression Testing: Ensure system stability by performing thorough regression testing before app releases to the App Store/Google Play or when new firmware updates are available. Regulatory readiness in healthcare: Support in information storage, test report writing, and standardizing technical documentation in a clear and transparent manner, assisting in the process of completing CE (European) and FDA (American) quality certification applications. Your Skills and Experience Hard Skills Experience: 1-3 years of experience in a Manual QA/QC position, preferably with experience testing Mobile Applications (iOS & Android). Mobile Testing: Proficient in testing on real devices and emulators. Understanding of how Hybrid applications work (React Native/Unity is a significant advantage). Foreign Languages: Proficient in English (good reading comprehension of technical documents, ability to write bug reports in English and communicate/chat directly with the French team). Personality & Mindset (Soft Skills & Mindset) Mindset: Careful, meticulous, highly logical thinking, and sensitive to bugs (User-centric mindset). Proactive and practical in problem-solving. Communication: Ability to clearly explain the bug status and reproduction steps to the development team and relevant departments. Cultural Fit: Comfortable and open to discussing topics related to women's health, pelvic floor muscles, childbirth, and sensitive body care issues (Femtech). Big plus if you have any ✨: Experience testing IoT devices or products connected via Bluetooth/BLE. Experience working in Medtech, Healthcare, or projects with strict requirements for test documentation archiving processes. Why You'll Love Working Here A chance to have an impact on the life of thousands of women ❤️ A high salary and responsibilities that will grow along with the company This is a remote job offer, we're thus fully flexible on working hours and location A rewarding experience to increase your skills and be at the forefront of the industry a Vietnamese-French team of unique and very talented individuals Big performance and 13-month bonuses Social insurance, medical insurance & unemployment insurance according to Vietnam Labor Law.

Participate in user story creation process through dissection of high-level requirements during team review sessions. Your Skills and Experience SKILLS AND QUALIFICATIONS 3+ years of work experience in Quality Assurance roles Good communication skills in English. Experience in writing clear, concise, and comprehensive test plans and test cases. Knowledge of testing integrations, testing best practices, and end-to-end system processes. Excellent analytical and problem-solving abilities. Demonstrated ability to think outside the box. Understanding of Agile/Scrum methodology and how QA functions within it. PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS Experience with test automation tools, such as Selenium, Gherkin, Specflow, Postman, SoapUI, etc. Familiarity with git and version control tools. Having Salesforce experience/knowledge is a big plus. Why You'll Love Working Here At OTSV, work is a self-fulfillment, we encourage staff to leave their comfort zone, think out of the box, and share their ideas without hesitation. As a team, we analyze and evaluate issues objectively to learn quickly from mistakes. We believe in ‘fail quick, success quick’ and strive to keep pace with the forefront of technology to digitize ONE’s business. The designs of our offices embrace our culture of being flexible and open. Unlike a conventional office, we have an open concept with different work areas which encourages collaboration, open-mindedness, and spontaneity. Each work area has its charm and aims to make our staff feel as comfortable in the office as they would feel at home. Have a meet-up at the Café amidst the aroma of coffee! You will love working here! Annual Salary Review & Increment 13th-month salary Performance Bonus Social Security co-contribution based on full gross salary Premium health care (Bao Viet Insurance) for employees & dependents (parents or spouse and children). Lunch allowance Free drinks and snacks 17 days of Annual Leave Annual health screening reimbursement: 4,700,000 VND/ year Training and education sponsorship: 38,000,000VND/year Well-being allowance: 13,800,000VND/year

title: [11] Nhân sự săn tìm mối nguy (Thread huntting)
company: TRUNG TÂM THÔNG TIN TÍN DỤNG QUỐC GIA VIỆT NAM (CIC)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job 1.Dò quét, đánh giá lỗ hổng an ninh mạng: Định kỳ hoặc đột xuất thực hiện dò quét, phát hiện các lỗ hổng bảo mật kịp thời; Tìm ra các lỗ hổng bảo mật và đưa ra khuyến cáo, hướng dẫn hỗ trợ cập nhật/ kiện toàn bảo mật cho hệ thống Phân tích, đưa ra giải pháp và hỗ trợ các bộ phận liên quan xử lý, vá các lỗ hổng hệ thống để bảo đảm an toàn, bảo mật. 2. Kiểm thử xâm nhập, đánh giá hệ thống: Phát triển, sử dụng các công cụ để tấn công xâm nhập các hệ thống để tìm ra các lỗ hổng, điểm yếu của hệ thống. Rà soát, đánh giá rủi ro an ninh, bảo mật các hệ thống Công nghệ thông tin theo đúng quy định, quy trình; Phát hiện kịp thời các lỗ hổng an ninh, các rủi ro gây mất an toàn cho các hệ thống và đề xuất phương án xử lý 3. Ứng cứu sự cố an toàn thông tin: Đầu mối hoặc tham gia diễn tập/ thực hiện ứng cứu sự cố và tấn công an ninh mạng. 4. Cảnh báo an ninh mạng: Rà soát không gian mạng, phát hiện nguy cơ ảnh hưởng đến an ninh hệ thống/ thương hiệu của CIC Tiếp nhận, nghiên cứu đưa ra các hướng dẫn thực hiện cảnh báo của các cơ quan quản lý nhà nước về an toàn thông tin hoặc của các đối tác. Your Skills and Experience Bạn vui lòng truy cập vào website của CIC: cic. gov. vn để Lấy đúng mẫu Phiếu đăng ký tuyển dụng của đơn vị. Điền thông tin form và đính kèm vào CV gửi qua nút "Ứng tuyển" Vì sao Bạn nên đảm bảo đầy đủ thông tin khi ứng tuyển? - Hồ sơ của Bạn sẽ được đánh giá nhanh chóng. - Đối với các hồ sơ đáp ứng đầy đủ thông tin và tiêu chí tuyển dụng phù hợp, CIC sẽ chủ động liên hệ phỏng vấn trong thời gian sớm nhất. - Ứng viên vui lòng kiểm tra email và điện thoại thường xuyên để không bỏ lỡ lịch hẹn phỏng vấn Trình độ chuyên môn: Tốt nghiệp đại học hệ chính quy các trường Đại học trong và ngoài nước trở lên. Chuyên ngành: Công nghệ thông tin/ Điện tử viễn thông/ An toàn thông tin Kinh nghiệm: Tối thiểu 02 năm kinh nghiệm làm kiểm thử an ninh bảo mật (Pentest) các hệ thống công nghệ thông tin/ phân tích ứng cứu xử lý sự cố an ninh/ săn tìm thông tin trên không gian mạng. Ưu tiên: Ưu tiên có chứng chỉ chuyên ngành/Chứng chỉ quốc tế liên quan đến an toàn thông tin như: CompTIA, CEH, CHFI, CISSP, OSCP, hoặc tương đương. Đã từng làm việc Pentest, ứng cứu xử lý sự cố an ninh (hoặc dịch vụ Threat Intelligence) của một tổ chức hoặc Ngân hàng. Kỹ năng Có kỹ năng giao tiếp và trình bầy vấn đề. Có kỹ năng làm việc độc lập hoặc theo nhóm. Có khả năng lập báo cáo/đề xuất cảnh báo/hướng dẫn xử lý sự kiện an toàn thông tin Why You'll Love Working Here GIỚI THIỆU CHUNG & MÔI TRƯỜNG LÀM VIỆC Về Trung tâm Thông tin tín dụng Quốc gia Việt Nam (CIC) Gia nhập CIC, bạn sẽ trở thành một phần của đơn vị sự nghiệp công lập trực thuộc Ngân hàng Nhà nước Việt Nam, một trong những trụ cột quan trọng của hệ thống hạ tầng tài chính quốc gia. Chúng tôi đang tìm kiếm những nhân sự tài năng, có đủ tiêu chuẩn về phẩm chất, đạo đức và trình độ chuyên môn để bổ sung cho đội ngũ tại Phòng Phát triển phần mềm và Phòng Vận hành và an ninh thông tin . Trong giai đoạn 2025 – 2030, CIC sẽ triển khai nhiều dự án lớn về công nghệ thông tin và phát triển nghiệp vụ , tập trung vào việc hiện đại hóa hệ thống và ứng dụng các thành tựu của cuộc cách mạng công nghiệp 4.0. Đây là cơ hội để bạn tham gia vào các dự án đầy thách thức, có tầm ảnh hưởng và phát triển sự nghiệp bền vững cùng chúng tôi. Tại sao bạn sẽ yêu thích làm việc tại đây? Thu nhập & Ghi nhận: Mức lương thỏa thuận cạnh tranh, dựa trên năng lực và kinh nghiệm của bạn. Mức lương khởi điểm từ 15 -20, 20- 40, 40 -70 tuỳ vị trí và số năm kinh nghiệm làm việc. Được thanh toán tiền làm thêm ngoài giờ và được xét tăng lương định kỳ. Phát triển sự nghiệp: Được tham gia các khóa đào tạo, các lớp học chuyên môn để không ngừng nâng cao năng lực và phát triển bản thân. Chế độ phúc lợi toàn diện: Có chế độ khen thưởng, phúc lợi Có chi tiền ăn trưa, nhà ăn tại trụ sở làm việc Có chế độ nghỉ mát hàng năm Thăm khám sức khỏe định kỳ hàng năm, hỗ trợ đồng phục của cơ quan. Đóng các chế độ bảo hiểm xã hội theo quy định đầy đủ; Ngoài ra, còn được hỗ trợ kinh phí mua bảo hiểm chăm sóc sức khỏe dành cho đoàn viên công đoàn (ABIC) Có chi tặng quà sinh nhật hàng năm Tham gia các câu lạc bộ thể thao (bóng đá, tenis, cầu lông, pickleball…) Sự ổn định: Sau thời gian thử việc 02 tháng (dự kiến), nếu đạt yêu cầu, bạn sẽ được ký hợp đồng lao động theo quy định, làm việc lâu dài trong một môi trường chuyên nghiệp, công bằng và minh bạch.

title: [2.1] Pentest / Threat Hunting
company: TRUNG TÂM THÔNG TIN TÍN DỤNG QUỐC GIA VIỆT NAM (CIC)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job a. Vai trò, số lượng: Vai trò: Tổ chức triển khai công tác điều tra, phát hiện các mối nguy về ATTT đối với các hệ thống thông tin của NHNN và đề xuất phương án xử lý. Số lượng: 03 người . b. Mô tả công việc thực hiện: Thực hiện kiểm thử bảo mật: đánh giá hệ thống nội bộ, ứng dụng web, API, mobile app, …bằng cả phương pháp thủ công (manual) và tự động (automated). Đánh giá và khai thác lỗ hổng: xác minh các lỗ hổng được phát hiện bởi các công cụ dò quét lỗ hổng bảo mật (VA tool), thực hiện kiểm thử xâm nhập khi có thể. Viết báo cáo và đề xuất khắc phục để cải thiện hệ thống, tăng cường an toàn thông tin, bảo mật. Xây dựng và chuẩn hóa quy trình kiểm thử xâm nhập: xây dựng check list cho từng hệ thống, ứng dụng; chuẩn hóa quy trình; tự động hóa việc kiểm thử xâm nhập bằng các công cụ. Thực hiện kiểm thử bảo mật: đánh giá hệ thống nội bộ, ứng dụng web, API, mobile app, …bằng cả phương pháp thủ công (manual) và tự động (automated). Đánh giá và khai thác lỗ hổng: xác minh các lỗ hổng được phát hiện bởi các công cụ dò quét lỗ hổng bảo mật (VA tool), thực hiện kiểm thử xâm nhập khi có thể. Viết báo cáo và đề xuất khắc phục để cải thiện hệ thống, tăng cường an toàn thông tin, bảo mật. Xây dựng và chuẩn hóa quy trình kiểm thử xâm nhập: xây dựng check list cho từng hệ thống, ứng dụng; chuẩn hóa quy trình; tự động hóa việc kiểm thử xâm nhập bằng các công cụ. Thu thập, phân tích nguy cơ thách thức về ATTT trên toàn cầu. Giám sát, phân tích các sự kiện ATTT trên hệ thống mạng NHNN. Rà soát, tìm kiếm, phát hiện mã độc, các mối nguy hại, các dấu hiệu xâm nhập, tấn công vào Hệ thống thông tin (HTTT) của NHNN. Your Skills and Experience Bạn vui lòng truy cập vào website của CIC: cic. gov. vn để Lấy đúng mẫu Phiếu đăng ký tuyển dụng của đơn vị. Điền thông tin form và đính kèm vào CV gửi qua nút "Ứng tuyển" Vì sao Bạn nên đảm bảo đầy đủ thông tin khi ứng tuyển? - Hồ sơ của Bạn sẽ được đánh giá nhanh chóng. - Đối với các hồ sơ đáp ứng đầy đủ thông tin và tiêu chí tuyển dụng phù hợp, CIC sẽ chủ động liên hệ phỏng vấn trong thời gian sớm nhất. - Ứng viên vui lòng kiểm tra email và điện thoại thường xuyên để không bỏ lỡ lịch hẹn phỏng vấn Trường tốt nghiệp Tốt nghiệp đại học hệ chính quy các trường Đại học uy tín trong và ngoài nước trở lên. Ưu tiên các trường: Học viện Kỹ thuật Quân sự, Học viện An ninh Nhân dân, Đại học FPT, Học viện Kỹ thuật Mật mã, Trường Đại học Bách khoa Hà Nội, Trường Đại học Công nghệ – ĐHQGHN, Học viện Công nghệ Bưu chính Viễn thông, Trường Đại học Công nghệ Thông tin – ĐHQGTPHCM, Đại học Công nghệ TP.HCM (HUTECH), Đại học Duy Tân Đà Nẵng, Đại học Bách khoa Đà Nẵng (DUT). Yêu cầu kỹ năng, kinh nghiệm, chứng chỉ: (i) Về kinh nghiệm ưu tiên các ứng viên: Có kỹ năng (hoặc được đào tạo hoặc từng làm) về kiểm thử an ninh bảo mật (Pentest) các hệ thống công nghệ thông tin/ phân tích ứng cứu xử lý sự cố an ninh/ săn tìm các mối nguy ATTT trên không gian mạng. Có chứng chỉ chuyên ngành/Chứng chỉ quốc tế liên quan đến an toàn thông tin như: CompTIA, CEH, CHFI, CISSP, OSCP, hoặc tương đương. Đã từng làm việc Pentest, ứng cứu xử lý sự cố an ninh (hoặc dịch vụ Threat Intelligence) của một tổ chức hoặc Ngân hàng. (ii) Về kỹ năng: Kỹ năng phân tích, báo cáo và giao tiếp: có khả năng phân tích chi tiết kết quả kiểm thử, xác định mức độ rủi ro và viết báo cáo chi tiết với các đề xuất khắc phục; kỹ năng trình bày kết quả kiểm thử và chia sẻ kinh nghiệm với các bên liên quan (IT, Quản trị an ninh bảo mật, Quản trị vận hành, Ứng cứu sự cố); kỹ năng tổ chức workshop, đào tạo và chia sẻ kiến thức nhằm hỗ trợ cải tiến quy trình phòng thủ. Có kỹ năng làm việc độc lập hoặc theo nhóm Thành thạo tiếng Anh để có thể làm việc được với các tài liệu tiếng Anh, tham dự/tổ chức các hội nghị, sự kiện dùng tiếng Anh. d. Thời gian thực hiện công việc: lâu dài Why You'll Love Working Here GIỚI THIỆU CHUNG & MÔI TRƯỜNG LÀM VIỆC Về Trung tâm Thông tin tín dụng Quốc gia Việt Nam (CIC) Gia nhập CIC, bạn sẽ trở thành một phần của đơn vị sự nghiệp công lập trực thuộc Ngân hàng Nhà nước Việt Nam, một trong những trụ cột quan trọng của hệ thống hạ tầng tài chính quốc gia. Chúng tôi đang tìm kiếm những nhân sự tài năng, có đủ tiêu chuẩn về phẩm chất, đạo đức và trình độ chuyên môn để bổ sung cho đội ngũ tại Phòng Phát triển phần mềm và Phòng Vận hành và an ninh thông tin . Trong giai đoạn 2025 – 2030, CIC sẽ triển khai nhiều dự án lớn về công nghệ thông tin và phát triển nghiệp vụ , tập trung vào việc hiện đại hóa hệ thống và ứng dụng các thành tựu của cuộc cách mạng công nghiệp 4.0. Đây là cơ hội để bạn tham gia vào các dự án đầy thách thức, có tầm ảnh hưởng và phát triển sự nghiệp bền vững cùng chúng tôi. Tại sao bạn sẽ yêu thích làm việc tại đây? Thu nhập & Ghi nhận: Mức lương thỏa thuận cạnh tranh, dựa trên năng lực và kinh nghiệm của bạn. Mức lương khởi điểm từ 15 -20, 20- 40, 40 -70 tuỳ vị trí và số năm kinh nghiệm làm việc. Được thanh toán tiền làm thêm ngoài giờ và được xét tăng lương định kỳ. Phát triển sự nghiệp: Được tham gia các khóa đào tạo, các lớp học chuyên môn để không ngừng nâng cao năng lực và phát triển bản thân. Chế độ phúc lợi toàn diện: Có chế độ khen thưởng, phúc lợi Có chi tiền ăn trưa, nhà ăn tại trụ sở làm việc Có chế độ nghỉ mát hàng năm Thăm khám sức khỏe định kỳ hàng năm, hỗ trợ đồng phục của cơ quan. Đóng các chế độ bảo hiểm xã hội theo quy định đầy đủ; Ngoài ra, còn được hỗ trợ kinh phí mua bảo hiểm chăm sóc sức khỏe dành cho đoàn viên công đoàn (ABIC) Có chi tặng quà sinh nhật hàng năm Tham gia các câu lạc bộ thể thao (bóng đá, tenis, cầu lông, pickleball…) Sự ổn định: Sau thời gian thử việc 02 tháng (dự kiến), nếu đạt yêu cầu, bạn sẽ được ký hợp đồng lao động theo quy định, làm việc lâu dài trong một môi trường chuyên nghiệp, công bằng và minh bạch.

title: [Remote] QA Automation Engineer (Cypress / Playwright)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us 100% remote, work from anywhere in Vietnam Build an AI-augmented team from the ground up Modern greenfield stack, no legacy mess The Job Kitchen Warehouse is one of Australia's largest specialty kitchenware retailers, and we are building our internal engineering function to take full ownership of our e-commerce platform (Next.js, CommerceTools, headless architecture). This is a greenfield automation role. You will build our test automation foundation from the ground up. We run an AI-augmented engineering team. You will not just write tests, you will train and tune AI agents that generate and extend test coverage, working alongside Claude-powered code review and test generation in our CI pipeline. If you want to shape how quality engineering and AI work together, this is the role. What you will do: Build our end-to-end and unit test infrastructure from scratch using Cypress and/or Playwright Write critical-path E2E tests for core journeys: browse, search, product detail, cart, checkout, payment, confirmation Establish unit testing patterns with Jest and React Testing Library on a Next.js and TypeScript codebase Own the testing stages of our GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline (test runners, coverage reporting, quality gates) Train and refine our AI test generation agent: review its output, improve prompts, correct patterns Define our test strategy, coverage targets, and testing standards Build test data, mocking, and environment strategies, including testing payment and fraud flows without hitting live APIs Your Skills and Experience Must have: 3+ years of test automation experience for web applications Strong hands-on Cypress or Playwright (both is a plus) Experience testing Next.js / React applications Comfortable writing TypeScript Solid understanding of API testing and mocking strategies Experience integrating test suites into CI/CD (GitHub Actions preferred) Good written English for a remote-first, distributed team Nice to have: Experience with AI-assisted testing tools or LLM-based workflows Visual regression testing (Percy, Chromatic) Performance testing experience Exposure to headless commerce (CommerceTools, Shopify, or BigCommerce) Why You'll Love Working Here Greenfield ownership: you build the automation foundation and set the standard AI-augmented from day one: hands-on with Claude-powered agents in a modern toolchain Fully remote, flexible hours, collaborative distributed engineering team Direct access to engineering leadership; your decisions shape the platform Modern stack: Next.js, TypeScript, CommerceTools, GitHub Actions, SonarCloud

title: Intern - Quality Engineer (QC)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Competitive salary, healthy and sporty environment Hybrid/remote professional working environment Opportunity traveling to US for training The Job We are seeking an Quality Engineer who is passionate about delivering high-quality software and leveraging AI to improve testing efficiency, product quality, and team productivity. As part of our AI-first organization, you will work closely with Business Analysts, Product Managers, Developers, Designers, and AI systems to ensure our SaaS platforms, mobile applications, CRM systems, and AI-powered products meet the highest quality standards. Key Responsibilities Quality Assurance & Testing ● Review business requirements, user stories, specifications, and acceptance criteria to identify gaps, risks, and edge cases before development begins. ● Design and execute comprehensive test plans, test cases, test scenarios, and exploratory testing activities. ● Perform functional, regression, integration, usability, and end-to-end testing for web, mobile, and API-based applications. ● Validate new features, enhancements, bug fixes, and production releases. ● Ensure applications perform consistently across browsers, devices, operating systems, and environments. ● Conduct risk-based testing to maximize quality while maintaining delivery speed. Mobile Application Testing ● Test mobile applications on iOS and Android platforms. ● Verify functionality, performance, usability, accessibility, and overall user experience. ● Validate synchronization with backend systems, APIs, wearable devices, and third-party integrations. ● Identify mobile-specific issues related to connectivity, notifications, permissions, and device compatibility. AI-Assisted Quality Engineering ● Utilize AI tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor, Gemini, or similar technologies to improve testing productivity and coverage. ● Use AI to generate test cases, test scenarios, edge cases, regression suites, and exploratory testing ideas. ● Leverage AI to analyze requirements, identify ambiguities, detect missing acceptance criteria, and uncover potential defects early. ● Partner with development teams to continuously improve software quality using AI-driven approaches. ● Contribute to building and improving automated quality assurance processes using AI technologies. Defect Management ● Identify, document, prioritize, and track software defects using project management tools. ● Work closely with developers to reproduce, investigate, and resolve issues efficiently. ● Verify bug fixes and validate that defects are fully resolved before closure. ● Communicate quality risks and release readiness clearly to stakeholders. Release Quality & UAT Support ● Participate in sprint planning, backlog refinement, requirement reviews, and release activities. ● Support User Acceptance Testing (UAT) activities and validate business workflows. ● Provide quality assessments and release recommendations. ● Ensure releases meet defined quality standards before deployment to production. Continuous Improvement ● Help improve testing methodologies, QA standards, test documentation, and quality processes. ● Identify opportunities for automation and efficiency improvements. ● Contribute to building a quality-first and AI-first engineering culture. ● Continuously learn and adopt new testing tools, technologies, and AI capabilities. Your Skills and Experience Job Requirements Technical Qualifications ● Have knowledge in Software QA, Quality Engineering, or Mobile Application Testing. ● Experience testing web and mobile applications on iOS and Android platforms. ● Strong understanding of software testing methodologies, testing strategies, and defect lifecycle management. ● Experience creating test plans, test cases, test scenarios, and regression testing suites. ● Familiarity with Agile/Scrum development methodologies. ● Experience using Jira, Confluence, or similar collaboration tools. ● Basic understanding of APIs, integrations, and API testing tools such as Postman. ● Familiarity with SQL and data validation techniques is a plus. ● Experience with automation testing tools and frameworks is an advantage. AI & Productivity Skills ● Practical experience using AI tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Cursor, Copilot, or similar technologies. ● Ability to leverage AI to improve testing efficiency, requirement analysis, documentation, and defect investigation. ● Strong interest in AI-assisted software development and quality engineering. Language Skills ● Strong written and verbal English communication skills. ● Ability to read and understand product requirements, technical documentation, release notes, and user stories. ● Ability to write clear, detailed, and actionable bug reports and testing documentation in English. Soft Skills ● Strong analytical and critical-thinking abilities. ● Exceptional attention to detail and commitment to product quality. ● Strong problem-solving and investigative skills. ● Excellent communication and collaboration skills. ● Ability to work independently while managing multiple priorities. ● Proactive mindset with a passion for continuous learning and improvement. ● Comfortable working in a fast-paced, AI-driven environment. Why You'll Love Working Here We're always looking for superstars to join our team in any of our three offices and we have 12 core values that make us who we are today and define where we are going tomorrow: • Build a family spirit • Focus on users and all else will follow • Recognize and reward results • Move fast • Keep things simple • Be honest and direct • Stay lean • Leverage technology • Embrace change • Don't take success for granted • Aspire to improve and change the world • Live Healthy

title: Software QA Engineer (AI-first mindset)

Hands-on experience with automation testing tools/frameworks such as Selenium, Playwright, Cypress, Robot Framework, or similar. Ability to write and maintain automation scripts using JavaScript, Java, Python, or similar languages. Experience with API testing and backend validation. Familiarity with Agile/Scrum methodologies and CI/CD environments. Strong interest in applying AI/LLM/Agentic AI tools to improve software testing and QAworkflows. Experience using AI-assisted development/testing tools such as Cursor, Claude, GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, or similar platforms is highly preferred. Experience with test management and defect tracking tools such as Jira, qTest, Xray, or TestRail. Strong analytical thinking, troubleshooting, and communication skills. Ability to work independently in fast-paced and complex environments Desired qualification Experience with embedded systems, industrial software, IoT devices, or hardwareintegrated applications. Experience with performance/load testing tools such as JMeter, k6, or Gatling. Familiarity with Linux environments and shell scripting. Experience building automation frameworks from scratch. Knowledge of microservices or event-driven architectures. Experience integrating AI capabilities into QA or engineering workflows. ISTQB certification or equivalent Why You'll Love Working Here Salary and bonus Attractive salary; 100% salary on probation; Performance review twice a year, based on job outcomes; 13 months’ salary and bonus assessment yearly; Working time: Flexible working hours and location from Mondays to Fridays. Unlimited paid leave annually; Insurance, health care, and extra benefits Premium PTI health care insurance; Special health benefits (50% discount on medical examination fee, 10% discount on ultrasound and procedure fees, 5% on medicine) at 2 Clinics, including: Vivision - 514 Bạch Mai Phụ Sản 1 - 329 Bạch Mai An annual medical check-up; Annual company trip and holiday party and other benefits according to company policy; Free lunch at the office; drinks and snacks at the pantry; MacBook and external monitor provided for work; Working environment and development Working environment: fast-moving, young, dynamic, no-walls environment. Sports activities: football, exercise break. Training: soft skills and technical skills training. Others: free coffee/tea/cookies, parking fee, year-end party, etc… Join our team to become part of an amazing group of tech talents!

title: Mobile Software Engineer - Attractive Salary
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Performance & salary review yearly Competitive Package Full salary-based social insurance The Job About Buymed Buymed is the leading B2B healthcare platform in Southeast Asia, operating across Vietnam, Cambodia, and Thailand. We serve over 35,000 pharmacies, clinics, and hospitals with a mission to make healthcare more accessible and efficient. As we scale rapidly, recruitment must evolve from manual and reactive to systemized and data-driven, and that’s where this role comes in. *** Note: Our recruitment team will contact you via the email listed in your CV. Please ensure it is up to date and check it regularly. About the Role A Mobile Software Engineer is responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining high-performance mobile applications across iOS and Android platforms. This role works closely with Product Managers, Designers, Backend Engineers, and Business stakeholders to deliver scalable, reliable, and user-friendly mobile solutions. The engineer will contribute to technical architecture, performance optimization, and continuous improvement of mobile development practices. Key Responsibilities 1. Mobile Application Development Design, develop, test, and maintain mobile applications using modern technologies and best practices. Build scalable, high-performance, and maintainable solutions. Ensure code quality through testing, debugging, code reviews, and performance optimization. Manage app releases and maintenance on App Store and Google Play. 2. Technical Design & Architecture Contribute to mobile architecture decisions and technical roadmap. Act as technical owner for assigned projects, providing guidance on solution design and feasibility. Apply modern architecture patterns (MVVM, Clean Architecture, Redux, etc.) and recommend best practices to improve scalability and performance. 3. Cross-functional Collaboration Partner with PM/PO, Business, and Operations teams to define requirements, estimate tasks, and support sprint planning. Collaborate with Backend Engineers and QA teams throughout development, testing, release, and post-launch support. Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues across environments. 4. Improvement Monitor application performance and user experience, identifying opportunities for optimization. Improve engineering processes through CI/CD, automation, and development best practices. Stay updated on emerging mobile technologies and contribute to technical documentation and knowledge sharing. Your Skills and Experience Must-Have Qualifications: 3+ years of experience in mobile application development. Strong proficiency in React Native (JavaScript/TypeScript), Android (Kotlin/Java), or iOS (Swift/Objective-C). Solid understanding of mobile architecture patterns (MVVM, Clean Architecture, Redux, etc.). Experience working with RESTful APIs, WebSockets, MongoDB, and modern state management tools (Redux, MobX, Zustand, TanStack React Query). Knowledge of offline-first architecture, caching, local persistence, and background synchronization. Hands-on experience with Firebase services, including Analytics, Crashlytics, Remote Config, Cloud Messaging, and Performance Monitoring. Experience publishing and maintaining applications on App Store and/or Google Play. Strong debugging, performance optimization, and troubleshooting skills. Familiarity with Git, CI/CD pipelines, and automated testing frameworks. Strong problem-solving ability, ownership mindset, and attention to detail. Nice-To-Have Qualifications: Experience with microservices, backend APIs, or full-stack development. Knowledge of mobile security best practices. Experience with multi-country apps, localization, or large user bases. Experience integrating AI, chat features, real-time updates, or e-commerce flows. Contributions to open-source projects or personal app portfolio. Why You'll Love Working Here Performance & salary review yearly Paid social insurance based on full salary Bao Viet Insurance Medical Checkup 15 days of annual leave Parking allowance Mindset At Buymed, we value outcomes over intentions, and we expect our leaders to be practical, decisive, and grounded in execution. Feel free to review our approach to work and expectations at:

title: Senior UX Designer (UI-UX, Mobile Apps, Figma, English)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Highly competitive salary and benefits package Excellent environment and team to help you grow. We are Singapore's leading car portal The Job Role Overview: We are seeking a strategic, visionary Senior UX Designer to lead the design direction for the Motorist ecosystem. In this role, you will own the end-to-end user experience of complex, high-impact projects, driving the UX strategy across our Super App and web platforms. You will act as a design champion, aligning user needs with our business goals, scaling our design system for regional expansion, and mentoring other designers on the team. Translate complex business requirements into elegant, user-centric design strategies that drive conversion and user retention. Advanced Research & Insights: Spearhead comprehensive user research initiatives. Synthesize deep behavioral insights to identify new opportunities within the automotive, auto-finance space and more. Stakeholder Alignment: Partner closely with business leaders, engineering leads, and external partners to define product roadmaps and deliver cross-platform solutions. Mentorship & Growth: Mentor mid-level designers, fostering a culture of design excellence, continuous learning, and collaborative growth. Scale the Design System: Oversee and scale the global Motorist design system to accommodate multi-language and multi-region adaptations as we expand across APAC. A stellar portfolio demonstrating complex problem-solving, strategic design thinking, and measurable business impact. Proficiency in industry-standard design and prototyping tools (e.g., Figma, FigJam ). Deep expertise in UX research methodologies, interaction design, and information architecture. Proven experience leading projects from concept to launch, with strong stakeholder management and presentation skills. Experience mentoring designers and leading the development of robust design systems. Proficiency in English is required to communicate with our headquarters in Singapore. Why You'll Love Working Here Competitive salary with annual performance review and 13th-month bonus: 30-50M+ Modern working devices: MacBook, monitor, Android test phones, etc. PVI Health Insurance and full social insurance as per Vietnam Labor Law. 15 days annual leave, increasing by 1 day per year. Unlimited potential for career growth and internal advancement.

title: Mobile Community, Design System Architect (Android,iOS)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Excellent environment and team to help you grow. Competitive salary and learning culture. Premium health care for you and your family. The Job Description About the Role We're seeking a community leader to build and lead our engineering front end community and teams. The teams are focused on the front end mobile frameworks and our design system architecture and roadmaps for GoTymeX. This is a unique opportunity arising from our successful growth. You'll start with some strong teams of existing frontend engineers and a Product Manager. Initially, you'll be about 40-50% hands-on, gradually transitioning to a more leadership-focused role. You'll architect scalable, maintainable, and secure solutions while mentoring and developing your team. You'll collaborate with other Engineering Managers, Product Managers, Designers, Solution Architect, Technical Lead, and Product Engineers to define roadmaps, drive execution, and uphold best practices. You'll contribute to the codebase and guide your team in developing innovative solutions for our customers. Responsibilities Front End Framework and Architecture Design : Ensure the design and architecture of our mobile applications is maintained and designed to meet our future growth and the needs of the developer community. Design and implement the overall architecture for our mobile applications, ensuring scalability, performance, maintainability, and security. This includes defining the technical stack, choosing appropriate frameworks and libraries, and establishing coding standards and best practices. Front End Community : Ensure all of our front end members develop their skills using a mixture of on the job learning and training. Be an advocate for the front end architecture and development approaching that you are responsible for in the wider engineering community. Global design system : Ensure that we have a platform that can give us flexibility and consistency to rapidly develop a global design system that automates this work and adopts AI techniques and tools. Our goal is to maximise efficiency whilst supporting a design that customers can love. Cross-Platform Development: Lead the development of cross-platform applications using frameworks like React Native, Flutter, or similar technologies, targeting both iOS and Android platforms. title: Mobile Gamification UI-UX Designer (Fintech)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us International fintech & digital banking firm Top salary, bonus & stock options Work & travel globally with innovation teams The Job Role summary The Mobile Gamification UI/UX Designer (Fintech) leads the design of high retention mobile experiences for Vietpay. You will translate product goals into engaging user journeys using point systems, missions, rewards, and clear progress feedback, supported by strong narrative and microcopy. This is a hands on role that requires expert Figma execution, strong mobile interaction design, and close collaboration with engineering to ship production quality experiences. Key responsibilities 1) Gamification and engagement design • Own the gamification framework across onboarding, activation, and daily usage loops, aligned with measurable business outcomes. • Design and document mechanics such as points, XP, levels, missions, streaks, badges, challenges, unlocks, and reward redemption flows. • Create progression and feedback systems that motivate users to complete financial tasks, without confusing users or reducing trust. • Define anti abuse rules and edge cases for point earning and reward logic, in partnership with product, risk, and engineering teams. • Ensure gamification is ethical and transparent, avoiding dark patterns and protecting the integrity of a financial product. 2) Story and narrative design • Develop a simple narrative layer that makes complex fintech tasks feel clear, motivating, and approachable. • Design mission structures and achievement messaging that guide users to the next best action. • Partner with product and marketing on tone, microcopy direction, and achievement stories that match the Vietpay brand. 3) Mobile UI and UX ownership • Lead end to end UX from user flows and wireframes to high fidelity UI, interaction states, and clickable prototypes. • Design mobile first experiences for Android and iOS, including onboarding, dashboard, tasks, rewards, and account and security related screens. • Create and maintain a scalable component library and design system in Figma, including gamification components and states. • Produce developer ready specs, including layout rules, responsive behavior, empty states, error states, and accessibility considerations. 4) Cross functional delivery with engineering • Work closely with engineers, QA, and product managers to plan, scope, and deliver features on schedule. • Provide detailed handoff materials, including annotations, interaction rules, and acceptance criteria for UI behavior. • Review builds, provide structured feedback, and ensure the shipped UI matches intended design and quality. 5) Web and website design support • Support related web experiences when needed, including landing pages, product marketing flows, and partner portals. • Ensure consistent brand expression and design language across mobile and web. 6) Testing, iteration, and metrics driven improvement • Collaborate on usability testing and rapid iteration cycles to validate designs before and after release. • Partner with product and analytics to monitor activation, retention, feature adoption, and reward engagement, then iterate based on data. • Maintain documentation of design decisions, edge cases, and learnings to scale the system over time. Your Skills and Experience Job Requirements: • Must speak fluent English • Must have an impressive portfolio with references • 5+ years of UI and UX design experience, with a strong portfolio of shipped mobile apps. • Proven experience designing gamification systems such as point based rewards, progression, missions, streaks, and redemption journeys. • Expert in Figma, including components, variants, auto layout, libraries, and prototyping. • Strong collaboration experience with software engineering teams, including agile delivery and clear design handoff. • Excellent English communication skills, spoken and written. Vietnamese is strongly preferred. • Strong mobile interaction design skills for Android and iOS, including edge cases, error states, and accessibility. • Portfolio link required, showing at least two mobile projects and at least one gamification focused system. Preferred qualifications • Experience applying behavioral design principles responsibly, including motivation and feedback systems. • Experience with motion design and micro interactions for mobile UI. • Familiarity with product analytics and experimentation workflows, including A and B testing. • Experience contributing to or owning a design system across mobile and web. • (optional) Experience in fintech, banking, insurance, payments, or other enterprise products. Why You'll Love Working Here International fintech & digital banking firm Top salary, bonus & stock options Work & travel globally with innovation teams Social insurance based on full salary Full Training will be provided to Candidate

title: Senior Flutter Developer (Dart, iOS, Android)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Competitive salary: Negotiable based on experience 13th-month salary. 12 days of annual leave plus public holidays. The Job 🧾 POSITION SUMMARY The Senior Flutter Developer will be responsible for designing and developing complex frontend services, ensuring high performance and scalability, and mentoring junior team members. You will work closely with cross-functional teams and lead initiatives that shape our technical strategy and product infrastructure. 🛠 KEY Responsibilities Mobile Architecture & Ownership Design and own the Flutter app architecture: Clean Architecture, layered separation (Domain / Data / Presentation), and scalable folder structure. Define and enforce state management patterns using BLoC — including event/state modeling, error handling flows, and loading states. Lead code reviews, establish coding standards, and mentor mid/junior Flutter developers on the team. Make platform-level decisions: routing strategy (GoRouter), DI approach (get_it), environment config, flavor setup (dev/staging/prod). Native Platform Integration Write and maintain native code in Swift (iOS) and Kotlin (Android) via Flutter Platform Channels — for features that cannot be handled in Dart alone. Integrate biometric authentication (Face ID, Touch ID, Android Biometric API) directly at the native layer. Handle native camera pipeline: TrueDepth camera data for liveness detection (iOS), CameraX (Android) for document capture. Debug native-side crashes using Xcode Instruments (iOS) and Android Studio Profiler — not just crash reports. Manage native module dependencies: CocoaPods (iOS Podfile), Gradle (Android build.gradle), and resolve conflicts when Flutter plugin versions clash. Banking & Fintech Features Build and maintain complex financial UI: transaction histories with pagination, transfer flows with step-by-step validation, OTP screens, PIN entry. Implement deep linking and universal links for cross-app payment flows (e.g., redirect from browser back into the app after 3DS verification). Handle sensitive data correctly on mobile: Keychain (iOS) / Keystore (Android) for token storage, certificate pinning, jailbreak/root detection. Support offline-first patterns where required: local caching strategy, sync queue, conflict resolution. Performance & Quality Profile and optimize app performance: frame drops, rebuild storms, widget tree depth, unnecessary repaints (use Flutter DevTools / Observatory). Write unit tests, widget tests, and integration tests. Set and maintain coverage targets per layer. Own CI/CD pipeline configuration for mobile: Fastlane, GitHub Actions, or equivalent — covering build signing, test gates, and App Store / Google Play delivery. Your Skills and Experience 📌 Requirements 5+ years of professional mobile development experience, with at least 3 years focused on Flutter / Dart in production apps. Native (required) Hands-on native development experience: iOS: Swift, UIKit/SwiftUI, CocoaPods, Xcode build system, signing & provisioning Android: Kotlin, Jetpack basics, Gradle, Android Studio, ProGuard/R8 Has written actual Platform Channel code — not just used existing plugins Deep understanding of Flutter state management — must be able to explain tradeoffs between BLoC, Riverpod, GetX, and choose appropriately. Solid grasp of async Dart: Future, Stream, Isolate — and knows when to use each. Experience publishing apps to both App Store (App Store Connect, TestFlight) and Google Play (internal/closed/open tracks). English proficiency sufficient for written technical communication and basic client calls. ➕ STRONG ADVANTAGE Experience in banking, fintech, or any regulated financial application. Familiarity with EKYC flows: liveness detection, document OCR, face matching integrated into mobile onboarding. Experience with Flutter flavors and multi-environment config (dev / staging / prod with separate Firebase projects, API endpoints, signing certs). Has led or technically mentored a mobile team of 3+ developers. Knowledge of OWASP Mobile Top 10 and how to apply mitigations in a Flutter context. Actively uses AI tools in daily development workflow (GitHub Copilot, Claude, Cursor, or equivalent) — for code generation, debugging, writing tests, or documentation. Comfortable evaluating and integrating AI-generated code critically, not just accepting output blindly. Why You'll Love Working Here 📍 Position Information Location: B20 Bach Dang Street, Tan Son Hoa Ward, Ho Chi Minh City Working hours: Monday to Friday, 8:30 AM – 6:00 PM (including 1.5-hour lunch break from 12:00 PM - 1:30 PM) 💼 WHAT WE OFFER Competitive salary: Negotiable based on experience. 13th-month salary. 12 days of annual leave plus public holidays. Daily lunch provided by the company’s kitchen, offering both Vietnamese and Western dishes. 🌐 LANGUAGE Vietnamese (primary language) English (client communication) 🚀 Application Process To apply, please submit: An updated English CV. GitHub or portfolio links (if available). Relevant certifications or personal projects. Good English proficiency is required. There will be an English interview following the work experience discussion round.

title: Android Developer (Kotlin)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Work on 20+ global games with over 300M+ downloads Full SHUI & extra health insurance Bonus with 30% of company profit shared (no cap) The Job We're hiring Android Developer! Join Uplive on our mission to musicalize the world! We are looking for a talented Android Developer to turn bold product ideas into polished, high-performance native mobile experiences. In this role, you will dive deep into modern Android architecture, craft seamless user interfaces, and help push the boundaries of mobile audio processing. If you are passionate about clean code, love solving complex technical challenges, and want to build apps enjoyed by millions of music lovers worldwide, we want you on our team. What will you do Feature Development: Build and optimize features for our high-scale music applications following product priorities and Agile/Scrum methodologies. Architecture & Clean Code: Participate in technical brainstorming sessions, design robust technical solutions, and conduct code reviews to maintain high standards of code quality and scalability. R&D & Innovation: Research and prototype emerging Android technologies and audio frameworks to meet evolving product requirements. Collaboration & Mentorship: Actively collaborate within cross-functional Scrum teams, supporting fellow engineers with logic solutions and technical hurdles. DevOps & Tooling: Manage your workflow efficiently using Git, JIRA, and modern CI/CD pipelines. Production Ownership: Take pride in app stability by debugging complex issues and ensuring high availability for our global user base. Language Proficiency: Strong command of Kotlin , including idiomatic style, Coroutines, Flow, and Kotlin Serialization. Modern UI: Hands-on production experience with Jetpack Compose , State Hoisting, and Material Design 3. Architecture: Deep understanding of Clean Architecture (Data/Domain/Presentation layers) and MVVM utilizing StateFlow, sealed class state machines, and the repository pattern. Jetpack Ecosystem: Proficiency with Jetpack Navigation, Room, and DataStore. Dependency Injection: Experience with Hilt or Dagger. Networking & Backend: Experience integrating REST APIs (using Ktor or Retrofit). Testing: Familiarity with unit testing (JUnit, MockK) and UI testing fundamentals. Cloud & Ads: Solid experience with Firebase (Analytics, Crashlytics, Remote Config) and AdMob SDK. Next-Gen Workflow: Highly comfortable leveraging AI Coding Agents (e.g., Claude Code, GitHub Copilot) as daily development companions to accelerate output. Preferred Plusses (Nice-to-Haves) Experience with Media3 / ExoPlayer and core audio processing. Familiarity with GLSL shaders and advanced graphics rendering. Knowledge of background processing using WorkManager . Experience with Supabase or Ktor backend environments. Optimization experience using ProGuard/R8 and KSP (Kotlin Symbol Processing). Hands-on experience with Ad Mediation platforms (AppLovin MAX, Meta, ironSource). Soft Skills & Mindset Product Mindset: You don't just build specs; you care about the user experience and the "why" behind the feature. Problem Solving: Strong logical thinking, troubleshooting skills, and a proactive attitude toward resolving blockers. Ownership: A self-driven approach to time management, discipline, and project delivery. Passion: A genuine love for mobile apps and music! Why You'll Love Working Here Competitive salary, 100% salary during probation Performance bonus with 30% of company profit shared with no cap Full SHUI as Vietnamese Law + Premium Private Medical Insurance and annual health check Minimum 12 days paid annual leave + 10 days paid sick leave. 12 days working from home per year Annual flexi-budget (9.400.000 VNĐ/year) for well-being & personal development Free daily lunch with 10+ menu options. Free daily F&B: Snacks, juice, beverage, tea-time Monthly/Bi-monthly team activity allowance Company learning trip will be top of countries that we gain most profit. 1st is Korea, next destination is Japan Sponsored sports activities: badminton, soccer, ... title: IOS Developer

Workflow & Tools: • DevOps/Collaboration: Daily usage of Git/GitLab and Jira/Redmine. You are comfortable with branching strategies (GitFlow/Trunk-based), code review workflows, and CI/CD practices. • Design-to-Code: High proficiency in interpreting complex Figma designs, ensuring pixel-perfect responsiveness across all device screen sizes and OS versions. 4. Strategic & "Plus" Skills • Technical Leadership: Ability to mentor junior developers, perform deep code reviews, and drive architectural decisions. • Future-Proofing: Experience or strong interest in Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP) for cross-platform logic sharing. • Continuous Learning: A proactive mindset to evaluate, prototype, and implement new mobile methodologies to improve the development lifecycle. • AI-SDLC: Experience in leverage AI tools in product development activities. Your Skills and Experience • Education: Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Software Engineering, or equivalent technical field. • Experience: 5+ years of professional iOS development experience using Swift. • Architecture: Mastery of MVVM and Coordinator patterns. Proficient in Clean Architecture and large-scale Modularization (dynamic frameworks/libraries). • Modern Swift: Deep expertise in Combine, Swift Concurrency (Async/Await), and Diffable DataSources. • Dependency Management: Advanced experience with Swift Package Manager (SPM) and dependency injection patterns. title: Flutter & Native iOS/Android (Fintech)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us International fintech & digital banking firm Top salary, bonus & stock options Work & travel globally with innovation teams The Job Role Summary Vietpay is hiring a Senior Mobile Developer who is Flutter-first but comes from a strong native mobile engineering background. You have built and shipped production applications on iOS or Android at a professional level, and you bring that depth of platform knowledge into your Flutter work. Engineers who have transitioned from native iOS development are strongly preferred — that foundation of understanding how the platform actually works, how builds are configured, how signing and distribution operate, and how native APIs behave, is what separates good Flutter engineers from great ones. You will own the full mobile delivery lifecycle at Vietpay: architecture, feature development, build and release operations, dependency governance, and continuous technical improvement. You take personal accountability for the products you work on and always push toward better engineering. Key Responsibilities 1) Flutter Development Build and maintain production Flutter features using Dart, following Clean Architecture with BLoC or equivalent state management. Make sound architectural decisions in the Flutter layer: navigation, state management, platform channels, and native integration. Write platform channel integrations when Flutter needs access to native iOS or Android capabilities not covered by existing plugins. Maintain Flutter code quality: proper widget decomposition, no business logic in UI, testable BLoCs, and clean dependency injection. Stay current with Flutter SDK releases and Dart language updates, proactively adopting improvements that benefit the codebase. 2) Native Mobile Knowledge Applied to Flutter Leverage native platform knowledge to debug Flutter issues that surface at the platform layer: build errors, signing failures, native plugin conflicts, and platform-specific rendering behaviour. Understand what Flutter abstracts away and what it does not — and know when to drop into native code to solve a problem correctly. Apply native architecture instincts — clean layer separation, testability, lifecycle awareness — to Flutter codebase decisions. Recognise platform-specific performance characteristics and apply the right fix at the right layer, whether Dart, platform channel, or native. 3) iOS App Setup, Build Configuration, and Distribution Own Flutter project setup for iOS: bundle IDs, entitlements, Info.plist configuration, and environment-specific build settings. Configure and manage iOS signing: certificates, provisioning profiles, and App ID setup in Apple Developer Portal. Set up and maintain App Store Connect: app records, TestFlight distributions, and App Store submissions. Manage iOS build tooling and automation: Fastlane lanes for building, signing, testing, and distributing; integration with CI/CD pipelines. Configure and manage iOS dependency tooling: CocoaPods and Swift Package Manager as required by Flutter plugins — including version pinning and conflict resolution. Manage Flutter flavor and build variant configuration: bundle IDs per environment, build configs, and native bridging for both iOS and Android. 4) Release Management and Operations Own the end-to-end release pipeline: from branch to signed build to TestFlight or internal track to store submission. Manage App Store review submissions: metadata, screenshots, compliance answers, and resolving reviewer rejections. Coordinate with DevOps on CI/CD pipelines that run builds, tests, and distributions automatically on the right triggers. Monitor production releases: crash rates, performance regressions, and ANRs via crash reporting and analytics tooling; respond to incidents promptly. Maintain changelogs, release notes, and version tracking disciplines across environments. 5) Architecture and Code Quality Define and enforce mobile architecture standards across the codebase: folder structure, layer separation, naming conventions, and dependency direction. Conduct thorough code reviews focused on correctness, maintainability, security, and alignment with project conventions. Write unit tests, widget tests, and integration tests that give genuine confidence in behaviour, not just coverage numbers. Identify and address architectural drift before it compounds: refactor proactively rather than building on fragile foundations. Document key decisions, patterns, and setup procedures so that the codebase is approachable by any competent engineer, not dependent on tribal knowledge. 6) Dependency and Package Governance Own the Flutter dependency graph: audit third-party packages for security, maintenance status, licence compliance, and API stability before adoption. Define upgrade policies: keep dependencies current on a schedule, not reactively, and pin versions with documented reasons for exceptions. Maintain a managed pub upgrade process: test every upgrade against the full app before merging, document breaking API changes. Remove unused dependencies promptly; avoid bloat that inflates binary size or build times. 7) Security and Fintech Compliance Apply mobile security best practices: Keychain for credentials, certificate pinning for API communication, jailbreak and root detection, and secure data storage. Ensure the app meets financial services compliance requirements: session management, transaction confirmation flows, sensitive data handling, and audit logging of security-relevant actions. Follow App Store privacy guidelines rigorously: accurate data usage declarations, permission usage strings, and privacy manifest compliance. Never store sensitive financial or user data in plaintext, logs, or insecure storage. 8) Accountability, Ownership, and Continuous Improvement Take full ownership of the features and systems you build — not just until the PR merges, but in production, through incidents, and across the full product lifecycle. Proactively identify technical debt, performance bottlenecks, and UX friction in the codebase before they become user-facing problems; propose and execute improvements without waiting to be asked. Hold yourself to a higher standard than "it works": consider performance, edge cases, accessibility, error states, and long-term maintainability as non-negotiable parts of done. Raise concerns early: if a product decision will create technical problems, say so clearly and propose alternatives — not to block delivery, but to protect product quality. Continuously learn: follow platform releases, community best practices, and industry patterns in fintech mobile; bring relevant improvements back to the team with a concrete rationale. Treat the product as your own: care about the user experience, the crash rate, the App Store rating, and the release cadence as a founder would. Your Skills and Experience Job Requirements Must be fluent in English (spoken and written) 5+ years of professional mobile development experience with at least one shipped production app. Strong background in native mobile development — iOS (Swift) or Android (Kotlin/Java) — at a professional, production level. Solid Flutter and Dart skills with experience delivering a production Flutter application. Strong understanding of mobile architecture: Clean Architecture, MVVM, or equivalent applied consistently across a real codebase. Hands-on experience with mobile build configuration, signing, and CI/CD distribution pipelines. Experience writing unit, widget, and integration tests with genuine coverage of business-critical paths. Demonstrable ownership mindset: able to point to specific examples of proactively improving product quality beyond assigned tasks. Strong English communication skills; comfortable raising technical concerns clearly with product and engineering stakeholders. Preferred Qualifications Native iOS background (Swift, Xcode, UIKit or SwiftUI) is strongly preferred over Android. Hands-on experience managing iOS signing end to end: Apple Developer Portal, certificates, provisioning profiles, and Xcode signing settings. Proven experience with App Store Connect: submissions, TestFlight, metadata management, and resolving review rejections. Experience with iOS dependency management using Swift Package Manager and CocoaPods. Experience in fintech, banking, payments, or other regulated mobile applications. Experience with Flutter platform channels and native iOS or Android integration. Familiarity with mobile security tooling: certificate pinning, jailbreak detection, and secure enclave usage. Experience with crash reporting and mobile observability tooling: Firebase Crashlytics, Sentry, or equivalent. Experience setting up Flutter flavor configurations across multiple environments. Familiarity with App Store privacy manifest requirements and data usage declarations. Tools and Working Methods Flutter: Dart, Flutter SDK, BLoC or equivalent state management, flutter pub, platform channels, flavor configuration. Native reference: Swift/Xcode (iOS) or Kotlin/Android Studio (Android) for platform-layer debugging and native plugin work. Distribution: App Store Connect, TestFlight, Fastlane, Firebase App Distribution. CI/CD: GitHub Actions, Bitrise, or equivalent pipeline tooling. Observability: Firebase Crashlytics, Sentry, or equivalent crash and performance monitoring. Collaboration: Jira, Confluence or Notion, Git-based workflows with clear PR descriptions and decision documentation. Why You'll Love Working Here International fintech & digital banking firm Top salary, bonus & stock options Work & travel globally with innovation teams Social insurance based on full salary Full Training will be provided to Candidate

Work-life balance 40-hr per week from Mon to Fri .

Job Description As an iOS Developer, you will be responsible for the full lifecycle of mobile application development for our FinTech services. You will design, develop, test, and deploy robust, user-friendly, and secure iOS applications that serve millions of users. Responsibilities: Lead development activities for iOS mobile applications for our FinTech services, ensuring high quality, performance, and adherence to best practices using Swift. Conduct solution research and implementation studies for new mobile application features and proof-of-concepts (POCs), evaluating technical feasibility and proposing optimal solutions. Drive the improvement and enhancement of automated testing strategies including unit, integration, and UI tests (e.g., XCTest), to ensure high code quality and reliability. Propose and implement various technical improvements for our services within the iOS ecosystem, focusing on architecture, performance, and user experience. Actively contribute to the proposition of new functions and services , translating business requirements into technical solutions. Collaborate closely with product owners, UI/UX designers, and backend teams to define requirements, integrate APIs, and ensure seamless end-to-end functionality. Participate in code reviews , providing constructive feedback and ensuring adherence to coding standards and best practices. Ensure compliance with security best practices for mobile application development in a FinTech environment. Your Skills and Experience Must have: At least 4+ years of professional experience in iOS application development using Swift. Proven experience consuming Web APIs for mobile application development. Intermediate-level in English communication (B2 or equivalent), capable of technical discussions. Strong knowledge of source control systems (e.g., Git) and defect tracking tools. Solid experience with Agile development methodologies (Scrum, Kanban). Good knowledge of databases and SQL , with experience integrating mobile apps with backend databases. Must be independent, responsible, and self-motivated , with a proven ability to learn quickly and achieve superior results. Strong communication skills , with proven ability to present complex ideas and document technical solutions clearly and concisely. Experience with unit testing frameworks (e.g., XCTest) and writing testable code. Familiarity with UI/UX design tools and collaboration with designers (e.g., Figma , Sketch, Zeplin). Nice to have: Experience with automated testing tools (e.g., Appium, XCUITest). Experience with building large-scale, enterprise-level mobile projects. Understanding of microservices architecture and cloud computing concepts. Experience with CI/CD pipelines for mobile apps. Experience in the FinTech domain. Experience with TestRails or similar test management tools. Experience with Android development is a plus. Why You'll Love Working Here Commuting Allowances Meal Allowances Performance Bonus Tet Bonus (Annual Bonus) Salary review Health checkup Premium Health care Company Trip Annual Leave *Benefits might be updated to add on, please let us know if you want to know more.
