title: Project Manager (Tech)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Engaging perks and benefits for your well-being World-class technology for parcel tracking Culture that embraces growth and teamwork The Job Interest in facilitating and coordinating Scrum project teams for B2B software solutions in e-commerce logistics? Parcel Perform is looking for an amazing team member to support us on project management! You have project management skills, 3 years of experience in Agile, Scrum, Kanban environments, you’re technically savvy and have a good grasp on critical thinking and design thinking? Are you also interested in e-commerce and like to take on new challenges? Help us drive Parcel Perform’s growth and join our team. We are looking for you! WE NEED YOU ON OUR TEAM! Ensure that all projects are delivered on-time, within the scope and team resource Coordinate the Team - You will communicate with different people on our team (developers, business, designers etc.) to ensure that roadblocks are removed and issues are closed quickly Ensure quality - Ensuring we have the right level of scope and coverage per epic and regression failures are protected against together with QA team Continuous Improvement - Identifying and driving areas where the team and process can improve the way we deliver on high-quality release Ensure resource availability and allocation Develop a detailed project plan to track progress Create and maintain comprehensive project documentation Measure project performance using appropriate systems, tools, and techniques Report and escalate to management as needed Manage the relationship with stakeholders Perform risk management to minimize project risks Such a job isn’t easy, especially with a focus on good project management practices. But that is ok. We aren’t here for ease anyway. We are here for people who want to operate at the next level in their careers. Your Skills and Experience WHAT YOU SHOULD BRING ALONG! We at Parcel Perform believe in innovation, energy, and resourcefulness for everything we do. We will not stop delivering an outstanding product that we can be proud of and need you to help us to inform the world. You need to feel the same way about our offering and bring along the following things: Educational background, preferably in the fields of computer science or engineering for technical project management Experience managing AI/ML or data-heavy projects with experimental phases Understanding of cloud infrastructure projects (AWS preferred) Familiarity with epic-driven development cycles and technical design processes Experience in project management in software development Practical knowledge or hands-on experience in software development and web technologies Excellent internal communication skills, written and verbal communication skills Solid organizational skills including attention to detail and multi-tasking skills PMP / Scrum Master certification is a plus Why You'll Love Working Here WHAT YOU WILL RECEIVE IN RETURN! We at Parcel Perform are dedicated to being a platform for growth for all our team members, regardless of function and location. The opportunity to work in a fast-growing, super exciting and innovative business that will revolutionize the e-commerce logistics industry. You will be the needle of success on the growth of a global product that will become a key platform behind successful e-commerce logistics worldwide. Fully sponsored Claude usage — As part of our commitment to AI-first ways of working, we provide sponsored access to Claude (Desktop, CoWork, and Code) to support smarter, more efficient workflows across the team. Submerge in the bleeding-edge of Agentic Development — We don’t simply supplement an existing process with AI tools, we rework every aspect of the software development life cycle, from requirement gathering, implementation, to testing. We believe the productivity multiplication of AI doesn’t just come from individual applications but also from an entire system that embraces it into every fabric. An environment where everybody never stops growing and focuses on succeeding – we continuously work with you on your strengths and weaknesses across many important dimensions and look at ways for you to address them and further your development. Join a passionate, global team at Parcel Perform where you can continuously develop your skills and actively drive our missions and international success. OUR BENEFITS! Parcel Perform is committed to providing a comprehensive and competitive benefits package that supports the wellbeing, growth, and performance of our employees. Competitive compensation package 13th month salary and ESOP Health insurance and annual health check-up Hybrid working, flexible hours, and unlimited leave Learning support fund for professional development Access to AI tools and innovation initiatives Company-provided laptop & monitor Complimentary lunch and daily snacks Employee care programs and engagement activities WHO ARE WE AT PARCEL PERFORM! Parcel Perform is built on one of the largest logistics data infrastructures in delivery experience, processing billions of shipment events across 1,100+ carriers. We help customers optimize every stage—from EDD at checkout through post-purchase, returns, and logistics operations. Now the benchmark in delivery experience, Parcel Perform is the strategic partner that enables global e-commerce businesses to thrive in the age of AI Commerce. As AI shopping assistants reshape how consumers discover and buy, brands face a new imperative: get found by AI, then consistently deliver on promises. Parcel Perform helps e-commerce brands achieve AI visibility, then provide the cost-efficient delivery experience that turns every successful shipment into proof of reliability—building the trust that earns repeat AI recommendations. The platform handles enterprise complexity with the agility to go live in weeks—built for the speed of AI without sacrificing customization.

title: IT Technical Project Manager (Agile/ Scrum)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Hi-tech working environment Young and dynamic colleagues International experience The Job ABOUT THE ROLE Coordinate delivery across CoSAP, an AI-powered FinTech/ERP intelligence platform for SMEs, and Fusionflow, a GPU infrastructure orchestration platform for AI workloads. You are the delivery backbone across engineering, product, infrastructure, business, and customer-facing teams in Vietnam, Singapore, and regional markets. You turn ambiguous goals into executable plans, surface risks early, and help teams ship reliably. We need an AI-native delivery practitioner: someone who uses AI daily to improve planning, communication, documentation, analysis, automation, and decision quality - while keeping human accountability for the final result. AI-NATIVE MINDSET & PRACTICE Use ChatGPT, Claude, Cursor, Claude Code, Copilot, Notion AI, MCP servers, or custom agents for backlog shaping, meeting synthesis, risk analysis, docs, release checklists, and retrospectives. Apply vibe-coding-style workflows for non-production scripts, dashboards, reporting helpers, templates, workflow automations, and prototypes. Build reusable prompts, templates, project artifacts, and AI-assisted workflows that make delivery faster and clearer. Verify AI-generated plans, summaries, estimates, acceptance criteria, and documents before sharing or relying on them. Protect FinTech/customer data: do not expose sensitive financial, customer, or infrastructure information to unmanaged tools. Coach the team toward practical AI habits: better questions, faster drafts, stronger verification, and less manual coordination waste. WHAT YOU'LL DO Run pragmatic Agile/Scrum: planning, refinement, async updates, reviews, retrospectives, and release planning. Convert business priorities into plans with owners, milestones, dependencies, risks, acceptance criteria, and timelines. Manage dependencies across CoSAP, Fusionflow, infrastructure, product, customer success, and leadership. Coordinate FinTech work involving ERP integrations, financial data, reporting, reconciliation, access control, auditability, and customer trust. Support release readiness: QA, validation, rollback planning, monitoring, documentation, and support handoff. Improve project boards, sprint cadence, templates, dashboards, checklists, and postmortem follow-up. Your Skills and Experience WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR Value-driven - focused on customer impact, business outcomes, engineering quality, and risk reduction. AI-native practitioner - uses AI as a default working partner for thinking, drafting, analyzing, documenting, and automating. Adaptive - applies Agile/Scrum pragmatically across product, infrastructure, FinTech, and operations work. Willing to learn - builds working knowledge of AI, ERP, SME finance workflows, Kubernetes, GPU infrastructure, and FinTech. Technically fluent - comfortable discussing APIs, databases, data pipelines, cloud, CI/CD, observability, release risk, and dependencies. Verification-minded - checks AI outputs, assumptions, data risks, edge cases, and stakeholder impact before treating anything as true. Clear and accountable - writes concise English updates, clarifies ownership, follows up on blockers, and escalates risks early. Servant leader - reduces noise, improves clarity, and removes blockers without micromanaging. REQUIREMENTS 3+ years in TPM, Agile delivery, Scrum Master, technical program, or delivery management roles. Experience managing software engineering projects from planning through release. Strong Agile/Scrum practice: planning, refinement, retrospectives, estimation, release planning. Technical fluency with APIs, databases, cloud/infrastructure, CI/CD, observability, and production operations. Hands-on daily AI-tool usage for planning, documentation, analysis, summarization, stakeholder communication, and workflow acceleration. Comfortable with financial data, ERP, reporting workflows, data quality, or compliance-sensitive requirements. Strong written and spoken English. NICE TO HAVE FinTech, banking, payments, accounting software, ERP, BI, AI products, data platforms, infrastructure, or Kubernetes. Distributed teams across countries or international stakeholder/customer environments. Jira, Linear, GitHub Projects, Notion, Confluence, Slack, Miro, or similar tools. Prompt libraries, AI-assisted dashboards, project agents, documentation workflows, or lightweight internal automations. Scrum Master, PMI-ACP, PMP, SAFe, or similar certification. Why You'll Love Working Here Competitive package Professional working environment Opportunities to challenge and develop your career Social insurance, health insurance, unemployment insurance as labor law stipulated Premium Healthcare Opportunity to participate in stock option program. Public holiday and Annual leave in accordance with the Vietnamese labour law

title: Product Owner - Sales Intelligence Platform (Agile)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job AI is transforming the way businesses sell. We are building a Sales Intelligence Platform that combines enterprise data, GenAI, and AI Agents to help sales teams uncover opportunities, deeply understand customers, and make better decisions. We are looking for a Product Owner who can seamlessly bridge the gap between business, product, and technology. In this role, you will help shape the product from its very first iterations to delivering real, measurable impact for our users Define and drive the product vision, strategy, and roadmap. Identify core business problems that can be solved effectively using data and AI. Collaborate with customers, stakeholders, and internal teams to gather and understand real-world needs. Translate business objectives into clear, actionable product features. Manage and prioritize the product backlog, defining the development direction. Partner closely with BAs, Designers, AI Engineers, Data Engineers, and QA throughout the entire product development lifecycle. Define, track, and analyze key product performance metrics. Continuously gather and evaluate user feedback to optimize user experience and product value. Your Skills and Experience 1. Job Requirements 5+ years of experience as a Product Owner, Product Manager, or in a similar role. Proven experience in building or operating digital products. Strong product mindset and problem-solving skills. Ability to work effectively across various cross-functional teams. Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills. 2. Preferred Qualifications (Nice-to-have) Understanding of Sales, CRM, or Customer Intelligence. Experience with Data Platforms, Analytics, or AI. Interest in GenAI, RAG, and AI Agents. Prior experience building B2B or Enterprise Products. Why You'll Love Working Here Benefits The opportunity to build an AI-native product from the ground up (0 to 1). Work directly with the latest advancements in AI and Machine Learning. Ownership and high autonomy in shaping the product's direction. A high-speed, agile culture with plenty of room to experiment, fail fast, and learn. Work closely with the leadership team, tech experts, and enterprise clients.

title: Product Engineer (Intern/Fresher/Junior)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Own critical product surfaces end‑to‑end Build real revenue engines with AI and data Hybrid, async work that respects working style The Job About Flexspace AI Flexspace AI is the e-commerce + AI revenue platform for coworking — / Shopify / Airbnb for flexible workspace. Seed-funded. We turn operators' websites into high-converting storefronts and run AI agents that price and market their inventory in real time. What we ship : mobile-first booking engine that embeds in any operator's site; SmartPricing Agent for dynamic pricing on meeting rooms, day passes, offices; SmartMarketing Agent for promo campaigns; operator dashboard for revenue/bookings/attribution; member portal for end customers; two-way integrations with prominent property management systems. Who buys it : coworking operators from single-location indies to multi-country brands. Their revenue is the conversion rate of the screens you'll design — CTAs, catalog, transitions, and checkout aren't decoration here; they're the product. How we work : small, agile, AI-heavy. On track to profitability this year. Headcount is deliberately small so each person owns real surface area — tight feedback loops, no bureaucracy, no committees. We measure shipped work — funnel lifts, partner themes shipped, UX issues triaged — not hours. No face-time theater. Co-located hybrid out of Workflow Thao Dien in HCMC for in-person speed. Wider team is async-first, written-first across US, Israel, Turkey, Philippines, and Vietnam. Weekly product/design sync with the CTO/cofounder — no layers between you and the people deciding what to build. Role Overview Product Engineer building the e-commerce platform behind the next generation of coworking spaces—SmartPricing, SmartMarketing, the booking engine operators embed on their sites, and the integrations that tie it all together. You work directly with the founders, with no layers between you and the people setting the roadmap. We also welcome final-year students looking for an internship. What engineering means here. The hard problem isn't writing code—AI writes plenty of it now. It's deciding what's worth building. Operators juggle hundreds of spaces, prices, members, bookings, and integrations across locations and time zones; customers comparing meeting rooms decide in seconds. Your job is to understand these humans—in the data—then ship software that moves their revenue. Empathy and data are the input; working product is the output. Polish comes last. On prioritization. Not all code has the same payoff. You'll look at a problem from several angles—funnel data, operator feedback, revenue, churn signals—and pick the work where your hours move the business most. A feature nobody uses is wasted hours; a 2% lift on the booking funnel is the company's quarter. Judgment over completeness. On decisions. Bigger calls go to the team before you build. Smaller calls—ship, watch the data, iterate. We're data-driven, not opinion-driven, and seniority doesn't win arguments—evidence does. You'll own the surfaces you touch, with support, and you expose your reasoning so we can calibrate together. On growth. You're early-career, and we hire for that on purpose. Expect code review, pairing, and direct coaching from founders and senior engineers. We can teach the stack, the patterns, and the product thinking. The one thing we can't give you is drive—that comes from you. What You'll Do Ship features end-to-end. Work with founders and operators to understand a need, then spec, build, and release it—with support along the way. Build and evolve our SmartPricing & SmartMarketing agents. Pricing rules, targeting logic, and performance monitoring. Make booking effortless. Seamless booking experiences with instant payment, embedded right in operators' websites. Wire up integrations. Sync data with coworking CRMs, inventory systems, and analytics tools—and prevent double bookings. Pull data, form an opinion, decide. Revenue, Mixpanel, GA4 / GTM funnel data, and operator feedback. Write so the team stays in sync. Clear specs and pull-request descriptions that keep an async, distributed team aligned across time zones. How You'll Work With AI Claude as peers, not novelties. You'll write and refine structured prompts, build new ones, and ship real changes through AI tools. Senior engineers coach you and set guardrails so you can move fast without first becoming a framework expert. Judgment, taste, and clear thinking are the bottleneck now—not syntax. We give you a budget for the best AI tools because we expect you to use them as leverage, not as a crutch. What Success Looks Like In Your First 6 Months You've shipped real features to production that operators and members actually use. You can navigate the codebase and pick up unfamiliar areas without much hand-holding. You ship changes through Claude with sound judgment about what to accept and what to rework. You back your decisions and pushback with data—and your written updates keep the async team moving without meetings. You're catching product, UX, and trade-off issues early, not just implementing tickets. What Makes You a Great Fit We prioritize these qualities top-down—technical skills can be learned quickly by sharp, curious people with low ego and a strong work ethic. Above all, here's what we look for: Drive and motivation. We can give you the tools, the environment, and hands-on coaching—but we can't give you the drive to succeed as a product engineer in the modern AI era. That has to come from you. Attention to detail and high standards. You're obsessed with quality—it's not about just getting the job done, it's about delivering the best work you can and raising the team's bar. You sweat the small things—edge cases, copy, data correctness—because details separate a working product from a trusted one. Clear written English. You read and write clear English (with the help with AI tools); in an async, globally distributed team, your writing is how you think, collaborate, and lead. High agency. You take initiative—ask questions when something's unclear, chase down answers, and push your work forward instead of waiting to be told the next step. You question everything. Everyone has a voice and is expected to push the envelope. There's no "the senior person knows better"—answers and pushback alike are grounded in data and critical thinking, regardless of title or age. Curiosity and fast learning. You pick up new domains, tools, and concepts quickly, especially around AI, pricing, and B2B SaaS. Product sense. You care about customers and business context, not just the tech stack, and you treat engineering as a way to drive revenue, bookings, and occupancy. You grasp basic microeconomics—incentives, opportunity cost, supply and demand—as a toolkit for trade-offs: simpler designs that still maximize value, arguments made in terms of impact rather than opinion, and an understanding of why the business prioritizes what it does. Don't have this thinking framework yet? If you bring the motivation, we'll coach you on it. Your Skills and Experience Must-have Vietnamese, based in Ho Chi Minh City . Hired on a Vietnamese employment contract. No visa sponsorship or relocation funding. Solid CS fundamentals. You understand how data is structured, how APIs work, and how to troubleshoot methodically—and you can name what you're doing and why. Comfortable with the basics that make a good teammate. Git, reading existing code, writing tests, and jumping into unfamiliar parts of a codebase. Some Ruby, TypeScript, or Python. You'll spend most of your time in Ruby and TypeScript. We don't expect all three—we expect you to learn fast. A project we can look at. At least one thing you built that works—side project, open source, internship, hackathon, or coursework—with a link and a clear story of how and why you built it. AI-native. You use Claude and Cursor daily and know where they shine and where they break down. Writing and reading English for async work. Speaking can be conversational—we coach. Agency. You spot things, fix things, ship things—you don't wait to be told. Self-taught software engineers are welcome. You don't have to study IT or computer majors to become a good software product builders. What matters is the drive, agency, attention to detail, willingness to ship, and how fast you learn. If you read this and thought "I could do that with some support," don't self-select out—apply. Why You'll Love Working Here This role suits future founders. Direct cofounder access, real ownership of decisions and outcomes, scope across an entire product surface, an inside look at how a small team turns AI into shipped product. If you aspire to build your own startup product one day, this is the seat that builds the muscles. Compensation & growth Salary: up to 27M VND/month GROSS. Calibrated on portfolio strength, interview sharpness, and demonstrated speed of learning, not years on a resume. Exceptional candidates can be discussed above this band. Comp reviews on request — if you've grown the role, raise it. Probation: 2 months at full salary. Passes on shipping consistently — no surprise gates. Stock options eligibility and a company laptop after probation. Bring your own laptop during probation. Tools Company-paid Claude Workspace & culture Covered desk at Workflow Thao Dien (HCMC). Hybrid at least 2 days/week in-person. Flexible hours. Vietnam time (ICT). Occasional pre-scheduled evening calls overseas, rare in practice. English-first, American startup culture: direct feedback, written-first, low-meeting. We measure shipped work, not hours. Benefits BHXH / BHYT / BHTN contributions per Vietnamese labor law. Vietnamese public holidays off (incl. Tết). Unlimited personal time off. Coordinate with the team based on urgency and your ownership. Hiring process Three real-time conversations with humans. No automated screening, no pre-recorded video tasks, no take-home gauntlet. Intro call — short conversation to get a sense of your English and how clearly you articulate your thinking. Team conversation — in person at Workflow Thao Dien. Walk us through your portfolio, talk shop, hang out, code together, grab lunch (we pay). Conversation with the CTO — remote (or in-person if on business trip). Product, technical fluency, working style.

title: Principal Game Engineer (Unreal Engine/C++)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Working with a multicultural team Hybrid work culture Recognition and reward based on performance The Job What you will focus on As the primary technical authority for the OTT portfolio (all non-Brand-Partnership), you are responsible for technical strategy and transformative innovation across all technological disciplines within OTT. This encompasses everything from game engine architecture, large-scale infrastructure, advanced tools, optimized pipelines, and robust live service operations – including C++ internal engines, Unreal Engine/Unity production, and legacy game stacks. You will lead, empower, and inspire multi-disciplinary teams of programmers, architects, and technologists on game technology areas, ensuring technical excellence and alignment across multiple projects and production teams in line with Studio production goals and long-term vision. Furthermore, you will drive the team upskilling and lead the integration of AI-driven productivity tools across the OTT portfolio. What it means on a daily basis​ 1. Strategic innovation and leadership Shape and champion the long-term strategic technical vision, roadmap, and architectural direction of the entire division. Build a highly scalable and robust production ecosystem, strategically designed to support the studio's long-term content demands, operational flexibility, and global reach. Initiate, lead, and oversee high-impact R&D activities (including AI pipeline in game development); proactively explore and integrate new or efficient technologies, tools, and methodologies to maintain a competitive edge; anticipate technological advancements, overcome emerging production challenges, to enhance production efficiency and quality of technical deliveries. Proactively analyze and resolve complex, critical technical challenges at division or studio level to prevent roadblocks and ensure seamless operations. Promote a culture of creativity, experimentation, continuous improvement, and a product-focused mindset within programming teams. 2. Technical alignment and operational excellence Act as the primary point of contact and escalation path for complex technical challenges, providing consultation and guidance to production teams and partners. Partner with the Studio Technical Director on strategic resource planning and project allocation. Follow up closely with technical leads and other stakeholders (game managers, producers, cross-functional team leads) to monitor all projects’ technical status, anticipate, prevent and solve critical issues, and ensure programming teams meet deadlines with efficiency and quality; report periodic progress and key performance updates to the Studio Technical Director. Establish and enforce studio-wide coding standards, architectural patterns, and workflows with best-in-class engineering practices. Drive the successful transition and integration of R&D outcomes (e.g., comprehensive documentation, Proofs of Concept, mature prototypes) into production pipelines. Continuously optimize processes and technical infrastructure to support project scaling and the studio’s long-term strategic direction. Collaborate with top technical experts to share AI/Unreal/engine-level learnings and align on technical directions. Coordinate with partner studios to standardize Unreal toolchains (Horde, UGS, Perforce branching, AutoSDK/Turnkey, plugin baseline) per Gameloft Technical Summit directives. 3. Talent focus and team upskilling Manage the team of seniors/experts/leads, focus on expertise and career development. Perform periodic assessments of technical competencies across the division with regards to technical challenges and strategic directions. Take action to fill the identified skill gaps (e.g., training, on-the-job mentoring, coaching), with focus on high-potential and talented programmers, facilitating their development path towards future technical experts/leads. Foster a positive and effective cooperation between programming and other departments. 4. Studio and technology partnerships Develop and maintain strategic relationships with technical/production counterparts in co-development studios and technology partners. Lead the technical co-development relationship with other partner studios, including alignment on style guides, architecture, tooling, and frequent lead-to-lead syncs during active production phases. Evaluate new external technologies and partnerships for strategic fit and potential impact on studio capabilities. What success will look like​ As the Division Principal Programmer, you will bring visible impact on technical leadership and development on strategic projects and missions aligned with the studio's vision. Who you would be working with​ You will overseeing your programing team of approximately 35 to 40 people, and collaborating closely with other department heads and team leads in game development like Game Design, Art, and Producing. You will also report to the Studio Technical Director and coordinate with Studio Directors, Studio Manager, and Technical Managers/Directors from partner studios. Your Skills and Experience What you need to succeed Expertise in game creation across various genres. Deep expertise in core game development domains (e.g., AI, 3D rendering, online/network scalability, cloud technology). Proficiency in multiple game engines (e.g., Unity, Unreal), with mandatory mastery of Unreal (UE5). Expert proficiency in architecture design and coding in multiple languages (e.g., C#, C++, Python). Strong knowledge of AI/LLM production deployment; hands-on experience using AI coding assistants (e.g., Claude Code, Copilot). Proactive in staying current with industry technological advancements; ability to lead R&D initiatives and produce high-quality technical documentation (whitepapers, specifications). Who you are Proven experience in strategic project management. A strong product mindset (balancing technical requirements with business and player value). Ability to collaborate effectively with high-level leadership and external partners. Strong problem-solving skills with a structured approach that considers both the immediate issue and the overall system architecture. Strong communication skills, with the ability to influence or facilitate decision-making process. Strong negotiation and conflict resolution skills. Strong technical mentorship skill. Highly autonomous, initiative driver. Strong adaptability and steady leadership during periods of change or high-pressure situations. Strong analytical and critical thinking skills. Excellent team player with a high sense of responsibility and a focus on results. Open, proactive, excellence-driven mindset. Fast learner and visionary leader. Why You'll Love Working Here Benefits A hybrid working model with 2 days working from home every week. A range of well-being events and policies to support employees physically, mentally, and emotionally. Various training packages, including internal training, training sponsorship, and e-learning platforms (iLearn, Udemy, O'Reilly,...). Opportunities to collaborate and train with Gameloft worldwide experts and develop yourself. An attractive monthly salary alongside Tet and other performance bonuses. Minimum 12 days of paid annual leave, plus 5 days of paid sick leave, Christmas leave, Birthday leave, CSR leave,... 100% coverage of mandatory insurance plus private healthcare insurance. A monthly allowance to support lunch meals and working-from-home electricity and Internet bills. Relocation supprt for international candidates joining from overseas. Life at Gameloft Saigon A collaborative workplace environment, with over 15+ nationalities, where hundreds of world-renowned game titles were born. An open-space office, a canteen, a billiard table, a ping-pong table, and a foosball table. A gaming room equipped with mutiple devices (PS, Xbox, Nintendo Switch, arcade machine,...). A capable and encouraging team of professionals focused on creating compelling video games. A global company where you can meet great people around the world. A fun place to work in the heart of the city.

title: [Remote] Senior 3D Game Artist (Unity/English)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job We are looking for a Senior 3D Game Artist to define and elevate the visual quality of our casual and puzzle mobile games. You'll own the art direction, produce high-level 3D assets, and guide a small art team, balancing eye-catching visuals with the performance and clarity that casual games demand. RESPONSIBILITIES Create and participate in concept art, key UI screens, main characters, and high-level 3D assets (props, environments, hero objects). Ensure visual quality and consistency across the product. Keep up with art trends, propose creative improvements, and contribute innovative ideas to enhance product development. Organize, arrange, and manage the team's asset and image library. Optimize models, textures, sizes, and dimensions to enhance visual quality while maintaining mobile performance. Support the exporting and integration of 3D models, textures, and animations into the Unity engine. Stay abreast of industry trends, themes, and new artistic styles across mobile game genres. Your Skills and Experience SKILL Proficient with Unity Particle System, Shader Graph, and related VFX tools. Strong art technical skills, including proficiency with 3D tools (e.g., Blender, Maya, 3ds Max, ZBrush, Substance) and Unity-ready asset workflows. AI adoption mindset: able to apply generative AI tools and maintain a positive, forward-thinking perspective on AI integration in the creative process. Demonstrated strong leadership and management skills. Intermediate English skills. 5+ years of experience as a Game Artist, with solid 3D production experience. ABILITIES Strong emotional intelligence is significant. Keen artistic eye and attention to detail. Pioneering spirit with creative and unique thinking. Ability to receive constructive criticism and implement amendments based on feedback. Experience working under pressure and consistently meeting deadlines. Excellent communication and teamwork to effectively collaborate with team members. Willingness to share ideas and knowledge. Growth mindset: can-do attitude, eagerness to learn, and persistence in the face of setbacks. Ability to adapt to various art genres, themes, and styles. Strong organizational, analytical, and problem-solving skills. PLUS POINTS (NICE TO HAVE) A strong interest in mobile game art across genres is a plus. A love of playing mobile games and sensitivity to user experience is a plus. Certification in UX Design is advantageous. Understanding of various game genres and trends is a plus. Experience with stylized/low-poly 3D art and mobile optimization is a plus. Why You'll Love Working Here Professional, creative working environment and talented teams; equal-opportunity & agile culture. Fully remote team, no traffic jam, no rigid office hours. Regular discussions and a chance to learn directly from experts in their fields. International exposure and real opportunity to grow.

title: Enterprise Architect
company: Ngân hàng TMCP Phương Đông | OCB
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Large-scale technology projects Bonus and benefits - Bank’s policies Loan programs for employees The Job Enterprise Architecture & Strategy Develop and maintain enterprise architecture across Business, Data, Application, and Technology layers. Define target architecture and transformation roadmaps for key domains: Digital Banking, Core Banking, Data & AI, and Integration. Establish and standardize reference architectures and architectural patterns (API-first, microservices, event-driven, cloud-native). Architecture Governance Establish and operate the Architecture Governance Model, including the Architecture Review Board (ARB). Ensure all initiatives comply with defined architectural principles, standards, and target state. Coordinate architecture reviews with stakeholders across Business, Security, Risk, Legal, and IT. Cloud, Platform & Integration Architecture Lead Cloud Adoption Strategy (AWS, Azure, GCP) and hybrid architecture design. Define architecture for microservices, API gateways, and event-driven integration. Standardize enterprise platforms including Digital Platform, Data Platform, AI Platform, and Integration Platform. AI & Data Architecture Enablement Drive the adoption and scaling of AI/GenAI use cases across the organization. Define modern AI architecture, including ML/GenAI stack (Python, TensorFlow/PyTorch, model lifecycle & fine-tuning) Vector databases (Milvus, PGVector) Orchestration frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex) Cloud AI services (AWS Bedrock, Azure AI, GCP Vertex AI) Ensure AI solutions are embedded into business workflows (automation, personalization, risk management). Standards, Policies & Controls Define and enforce enterprise-wide policies for: Technology lifecycle management Cloud governance API strategy System decommissioning Ensure consistency, interoperability, and alignment across platforms and business units. Manage technical debt and continuously improve system quality. Tools & Architecture Repository Implement and manage enterprise architecture tools for: Architecture modeling (TOGAF/ArchiMate tools) System mapping and repository management Maintain enterprise-wide architecture repository (capability map, system inventory, data flows). System Quality, Security & Compliance Ensure architecture meets requirements for scalability, reliability, and performance. Align designs with security standards and regulatory compliance (e.g., central bank regulations). Collaborate with Security, Risk, and Data teams to ensure end-to-end compliance. Stakeholder Management & Leadership Act as a bridge between Business, IT, Product, and Risk functions. Lead architecture communities of practice and engineering guilds. Provide architectural guidance to agile teams and ensure alignment with target architecture. Your Skills and Experience Education & Experience Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, or related field. Minimum 8 years of IT experience, including 3–5 years in Enterprise Architecture / Solution Architecture roles. Proven experience in large-scale digital transformation initiatives. Architecture & Technology Expertise Strong knowledge of architecture frameworks: TOGAF, Zachman (or equivalent). Deep expertise in: Cloud architecture (AWS, Azure, GCP) Microservices, API design, and integration patterns Full SDLC (design, deployment, monitoring, lifecycle management) AI & Modern Technology Capability Hands-on experience delivering AI/ML or GenAI solutions across at least two domains. Strong understanding of modern AI architecture and enterprise-scale deployment. Governance & Compliance Solid understanding of enterprise security, data governance, and regulatory requirements. Experience designing architectures compliant with regulated industry standards (e.g., banking). Leadership & Soft Skills Strong strategic thinking and system-level mindset. Excellent stakeholder management and executive communication skills. Proven ability to lead cross-functional teams and communities of practice. Why You'll Love Working Here - 100% salary during probation - 13th month salary and year-end bonus based on business performance (1–3.5 months’ salary) - Competitive total compensation, commensurate with experience and capability - Annual salary review based on performance - Bonus and benefits in accordance with the Bank’s policies - Eligibility for preferential loan programs for employees - Health insurance card covering inpatient and outpatient medical care (as per policy) - Professional working environment with deep technical specialization and long-term career development - Opportunity to participate in large-scale technology projects in the banking and finance domain - Exposure to core banking systems, large-scale data, and high-security environments - Regular internal training programs in technical expertise, banking knowledge, and soft skills

title: Business Analyst – Fulfillment
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job Gather, analyze, and clarify business requirements from fulfillment, warehouse, logistics operations teams, and customers. Collaborate with Dev/QA teams to develop and enhance features for the fulfillment system. Analyze current operational processes and propose improvements to optimize efficiency and user experience. Prepare business documents such as BRD, SRS, User Stories, Flowcharts, and basic Wireframes. Monitor project progress, support UAT, and ensure solutions meet business requirements. Coordinate with stakeholders to resolve issues during system operations. Conduct training sessions and provide user guidance when necessary. Your Skills and Experience From 2 years of experience as a Business Analyst or in related positions. Knowledge or experience in fulfillment, warehouse, logistics, or e-commerce operations is a strong advantage. Experience working as a Business Analyst in an IT/product company is a plus. Good understanding of fulfillment operational processes and process optimization mindset. Strong analytical, communication, and cross-functional collaboration skills. Proactive, adaptable, fast learner, and open to challenges in a dynamic environment. Preferred candidates are growth-oriented, eager to learn, and willing to grow long-term with the product. Ability to use AI tools (such as ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Copilot, or equivalent) to support business analysis, documentation, solution research, and improve work efficiency. Why You'll Love Working Here Salary: Negotiable based on qualifications and experience. (20M – 30M) Opportunity to work in a dynamic technology environment and develop real-world products. Chance to participate in building and enhancing large-scale fulfillment systems. Salary review, bonuses, and full benefits according to company policies. Career growth opportunities to Senior BA or Product Owner positions.

title: Embedded Hardware Engineer (AI Glasses)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Quyết định kiến trúc và công nghệ sản phẩm ESOP lên đến 2% cho thành viên nòng cốt Lộ trình phát triển lên vị trí lãnh đạo cấp cao The Job Chúng tôi đang tìm kiếm một Embedded Hardware Engineer để tham gia phát triển nền tảng phần cứng cho sản phẩm AI Glasses. Bạn sẽ chịu trách nhiệm: Thiết kế và phát triển hệ thống phần cứng nhúng cho các sản phẩm wearable. Thiết kế schematic và PCB, lựa chọn linh kiện phù hợp với yêu cầu sản phẩm. Tích hợp các thành phần như: MCU/SoC Bluetooth/Wi-Fi Camera, microphone, speaker Battery và power management Phối hợp với Firmware Engineers để đảm bảo tính tương thích giữa phần cứng và phần mềm. Thực hiện debug, validation và tối ưu hiệu năng hệ thống. Phân tích và xử lý các vấn đề liên quan đến tín hiệu, nguồn và kết nối ngoại vi. Làm việc với nhà cung cấp, ODM/OEM và đội sản xuất để đưa sản phẩm từ prototype đến mass production. Tham gia cải tiến thiết kế nhằm tối ưu hiệu năng, độ ổn định và mức tiêu thụ điện năng của thiết bị. Your Skills and Experience Must-have Từ 2 năm kinh nghiệm trong thiết kế và phát triển phần cứng nhúng. Có kinh nghiệm thiết kế schematic và PCB bằng Altium Designer, KiCad hoặc các công cụ tương đương. Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với MCU/SoC như STM32, ESP32 hoặc các nền tảng tương tự. Hiểu và sử dụng thành thạo các giao thức giao tiếp như UART, SPI, I2C, USB. Có kinh nghiệm debug phần cứng và sử dụng các thiết bị đo kiểm như Oscilloscope, Logic Analyzer. Có khả năng đọc hiểu datasheet, schematic và tài liệu kỹ thuật tiếng Anh. Nice-to-have Đã từng tham gia phát triển sản phẩm từ prototype đến production. Có kinh nghiệm với các sản phẩm IoT, wearable devices hoặc consumer electronics. Có kinh nghiệm tích hợp Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, RF hoặc camera modules. Hiểu biết về power management, battery systems và tối ưu năng lượng. Có kinh nghiệm làm việc với ODM/OEM hoặc các đối tác sản xuất. Why You'll Love Working Here Chính sách ESOP/cổ phần hấp dẫn ( 0.5% – 2% ) dành cho những thành viên gia nhập sớm và đóng góp vào sự phát triển của sản phẩm. Tham gia xây dựng sản phẩm AI Glasses thế hệ mới từ giai đoạn ý tưởng, prototype đến thương mại hóa. Trực tiếp làm việc cùng đội ngũ Product, AI và Firmware để phát triển một sản phẩm công nghệ có tác động thực tế đến người dùng. Cơ hội sở hữu và dẫn dắt toàn bộ vòng đời phát triển phần cứng của sản phẩm (end-to-end ownership). Được trao quyền quyết định về kiến trúc phần cứng, lựa chọn công nghệ và định hướng kỹ thuật cho sản phẩm. Cơ hội trở thành thành viên nòng cốt của công ty với lộ trình phát triển lên các vị trí Head of Hardware hoặc CTO trong tương lai. Làm việc trực tiếp với các đối tác ODM/OEM và nhà máy sản xuất để đưa sản phẩm từ prototype đến mass production. Môi trường startup năng động, tốc độ cao, hướng đến xây dựng sản phẩm công nghệ toàn cầu. Mức thu nhập cạnh tranh cùng các khoản thưởng dựa trên hiệu quả và kết quả kinh doanh. Nhiều cơ hội học hỏi, thử nghiệm công nghệ mới và tạo dấu ấn cá nhân trong quá trình xây dựng sản phẩm từ 0 → 1 .

title: Senior Developer
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job iDeaLogic is an IT Staffing company specializing in software and application development. We provide technology services that digitally transform our partners and generate business value. We are a Microsoft Gold Partner and are ISO 27001:2022 certified. We offer a comprehensive range of services, including staffing and technology consulting, software engineering, and ongoing support. We fully embrace the Agile software engineering principles and use SCRUM to manage projects. Our multidisciplinary expertise enables us to deliver innovative solutions that help our partners achieve their goals. Your Skills and Experience Core Engineering (Must Have) 5–8 years of software engineering experience, including at least 2 years of hands-on experience building AI-powered applications and integrating AI tools into development workflows. Strong proficiency in TypeScript/JavaScript and .NET. Solid experience with Microsoft Azure services, including App Services, Azure Functions, and Key Vault. Experience implementing CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps and/or GitHub Actions. AI & LLM Expertise (Must have) Hands-on experience with OpenAI or Azure OpenAI Service, including prompt design, embeddings, function calling, and streaming responses. Proven track record of developing AI-powered solutions such as chatbots, virtual assistants, or conversational applications. Experience with Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), semantic search, vector databases, and agent-based architectures. Strong prompt engineering skills, including structured prompting, few-shot prompting, evaluation techniques, and output optimization. AI Frameworks & Orchestration (Must have) Practical experience with AI orchestration frameworks such as Semantic Kernel, AutoGen, LangChain, LangGraph, or similar technologies. Experience designing and implementing multi-step AI workflows and agent-based systems. Familiarity with Azure AI Foundry or equivalent AI platforms (e.g., AWS Bedrock, Google Vertex AI), including prompt flows, model evaluation, and deployment workflows. Developer Tooling (Must Have) Experience using AI-assisted development tools such as GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, Cursor, OpenCode, or similar solutions. title: Product Manager (Product Owner)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Competitive salary based on ability. SHUI & PIT based on full paid salary. Mid-autumn gift, wedding & maternity bonus. The Job About Hotel Link Hotel Link builds cloud-based technology that helps independent hotels and accommodation providers manage and grow their business online. Our platform spans a Channel Manager (CM), Property Management System (PMS), Booking Engine, and integrated Payment capabilities, connecting properties to OTAs, distribution channels, and payment processing in a single ecosystem. About the Role We're hiring a Product Manager to own the discovery, definition, and delivery of features across one of our core product lines: Channel Manager, PMS, and Payments. You'll translate the operational realities of hoteliers into shipped product, working at the intersection of engineering, design, integrations partners (OTAs, payment gateways), and go-to-market teams. This is a hands-on execution role: you'll manage a backlog, write requirements, coordinate releases across a connected product suite, and measure outcomes. Responsibilities Own and prioritize the backlog for your product area (CM, PMS, or Payments), balancing hotelier needs, partner/channel requirements, and technical constraints. Write clear PRDs, user stories, and acceptance criteria, particularly for integration-heavy work where third-party API behavior (OTAs, payment processors) defines what's possible. Coordinate delivery across the product and engineering teams: tracking progress against the roadmap, surfacing risks early, and removing blockers to keep releases on schedule. (PM owns priorities and scope; engineering owns estimates and technical execution.) Drive alignment within the product team on your area: facilitating planning, keeping stakeholders in sync, and ensuring everyone is working from a single, current source of truth. Manage the full lifecycle of OTA and channel integrations (e.g., Booking.com, Expedia, Agoda) and payment gateway connections, working closely with partner technical contacts. Run agile ceremonies with engineering and triage bugs, sync issues, and partner-reported defects, which are frequent in distribution and payments. Conduct customer research with hoteliers and property managers; synthesize operational pain points (overbookings, rate parity, reconciliation, settlement) into product requirements. Define and track success metrics: channel connection health, booking sync reliability, payment authorization/settlement rates, PMS adoption, using analytics and direct data queries. Leverage AI tools throughout the product workflow — for research synthesis, PRD drafting, competitive analysis, data querying, prototyping, and accelerating routine product work. Coordinate cross-functional launches across support, onboarding, and regional sales teams, accounting for a geographically distributed, often non-technical customer base. Your Skills and Experience At least 2–3 years of product management experience. Demonstrated ownership of at least one feature or integration from definition through launch. Fluent English (written and spoken) is mandatory. You will work daily with international partners, OTA technical contacts, and a global customer base; precise communication is non-negotiable. Proven, hands-on proficiency with AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or equivalents) applied to real product work: research, writing, analysis, and prototyping. This is a hard requirement, not a nice-to-have. Comfort with data: defining metrics, basic analysis, and reading API logs/responses. SQL is a plus. Working knowledge of agile/scrum and tools such as Jira or Linear. Customer-centric mindset with evidence of conducting or contributing to user research. Preferred Qualifications Experience in hospitality technology, travel tech, OTA distribution, or payments. Familiarity with hotel distribution concepts: ARI (Availability, Rates, Inventory), rate plans, channel mapping, two-way sync, OTA messaging/booking APIs. Exposure to payment flows: tokenization, authorization, capture, refunds, settlement, chargebacks, and PCI considerations. Experience integrating AI into product features themselves (not just personal workflow) e.g., AI-assisted support, automation, or recommendations. Bachelor's degree in a technical, business, or hospitality field or equivalent practical experience. Why You'll Love Working Here Why You'll Love Working Here Competitive salary based on ability. 14 annual leaves in a year: 12 annual leaves + 1 day for birthday + 1 day on Christmas. Happy Hour every 4 weeks. Many parties: Badminton team, Mid-Autumn festival, Christmas Day, New Year…. SHUI & PIT based on full paid salary. Not OT, have time for yourself. Multi-national colleagues. Company trip every year. Many benefits: mid-autumn gift, wedding & maternity bonus. A laptop for work.

We are looking for a highly motivated and creative individual to join our team as a Junior Generative Game Artist . This is a fantastic entry-level opportunity to begin your career at the intersection of art and artificial intelligence. Learn Prompt Engineering: Under mentorship, you will learn and apply basic-to-intermediate prompt engineering techniques to generate images that align with the project's art style. Image Refinement and Cleanup: Use your Adobe Photoshop skills to perform essential post-production tasks, including cleaning up artifacts, making color corrections, compositing elements, and preparing AI-generated images for in-game use. Asset Management: Help organize, name, and maintain the growing library of AI-generated assets to ensure the team can access them easily. Experiment and Learn: Actively participate in training sessions and spend time experimenting with our suite of AI tools to develop your skills. Support the Team: Provide general support to the art department as needed, contributing to a positive and collaborative studio culture. Your Skills and Experience Passion for Art & AI: You must have a genuine interest in both digital art and the possibilities of generative AI. Photoshop Proficiency: Basic to intermediate proficiency in Adobe Photoshop, with a minimum of 6 to 12 months of consistent use for personal or academic projects. A Creative Portfolio: A portfolio is required, but professional experience is not. We want to see your potential! Please include any digital art, drawings, or personal projects made with AI tools (Midjourney, etc.) that showcase your creativity and artistic eye. Good Artistic Foundation: A basic understanding of composition, color, and lighting. Eagerness to Learn: A strong desire to be trained, listen to feedback, and rapidly develop new skills in a fast-paced environment. Good Communication Skills: Ability to communicate in English and/or Vietnamese within a team setting. Preferred Qualifications (Bonus Points) Experience with other digital art software like Clip Studio Paint, Procreate, etc. Personal experience creating a small game or mod. Familiarity with the basic concepts of 3D modeling (e.g., playing with Blender). Active participation in online art or AI art communities. Why You'll Love Working Here Gain hands-on experience with state-of-the-art automation and AI tools. Receive mentorship from industry-leading experts. Enjoy flexible working hours tailored to your schedule. Opportunity for a full-time role based on performance.

title: Senior PostgreSQL Platform Engineer
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Attractive Salary and Benefits Amazing Clients Product driven company The Job Job Summary: You'll own how the Orange Logic platform runs on PostgreSQL - the performance, scalability, and reliability of the database layer at the heart of our product. You'll join one of our Platform development teams and take strong ownership of execution. Specifically, you will: Own how our platform interacts with PostgreSQL: query and index design, schema design and versioned migrations, transaction and connection management, and continuous performance optimization. Design for scale — apply the right patterns (replication, partitioning, read distribution, connection pooling) to keep the database fast and reliable as load and tenancy grow. Make PostgreSQL reliable and reusable across the platform: running on Kubernetes, provisioned through infrastructure-as-code, and consumed cleanly by other engineering teams. Take on other high-priority platform work when it outranks the database stream. This is a platform engineering role, not a single-track one. Deliver well-tested, PR-quality work and review others', with AI coding agents as a core part of how you work. Your Skills and Experience The most successful candidates for this role will have: Required: Production experience with PostgreSQL — query optimization, EXPLAIN/ANALYZE, indexing, schema design, and diagnosing performance at the application boundary. Proven experience operating PostgreSQL at scale in production — multi-terabyte databases, sustaining thousands of transactions per second, and scaling read capacity with auto-scaling replicas — plus command of the patterns and tradeoffs behind it: partitioning, read distribution, replication/failover, and connection pooling options. 5+ years of professional backend engineering. Comfort in Kubernetes environments and with infrastructure-as-code. You're infra-aware, not a DBA. Demonstrated ability to use AI coding agents for feature- and bugfix-level work across a codebase — context preparation, agent direction, implementation review, testing, and PR-quality delivery. A track record of taking ownership and shipping under your own direction. Professional English, written and verbal — you'll work closely with our US-based teams. Bachelor's degree in a relevant field (Computer Science, Information Technology, or similar). A strong plus: Building internal platform or self-service capabilities — database-as-a-service, golden paths, and the telemetry/observability that makes them self-serve (metrics, slow-query insight, health and performance signals). Working within or extending a custom data-access layer or ORM internals. Experience with C#/.NET — our platform's stack. Why You'll Love Working Here You would love to work and find those values with us: Distributed decision making: We also allow each employee to directly weigh in on our priorities. Transparency: We value transparency, openness, and accountability, whether it is with our customers or internally. Meritocracy: Employee's recognition and advancement is based purely on their individual and collective achievements. Deep work: We do everything we can to let you focus deeply on your work. Our benefits include: Attractive salary package. 100% Gross Salary in the probation period. 13th-month salary. 18 days of annual leaves (cashback allowed if not used). 4 days for an overseas company trip. Multiple allowances (Lunch, Gym, Parking, Birthday/Tet/Wedding voucher... ). Full social, health, and unemployment insurance. Premium healthcare insurance for you and coverage for 1 extra family member. Monthly team-building activities (Bowling, Go-Kart, Candle Handmade workshop....) and special celebrations on Autumn Festival, Halloween, Christmas, Tet, … Monthly happy lunch and daily happy hours with free snacks, soft drinks, fruit, and coffee. Sports activities (PlayStation 5, Badminton, Football,...) Data Privacy Notice for Candidates in Vietnam: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that you have read and understood OL Vietnam’s Privacy Policy. Any consent provided herein is explicit and voluntary. Based on your consent, OL Vietnam will process your personal data for recruitment for the position you apply for, including evaluating your candidacy, communicating with you, and, where applicable, verifying relevant information as part of the selection process. If you would like OL Vietnam to consider you for future suitable roles, we will request your separate, explicit consent and you may withdraw consent at any time as described in the Privacy Policy. For details on how we handle your information, please refer to our Privacy Policy on OLVN Website. Please be aware: Orange Logic only communicates with candidates through official @orangelogic.com email addresses or via LinkedIn from a verified Orange Logic Talent Acquisition employee listed under “Meet the Hiring Team.” We do not conduct interviews via text message or request payment or equipment purchases at any stage of the hiring process.

title: [Remote] 3D Game Prototype Developer (Unity/English)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job We are looking for a Unity developer who can turn casual/hypercasual game ideas into playable 3D prototypes quickly, taking a concept to a testable build in days, not months. You'll work on fast iteration loops to validate the "fun factor" of mechanics similar to puzzle, sorting, merge, and arcade-style mobile games. RESPONSIBILITIES Rapidly build playable 3D game prototypes on Unity from concepts, references, or design briefs. Reproduce and adapt core gameplay mechanics from reference games to test new variations. Implement core loops, level systems, and basic UI fast, prioritizing playability over polish. Iterate quickly on mechanics, difficulty, and feel based on playtest feedback and metrics. Meet with the design team to scope ideas, clarify specifications, and propose technical approaches. Collaborate closely with Game Artists to integrate 3D assets, animations, and effects. Set up lightweight, reusable prototype templates and a development pipeline to speed up future projects. Write clean, efficient, and modular code that can be extended if a prototype gets greenlit. Ensure prototypes run smoothly on target mobile devices (stable framerate, reasonable load times). Identify and resolve gameplay bugs and performance bottlenecks quickly. Propose and implement technical solutions in a timely manner. Conduct white-box testing on prototype builds before handoff. Your Skills and Experience REQUIREMENT Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience). 2–4 years of experience as a Unity Developer, ideally including mobile game development. Hands-on experience building casual/hypercasual or puzzle-style games (a portfolio of prototypes or shipped titles is strongly preferred). Comfortable working in fast iteration cycles and an Agile/Scrum environment. Knowledge of AI-assisted development tools to accelerate coding. SKILLS Proficiency in C# and the Unity engine. Solid grasp of 3D fundamentals: scripting, physics, animation, materials/textures, GUI styles, and scene management. Ability to quickly reverse-engineer and reimplement gameplay mechanics from reference games. Skill in optimizing memory and performance for mobile devices. Ability to use AI tools effectively to improve productivity and development workflow. Good English reading and writing skills for collaboration in an international environment. ABILITIES Strong critical thinking and troubleshooting abilities. Ability to critically evaluate and adapt AI-generated solutions. A bias toward speed and experimentation, shipping a rough playable beats a perfect plan. Open-mindedness and willingness to learn and explore new technologies. Excellent attention to detail. Strong work ethic and trustworthiness. Why You'll Love Working Here Professional, creative working environment and talented teams; equal-opportunity & agile culture. Fully remote team, no traffic jam, no rigid office hours. Regular discussions and a chance to learn directly from experts in their fields. International exposure and real opportunity to grow.

title: Digital Business & Automation Specialist
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job We are looking for a hands-on Digital Business & Automation Specialist. This is not a narrow IT admin job, and it is not a pure marketing job. You will work across our websites and e-commerce, Microsoft 365 administration, branding support, product data, and AI-supported automation — building the digital backbone that makes us more professional, more efficient, and easier for customers to work with. You do not need to be an expert in every tool on day one. You do need to be practical, curious, organized, and able to take ownership. When something is broken, unclear, or manual, we expect you to figure it out, propose a solution, and build it — step by step, without waiting for detailed instructions. 1. E-commerce website & landing pages (~30%) Set up, maintain, and improve our e-commerce website for the German market: product pages, categories, technical specifications, downloadable datasheets, and inquiry/order flows Keep the shop compatible with 3PL logistics and warehouse fulfillment, coordinating with fulfillment partners Build and maintain landing pages for specific products, countries, and campaigns to generate qualified B2B inquiries Handle SEO basics, analytics and tracking, inquiry forms, and CRM/email workflow connections Run simple A/B tests and continuously improve conversion and usability 2. Automation, AI workflows & internal tools (~25%) Automate repetitive office, sales, marketing, and admin processes Connect tools such as website forms, email, CRM, spreadsheets, Odoo/ERP, file storage, and reporting systems Build simple apps, forms, dashboards, and internal workflows Use AI tools to speed up content creation, reporting, and document generation — with human judgment, not blind copy-paste Spot automation opportunities and implement them step by step 3. Microsoft 365 & general IT administration (~20%) Manage users, email accounts, groups, permissions, and security settings in Microsoft 365 Support Outlook, Teams, SharePoint, OneDrive, and related tools across the company Manage domains, website-related accounts, and admin access Help standardize digital file structures and internal access rights Handle day-to-day IT requests from management and team members 4. Branding, product data & sales material (~20%) Improve our professional image across websites, presentations, datasheets, catalogs, email templates, and digital communication Help build a consistent corporate design; coordinate with designers, freelancers, or agencies where needed Create and maintain product datasheets, descriptions, and technical data in a structured, reusable format Support the sales team with documents, templates, and product material — keeping technical accuracy first 5. Reporting, documentation & ongoing improvement (~5%) Document what you build so others can use and maintain it Report on website performance, inbound inquiries, and automation results Suggest and prioritize the next improvements How we will measure success No pressure to deliver everything at once — we will grow into this together. Over your first 6–12 months, we would like to see progress like: The German e-commerce website takes shape and starts producing B2B inquiries or orders Landing pages begin generating qualified inbound inquiries Microsoft 365 becomes cleaner and better organized step by step Some manual processes get automated, saving real time Customer-facing material becomes more consistent and professional Your Skills and Experience What you should bring You do not need years of professional experience. This role is also open to motivated beginners who can show real drive and practical skills — personal projects, studies, or first work experience all count. A real interest in websites, e-commerce, and digital tools — with some first hands-on experience (e.g., WordPress, Shopify, or your own projects) Curiosity about AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or similar) and openness to using them in daily work Motivation to learn new tools quickly and figure things out on your own A sense for structure, tidy layouts, and professional presentation Care with details, data, and anything customers will see Reliability and open, friendly communication Good written and spoken English Nice-to-have None of these are required — any of them is a bonus: German language skills (we are building a shop for the German market) Basic HTML/CSS First experience with SEO, Google Analytics, or Search Console Microsoft 365 administration, Power Automate, or Power Apps Automation tools like Zapier or Make.com CRM or Odoo/ERP experience Design tools: Canva, Figma, Adobe, PowerPoint Interest in technical B2B products — telecom, cabling, or networking Why You'll Love Working Here A relaxed, friendly atmosphere in a small international team You work from our office, with the flexibility to also work from home A short weekly team meeting to align priorities — beyond that, you organize your own work Room to try things, learn new tools, and grow with the role
