title: Remote Senior Software Engineer (Production Support)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Friendly-Relaxed environment Be a part of fast growing dynamic team in Vietnam Opportunity for professional development The Job Who We Are Cloud Kinetix is proud to be the technology hub for a U.S.-based healthcare company pioneering software solutions for individuals with autism spectrum disorder (ASD) and intellectual developmental disabilities (IDD). Together, we build meaningful products that power a better, more inclusive future. With a lean and focused engineering team in Vietnam, we work directly with product and engineering leaders in the U.S. to create smart, secure, and scalable clinical platforms. At Cloud Kinetix, we believe that the best technology doesn’t just power systems—it empowers people. Why Cloud Kinetix Meaningful Mission: Our products support clinicians, caregivers, and families across the United States. Every feature we build has a direct impact on improving lives. Product-Focused Engineering : We build and own products, not projects. Engineers are encouraged to think beyond implementation and contribute to business outcomes. Direct Access to Decision Makers: Work closely with U.S.-based engineering and product leaders in a highly collaborative environment. High Ownership Culture: We trust our engineers to make decisions, solve problems, and drive improvements. Remote Flexibility: Work remotely while collaborating with a global team and modern engineering practices. The Role We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer who enjoys both building software and solving complex production challenges. This role combines software development with production ownership. Approximately 70% of your time will focus on development , delivering new features, platform improvements, and technical enhancements. The remaining 30% will focus on production support , troubleshooting issues, investigating incidents, and ensuring a reliable experience for users. Because this role works closely with our U.S.-based team, need strong English communication skills and the ability to collaborate during overlapping U.S. business hours are essential. We are looking for someone who can quickly understand systems, identify root causes, communicate effectively with stakeholders, and take ownership until problems are fully resolved. Key Responsibilities: Software Development (70%) Design, develop, test, and maintain scalable software solutions. Build new features and enhance existing products. Participate in technical design and architecture discussions. Write clean, maintainable, and well-tested code. Review code and contribute to engineering best practices. Collaborate closely with Product Managers, Designers, and Engineers to deliver high-quality solutions. Continuously improve application performance, reliability, and scalability. Production Support & Troubleshooting (30%) Investigate and resolve production issues impacting users and business operations. Perform root cause analysis and implement long-term solutions. Analyze application logs, system behavior, database records, and performance metrics. Work directly with U.S.-based stakeholders to diagnose and resolve incidents. Support critical business applications and ensure platform stability. Contribute to monitoring, alerting, and operational improvements. Take ownership of incidents and drive resolution with urgency and professionalism. Your Skills and Experience Must-Have Qualifications up to 5+ years of professional software development experience . Strong experience building and maintaining production-grade applications. Excellent English communication skills, both spoken and written. Comfortable communicating directly with U.S.-based stakeholders. Strong troubleshooting, debugging, and analytical problem-solving skills. Experience investigating and resolving production issues in live systems. Ability to quickly understand complex applications, workflows, and system architecture. Strong sense of ownership and accountability. Ability to work independently and make sound technical decisions. Comfortable working during overlapping U.S. business hours. Available to start work from 7:00 PM Vietnam Time on a regular basis. Preferred Qualifications Experience working in SaaS, Healthcare Technology, FinTech, or Product companies. Experience supporting customer-facing applications in production environments. Familiarity with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud. Experience with monitoring, logging, and observability tools. Experience working with distributed international teams. What We’re Looking For The ideal candidate is someone who: Can confidently troubleshoot production issues without waiting for detailed instructions. Understands how software behaves in real-world environments. Communicates effectively during high-priority incidents. Takes ownership of problems and follows them through to completion. Enjoys both building new features and improving operational reliability. Thrives in a fast-paced product environment. 📍 Remote – Hcmc Vietnam Office Day: Every Monday | Remote for the remaining weekdays ⏰ => => Working Hours: Starting from 7:00 PM (Vietnam Time) Why You'll Love Working Here 💻 Top-tier Equipment – MacBook Pro and premium working setup provided 🌎 Global Collaboration – Work directly with U.S.-based product and engineering leaders 🚀 Meaningful Impact – Build technology that improves the lives of individuals and families in the ASD & IDD communities 💰 Performance-Driven Rewards – 12-month salary package, annual salary reviews, and discretionary performance bonuses based on individual contributions and company performance 💯 Full Salary During Probation 🏡 Remote-First Working Environment – Work from anywhere in Vietnam while staying connected with a global team 📈 High Ownership & Career Growth – Opportunity to influence technical decisions, platform reliability, and product direction 🤝 Supportive Engineering Culture – Collaborate with talented teammates who value ownership, quality, and continuous learning Be Part of Something Bigger At CloudKinetix, you're not just writing code. You're helping build technology that empowers healthcare professionals and improves the lives of thousands of individuals and families. If you're passionate about software engineering, production excellence, and solving meaningful challenges, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Scrum Master/ Scrum Coach
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Môi trường đẩy nhanh phát triển năng lực Nơi quy tụ nhân tài người Việt trên toàn cầu Văn hóa thành công, đề cao sáng kiến The Job ABOUT ONE MOUNT One Mount is Vietnam's largest technological ecosystem that creates solutions along the entire value chain, starting with retail, distribution, real estate, and financial services. Our mission is to build Vietnam's most trusted ecosystem, empowering all people and businesses to realize their full potential at the intersection of technology and humanity. The Senior Scrum Master/Scrum Coach operates as a delivery enabler and transformation partner , supporting multiple teams and complex product environments. Beyond facilitating Agile practices, this role is responsible for: Optimizing end-to-end workflow and delivery predictability Removing systemic bottlenecks across teams and departments Enabling teams to operate effectively in a technology- and AI-enabled environment Contributing to the evolution of Ways of Working across the organization This role requires a shift from team-level facilitation to system-level impact. 1. Delivery Flow & Product Execution: Guide Product Owners and teams in managing Product Backlogs in complex, multi-product environments Support definition and alignment of Product Vision and Product Goals Improve flow of work across teams (planning, execution, delivery) Support roadmap clarity and delivery predictability Actively monitor and improve: lead time, throughput, delivery reliability 2. Cross-Team Coordination & System Optimization: Facilitate alignment across teams and departments Identify and resolve inter-team dependencies and bottlenecks Support coordination of large releases spanning multiple teams Ensure transparency of risks, assumptions, and constraints Shift focus from local optimization to system-wide performance 3. Agile Coaching & Team Enablement Coach teams to become self-organized, outcome-driven, and continuously improving Support adoption of Agile mindset and practices in a pragmatic way Enable teams to: Slice work effectively Manage commitments realistically Improve collaboration and feedback loops Reduce reliance on manual facilitation by promoting team ownership 4. Evolving Ways of Working: Contribute to the continuous improvement of Ways of Working at team, program, and organizational levels Support adoption of: Modern delivery practices Automation and AI-enabled workflows where relevant Ensure that increased speed does not compromise: Engineering quality, Risk management, Sustainability 5. Coaching & Capability Development: Mentor and support Junior Scrum Masters/Agile practitioners Provide coaching beyond teams, including: Product Owners, Delivery leaders Share best practices and contribute to internal capability buildingn. Your Skills and Experience Minimum 4-5 years of experience working as a Scrum Master, with at least 2 years working with multi-teams or large programs/products. Advanced Scrum Master Certification (e.g., PSM II, A-CSM) or specialized Scaling Agile certifications (e.g., SAFe SM, LeSS, Nexus) are required. Experience in participating in creating documentation and organizing internal training programs on Agile/Scrum. Jira Proficiency: Expert in managing backlogs, sprints, velocity, and progress reports (including Burndown, Control Chart, and CFD). Jira Customization: Capable of customizing workflows, setting up automation rules, and building filters/dashboards for risk detection and tracking. Confluence Expertise: Skilled in using Confluence for team documentation, recording decisions, and capturing process improvements (e.g., retrospectives). In-depth Coaching and Mentoring skills for individuals and other Scrum Masters. Servant Leadership and Change Management skills. Excellent communication and negotiation skills at the departmental/organizational level. Why You'll Love Working Here Salary & Allowances 13-month salary with annual performance bonus, project incentives, sales incentives (based on position) Lunch allowance: 730.000 VND/month Special occasion bonus: 3.000.000 - 5.000.000 VND/year Annual leaves: Up to 20 days/year (based on levels) Health: Social insurance, premium health insurance, yearly health check Laptop, screen and other needed facilities/accounts/tools for work Career Growth Yearly salary review and promotion. Diverse career path: Management or Expert and functions rotation opportunity. Free learning sources in Udemy, Coursera, O'relly platforms; internal workshop, certification sponsorship. Recognition and awards at team and organizational levels. Grow your career with opportunities across the dynamic ecosystem of Techcombank & Masterise Group. Access special loan offers with competitive interest rates and flexible grace period options tailored to your financial needs. Working Environment Open & collaborative working space fosters both individual focus and teamwork activities Young, dynamic, and collaborative working atmosphere Unwind zones: gaming, table tennis, yoga, gyms, bath rooms. Personal lockers with QR code access. Quarterly/yearly teambuilding & engaged internal events.

title: Senior Project Manager (Agile/Scrum, Jira)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job Role Overview We are looking for an experienced Senior Project Manager to lead the end-to-end delivery of complex, technology-driven projects across our global client portfolio. Working time: Monday to Friday, 14:00-23:00 Start date: ASAP Engagement: Long-term Language: English professional mandatory Your Skills and Experience Required Skills & Qualifications 10+ years of experience in project management, with proven success delivering large-scale technology projects. Strong hands-on experience with project management tools: MS Project, JIRA, Asana, Confluence, SharePoint. Solid product management skills — defining strategy, roadmap creation, persona definition, and feature prioritization. Deep understanding of agile/scrum methodologies, sprint planning, backlog grooming, and release management. Experience managing projects across multiple technology stacks (e.g., React, Node.js, .NET, mobile, cloud). Excellent stakeholder management, communication, and presentation skills. Strong analytical mindset with experience using tools such as Google Analytics or Hotjar for data-driven decision making. Proven ability to lead cross-functional and offshore teams in a globally distributed environment. Preferred Qualifications Experience delivering projects in fintech, banking, retail, or enterprise SaaS domains. Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) and modern microservices architectures. Exposure to UX research, design thinking, and prototyping cycles. PMP, PMI-ACP, CSM, or equivalent certifications. Education Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related discipline (required). MBA or equivalent post-graduate qualification preferred. This role requires someone who understands software development environments, can communicate effectively with technical teams, and actively drives delivery rather than simply coordinating meetings or passing information between stakeholders. The ideal candidate is proactive, highly organized, technically aware, and comfortable supporting multiple teams simultaneously. Key Responsibilities Facilitate Scrum ceremonies including Sprint Planning, Daily Standups, Sprint Reviews, and Retrospectives. Support and coordinate 2–3 Agile development teams simultaneously. Drive Agile best practices and continuous improvement initiatives. Identify, track, and remove impediments that affect team productivity and delivery. Collaborate closely with Product Owners, Engineering Leads, Developers, QA Engineers, and business stakeholders. Ensure effective communication and alignment across teams and stakeholders. Monitor sprint progress, delivery commitments, dependencies, and risks. Help teams improve planning, estimation, prioritization, and execution practices. Coach team members on Agile principles and foster a culture of accountability and ownership. Provide transparency into project status and delivery outcomes. Your Skills and Experience Must-Have Qualifications 5+ years of proven experience as a Scrum Master in software development environments. Strong knowledge of Agile methodologies and Scrum practices. Need excellent English communication skills, both written and spoken. Good understanding of software development processes and technical concepts. Ability to understand engineering discussions and work effectively with technical teams. Experience supporting multiple teams or projects simultaneously. Strong stakeholder management, facilitation, and problem-solving skills. Self-motivated, proactive, and highly accountable. Comfortable working in a dynamic, fast-paced environment. Willing and able to work from 6:00 AM Vietnam Time . Preferred Qualifications Scrum certifications such as PSM, CSM, or equivalent. Experience working with distributed or international teams. Experience in healthcare technology, SaaS, or product development environments. Familiarity with Jira, Confluence, and Agile project management tools. Experience coaching teams through Agile transformation or process improvement initiatives. 📍 Hybrid – Ho Chi Minh City, Vietnam Office Day: Every Monday | Remote flexibility for the remaining weekdays ⏰ Working Hours: Starting from 6:00 AM (Vietnam Time) Why You'll Love Working Here 💻 Top-tier Equipment – MacBook Pro and premium working setup provided 🌎 Global Collaboration – Work directly with U.S.-based product and engineering leaders 🚀 Meaningful Impact – Help build solutions that improve the lives of individuals and families in the ASD & IDD communities 💰 Performance-Driven Rewards – 12-month salary package, annual salary reviews, and discretionary performance bonuses based on individual contributions and company performance 💯 Full Salary During Probation 🏡 Flexible Hybrid Model – Office collaboration every Monday, remote flexibility for the rest of the week 📈 Growth & Ownership – High-impact role with opportunities to influence delivery practices and team success 🤝 Supportive Culture – Work alongside talented professionals in a collaborative and mission-driven environment Be Part of Something Bigger At CloudKinetix, you're not just managing Agile processes. You're helping teams build technology that makes a meaningful difference in people's lives. If you're passionate about Agile delivery, team empowerment, and creating real-world impact through technology, we'd love to hear from you.

title: Project Manager (Agile, Scrum)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Cơ hội nghiên cứu và phát triển công nghệ mới. Môi trường làm việc trẻ trung, năng động Chế độ lương, thưởng theo năng lực và năng suất The Job Chịu trách nhiệm tổ chức thực hiện hoàn thành các dự án trong thời gian và ngân sách phê duyệt. Chịu trách nhiệm theo dõi và thống kê tiến độ của dự án, chuẩn bị số liệu và lập báo cáo về tình trạng các dự án. Phối hợp với đội ngũ kinh doanh để giới thiệu sản phẩm/ dịch vụ đang phụ trách đến khách hàng. Làm việc với khách hàng xác định phạm vi công việc , thời gian và ngân sách. Chuẩn bị các nguồn lực để thực thi dự án. Đảm bảo rằng tất cả các dự án được thực hiện đúng hạn với phạm vi công việc và ngân sách phê duyệt. Lập kế hoạch chi tiết thực hiện dự án, theo dõi và cập nhật tiến trình dự án. Quản lý các thay đổi phạm vi, chi phí và lịch trình dự án. Kiểm tra chất lượng công việc của dự án. Phân công, theo dõi và kiểm tra kết quả công việc, lập báo cáo đánh giá, đo lường năng suất các thành viên. Quản lý các rủi ro và cảnh báo các rủi ro của các dự án cho quản lý khi cần thiết. Xây dựng mối quan hệ với khách hàng để kết nối và trao đổi công việc giữa đội dự án với khách hàng được diễn ra thuận lợi. Thiết lập và đảm bảo dự án tuân thủ đầy đủ quy định của công ty. Gửi báo cáo tuần, báo cáo định kỳ về tình hình dự án cho quản lý và khách hàng. Có kế hoạch đào tạo phát triển kiến thức kỹ năng cho các thành viên. Your Skills and Experience Tốt nghiệp Đại Học chuyên ngành CNTT, hệ thống thông tin hoặc tin học quản lý. Có ít nhất 2 năm kinh nghiệm về mô hình phát triển dự án theo phương pháp Agile (như Scrum). Tối thiểu 3 năm kinh nghiệm với vai trò quản lý dự án phát triển phần mềm. Có 2-3 năm kinh nghiệm về lập trình ứng dụng trên công nghệ .Net. Kỹ năng quản lý cuộc họp và Kỹ năng thuyết trình. Kỹ năng Lãnh đạo nhóm, Tư duy logic tốt. Kỹ năng phân tích, tổng hợp, ̣đánh giá, lập kế hoạch và giải quyết vấn đề. Khả năng Quản lý nhân viên theo hiệu quả công việc. Có tinh thần trách nhiệm cao và chủ động trong công việc Có thể làm việc dưới áp lực lớn & khả năng giao tiếp khéo léo, cởi mở. Là người linh hoạt và không định kiến. Why You'll Love Working Here Thử việc: 60 ngày Thời gian làm việc: Thứ 2 đến thứ 6 Đồng nghiệp: Cởi mở, hòa động, sẵn sàng hỗ trợ đồng nghiệp Ngày nghỉ: Thứ 7, Chủ nhật Phúc lợi: - Thưởng và lương tháng 13 - BHXH, BHYT và BHTN theo quy định BLLĐ. Bảo hiểm sức khoẻ của Bảo Việt. Phụ cấp thâm niên. Mức lương cạnh tranh dựa trên năng lực nhân viên. Thưởng THÁNG/QUÝ/NĂM theo mức độ hoàn thành chỉ tiêu năng suất (KPRI) được giao. Lương tháng 13, thưởng trong tất cả các ngày Lễ - Tết, thưởng dự án, ... Hệ thống phụ cấp hấp dẫn như: thâm niên, chứng chỉ văn bằng, hỗ trợ khách hàng … Ngoài chế độ bảo hiểm theo quy định BLLĐ, còn có chính sách bảo hiểm sức khỏe dành cho nhân viên làm việc từ 1 năm trở lên tại Công ty. Chế độ nghỉ mát, khám sức khỏe định kỳ, sinh nhật nhân viên, ... cho toàn thể nhân viên. Môi trường làm việc trẻ trung, năng động, và nhiều cơ hội thăng tiến trong công việc.

title: IT Project Manager / Technical PM (Agile/ Scrum)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us The Job Quản lý vòng đời dự án (End-to-End): Chịu trách nhiệm lập kế hoạch, định nghĩa phạm vi dự án (Scope), quản lý tiến độ, ngân sách và nguồn lực để triển khai các dự án phần mềm, hệ thống tích hợp AI từ giai đoạn khởi tạo đến khi bàn giao (Go-live). Điều phối và kết nối đội ngũ: Là cầu nối truyền đạt yêu cầu nghiệp vụ từ phía Ban giám đốc/Khách hàng thành các task kỹ thuật cụ thể cho team Product và Tech (LLM Engineers, DevOps, Front-end, Backend). Tổ chức và điều phối các buổi họp hàng ngày/hàng tuần (Daily Stand-up, Sprint Planning) theo mô hình Agile/Scrum. Quản trị rủi ro & Chất lượng: Chủ động nhận diện các rủi ro kỹ thuật, thắt nút cổ chai (Bottlenecks) hoặc nguy cơ chậm tiến độ để đưa ra giải pháp xử lý kịp thời. Đảm bảo chất lượng sản phẩm đầu ra đáp ứng đúng các tiêu chuẩn kỹ thuật và trải nghiệm người dùng (QA/QC). Báo cáo & Tài liệu hóa: Theo dõi hiệu suất dự án qua các chỉ số kỹ thuật, lập tài liệu quản lý dự án đầy đủ và báo cáo tiến độ định kỳ cho các Quản lý cấp cao (Sếp nước ngoài). Your Skills and Experience Kinh nghiệm: Tối thiểu 3 năm làm việc ở vị trí IT Project Manager, Technical PM hoặc Scrum Master trong các công ty phát triển phần mềm (Software Development/Outsourcing) hoặc công ty sản xuất sản phẩm công nghệ (Product). Chuyên môn kỹ thuật: Có nền tảng kỹ thuật tốt (Ưu tiên ứng viên từng là Developer/Tester đi lên). Thành thạo quy trình phát triển phần mềm (SDLC) và các phương pháp luận Agile/Scrum. Sử dụng thành thạo các công cụ quản lý dự án công nghệ: Jira, Confluence, Trello, Asana... Ngoại ngữ: Tiếng Anh giao tiếp tốt (Nghe, nói, đọc, viết thành thạo để làm việc trong môi trường quốc tế, báo cáo trực tiếp với sếp nước ngoài). Biết tiếng Trung là điểm cộng lớn. Kỹ năng mềm: Kỹ năng giải quyết vấn đề xuất sắc, tư duy logic, khả năng đàm phán và kết nối con người tốt dưới áp lực cao. Why You'll Love Working Here Mức lương cạnh tranh, tương xứng tối đa với năng lực và kinh nghiệm thực chiến. Cơ hội dẫn dắt các siêu dự án công nghệ cao, đón đầu làn sóng Generative AI toàn cầu. Môi trường làm việc quốc tế chuyên nghiệp, đa văn hóa. Đầy đủ các chế độ phúc lợi: BHXH, BHYT, lương tháng 13, thưởng hiệu suất năm.

title: ICT Project Manager (Waterfall, Agile, Scrum, English)
description: Top 3 Reasons To Join Us Opportunity to work with many big systems Long-term career development in full-stack Professional working environment The Job The Project Manager oversees the planning, implementation, and tracking of assigned projects which has a beginning, an end and specified deliverables. Key Roles & Responsibilities Project Ensure that all projects are delivered on-time, within scope, within budget and at the required level of quality. Developing project scopes and objectives, involving all relevant stakeholders and ensuring technical feasibility. Coordinate with User and Technical team to prepare request for proposal, evaluate vendor's solution Ensure resource (time, money, equipment, etc.) availability and allocation. Develop a detailed project plan to track progress. Use appropriate verification techniques to manage changes in project scope, schedule and costs. Measure project performance using appropriate systems, tools and techniques. Perform risk management to minimize project risks. Create and maintain comprehensive project documentation. Ensure projects are followed company’s standard, policies. Process Coordinate internal resources and third parties/vendors for the flawless execution of projects. Manage the relationship with all internal stakeholders and third parties/vendors. Report and escalate to management if needed. Other tasks assigned by line manager, department head, division head. Your Skills and Experience 1. Qualification Bachelor’s Degree majored in Information Technology (Master’s degree is a plus). 2. Work Experience At least 5 years of working experience as a project manager (both Waterfall and Agile methodology) in information technology PMP/Agile Scrum Master certification is a plus Have experience on Finance/Banking sector is a plus Experience in software application project. 3. Knowledge Have knowledge on application development, application support, mobile application is a plus. Have some knowledges on PL/SQL. Knowledge on Infrastructures, networking, security is a plus Strong working knowledge of Microsoft Office. 4. Skills Risk management Strong application management/analysis background, especially experience in financial service applications Solid organizational skills including attention to detail and multi-tasking skills Communication, trouble shooting, root cause analysis Relationship management, negotiation, leadership, teamwork Manage the relationship with all internal stakeholders and third parties/vendors Critical thinking/teamwork & motivation Good collaboration English communication in advanced (written & verbal). Why You'll Love Working Here Challenging finance projects with big architecture / systems Professional training programs Attractive salary and bonus Social insurance Premium health insurance Overseas / Vietnam company trip Engagement and outdoor activities (birthday, football, charity etc) Friendly and dynamic working environment
